authors_text: Hong Liu,Zhijian Ou,Yi Huang,Junlan Feng
title: Jointly Reinforced User Simulator and Task-oriented Dialog System with Simplified Generative Architecture
title_zh: 具有简化生成架构的联合增强的用户模拟器和面向任务的对话系统
comment: An early version of Markovian Generative Architectures (MGA) and Generative User Simulator (GUS)
comments: An early version of Markovian Generative Architectures (MGA) and Generative User Simulator (GUS)
abstract: Recently, there has been progress in supervised funetuning pretrained GPT-2 to build end-to-end task-oriented dialog (TOD) systems. However, online reinforcement learning of a GPT-2 based dialog system (DS), together with a end-to-end user simulator (US), has not ever been explored. Moreover, a drawback with existing GPT-2 based TOD systems is that they mostly employ the whole dialog history as input, which brings inefficiencies in memory and compute. In this paper, we first propose Simplified Generative Architectures (SGA) for DS and US respectively, both based on GPT-2 but using shortened history. Then, we successfully develop Jointly Reinforced US and DS, called SGA-JRUD. Our DS with the proposed SGA, when only supervised trained, achieves state-of-the-art performance on MultiWOZ2.1 and is more compute-efficient in both training and generation. Extensive experiments on MultiWOZ2.1 further show the superiority of SGA-JRUD in both offline and online evaluations.
summary: Recently, there has been progress in supervised funetuning pretrained GPT-2 to build end-to-end task-oriented dialog (TOD) systems. However, online reinforcement learning of a GPT-2 based dialog system (DS), together with a end-to-end user simulator (US), has not ever been explored. Moreover, a drawback with existing GPT-2 based TOD systems is that they mostly employ the whole dialog history as input, which brings inefficiencies in memory and compute. In this paper, we first propose Simplified Generative Architectures (SGA) for DS and US respectively, both based on GPT-2 but using shortened history. Then, we successfully develop Jointly Reinforced US and DS, called SGA-JRUD. Our DS with the proposed SGA, when only supervised trained, achieves state-of-the-art performance on MultiWOZ2.1 and is more compute-efficient in both training and generation. Extensive experiments on MultiWOZ2.1 further show the superiority of SGA-JRUD in both offline and online evaluations.
abstract_zh: 最近，在有监督的函数调整预训练 GPT-2 方面取得了进展，以构建端到端的面向任务的对话 (TOD) 系统。然而，基于 GPT-2 的对话系统 (DS) 以及端到端用户模拟器 (US) 的在线强化学习尚未被探索过。此外，现有基于 GPT-2 的 TOD 系统的一个缺点是它们大多采用整个对话历史记录作为输入，这导致内存和计算效率低下。在本文中，我们首先分别为 DS 和 US 提出了简化生成架构（SGA），两者都基于 GPT-2 但使用缩短的历史记录。随后，我们成功开发了US和DS联合增强型，称为SGA-JRUD。我们的 DS 与所提出的 SGA 在仅进行监督训练时，在 MultiWOZ2.1 上实现了最先进的性能，并且在训练和生成方面都具有更高的计算效率。 MultiWOZ2.1上的大量实验进一步证明了SGA-JRUD在离线和在线评估中的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合简化生成架构的联合强化用户模拟器和任务导向对话系统，以提高计算效率和对话性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于GPT-2的任务导向对话系统存在内存和计算效率低的问题，且未探索在线强化学习与端到端用户模拟器的联合优化。
AI.method: 设计简化生成架构（SGA）缩短对话历史输入，开发联合强化的用户模拟器与对话系统SGA-JRUD，实现端到端训练与优化。
AI.result: SGA架构在MultiWOZ2.1数据集上达到SOTA性能，计算效率显著提升；SGA-JRUD在离线和在线评估中均表现优越。
AI.conclusion: 简化生成架构与联合强化方法有效平衡了效率与性能，为任务导向对话系统提供了新方向。

search_text: Jointly Reinforced User Simulator and Task-oriented Dialog System with Simplified Generative Architecture 具有简化生成架构的联合增强的用户模拟器和面向任务的对话系统 Recently, there has been progress in supervised funetuning pretrained GPT-2 to build end-to-end task-oriented dialog (TOD) systems. However, online reinforcement learning of a GPT-2 based dialog system (DS), together with a end-to-end user simulator (US), has not ever been explored. Moreover, a drawback with existing GPT-2 based TOD systems is that they mostly employ the whole dialog history as input, which brings inefficiencies in memory and compute. In this paper, we first propose Simplified Generative Architectures (SGA) for DS and US respectively, both based on GPT-2 but using shortened history. Then, we successfully develop Jointly Reinforced US and DS, called SGA-JRUD. Our DS with the proposed SGA, when only supervised trained, achieves state-of-the-art performance on MultiWOZ2.1 and is more compute-efficient in both training and generation. Extensive experiments on MultiWOZ2.1 further show the superiority of SGA-JRUD in both offline and online evaluations. 最近，在有监督的函数调整预训练 GPT-2 方面取得了进展，以构建端到端的面向任务的对话 (TOD) 系统。然而，基于 GPT-2 的对话系统 (DS) 以及端到端用户模拟器 (US) 的在线强化学习尚未被探索过。此外，现有基于 GPT-2 的 TOD 系统的一个缺点是它们大多采用整个对话历史记录作为输入，这导致内存和计算效率低下。在本文中，我们首先分别为 DS 和 US 提出了简化生成架构（SGA），两者都基于 GPT-2 但使用缩短的历史记录。随后，我们成功开发了US和DS联合增强型，称为SGA-JRUD。我们的 DS 与所提出的 SGA 在仅进行监督训练时，在 MultiWOZ2.1 上实现了最先进的性能，并且在训练和生成方面都具有更高的计算效率。 MultiWOZ2.1上的大量实验进一步证明了SGA-JRUD在离线和在线评估中的优越性。 本文提出一种结合简化生成架构的联合强化用户模拟器和任务导向对话系统，以提高计算效率和对话性能。 Hong Liu,Zhijian Ou,Yi Huang,Junlan Feng cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Satyen Kale,Jason D. Lee,Chris De Sa,Ayush Sekhari,Karthik Sridharan
title: From Gradient Flow on Population Loss to Learning with Stochastic Gradient Descent
title_zh: 从种群损失的梯度流到随机梯度下降学习
abstract: Stochastic Gradient Descent (SGD) has been the method of choice for learning large-scale non-convex models. While a general analysis of when SGD works has been elusive, there has been a lot of recent progress in understanding the convergence of Gradient Flow (GF) on the population loss, partly due to the simplicity that a continuous-time analysis buys us. An overarching theme of our paper is providing general conditions under which SGD converges, assuming that GF on the population loss converges. Our main tool to establish this connection is a general converse Lyapunov like theorem, which implies the existence of a Lyapunov potential under mild assumptions on the rates of convergence of GF. In fact, using these potentials, we show a one-to-one correspondence between rates of convergence of GF and geometrical properties of the underlying objective. When these potentials further satisfy certain self-bounding properties, we show that they can be used to provide a convergence guarantee for Gradient Descent (GD) and SGD (even when the paths of GF and GD/SGD are quite far apart). It turns out that these self-bounding assumptions are in a sense also necessary for GD/SGD to work. Using our framework, we provide a unified analysis for GD/SGD not only for classical settings like convex losses, or objectives that satisfy PL / KL properties, but also for more complex problems including Phase Retrieval and Matrix sq-root, and extending the results in the recent work of Chatterjee 2022.
summary: Stochastic Gradient Descent (SGD) has been the method of choice for learning large-scale non-convex models. While a general analysis of when SGD works has been elusive, there has been a lot of recent progress in understanding the convergence of Gradient Flow (GF) on the population loss, partly due to the simplicity that a continuous-time analysis buys us. An overarching theme of our paper is providing general conditions under which SGD converges, assuming that GF on the population loss converges. Our main tool to establish this connection is a general converse Lyapunov like theorem, which implies the existence of a Lyapunov potential under mild assumptions on the rates of convergence of GF. In fact, using these potentials, we show a one-to-one correspondence between rates of convergence of GF and geometrical properties of the underlying objective. When these potentials further satisfy certain self-bounding properties, we show that they can be used to provide a convergence guarantee for Gradient Descent (GD) and SGD (even when the paths of GF and GD/SGD are quite far apart). It turns out that these self-bounding assumptions are in a sense also necessary for GD/SGD to work. Using our framework, we provide a unified analysis for GD/SGD not only for classical settings like convex losses, or objectives that satisfy PL / KL properties, but also for more complex problems including Phase Retrieval and Matrix sq-root, and extending the results in the recent work of Chatterjee 2022.
abstract_zh: 随机梯度下降（SGD）一直是学习大规模非凸模型的首选方法。虽然对 SGD 何时起作用的一般分析一直难以捉摸，但最近在理解梯度流 (GF) 对人口损失的收敛性方面取得了很多进展，部分原因是连续时间分析为我们带来了简单性。我们论文的一个首要主题是提供 SGD 收敛的一般条件，假设人口损失的 GF 收敛。我们建立这种联系的主要工具是一般逆李雅普诺夫定理，这意味着在 GF 收敛率的温和假设下存在李雅普诺夫势。事实上，利用这些势，我们展示了 GF 收敛速度和底层目标的几何特性之间的一一对应关系。当这些势进一步满足某些自限性质时，我们证明它们可以用来为梯度下降（GD）和SGD提供收敛保证（即使当GF和GD/SGD的路径相距很远时）。事实证明，这些自我约束的假设在某种意义上也是 GD/SGD 发挥作用所必需的。使用我们的框架，我们不仅可以为凸损失等经典设置或满足 PL / KL 属性的目标提供 GD/SGD 的统一分析，还可以为包括相位检索和矩阵平方根在内的更复杂的问题提供统一的分析，并扩展 Chatterjee 2022 最近工作中的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了梯度流（GF）在人口损失上的收敛性与随机梯度下降（SGD）收敛之间的关系，提出了一般条件并建立理论框架。
AI.motivation: SGD在非凸模型中广泛应用，但其收敛性分析困难；GF的连续时间分析更简单，但需将其与SGD的离散行为关联以指导实际应用。
AI.method: 通过逆Lyapunov定理推导Lyapunov势的存在，建立GF收敛速率与目标函数几何性质的对应关系，并利用自界条件提供GD/SGD的收敛保证。
AI.result: 统一分析了GD/SGD在凸损失、PL/KL条件及复杂问题（如相位恢复）的收敛性，扩展了Chatterjee 2022的结果，揭示了自界条件的必要性。
AI.conclusion: 框架揭示了GF与SGD收敛的深层联系，为多场景优化提供了理论支持，明确了自界条件在算法有效性中的关键作用。

authors_text: Hadi M. Dolatabadi,Sarah Erfani,Christopher Leckie
title: COLLIDER: A Robust Training Framework for Backdoor Data
title_zh: COLLIDER：后门数据的稳健训练框架
comment: Accepted to the 16th Asian Conference on Computer Vision (ACCV 2022)
comments: Accepted to the 16th Asian Conference on Computer Vision (ACCV 2022)
abstract: Deep neural network (DNN) classifiers are vulnerable to backdoor attacks. An adversary poisons some of the training data in such attacks by installing a trigger. The goal is to make the trained DNN output the attacker's desired class whenever the trigger is activated while performing as usual for clean data. Various approaches have recently been proposed to detect malicious backdoored DNNs. However, a robust, end-to-end training approach, like adversarial training, is yet to be discovered for backdoor poisoned data. In this paper, we take the first step toward such methods by developing a robust training framework, COLLIDER, that selects the most prominent samples by exploiting the underlying geometric structures of the data. Specifically, we effectively filter out candidate poisoned data at each training epoch by solving a geometrical coreset selection objective. We first argue how clean data samples exhibit (1) gradients similar to the clean majority of data and (2) low local intrinsic dimensionality (LID). Based on these criteria, we define a novel coreset selection objective to find such samples, which are used for training a DNN. We show the effectiveness of the proposed method for robust training of DNNs on various poisoned datasets, reducing the backdoor success rate significantly.
summary: Deep neural network (DNN) classifiers are vulnerable to backdoor attacks. An adversary poisons some of the training data in such attacks by installing a trigger. The goal is to make the trained DNN output the attacker's desired class whenever the trigger is activated while performing as usual for clean data. Various approaches have recently been proposed to detect malicious backdoored DNNs. However, a robust, end-to-end training approach, like adversarial training, is yet to be discovered for backdoor poisoned data. In this paper, we take the first step toward such methods by developing a robust training framework, COLLIDER, that selects the most prominent samples by exploiting the underlying geometric structures of the data. Specifically, we effectively filter out candidate poisoned data at each training epoch by solving a geometrical coreset selection objective. We first argue how clean data samples exhibit (1) gradients similar to the clean majority of data and (2) low local intrinsic dimensionality (LID). Based on these criteria, we define a novel coreset selection objective to find such samples, which are used for training a DNN. We show the effectiveness of the proposed method for robust training of DNNs on various poisoned datasets, reducing the backdoor success rate significantly.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 分类器容易受到后门攻击。攻击者通过安装触发器来毒害此类攻击中的一些训练数据。目标是让经过训练的 DNN 在触发器被激活时输出攻击者所需的类，同时照常执行干净数据。最近提出了各种方法来检测恶意后门 DNN。然而，对于后门中毒数据，尚未发现一种强大的端到端训练方法，例如对抗性训练。在本文中，我们通过开发一个强大的训练框架 COLLIDER 迈出了实现此类方法的第一步，该框架通过利用数据的底层几何结构来选择最突出的样本。具体来说，我们通过解决几何核心集选择目标，有效地过滤掉每个训练时期的候选中毒数据。我们首先讨论干净的数据样本如何表现出（1）与干净的大多数数据相似的梯度和（2）低局部固有维度（LID）。基于这些标准，我们定义了一个新颖的核心集选择目标来查找此类样本，这些样本用于训练 DNN。我们展示了所提出的方法在各种中毒数据集上对 DNN 进行鲁棒训练的有效性，显着降低了后门的成功率。

AI.tldr: 开发一种鲁棒的训练框架COLLIDER，用于处理被后门攻击污染的数据，以降低模型的后门成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效检测和防御后门攻击，缺乏端到端的鲁棒训练方法，导致模型易受后门数据影响。
AI.method: 通过几何共核选择方法筛选样本，利用梯度相似性和低局部内在维度（LID）准则过滤潜在中毒数据，从而进行鲁棒训练。
AI.result: 在多个中毒数据集上验证，显著降低后门攻击的成功率，提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: COLLIDER框架通过几何结构分析有效识别中毒样本，为深度学习模型的鲁棒训练提供了新思路。

search_text: COLLIDER: A Robust Training Framework for Backdoor Data COLLIDER：后门数据的稳健训练框架 Deep neural network (DNN) classifiers are vulnerable to backdoor attacks. An adversary poisons some of the training data in such attacks by installing a trigger. The goal is to make the trained DNN output the attacker's desired class whenever the trigger is activated while performing as usual for clean data. Various approaches have recently been proposed to detect malicious backdoored DNNs. However, a robust, end-to-end training approach, like adversarial training, is yet to be discovered for backdoor poisoned data. In this paper, we take the first step toward such methods by developing a robust training framework, COLLIDER, that selects the most prominent samples by exploiting the underlying geometric structures of the data. Specifically, we effectively filter out candidate poisoned data at each training epoch by solving a geometrical coreset selection objective. We first argue how clean data samples exhibit (1) gradients similar to the clean majority of data and (2) low local intrinsic dimensionality (LID). Based on these criteria, we define a novel coreset selection objective to find such samples, which are used for training a DNN. We show the effectiveness of the proposed method for robust training of DNNs on various poisoned datasets, reducing the backdoor success rate significantly. 深度神经网络 (DNN) 分类器容易受到后门攻击。攻击者通过安装触发器来毒害此类攻击中的一些训练数据。目标是让经过训练的 DNN 在触发器被激活时输出攻击者所需的类，同时照常执行干净数据。最近提出了各种方法来检测恶意后门 DNN。然而，对于后门中毒数据，尚未发现一种强大的端到端训练方法，例如对抗性训练。在本文中，我们通过开发一个强大的训练框架 COLLIDER 迈出了实现此类方法的第一步，该框架通过利用数据的底层几何结构来选择最突出的样本。具体来说，我们通过解决几何核心集选择目标，有效地过滤掉每个训练时期的候选中毒数据。我们首先讨论干净的数据样本如何表现出（1）与干净的大多数数据相似的梯度和（2）低局部固有维度（LID）。基于这些标准，我们定义了一个新颖的核心集选择目标来查找此类样本，这些样本用于训练 DNN。我们展示了所提出的方法在各种中毒数据集上对 DNN 进行鲁棒训练的有效性，显着降低了后门的成功率。 开发一种鲁棒的训练框架COLLIDER，用于处理被后门攻击污染的数据，以降低模型的后门成功率。 Hadi M. authors_text: Gabriel L. Duarte,Uéverton S. Souza
title: On the Minimum Cycle Cover problem on graphs with bounded co-degeneracy
title_zh: 关于有界共简并图的最小环覆盖问题
abstract: In 2021, Duarte, Oliveira, and Souza [MFCS 2021] showed some problems that are FPT when parameterized by the treewidth of the complement graph (called co-treewidth). Since the degeneracy of a graph is at most its treewidth, they also introduced the study of co-degeneracy (the degeneracy of the complement graph) as a parameter. In 1976, Bondy and Chvátal [DM 1976] introduced the notion of closure of a graph: let $\ell$ be an integer; the $(n+\ell)$-closure, $\operatorname{cl}_{n+\ell}(G)$, of a graph $G$ with $n$ vertices is obtained from $G$ by recursively adding an edge between pairs of nonadjacent vertices whose degree sum is at least $n+\ell$ until no such pair remains. A graph property $Υ$ defined on all graphs of order $n$ is said to be $(n+\ell)$-stable if for any graph $G$ of order $n$ that does not satisfy $Υ$, the fact that $uv$ is not an edge of $G$ and that $G+uv$ satisfies $Υ$ implies $d(u)+d(v)< n+\ell$. Duarte et al. [MFCS 2021] developed an algorithmic framework for co-degeneracy parameterization based on the notion of closures for solving problems that are $(n+\ell)$-stable for some $\ell$ bounded by a function of the co-degeneracy. In this paper, we first determine the stability of the property of having a bounded cycle cover. After that, combining the framework of Duarte et al. [MFCS 2021] with some results of Jansen, Kozma, and Nederlof [WG 2019], we obtain a $2^{\mathcal{O}(k)}\cdot n^{\mathcal{O}(1)}$-time algorithm for Minimum Cycle Cover on graphs with co-degeneracy at most $k$, which generalizes Duarte et al. [MFCS 2021] and Jansen et al. [WG 2019] results concerning the Hamiltonian Cycle problem.

abstract_zh: 2021 年，Duarte、Oliveira 和 Souza [MFCS 2021] 展示了一些当通过补图的树宽（称为 co-treewidth）参数化时属于 FPT 的问题。由于图的简并性至多是其树宽，因此他们还引入了共简并性（补图的简并性）作为参数的研究。 1976 年，Bondy 和 Chvátal [DM 1976] 引入了图闭包的概念：令 $\ell$ 为整数；具有 $n$ 个顶点的图 $G$ 的 $(n+\ell)$ 闭包 $\operatorname{cl}_{n+\ell}(G)$ 是通过在度数总和至少为 $n+\ell$ 的非相邻顶点对之间递归添加一条边，从 $G$ 获得的，直到没有这样的对为止。如果对于任何不满足 $Y$ 的 $n$ 阶图 $G$，$uv$ 不是 $G$ 的边并且 $G+uv$ 满足 $Y$ 这一事实意味着 $d(u)+d(v)< n+\ell$，则在所有 $n$ 阶图上定义的图属性 $Y$ 被称为 $(n+\ell)$ 稳定。杜阿尔特等人。 [MFCS 2021] 基于闭包的概念开发了一种用于共简并参数化的算法框架，用于解决对于某些由共简并函数限制的 $\ell$ 而言 $(n+\ell)$ 稳定的问题。在本文中，我们首先确定有界循环覆盖性质的稳定性。之后，结合 Duarte 等人的框架。 [MFCS 2021] 结合 Jansen、Kozma 和 Nederlof [WG 2019] 的一些结果，我们获得了一个 $2^{\mathcal{O}(k)}\cdot n^{\mathcal{O}(1)}$ 时间算法，用于在共简并性至多 $k$ 的图上进行最小循环覆盖，该算法概括了 Duarte 等人。 [MFCS 2021] 和 Jansen 等人。 [WG 2019] 有关哈密顿循环问题的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在具有有界共退化性的图上求解最小环覆盖问题的算法。
AI.motivation: 共退化性作为图补图的退化性参数，为解决某些图问题提供了新的参数化视角，但此前缺乏针对环覆盖问题的有效算法。
AI.method: 结合图闭包概念与现有结果，基于共退化性参数化框架设计算法。
AI.result: 提出一个时间复杂度为$2^{\\mathcal{O}(k)}\\cdot n^{\\mathcal{O}(1)}$的算法，适用于共退化性至多为$k$的图的最小环覆盖问题。
AI.conclusion: 该成果推广了此前关于哈密顿圈问题的研究，为共退化性参数化提供了新的算法范式。

authors_text: Andrew Zhao,Matthieu Gaetan Lin,Yangguang Li,Yong-Jin Liu,Gao Huang
title: A Mixture of Surprises for Unsupervised Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 无监督强化学习的惊喜组合
abstract: Unsupervised reinforcement learning aims at learning a generalist policy in a reward-free manner for fast adaptation to downstream tasks. Most of the existing methods propose to provide an intrinsic reward based on surprise. Maximizing or minimizing surprise drives the agent to either explore or gain control over its environment. However, both strategies rely on a strong assumption: the entropy of the environment's dynamics is either high or low. This assumption may not always hold in real-world scenarios, where the entropy of the environment's dynamics may be unknown. Hence, choosing between the two objectives is a dilemma. We propose a novel yet simple mixture of policies to address this concern, allowing us to optimize an objective that simultaneously maximizes and minimizes the surprise. Concretely, we train one mixture component whose objective is to maximize the surprise and another whose objective is to minimize the surprise. Hence, our method does not make assumptions about the entropy of the environment's dynamics. We call our method a $\textbf{M}\text{ixture }\textbf{O}\text{f }\textbf{S}\text{urprise}\textbf{S}$ (MOSS) for unsupervised reinforcement learning. Experimental results show that our simple method achieves state-of-the-art performance on the URLB benchmark, outperforming previous pure surprise maximization-based objectives. Our code is available at: https://github.com/LeapLabTHU/MOSS.
summary: Unsupervised reinforcement learning aims at learning a generalist policy in a reward-free manner for fast adaptation to downstream tasks. Most of the existing methods propose to provide an intrinsic reward based on surprise. Maximizing or minimizing surprise drives the agent to either explore or gain control over its environment. However, both strategies rely on a strong assumption: the entropy of the environment's dynamics is either high or low. This assumption may not always hold in real-world scenarios, where the entropy of the environment's dynamics may be unknown. Hence, choosing between the two objectives is a dilemma. We propose a novel yet simple mixture of policies to address this concern, allowing us to optimize an objective that simultaneously maximizes and minimizes the surprise. Concretely, we train one mixture component whose objective is to maximize the surprise and another whose objective is to minimize the surprise. Hence, our method does not make assumptions about the entropy of the environment's dynamics. We call our method a $\textbf{M}\text{ixture }\textbf{O}\text{f }\textbf{S}\text{urprise}\textbf{S}$ (MOSS) for unsupervised reinforcement learning. Experimental results show that our simple method achieves state-of-the-art performance on the URLB benchmark, outperforming previous pure surprise maximization-based objectives. Our code is available at: https://github.com/LeapLabTHU/MOSS.
abstract_zh: 无监督强化学习旨在以无奖励的方式学习通才策略，以快速适应下游任务。大多数现有方法建议根据惊喜提供内在奖励。最大化或最小化意外会促使智能体探索或控制其环境。然而，这两种策略都依赖于一个强有力的假设：环境动态的熵要么高要么低。在现实世界的场景中，这种假设可能并不总是成立，因为环境动态的熵可能是未知的。因此，在这两个目标之间进行选择是一个两难的选择。我们提出了一种新颖而简单的政策组合来解决这一问题，使我们能够优化目标，同时最大化和最小化意外情况。具体来说，我们训练一个混合组件，其目标是最大化惊喜，另一个混合组件的目标是最小化惊喜。因此，我们的方法不对环境动力学的熵做出假设。我们将我们的方法称为 $\textbf{M}\text{ixture }\textbf{O}\text{f }\textbf{S}\text{urprise}\textbf{S}$ (MOSS)，用于无监督强化学习。实验结果表明，我们的简单方法在 URLB 基准上实现了最先进的性能，优于之前纯粹的基于惊喜最大化的目标。我们的代码位于：https://github.com/LeapLabTHU/MOSS。

AI.motivation: 现有的无监督强化学习方法依赖于环境动态熵的高或低假设，这在实际场景中可能不成立，因此需要一种不依赖该假设的方法。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种名为MOSS的方法，通过训练两个策略组件，一个最大化惊喜，另一个最小化惊喜，以同时优化这两个目标。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在URLB基准测试中取得了最先进的性能，优于基于纯惊喜最大化的目标。
AI.conclusion: MOSS方法通过结合最大化和最小化惊喜的策略，成功解决了环境动态熵未知的问题，并在无监督强化学习中表现出色。

search_text: A Mixture of Surprises for Unsupervised Reinforcement Learning 无监督强化学习的惊喜组合 Unsupervised reinforcement learning aims at learning a generalist policy in a reward-free manner for fast adaptation to downstream tasks. Most of the existing methods propose to provide an intrinsic reward based on surprise. Maximizing or minimizing surprise drives the agent to either explore or gain control over its environment. However, both strategies rely on a strong assumption: the entropy of the environment's dynamics is either high or low. This assumption may not always hold in real-world scenarios, where the entropy of the environment's dynamics may be unknown. Hence, choosing between the two objectives is a dilemma. We propose a novel yet simple mixture of policies to address this concern, allowing us to optimize an objective that simultaneously maximizes and minimizes the surprise. Concretely, we train one mixture component whose objective is to maximize the surprise and another whose objective is to minimize the surprise. Hence, our method does not make assumptions about the entropy of the environment's dynamics. We call our method a $\textbf{M}\text{ixture }\textbf{O}\text{f }\textbf{S}\text{urprise}\textbf{S}$ (MOSS) for unsupervised reinforcement learning. Experimental results show that our simple method achieves state-of-the-art performance on the URLB benchmark, outperforming previous pure surprise maximization-based objectives. Our code is available at: https://github.com/LeapLabTHU/MOSS. 无监督强化学习旨在以无奖励的方式学习通才策略，以快速适应下游任务。大多数现有方法建议根据惊喜提供内在奖励。最大化或最小化意外会促使智能体探索或控制其环境。然而，这两种策略都依赖于一个强有力的假设：环境动态的熵要么高要么低。在现实世界的场景中，这种假设可能并不总是成立，因为环境动态的熵可能是未知的。因此，在这两个目标之间进行选择是一个两难的选择。我们提出了一种新颖而简单的政策组合来解决这一问题，使我们能够优化目标，同时最大化和最小化意外情况。具体来说，我们训练一个混合组件，其目标是最大化惊喜，另一个混合组件的目标是最小化惊喜。因此，我们的方法不对环境动力学的熵做出假设。我们将我们的方法称为 $\textbf{M}\text{ixture }\textbf{O}\text{f }\textbf{S}\text{urprise}\textbf{S}$ (MOSS)，用于无监督强化学习。实验结果表明，我们的简单方法在 URLB 基准上实现了最先进的性能，优于之前纯粹的基于惊喜最大化的目标。我们的代码位于：https://github.com/LeapLabTHU/MOSS。 本文提出了一种用于无监督强化学习的新方法，通过结合最大化和最小化惊喜的策略来学习通用策略。 Andrew Zhao,Matthieu Gaetan Lin,Yangguang Li,Yong-Jin Liu,Gao Huang cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Huiyuan Yang,Han Yu,Akane Sano
title: Empirical Evaluation of Data Augmentations for Biobehavioral Time Series Data with Deep Learning
title_zh: 利用深度学习对生物行为时间序列数据进行数据增强的实证评估
abstract: Deep learning has performed remarkably well on many tasks recently. However, the superior performance of deep models relies heavily on the availability of a large number of training data, which limits the wide adaptation of deep models on various clinical and affective computing tasks, as the labeled data are usually very limited. As an effective technique to increase the data variability and thus train deep models with better generalization, data augmentation (DA) is a critical step for the success of deep learning models on biobehavioral time series data. However, the effectiveness of various DAs for different datasets with different tasks and deep models is understudied for biobehavioral time series data. In this paper, we first systematically review eight basic DA methods for biobehavioral time series data, and evaluate the effects on seven datasets with three backbones. Next, we explore adapting more recent DA techniques (i.e., automatic augmentation, random augmentation) to biobehavioral time series data by designing a new policy architecture applicable to time series data. Last, we try to answer the question of why a DA is effective (or not) by first summarizing two desired attributes for augmentations (challenging and faithful), and then utilizing two metrics to quantitatively measure the corresponding attributes, which can guide us in the search for more effective DA for biobehavioral time series data by designing more challenging but still faithful transformations. Our code and results are available at Link.
summary: Deep learning has performed remarkably well on many tasks recently. However, the superior performance of deep models relies heavily on the availability of a large number of training data, which limits the wide adaptation of deep models on various clinical and affective computing tasks, as the labeled data are usually very limited. As an effective technique to increase the data variability and thus train deep models with better generalization, data augmentation (DA) is a critical step for the success of deep learning models on biobehavioral time series data. However, the effectiveness of various DAs for different datasets with different tasks and deep models is understudied for biobehavioral time series data. In this paper, we first systematically review eight basic DA methods for biobehavioral time series data, and evaluate the effects on seven datasets with three backbones. Next, we explore adapting more recent DA techniques (i.e., automatic augmentation, random augmentation) to biobehavioral time series data by designing a new policy architecture applicable to time series data. Last, we try to answer the question of why a DA is effective (or not) by first summarizing two desired attributes for augmentations (challenging and faithful), and then utilizing two metrics to quantitatively measure the corresponding attributes, which can guide us in the search for more effective DA for biobehavioral time series data by designing more challenging but still faithful transformations. Our code and results are available at Link.
abstract_zh: 深度学习最近在许多任务上表现得非常好。然而，深度模型的优越性能在很大程度上依赖于大量训练数据的可用性，这限制了深度模型在各种临床和情感计算任务上的广泛适应，因为标记数据通常非常有限。作为一种增加数据可变性并从而训练具有更好泛化能力的深度模型的有效技术，数据增强（DA）是生物行为时间序列数据深度学习模型成功的关键一步。然而，对于生物行为时间序列数据，各种 DA 对于具有不同任务和深度模型的不同数据集的有效性尚未得到充分研究。在本文中，我们首先系统地回顾了生物行为时间序列数据的八种基本 DA 方法，并评估了在具有三个主干的七个数据集上的效果。接下来，我们通过设计适用于时间序列数据的新策略架构，探索将更新的 DA 技术（即自动增强、随机增强）应用于生物行为时间序列数据。最后，我们尝试回答为什么 DA 有效（或无效）的问题，首先总结两个期望的增强属性（具有挑战性和忠实性），然后利用两个指标来定量测量相应的属性，这可以指导我们通过设计更具挑战性但仍然忠实的转换来寻找更有效的生物行为时间序列数据 DA。我们的代码和结果可在链接中找到。

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了八种数据增强方法在生物行为时间序列数据上的效果，并设计了新的增强策略以提升深度学习模型性能。
AI.motivation: 深度学习依赖大量数据，但临床和情感计算任务中标签数据稀缺，需通过数据增强提升模型泛化能力，但现有研究缺乏对不同任务和模型的系统评估。
AI.method: 系统评估八种基础数据增强方法在七个数据集和三种模型上的效果；设计适用于时间序列的自动增强策略架构；提出挑战性与忠实性两个属性及量化指标分析增强有效性。
AI.result: 发现部分增强方法在特定任务和模型中表现优异；新策略架构有效适应时间序列数据；量化指标可指导设计更有效的增强方法。
AI.conclusion: 数据增强对生物行为时间序列任务至关重要，需结合任务特性选择方法；新策略和评估指标为未来研究提供方向。

authors_text: Junyi Shen,Itaru Kitahara,Shinichi Koyama,Qiaoge Li
title: Size Does Matter: An Experimental Study of Anxiety in Virtual Reality
title_zh: 尺寸确实很重要：虚拟现实中焦虑的实验研究
abstract: The emotional response of users induced by VR scenarios has become a topic of interest, however, whether changing the size of objects in VR scenes induces different levels of anxiety remains a question to be studied. In this study, we conducted an experiment to initially reveal how the size of a large object in a VR environment affects changes in participants' (N = 38) anxiety level and heart rate. To holistically quantify the size of large objects in the VR visual field, we used the omnidirectional field of view occupancy (OFVO) criterion for the first time to represent the dimension of the object in the participant's entire field of view. The results showed that the participants' heartbeat and anxiety while viewing the large objects were positively and significantly correlated to OFVO. These study reveals that the increase of object size in VR environments is accompanied by a higher degree of user's anxiety.
summary: The emotional response of users induced by VR scenarios has become a topic of interest, however, whether changing the size of objects in VR scenes induces different levels of anxiety remains a question to be studied. In this study, we conducted an experiment to initially reveal how the size of a large object in a VR environment affects changes in participants' (N = 38) anxiety level and heart rate. To holistically quantify the size of large objects in the VR visual field, we used the omnidirectional field of view occupancy (OFVO) criterion for the first time to represent the dimension of the object in the participant's entire field of view. The results showed that the participants' heartbeat and anxiety while viewing the large objects were positively and significantly correlated to OFVO. These study reveals that the increase of object size in VR environments is accompanied by a higher degree of user's anxiety.
abstract_zh: VR场景引起的用户情绪反应已经成为人们感兴趣的话题，然而，改变VR场景中物体的大小是否会引起不同程度的焦虑仍然是一个有待研究的问题。在这项研究中，我们进行了一项实验，初步揭示了 VR 环境中大型物体的大小如何影响参与者 (N = 38) 焦虑水平和心率的变化。为了全面量化VR视野中大型物体的尺寸，我们首次使用全向视野占用（OFVO）标准来表示物体在参与者整个视野中的尺寸。结果显示，参与者在观看大型物体时的心跳和焦虑程度与 OFVO 呈显着正相关。这些研究表明，VR 环境中物体尺寸的增加伴随着用户更高程度的焦虑。

AI.tldr: 本论文通过实验研究虚拟现实环境中物体尺寸变化对用户焦虑水平的影响。
AI.motivation: 尽管VR场景中的情感反应备受关注，但物体尺寸变化是否引发不同焦虑水平仍缺乏研究，因此需要探索这一关系。
AI.method: 采用38名参与者进行实验，首次使用全向视野占用率（OFVO）量化VR场景中大型物体的尺寸，并监测参与者的心率和焦虑水平。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，参与者观看物体时的心率和焦虑水平与OFVO呈显著正相关，物体尺寸增大伴随更高的焦虑程度。
AI.conclusion: VR环境中物体尺寸的增加会显著提升用户的焦虑感，为VR场景设计提供了重要参考。

ai_content.tldr: 本论文通过实验研究虚拟现实环境中物体尺寸变化对用户焦虑水平的影响。
ai_content.motivation: 尽管VR场景中的情感反应备受关注，但物体尺寸变化是否引发不同焦虑水平仍缺乏研究，因此需要探索这一关系。

ai_content.conclusion: VR环境中物体尺寸的增加会显著提升用户的焦虑感，为VR场景设计提供了重要参考。

search_text: Size Does Matter: An Experimental Study of Anxiety in Virtual Reality 尺寸确实很重要：虚拟现实中焦虑的实验研究 The emotional response of users induced by VR scenarios has become a topic of interest, however, whether changing the size of objects in VR scenes induces different levels of anxiety remains a question to be studied. In this study, we conducted an experiment to initially reveal how the size of a large object in a VR environment affects changes in participants' (N = 38) anxiety level and heart rate. To holistically quantify the size of large objects in the VR visual field, we used the omnidirectional field of view occupancy (OFVO) criterion for the first time to represent the dimension of the object in the participant's entire field of view. The results showed that the participants' heartbeat and anxiety while viewing the large objects were positively and significantly correlated to OFVO. These study reveals that the increase of object size in VR environments is accompanied by a higher degree of user's anxiety. VR场景引起的用户情绪反应已经成为人们感兴趣的话题，然而，改变VR场景中物体的大小是否会引起不同程度的焦虑仍然是一个有待研究的问题。在这项研究中，我们进行了一项实验，初步揭示了 VR 环境中大型物体的大小如何影响参与者 (N = 38) 焦虑水平和心率的变化。为了全面量化VR视野中大型物体的尺寸，我们首次使用全向视野占用（OFVO）标准来表示物体在参与者整个视野中的尺寸。结果显示，参与者在观看大型物体时的心跳和焦虑程度与 OFVO 呈显着正相关。这些研究表明，VR 环境中物体尺寸的增加伴随着用户更高程度的焦虑。 本论文通过实验研究虚拟现实环境中物体尺寸变化对用户焦虑水平的影响。 Junyi Shen,Itaru Kitahara,Shinichi Koyama,Qiaoge Li cs.MM,cs.HC

authors_text: Zhaowei Wang,Hongming Zhang,Tianqing Fang,Yangqiu Song,Ginny Y. Wong,Simon See
title: SubeventWriter: Iterative Sub-event Sequence Generation with Coherence Controller
title_zh: SubeventWriter：使用 Coherence 控制器迭代子事件序列生成
comment: Accepted to the main conference of EMNLP 2022
comments: Accepted to the main conference of EMNLP 2022
abstract: In this paper, we propose a new task of sub-event generation for an unseen process to evaluate the understanding of the coherence of sub-event actions and objects. To solve the problem, we design SubeventWriter, a sub-event sequence generation framework with a coherence controller. Given an unseen process, the framework can iteratively construct the sub-event sequence by generating one sub-event at each iteration. We also design a very effective coherence controller to decode more coherent sub-events. As our extensive experiments and analysis indicate, SubeventWriter can generate more reliable and meaningful sub-event sequences for unseen processes.
summary: In this paper, we propose a new task of sub-event generation for an unseen process to evaluate the understanding of the coherence of sub-event actions and objects. To solve the problem, we design SubeventWriter, a sub-event sequence generation framework with a coherence controller. Given an unseen process, the framework can iteratively construct the sub-event sequence by generating one sub-event at each iteration. We also design a very effective coherence controller to decode more coherent sub-events. As our extensive experiments and analysis indicate, SubeventWriter can generate more reliable and meaningful sub-event sequences for unseen processes.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种针对看不见的过程生成子事件的新任务，以评估对子事件动作和对象的一致性的理解。为了解决这个问题，我们设计了SubeventWriter，一个带有一致性控制器的子事件序列生成框架。给定一个看不见的过程，框架可以通过在每次迭代时生成一个子事件来迭代地构造子事件序列。我们还设计了一个非常有效的相干控制器来解码更多相干的子事件。正如我们大量的实验和分析表明的那样，SubeventWriter 可以为看不见的进程生成更可靠、更有意义的子事件序列。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SubeventWriter的新框架，用于为未见过的过程生成连贯的子事件序列。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效生成未见过过程的子事件序列，且缺乏对子事件连贯性的系统控制。
AI.method: 设计了包含连贯性控制器的迭代生成框架，通过逐次生成子事件并利用控制器确保序列连贯性。
AI.result: 实验表明SubeventWriter能生成更可靠、有意义的子事件序列，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过迭代生成与连贯性控制，显著提升了未见过过程子事件序列生成的质量与合理性。

authors_text: Kaiyang Guo,Yunfeng Shao,Yanhui Geng
title: Model-Based Offline Reinforcement Learning with Pessimism-Modulated Dynamics Belief
title_zh: 具有悲观调制动态信念的基于模型的离线强化学习
abstract: Model-based offline reinforcement learning (RL) aims to find highly rewarding policy, by leveraging a previously collected static dataset and a dynamics model. While the dynamics model learned through reuse of the static dataset, its generalization ability hopefully promotes policy learning if properly utilized. To that end, several works propose to quantify the uncertainty of predicted dynamics, and explicitly apply it to penalize reward. However, as the dynamics and the reward are intrinsically different factors in context of MDP, characterizing the impact of dynamics uncertainty through reward penalty may incur unexpected tradeoff between model utilization and risk avoidance. In this work, we instead maintain a belief distribution over dynamics, and evaluate/optimize policy through biased sampling from the belief. The sampling procedure, biased towards pessimism, is derived based on an alternating Markov game formulation of offline RL. We formally show that the biased sampling naturally induces an updated dynamics belief with policy-dependent reweighting factor, termed Pessimism-Modulated Dynamics Belief. To improve policy, we devise an iterative regularized policy optimization algorithm for the game, with guarantee of monotonous improvement under certain condition. To make practical, we further devise an offline RL algorithm to approximately find the solution. Empirical results show that the proposed approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on a wide range of benchmark tasks.
summary: Model-based offline reinforcement learning (RL) aims to find highly rewarding policy, by leveraging a previously collected static dataset and a dynamics model. While the dynamics model learned through reuse of the static dataset, its generalization ability hopefully promotes policy learning if properly utilized. To that end, several works propose to quantify the uncertainty of predicted dynamics, and explicitly apply it to penalize reward. However, as the dynamics and the reward are intrinsically different factors in context of MDP, characterizing the impact of dynamics uncertainty through reward penalty may incur unexpected tradeoff between model utilization and risk avoidance. In this work, we instead maintain a belief distribution over dynamics, and evaluate/optimize policy through biased sampling from the belief. The sampling procedure, biased towards pessimism, is derived based on an alternating Markov game formulation of offline RL. We formally show that the biased sampling naturally induces an updated dynamics belief with policy-dependent reweighting factor, termed Pessimism-Modulated Dynamics Belief. To improve policy, we devise an iterative regularized policy optimization algorithm for the game, with guarantee of monotonous improvement under certain condition. To make practical, we further devise an offline RL algorithm to approximately find the solution. Empirical results show that the proposed approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on a wide range of benchmark tasks.
abstract_zh: 基于模型的离线强化学习 (RL) 旨在通过利用先前收集的静态数据集和动态模型来找到高回报策略。虽然动态模型是通过重用静态数据集来学习的，但如果利用得当，其泛化能力有望促进政策学习。为此，一些工作提出量化预测动态的不确定性，并明确地将其应用于惩罚奖励。然而，由于在 MDP 中动态和奖励本质上是不同的因素，因此通过奖励惩罚来表征动态不确定性的影响可能会在模型利用和风险规避之间产生意想不到的权衡。在这项工作中，我们反而维持动态的信念分布，并通过信念的有偏抽样来评估/优化策略。偏向悲观主义的采样过程是基于离线强化学习的交替马尔可夫博弈公式得出的。我们正式证明，有偏差的抽样自然会导致更新的动态信念与政策相关的重新加权因子，称为悲观调制动态信念。为了改进策略，我们为博弈设计了一种迭代正则化策略优化算法，保证在一定条件下的单调改进。为了实用，我们进一步设计了一种离线强化学习算法来近似找到解决方案。实证结果表明，所提出的方法在各种基准任务上实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于模型的离线强化学习方法，通过维护动力学信念分布并结合悲观采样策略，解决传统方法中模型利用与风险规避的权衡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过奖励惩罚量化动力学不确定性，但可能引发模型利用与风险规避的冲突，需探索更有效的动力学不确定性处理机制。
AI.method: 维护动力学信念分布，基于交替马尔可夫博弈框架设计悲观偏向采样，提出迭代正则化策略优化算法，并开发离线RL算法实现该理论框架。
AI.result: 在多个基准任务中达到最先进性能，验证了悲观调节动力学信念方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过理论分析与算法设计，有效平衡了模型利用与风险控制，为离线强化学习提供了新思路。

search_text: Model-Based Offline Reinforcement Learning with Pessimism-Modulated Dynamics Belief 具有悲观调制动态信念的基于模型的离线强化学习 Model-based offline reinforcement learning (RL) aims to find highly rewarding policy, by leveraging a previously collected static dataset and a dynamics model. While the dynamics model learned through reuse of the static dataset, its generalization ability hopefully promotes policy learning if properly utilized. To that end, several works propose to quantify the uncertainty of predicted dynamics, and explicitly apply it to penalize reward. However, as the dynamics and the reward are intrinsically different factors in context of MDP, characterizing the impact of dynamics uncertainty through reward penalty may incur unexpected tradeoff between model utilization and risk avoidance. In this work, we instead maintain a belief distribution over dynamics, and evaluate/optimize policy through biased sampling from the belief. The sampling procedure, biased towards pessimism, is derived based on an alternating Markov game formulation of offline RL. We formally show that the biased sampling naturally induces an updated dynamics belief with policy-dependent reweighting factor, termed Pessimism-Modulated Dynamics Belief. To improve policy, we devise an iterative regularized policy optimization algorithm for the game, with guarantee of monotonous improvement under certain condition. To make practical, we further devise an offline RL algorithm to approximately find the solution. Empirical results show that the proposed approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on a wide range of benchmark tasks. 基于模型的离线强化学习 (RL) 旨在通过利用先前收集的静态数据集和动态模型来找到高回报策略。虽然动态模型是通过重用静态数据集来学习的，但如果利用得当，其泛化能力有望促进政策学习。为此，一些工作提出量化预测动态的不确定性，并明确地将其应用于惩罚奖励。然而，由于在 MDP 中动态和奖励本质上是不同的因素，因此通过奖励惩罚来表征动态不确定性的影响可能会在模型利用和风险规避之间产生意想不到的权衡。在这项工作中，我们反而维持动态的信念分布，并通过信念的有偏抽样来评估/优化策略。偏向悲观主义的采样过程是基于离线强化学习的交替马尔可夫博弈公式得出的。我们正式证明，有偏差的抽样自然会导致更新的动态信念与政策相关的重新加权因子，称为悲观调制动态信念。为了改进策略，我们为博弈设计了一种迭代正则化策略优化算法，保证在一定条件下的单调改进。为了实用，我们进一步设计了一种离线强化学习算法来近似找到解决方案。实证结果表明，所提出的方法在各种基准任务上实现了最先进的性能。 本文提出一种基于模型的离线强化学习方法，通过维护动力学信念分布并结合悲观采样策略，解决传统方法中模型利用与风险规避的权衡问题。 Kaiyang Guo,Yunfeng Shao,Yanhui Geng cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Weijun Tan,Qi Yao,Jingfeng Liu
title: Overlooked Video Classification in Weakly Supervised Video Anomaly Detection
title_zh: 弱监督视频异常检测中被忽视的视频分类
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2101.10030 by other authors
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2101.10030 by other authors
abstract: Current weakly supervised video anomaly detection algorithms mostly use multiple instance learning (MIL) or their varieties. Almost all recent approaches focus on how to select the correct snippets for training to improve the performance. They overlook or do not realize the power of video classification in boosting the performance of anomaly detection. In this paper, we study explicitly the power of video classification supervision using a BERT or LSTM. With this BERT or LSTM, CNN features of all snippets of a video can be aggregated into a single feature which can be used for video classification. This simple yet powerful video classification supervision, combined into the MIL framework, brings extraordinary performance improvement on all three major video anomaly detection datasets. Particularly it improves the mean average precision (mAP) on the XD-Violence from SOTA 78.84\% to new 82.10\%. The source code is available at https://github.com/wjtan99/BERT_Anomaly_Video_Classification.
summary: Current weakly supervised video anomaly detection algorithms mostly use multiple instance learning (MIL) or their varieties. Almost all recent approaches focus on how to select the correct snippets for training to improve the performance. They overlook or do not realize the power of video classification in boosting the performance of anomaly detection. In this paper, we study explicitly the power of video classification supervision using a BERT or LSTM. With this BERT or LSTM, CNN features of all snippets of a video can be aggregated into a single feature which can be used for video classification. This simple yet powerful video classification supervision, combined into the MIL framework, brings extraordinary performance improvement on all three major video anomaly detection datasets. Particularly it improves the mean average precision (mAP) on the XD-Violence from SOTA 78.84\% to new 82.10\%. The source code is available at https://github.com/wjtan99/BERT_Anomaly_Video_Classification.
abstract_zh: 当前的弱监督视频异常检测算法大多使用多实例学习（MIL）或其变体。几乎所有最近的方法都集中在如何选择正确的片段进行训练以提高性能。他们忽视或没有意识到视频分类在提高异常检测性能方面的力量。在本文中，我们明确研究了使用 BERT 或 LSTM 进行视频分类监督的威力。借助此 BERT 或 LSTM，视频所有片段的 CNN 特征可以聚合为可用于视频分类的单个特征。这种简单而强大的视频分类监督与 MIL 框架相结合，为所有三个主要视频异常检测数据集带来了非凡的性能改进。特别是，它将 XD-Violence 的平均精度 (mAP) 从 SOTA 78.84\% 提高到新的 82.10\%。源代码位于 https://github.com/wjtan99/BERT_Anomaly_Video_Classification。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在弱监督视频异常检测中被忽视的视频分类监督方法，通过结合BERT或LSTM提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有弱监督视频异常检测方法过度关注片段选择，而忽略了视频分类监督对整体性能的潜在提升作用。
AI.method: 利用BERT或LSTM聚合视频所有片段的CNN特征，生成视频级特征用于分类监督，并将其整合到多实例学习框架中。
AI.result: 在三个主要数据集上取得显著提升，尤其在XD-Violence数据集上将mAP从78.84%提升至82.10%。
AI.conclusion: 视频分类监督能有效增强弱监督视频异常检测性能，为未来研究提供新方向。

search_text: Overlooked Video Classification in Weakly Supervised Video Anomaly Detection 弱监督视频异常检测中被忽视的视频分类 Current weakly supervised video anomaly detection algorithms mostly use multiple instance learning (MIL) or their varieties. Almost all recent approaches focus on how to select the correct snippets for training to improve the performance. They overlook or do not realize the power of video classification in boosting the performance of anomaly detection. In this paper, we study explicitly the power of video classification supervision using a BERT or LSTM. With this BERT or LSTM, CNN features of all snippets of a video can be aggregated into a single feature which can be used for video classification. This simple yet powerful video classification supervision, combined into the MIL framework, brings extraordinary performance improvement on all three major video anomaly detection datasets. Particularly it improves the mean average precision (mAP) on the XD-Violence from SOTA 78.84\% to new 82.10\%. The source code is available at https://github.com/wjtan99/BERT_Anomaly_Video_Classification. 当前的弱监督视频异常检测算法大多使用多实例学习（MIL）或其变体。几乎所有最近的方法都集中在如何选择正确的片段进行训练以提高性能。他们忽视或没有意识到视频分类在提高异常检测性能方面的力量。在本文中，我们明确研究了使用 BERT 或 LSTM 进行视频分类监督的威力。借助此 BERT 或 LSTM，视频所有片段的 CNN 特征可以聚合为可用于视频分类的单个特征。这种简单而强大的视频分类监督与 MIL 框架相结合，为所有三个主要视频异常检测数据集带来了非凡的性能改进。特别是，它将 XD-Violence 的平均精度 (mAP) 从 SOTA 78.84\% 提高到新的 82.10\%。源代码位于 https://github.com/wjtan99/BERT_Anomaly_Video_Classification。 本文研究了在弱监督视频异常检测中被忽视的视频分类监督方法，通过结合BERT或LSTM提升检测性能。 Weijun Tan,Qi Yao,Jingfeng Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Yufei Guo,Liwen Zhang,Yuanpei Chen,Xinyi Tong,Xiaode Liu,YingLei Wang,Xuhui Huang,Zhe Ma
title: Real Spike: Learning Real-valued Spikes for Spiking Neural Networks
title_zh: 真实尖峰：学习尖峰神经网络的实值尖峰
abstract: Brain-inspired spiking neural networks (SNNs) have recently drawn more and more attention due to their event-driven and energy-efficient characteristics. The integration of storage and computation paradigm on neuromorphic hardwares makes SNNs much different from Deep Neural Networks (DNNs). In this paper, we argue that SNNs may not benefit from the weight-sharing mechanism, which can effectively reduce parameters and improve inference efficiency in DNNs, in some hardwares, and assume that an SNN with unshared convolution kernels could perform better. Motivated by this assumption, a training-inference decoupling method for SNNs named as Real Spike is proposed, which not only enjoys both unshared convolution kernels and binary spikes in inference-time but also maintains both shared convolution kernels and Real-valued Spikes during training. This decoupling mechanism of SNN is realized by a re-parameterization technique. Furthermore, based on the training-inference-decoupled idea, a series of different forms for implementing Real Spike on different levels are presented, which also enjoy shared convolutions in the inference and are friendly to both neuromorphic and non-neuromorphic hardware platforms. A theoretical proof is given to clarify that the Real Spike-based SNN network is superior to its vanilla counterpart. Experimental results show that all different Real Spike versions can consistently improve the SNN performance. Moreover, the proposed method outperforms the state-of-the-art models on both non-spiking static and neuromorphic datasets.
summary: Brain-inspired spiking neural networks (SNNs) have recently drawn more and more attention due to their event-driven and energy-efficient characteristics. The integration of storage and computation paradigm on neuromorphic hardwares makes SNNs much different from Deep Neural Networks (DNNs). In this paper, we argue that SNNs may not benefit from the weight-sharing mechanism, which can effectively reduce parameters and improve inference efficiency in DNNs, in some hardwares, and assume that an SNN with unshared convolution kernels could perform better. Motivated by this assumption, a training-inference decoupling method for SNNs named as Real Spike is proposed, which not only enjoys both unshared convolution kernels and binary spikes in inference-time but also maintains both shared convolution kernels and Real-valued Spikes during training. This decoupling mechanism of SNN is realized by a re-parameterization technique. Furthermore, based on the training-inference-decoupled idea, a series of different forms for implementing Real Spike on different levels are presented, which also enjoy shared convolutions in the inference and are friendly to both neuromorphic and non-neuromorphic hardware platforms. A theoretical proof is given to clarify that the Real Spike-based SNN network is superior to its vanilla counterpart. Experimental results show that all different Real Spike versions can consistently improve the SNN performance. Moreover, the proposed method outperforms the state-of-the-art models on both non-spiking static and neuromorphic datasets.
abstract_zh: 受大脑启发的尖峰神经网络（SNN）由于其事件驱动和节能的特性最近引起了越来越多的关注。神经形态硬件上存储和计算范式的集成使得 SNN 与深度神经网络 (DNN) 有很大不同。在本文中，我们认为 SNN 可能无法从权重共享机制中受益，权重共享机制可以在某些硬件中有效减少 DNN 中的参数并提高推理效率，并假设具有非共享卷积核的 SNN 可以表现更好。受此假设的启发，提出了一种名为 Real Spike 的 SNN 训练推理解耦方法，该方法不仅在推理时享有非共享卷积核和二进制峰值，而且在训练期间同时保留共享卷积核和实值峰值。 SNN 的这种解耦机制是通过重新参数化技术来实现的。此外，基于训练-推理-解耦的思想，提出了一系列在不同级别上实现Real Spike的不同形式，它们在推理中也享受共享卷积，并且对神经形态和非神经形态硬件平台都很友好。理论证明表明基于 Real Spike 的 SNN 网络优于普通网络。实验结果表明，所有不同的 Real Spike 版本都能持续提高 SNN 性能。此外，所提出的方法在非尖峰静态和神经形态数据集上都优于最先进的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Real Spike的训练-推理解耦方法，通过学习实值脉冲提升脉冲神经网络（SNN）性能。
AI.motivation: 传统SNN在某些硬件上可能无法从DNN的权重共享机制中受益，而使用非共享卷积核的SNN可能表现更优。
AI.method: 通过重参数化技术实现训练与推理阶段的解耦，训练时使用共享卷积核和实值脉冲，推理时采用非共享卷积核和二值脉冲，并提出多级实现形式。
AI.result: 实验表明所有Real Spike版本均提升SNN性能，在静态和神经形态数据集上优于现有最佳模型。
AI.conclusion: Real Spike通过解耦机制有效提升SNN性能，兼顾神经形态与非神经形态硬件的兼容性，为SNN设计提供新思路。

authors_text: Michael Guevarra,Srijita Das,Christabel Wayllace,Carrie Demmans Epp,Matthew E. Taylor,Alan Tay
title: Augmenting Flight Training with AI to Efficiently Train Pilots
title_zh: 利用人工智能增强飞行训练，有效培训飞行员
comment: 3 pages, 3 figures, submitted to AAAI-23 Demonstration Program
comments: 3 pages, 3 figures, submitted to AAAI-23 Demonstration Program
abstract: We propose an AI-based pilot trainer to help students learn how to fly aircraft. First, an AI agent uses behavioral cloning to learn flying maneuvers from qualified flight instructors. Later, the system uses the agent's decisions to detect errors made by students and provide feedback to help students correct their errors. This paper presents an instantiation of the pilot trainer. We focus on teaching straight and level flying maneuvers by automatically providing formative feedback to the human student.
summary: We propose an AI-based pilot trainer to help students learn how to fly aircraft. First, an AI agent uses behavioral cloning to learn flying maneuvers from qualified flight instructors. Later, the system uses the agent's decisions to detect errors made by students and provide feedback to help students correct their errors. This paper presents an instantiation of the pilot trainer. We focus on teaching straight and level flying maneuvers by automatically providing formative feedback to the human student.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个基于人工智能的飞行员培训师来帮助学生学习如何驾驶飞机。首先，人工智能代理使用行为克隆向合格的飞行教练学习飞行动作。随后，系统使用代理的决策来检测学生所犯的错误，并提供反馈以帮助学生纠正错误。本文介绍了飞行员训练器的实例。我们专注于通过自动向人类学生提供形成性反馈来教授直线和水平飞行动作。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于AI的飞行员训练系统，通过行为克隆和实时反馈提高飞行训练效率。
AI.motivation: 传统飞行训练依赖人工反馈成本高且效率低，需借助AI实现自动化、即时的个性化训练辅助。
AI.method: 使用行为克隆技术让AI代理学习飞行教官的操作，再通过对比学生操作与AI模型生成反馈以纠正错误。
AI.result: 成功构建了针对直线和水平飞行训练的AI辅助系统，可自动提供形成性反馈帮助学生改进操作。
AI.conclusion: AI辅助训练能有效提升飞行学习效率，未来可扩展至更复杂的飞行场景与技能训练。

search_text: Augmenting Flight Training with AI to Efficiently Train Pilots 利用人工智能增强飞行训练，有效培训飞行员 We propose an AI-based pilot trainer to help students learn how to fly aircraft. First, an AI agent uses behavioral cloning to learn flying maneuvers from qualified flight instructors. Later, the system uses the agent's decisions to detect errors made by students and provide feedback to help students correct their errors. This paper presents an instantiation of the pilot trainer. We focus on teaching straight and level flying maneuvers by automatically providing formative feedback to the human student. 我们提出了一个基于人工智能的飞行员培训师来帮助学生学习如何驾驶飞机。首先，人工智能代理使用行为克隆向合格的飞行教练学习飞行动作。随后，系统使用代理的决策来检测学生所犯的错误，并提供反馈以帮助学生纠正错误。本文介绍了飞行员训练器的实例。我们专注于通过自动向人类学生提供形成性反馈来教授直线和水平飞行动作。 提出一种基于AI的飞行员训练系统，通过行为克隆和实时反馈提高飞行训练效率。 Michael Guevarra,Srijita Das,Christabel Wayllace,Carrie Demmans Epp,Matthew E. Taylor,Alan Tay cs.LG,cs.HC

authors_text: Kohou Wang,Zhaoxiang Liu,Shiguo Lian
title: Application-Driven AI Paradigm for Hand-Held Action Detection
title_zh: 用于手持动作检测的应用驱动的人工智能范式
abstract: In practical applications especially with safety requirement, some hand-held actions need to be monitored closely, including smoking cigarettes, dialing, eating, etc. Taking smoking cigarettes as example, existing smoke detection algorithms usually detect the cigarette or cigarette with hand as the target object only, which leads to low accuracy. In this paper, we propose an application-driven AI paradigm for hand-held action detection based on hierarchical object detection. It is a coarse-to-fine hierarchical detection framework composed of two modules. The first one is a coarse detection module with the human pose consisting of the whole hand, cigarette and head as target object. The followed second one is a fine detection module with the fingers holding cigarette, mouth area and the whole cigarette as target. Some experiments are done with the dataset collected from real-world scenarios, and the results show that the proposed framework achieve higher detection rate with good adaptation and robustness in complex environments.
summary: In practical applications especially with safety requirement, some hand-held actions need to be monitored closely, including smoking cigarettes, dialing, eating, etc. Taking smoking cigarettes as example, existing smoke detection algorithms usually detect the cigarette or cigarette with hand as the target object only, which leads to low accuracy. In this paper, we propose an application-driven AI paradigm for hand-held action detection based on hierarchical object detection. It is a coarse-to-fine hierarchical detection framework composed of two modules. The first one is a coarse detection module with the human pose consisting of the whole hand, cigarette and head as target object. The followed second one is a fine detection module with the fingers holding cigarette, mouth area and the whole cigarette as target. Some experiments are done with the dataset collected from real-world scenarios, and the results show that the proposed framework achieve higher detection rate with good adaptation and robustness in complex environments.
abstract_zh: 在实际应用中，特别是有安全要求的情况下，需要对一些手持动作进行严密监控，包括吸烟、拨号、吃饭等。以吸烟为例，现有的烟雾检测算法通常仅检测香烟或手上的香烟作为目标物体，导致准确率较低。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于分层对象检测的应用驱动的人工智能范例，用于手持动作检测。它是一个由粗到精的分层检测框架，由两个模块组成。第一个是粗检测模块，以整个手、香烟和头部组成的人体姿态作为目标对象。接下来的第二个是精细检测模块，以夹烟的手指、嘴部区域和整支烟为目标。利用从真实场景收集的数据集进行了一些实验，结果表明，所提出的框架在复杂环境中具有良好的适应性和鲁棒性，实现了更高的检测率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于分层目标检测的面向应用的AI范式，用于提高手持动作（如吸烟、进食等）检测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有手持动作检测算法仅以烟头或手部为检测目标，导致在复杂场景下准确率不足，需更全面的上下文信息以提升检测性能。
AI.method: 设计两级分层检测框架：第一级检测手部、头部及烟头整体区域，第二级聚焦手指持烟、嘴部及烟头细节区域，实现从粗到细的精准定位。
AI.result: 在真实场景数据集上实验表明，该框架在复杂环境下的检测率更高，适应性与鲁棒性显著优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提分层检测范式能有效提升手持动作检测精度，适用于安全监控等实际场景需求。

authors_text: Xuan Kan,Wei Dai,Hejie Cui,Zilong Zhang,Ying Guo,Carl Yang
title: Brain Network Transformer
title_zh: 脑网络变压器
comment: Accepted to NeurIPS 2022. The previous version is accepted for Workshop ICML-IMLH 2022 (Oral, no proceedings)
comments: Accepted to NeurIPS 2022. The previous version is accepted for Workshop ICML-IMLH 2022 (Oral, no proceedings)
abstract: Human brains are commonly modeled as networks of Regions of Interest (ROIs) and their connections for the understanding of brain functions and mental disorders. Recently, Transformer-based models have been studied over different types of data, including graphs, shown to bring performance gains widely. In this work, we study Transformer-based models for brain network analysis. Driven by the unique properties of data, we model brain networks as graphs with nodes of fixed size and order, which allows us to (1) use connection profiles as node features to provide natural and low-cost positional information and (2) learn pair-wise connection strengths among ROIs with efficient attention weights across individuals that are predictive towards downstream analysis tasks. Moreover, we propose an Orthonormal Clustering Readout operation based on self-supervised soft clustering and orthonormal projection. This design accounts for the underlying functional modules that determine similar behaviors among groups of ROIs, leading to distinguishable cluster-aware node embeddings and informative graph embeddings. Finally, we re-standardize the evaluation pipeline on the only one publicly available large-scale brain network dataset of ABIDE, to enable meaningful comparison of different models. Experiment results show clear improvements of our proposed Brain Network Transformer on both the public ABIDE and our restricted ABCD datasets. The implementation is available at https://github.com/Wayfear/BrainNetworkTransformer.
summary: Human brains are commonly modeled as networks of Regions of Interest (ROIs) and their connections for the understanding of brain functions and mental disorders. Recently, Transformer-based models have been studied over different types of data, including graphs, shown to bring performance gains widely. In this work, we study Transformer-based models for brain network analysis. Driven by the unique properties of data, we model brain networks as graphs with nodes of fixed size and order, which allows us to (1) use connection profiles as node features to provide natural and low-cost positional information and (2) learn pair-wise connection strengths among ROIs with efficient attention weights across individuals that are predictive towards downstream analysis tasks. Moreover, we propose an Orthonormal Clustering Readout operation based on self-supervised soft clustering and orthonormal projection. This design accounts for the underlying functional modules that determine similar behaviors among groups of ROIs, leading to distinguishable cluster-aware node embeddings and informative graph embeddings. Finally, we re-standardize the evaluation pipeline on the only one publicly available large-scale brain network dataset of ABIDE, to enable meaningful comparison of different models. Experiment results show clear improvements of our proposed Brain Network Transformer on both the public ABIDE and our restricted ABCD datasets. The implementation is available at https://github.com/Wayfear/BrainNetworkTransformer.
abstract_zh: 人脑通常被建模为感兴趣区域 (ROI) 网络及其连接，以了解大脑功能和精神障碍。最近，基于 Transformer 的模型已经在不同类型的数据（包括图形）上进行了研究，结果表明可以带来广泛的性能提升。在这项工作中，我们研究基于 Transformer 的大脑网络分析模型。在数据独特属性的驱动下，我们将大脑网络建模为具有固定大小和顺序的节点的图，这使我们能够（1）使用连接配置文件作为节点特征来提供自然且低成本的位置信息，以及（2）学习 ROI 之间的成对连接强度，以及跨个体的有效注意力权重，这些权重可预测下游分析任务。此外，我们提出了一种基于自监督软聚类和正交投影的正交聚类读出操作。这种设计考虑了确定 ROI 组之间相似行为的底层功能模块，从而产生可区分的集群感知节点嵌入和信息图嵌入。最后，我们在 ABIDE 唯一一个公开的大规模脑网络数据集上重新标准化了评估流程，以便对不同模型进行有意义的比较。实验结果表明，我们提出的 Brain Network Transformer 在公共 ABIDE 和我们受限的 ABCD 数据集上都有明显的改进。该实现可在 https://github.com/Wayfear/BrainNetworkTransformer 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的脑网络分析模型，通过建模脑区连接关系及聚类读出操作，提升对脑功能和精神障碍的预测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统脑网络分析方法难以有效捕捉区域间复杂连接关系，而Transformer在图结构数据上的成功启发了其在脑网络分析中的应用。
AI.method: 将脑网络建模为固定大小节点的图，利用连接特征作为节点位置信息，通过注意力机制学习ROI间连接强度，并设计正交聚类读出操作生成模块化嵌入表征。
AI.result: 在公开ABIDE数据集和受限ABCD数据集上均取得优于现有方法的实验结果，验证了模型有效性。
AI.conclusion: Brain Network Transformer通过结构化建模和聚类感知表征有效提升了脑网络分析性能，为相关研究提供了新工具。

authors_text: Ricky Sinclair,Muhammad Ashad Kabir
title: Understanding the Effect of Smartphone Cameras on Estimating Munsell Soil Colors from Imagery
title_zh: 了解智能手机相机对根据图像估计孟塞尔土壤颜色的影响
comment: 8 pages, 4 figures, accepted to publish in DICTA 2022 conference proceedings
comments: 8 pages, 4 figures, accepted to publish in DICTA 2022 conference proceedings
abstract: The Munsell soil color chart (MSCC) is a in laboratories under controlled conditions. To support an appbased solution, this paper explores three research areas including: (i) identifying the most effective color space, (ii) establishing then important reference for many professionals in the area of soil color analysis. Currently, the functionality to identify Munsell soil colors (MSCs) automatically from an image is only feasible color difference calculation method with the highest accuracy and (iii) evaluating the effects of smartphone cameras on estimating the MSCs. The existing methods that we have analysed have returned promising results and will help inform other researchers to better understand and develop informed solutions. This study provides both researchers and developers with an insight into the best methods for automatically predicting MSCs. Future research is needed to improve the reliability of results under differing environmental conditions.
summary: The Munsell soil color chart (MSCC) is a in laboratories under controlled conditions. Currently, the functionality to identify Munsell soil colors (MSCs) automatically from an image is only feasible color difference calculation method with the highest accuracy and (iii) evaluating the effects of smartphone cameras on estimating the MSCs. The existing methods that we have analysed have returned promising results and will help inform other researchers to better understand and develop informed solutions. This study provides both researchers and developers with an insight into the best methods for automatically predicting MSCs. Future research is needed to improve the reliability of results under differing environmental conditions.
abstract_zh: 孟塞尔土壤色卡 (MSCC) 是在受控条件下的实验室中制作的。为了支持基于应用程序的解决方案，本文探讨了三个研究领域，包括：(i) 确定最有效的色彩空间，(ii) 为土色分析领域的许多专业人士建立重要的参考。目前，从图像中自动识别孟塞尔土色（MSC）的功能是唯一可行的、精度最高的色差计算方法，并且（iii）评估智能手机摄像头对估计 MSC 的影响。我们分析的现有方法已经返回了有希望的结果，并将有助于其他研究人员更好地理解和开发明智的解决方案。这项研究为研究人员和开发人员提供了自动预测 MSC 的最佳方法的见解。未来的研究需要提高不同环境条件下结果的可靠性。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究智能手机摄像头在从图像中估计孟塞尔土壤颜色（MSCs）中的效果，并探索自动识别MSCs的最佳方法。
AI.motivation: 孟塞尔土壤色卡（MSCC）是土壤颜色分析的重要参考，但目前自动识别MSCs的功能仅在实验室受控条件下可行，需开发适用于实际环境的手机应用解决方案。
AI.method: 通过分析三种研究方向：（i）确定最有效的颜色空间，（ii）建立高准确度的颜色差异计算方法，（iii）评估智能手机摄像头对估计MSCs的影响。
AI.result: 现有方法在实验中表现良好，但需进一步研究以提高不同环境条件下的结果可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为研究人员和开发者提供了自动预测MSCs的最佳方法见解，未来需改进环境适应性以提升实用性。

search_text: Understanding the Effect of Smartphone Cameras on Estimating Munsell Soil Colors from Imagery 了解智能手机相机对根据图像估计孟塞尔土壤颜色的影响 The Munsell soil color chart (MSCC) is a in laboratories under controlled conditions. To support an appbased solution, this paper explores three research areas including: (i) identifying the most effective color space, (ii) establishing then important reference for many professionals in the area of soil color analysis. Currently, the functionality to identify Munsell soil colors (MSCs) automatically from an image is only feasible color difference calculation method with the highest accuracy and (iii) evaluating the effects of smartphone cameras on estimating the MSCs. The existing methods that we have analysed have returned promising results and will help inform other researchers to better understand and develop informed solutions. This study provides both researchers and developers with an insight into the best methods for automatically predicting MSCs. Future research is needed to improve the reliability of results under differing environmental conditions. 孟塞尔土壤色卡 (MSCC) 是在受控条件下的实验室中制作的。为了支持基于应用程序的解决方案，本文探讨了三个研究领域，包括：(i) 确定最有效的色彩空间，(ii) 为土色分析领域的许多专业人士建立重要的参考。目前，从图像中自动识别孟塞尔土色（MSC）的功能是唯一可行的、精度最高的色差计算方法，并且（iii）评估智能手机摄像头对估计 MSC 的影响。我们分析的现有方法已经返回了有希望的结果，并将有助于其他研究人员更好地理解和开发明智的解决方案。这项研究为研究人员和开发人员提供了自动预测 MSC 的最佳方法的见解。未来的研究需要提高不同环境条件下结果的可靠性。 该论文研究智能手机摄像头在从图像中估计孟塞尔土壤颜色（MSCs）中的效果，并探索自动识别MSCs的最佳方法。 Ricky Sinclair,Muhammad Ashad Kabir cs.CV

authors_text: Charis Y. N. Chiang,Fabian Braeu,Thanadet Chuangsuwanich,Royston K. Y. Tan,Jacqueline Chua,Leopold Schmetterer,Alexandre Thiery,Martin Buist,Michaël J. A. Girard
title: Are Macula or Optic Nerve Head Structures better at Diagnosing Glaucoma? An Answer using AI and Wide-Field Optical Coherence Tomography
title_zh: 黄斑或视神经头结构更适合诊断青光眼吗？使用人工智能和广域光学相干断层扫描的答案
abstract: Purpose: (1) To develop a deep learning algorithm to automatically segment structures of the optic nerve head (ONH) and macula in 3D wide-field optical coherence tomography (OCT) scans; (2) To assess whether 3D macula or ONH structures (or the combination of both) provide the best diagnostic power for glaucoma. Methods: A cross-sectional comparative study was performed which included wide-field swept-source OCT scans from 319 glaucoma subjects and 298 non-glaucoma subjects. All scans were compensated to improve deep-tissue visibility. We developed a deep learning algorithm to automatically label all major ONH tissue structures by using 270 manually annotated B-scans for training. The performance of our algorithm was assessed using the Dice coefficient (DC). A glaucoma classification algorithm (3D CNN) was then designed using a combination of 500 OCT volumes and their corresponding automatically segmented masks. This algorithm was trained and tested on 3 datasets: OCT scans cropped to contain the macular tissues only, those to contain the ONH tissues only, and the full wide-field OCT scans. The classification performance for each dataset was reported using the AUC. Results: Our segmentation algorithm was able to segment ONH and macular tissues with a DC of 0.94 $\pm$ 0.003. The classification algorithm was best able to diagnose glaucoma using wide-field 3D-OCT volumes with an AUC of 0.99 $\pm$ 0.01, followed by ONH volumes with an AUC of 0.93 $\pm$ 0.06, and finally macular volumes with an AUC of 0.91 $\pm$ 0.11. Conclusions: this study showed that using wide-field OCT as compared to the typical OCT images containing just the ONH or macular may allow for a significantly improved glaucoma diagnosis. This may encourage the mainstream adoption of 3D wide-field OCT scans. For clinical AI studies that use traditional machines, we would recommend the use of ONH scans as opposed to macula scans.

abstract_zh: 目的：（1）开发一种深度学习算法，在3D宽视场光学相干断层扫描（OCT）扫描中自动分割视神经乳头（ONH）和黄斑的结构； (2) 评估 3D 黄斑或 ONH 结构（或两者的组合）是否为青光眼提供最佳诊断能力。方法：进行了一项横断面比较研究，其中包括 319 名青光眼受试者和 298 名非青光眼受试者的宽视野扫源 OCT 扫描。所有扫描均经过补偿，以提高深层组织的可见度。我们开发了一种深度学习算法，通过使用 270 个手动注释的 B 扫描进行训练，自动标记所有主要 ONH 组织结构。我们的算法的性能是使用 Dice 系数 (DC) 进行评估的。然后使用 500 个 OCT 体积及其相应的自动分段掩模的组合来设计青光眼分类算法 (3D CNN)。该算法在 3 个数据集上进行了训练和测试：裁剪为仅包含黄斑组织的 OCT 扫描、仅包含 ONH 组织的 OCT 扫描以及全宽视野 OCT 扫描。使用 AUC 报告每个数据集的分类性能。结果：我们的分割算法能够以 0.94 $\pm$ 0.003 的 DC 分割 ONH 和黄斑组织。该分类算法能够最好地使用 AUC 为 0.99 $\pm$ 0.01 的宽视场 3D-OCT 体积诊断青光眼，其次是 AUC 为 0.93 $\pm$ 0.06 的 ONH 体积，最后是 AUC 为 0.91 $\pm$ 0.11 的黄斑体积。结论：本研究表明，与仅包含 ONH 或黄斑的典型 OCT 图像相比，使用宽视野 OCT 可以显着改善青光眼诊断。这可能会鼓励 3D 宽视场 OCT 扫描的主流采用。对于使用传统机器的临床人工智能研究，我们建议使用 ONH 扫描而不是黄斑扫描。

AI.tldr: 该论文开发了一种深度学习算法，用于分割视神经头（ONH）和黄斑区结构，并比较两者在广角OCT扫描中对青光眼诊断的效果。
AI.motivation: 研究旨在确定广角OCT扫描（包含ONH和黄斑区）是否比传统仅聚焦ONH或黄斑区的扫描更能提高青光眼诊断准确性。
AI.method: 采用横断面比较研究，收集319例青光眼和298例非青光眼患者的广角OCT数据，开发深度学习分割算法并训练3D卷积神经网络（CNN）分类器，分别在黄斑区、ONH区和全广角OCT数据集上测试诊断性能（AUC）。
AI.result: 分割算法Dice系数达0.94；全广角OCT分类AUC为0.99，ONH区为0.93，黄斑区为0.91，广角扫描显著优于局部区域。
AI.conclusion: 广角OCT可显著提升青光眼诊断效果，建议临床AI研究优先采用ONH扫描而非黄斑区扫描。

authors_text: Maying Shen,Hongxu Yin,Pavlo Molchanov,Lei Mao,Jianna Liu,Jose M. Alvarez
title: Structural Pruning via Latency-Saliency Knapsack
title_zh: 通过延迟显着性背包进行结构修剪
comment: Accepted by NeurIPS 2022. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2110.10811
comments: Accepted by NeurIPS 2022. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2110.10811
abstract: Structural pruning can simplify network architecture and improve inference speed. We propose Hardware-Aware Latency Pruning (HALP) that formulates structural pruning as a global resource allocation optimization problem, aiming at maximizing the accuracy while constraining latency under a predefined budget on targeting device. For filter importance ranking, HALP leverages latency lookup table to track latency reduction potential and global saliency score to gauge accuracy drop. Both metrics can be evaluated very efficiently during pruning, allowing us to reformulate global structural pruning under a reward maximization problem given target constraint. This makes the problem solvable via our augmented knapsack solver, enabling HALP to surpass prior work in pruning efficacy and accuracy-efficiency trade-off. We examine HALP on both classification and detection tasks, over varying networks, on ImageNet and VOC datasets, on different platforms. In particular, for ResNet-50/-101 pruning on ImageNet, HALP improves network throughput by $1.60\times$/$1.90\times$ with $+0.3\%$/$-0.2\%$ top-1 accuracy changes, respectively. For SSD pruning on VOC, HALP improves throughput by $1.94\times$ with only a $0.56$ mAP drop. HALP consistently outperforms prior art, sometimes by large margins. Project page at https://halp-neurips.github.io/.
summary: Structural pruning can simplify network architecture and improve inference speed. We propose Hardware-Aware Latency Pruning (HALP) that formulates structural pruning as a global resource allocation optimization problem, aiming at maximizing the accuracy while constraining latency under a predefined budget on targeting device. For filter importance ranking, HALP leverages latency lookup table to track latency reduction potential and global saliency score to gauge accuracy drop. Both metrics can be evaluated very efficiently during pruning, allowing us to reformulate global structural pruning under a reward maximization problem given target constraint. This makes the problem solvable via our augmented knapsack solver, enabling HALP to surpass prior work in pruning efficacy and accuracy-efficiency trade-off. We examine HALP on both classification and detection tasks, over varying networks, on ImageNet and VOC datasets, on different platforms. In particular, for ResNet-50/-101 pruning on ImageNet, HALP improves network throughput by $1.60\times$/$1.90\times$ with $+0.3\%$/$-0.2\%$ top-1 accuracy changes, respectively. For SSD pruning on VOC, HALP improves throughput by $1.94\times$ with only a $0.56$ mAP drop. HALP consistently outperforms prior art, sometimes by large margins. Project page at https://halp-neurips.github.io/.
abstract_zh: 结构剪枝可以简化网络架构并提高推理速度。我们提出了硬件感知延迟修剪（HALP），它将结构修剪制定为全局资源分配优化问题，旨在最大化准确性，同时将延迟限制在目标设备上的预定义预算内。对于过滤器重要性排名，HALP 利用延迟查找表来跟踪延迟减少潜力和全局显着性分数来衡量准确性下降。这两个指标都可以在剪枝过程中非常有效地进行评估，使我们能够在给定目标约束的奖励最大化问题下重新制定全局结构剪枝。这使得问题可以通过我们的增强背包求解器来解决，使 HALP 能够超越之前在修剪功效和准确性-效率权衡方面的工作。我们在不同的网络、ImageNet 和 VOC 数据集、不同的平台上检查分类和检测任务上的 HALP。特别是，对于 ImageNet 上的 ResNet-50/-101 剪枝，HALP 将网络吞吐量分别提高了 $1.60\times$/$1.90\times$，同时 $+0.3\%$/$-0.2\%$ top-1 精度变化。对于 VOC 上的 SSD 修剪，HALP 将吞吐量提高了 $1.94\times$，而 mAP 仅下降了 $0.56$。 HALP 始终优于现有技术，有时甚至大幅领先。项目页面位于 https://halp-neurips.github.io/。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为HALP的结构化剪枝方法，通过将剪枝问题建模为硬件感知的延迟-显著性背包问题，以在预定义的延迟预算下最大化模型精度。
AI.motivation: 现有结构化剪枝方法难以在模型精度与推理延迟之间取得良好平衡，尤其缺乏针对特定硬件平台的优化策略。
AI.method: HALP结合延迟查找表和全局显著性评分，通过高效评估滤波器的重要性，将全局结构剪枝转化为约束条件下的奖励最大化问题，并采用改进的背包算法求解。
AI.result: 在ImageNet和VOC数据集上，HALP在ResNet-50/-101模型上分别实现1.60×/1.90×的吞吐量提升（精度变化+0.3%/−0.2%），在SSD模型上提升1.94×吞吐量（mAP下降0.56），优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: HALP通过硬件感知的优化框架，在模型压缩领域实现了更优的精度-效率权衡，为实际部署提供了有效解决方案。

search_text: Structural Pruning via Latency-Saliency Knapsack 通过延迟显着性背包进行结构修剪 Structural pruning can simplify network architecture and improve inference speed. We propose Hardware-Aware Latency Pruning (HALP) that formulates structural pruning as a global resource allocation optimization problem, aiming at maximizing the accuracy while constraining latency under a predefined budget on targeting device. For filter importance ranking, HALP leverages latency lookup table to track latency reduction potential and global saliency score to gauge accuracy drop. Both metrics can be evaluated very efficiently during pruning, allowing us to reformulate global structural pruning under a reward maximization problem given target constraint. This makes the problem solvable via our augmented knapsack solver, enabling HALP to surpass prior work in pruning efficacy and accuracy-efficiency trade-off. We examine HALP on both classification and detection tasks, over varying networks, on ImageNet and VOC datasets, on different platforms. In particular, for ResNet-50/-101 pruning on ImageNet, HALP improves network throughput by $1.60\times$/$1.90\times$ with $+0.3\%$/$-0.2\%$ top-1 accuracy changes, respectively. For SSD pruning on VOC, HALP improves throughput by $1.94\times$ with only a $0.56$ mAP drop. HALP consistently outperforms prior art, sometimes by large margins. authors_text: Diana Kim,Virgil Watkins,Laszlo Cline,Jingxian Li,Kai Sun,Joshua D. Sugar,Elliot J. Fuller,A. Alec Talin,Yiyang Li
title: Nonvolatile Electrochemical Random-Access Memory Under Short Circuit
title_zh: 短路下的非易失性电化学随机存取存储器
abstract: Electrochemical random-access memory (ECRAM) is a recently developed and highly promising analog resistive memory element for in-memory computing. One longstanding challenge of ECRAM is attaining retention time beyond a few hours. This short retention has precluded ECRAM from being considered for inference classification in deep neural networks, which is likely the largest opportunity for in-memory computing. In this work, we develop an ECRAM cell with orders of magnitude longer retention than previously achieved, and which we anticipate to exceed 10 years at 85C. We hypothesize that the origin of this exceptional retention is phase separation, which enables the formation of multiple effectively equilibrium resistance states. This work highlights the promises and opportunities to use phase separation to yield ECRAM cells with exceptionally long, and potentially permanent, retention times.
summary: Electrochemical random-access memory (ECRAM) is a recently developed and highly promising analog resistive memory element for in-memory computing. One longstanding challenge of ECRAM is attaining retention time beyond a few hours. This short retention has precluded ECRAM from being considered for inference classification in deep neural networks, which is likely the largest opportunity for in-memory computing. In this work, we develop an ECRAM cell with orders of magnitude longer retention than previously achieved, and which we anticipate to exceed 10 years at 85C. We hypothesize that the origin of this exceptional retention is phase separation, which enables the formation of multiple effectively equilibrium resistance states. This work highlights the promises and opportunities to use phase separation to yield ECRAM cells with exceptionally long, and potentially permanent, retention times.
abstract_zh: 电化学随机存取存储器 (ECRAM) 是一种最近开发的、非常有前途的用于内存计算的模拟电阻存储元件。 ECRAM 的一项长期挑战是实现几个小时以上的保留时间。这种短暂的保留使得 ECRAM 无法被考虑用于深度神经网络中的推理分类，而这可能是内存计算的最大机会。在这项工作中，我们开发了一种 ECRAM 单元，其保留时间比之前实现的要长几个数量级，我们预计其在 85°C 下的保存时间将超过 10 年。我们假设这种特殊保留的根源是相分离，它能够形成多个有效平衡的电阻状态。这项工作强调了使用相分离生产具有极长且可能永久保留时间的 ECRAM 单元的前景和机会。

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一种具有超长保持时间的非易失性电化学随机存取存储器（ECRAM），以解决其在深度神经网络推理分类中的应用限制。
AI.motivation: ECRAM的保持时间不足几小时，阻碍了其在需要长期数据保留的深度神经网络推理分类中的应用。
AI.method: 通过相分离机制形成多个有效平衡电阻态，显著延长ECRAM的保持时间。
AI.result: 新开发的ECRAM单元在85°C条件下预计保持时间超过10年，实现保持时间数量级的提升。
AI.conclusion: 相分离为ECRAM提供了实现超长甚至永久保持时间的潜力，为内存计算技术开辟了新方向。

authors_text: Tsun-Hsuan Wang,Wei Xiao,Tim Seyde,Ramin Hasani,Daniela Rus
title: Interpreting Neural Policies with Disentangled Tree Representations
title_zh: 用解开的树表示解释神经策略
abstract: The advancement of robots, particularly those functioning in complex human-centric environments, relies on control solutions that are driven by machine learning. Understanding how learning-based controllers make decisions is crucial since robots are often safety-critical systems. This urges a formal and quantitative understanding of the explanatory factors in the interpretability of robot learning. In this paper, we aim to study interpretability of compact neural policies through the lens of disentangled representation. We leverage decision trees to obtain factors of variation [1] for disentanglement in robot learning; these encapsulate skills, behaviors, or strategies toward solving tasks. To assess how well networks uncover the underlying task dynamics, we introduce interpretability metrics that measure disentanglement of learned neural dynamics from a concentration of decisions, mutual information and modularity perspective. We showcase the effectiveness of the connection between interpretability and disentanglement consistently across extensive experimental analysis.
summary: The advancement of robots, particularly those functioning in complex human-centric environments, relies on control solutions that are driven by machine learning. Understanding how learning-based controllers make decisions is crucial since robots are often safety-critical systems. This urges a formal and quantitative understanding of the explanatory factors in the interpretability of robot learning. In this paper, we aim to study interpretability of compact neural policies through the lens of disentangled representation. We leverage decision trees to obtain factors of variation [1] for disentanglement in robot learning; these encapsulate skills, behaviors, or strategies toward solving tasks. To assess how well networks uncover the underlying task dynamics, we introduce interpretability metrics that measure disentanglement of learned neural dynamics from a concentration of decisions, mutual information and modularity perspective. We showcase the effectiveness of the connection between interpretability and disentanglement consistently across extensive experimental analysis.
abstract_zh: 机器人的进步，特别是那些在复杂的以人为中心的环境中运行的机器人，依赖于机器学习驱动的控制解决方案。了解基于学习的控制器如何做出决策至关重要，因为机器人通常是安全关键系统。这促使人们对机器人学习的可解释性的解释因素进行正式和定量的理解。在本文中，我们的目标是通过解开表示的视角来研究紧凑神经策略的可解释性。我们利用决策树来获取变异因素[1]，以解开机器人学习中的纠缠；这些概括了解决任务的技能、行为或策略。为了评估网络如何更好地揭示潜在的任务动态，我们引入了可解释性指标，这些指标从决策集中、相互信息和模块化的角度来衡量学习神经动态的解开程度。我们通过广泛的实验分析一致地展示了可解释性和解开之间联系的有效性。

AI.tldr: 研究如何通过解耦树表示提升神经策略的可解释性，以理解机器人学习中的决策因素。
AI.motivation: 机器人决策需安全可靠，但现有学习控制器缺乏形式化可解释性分析，需定量理解其决策因素。
AI.method: 利用决策树提取任务变化因素，结合决策集中度、互信息和模块化指标评估神经网络的解耦效果。
AI.result: 实验验证了解耦程度与可解释性之间的显著关联，表明方法能有效揭示任务动态。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法为机器人学习中的可解释性研究提供了形式化分析框架，有助于提升决策透明度。
