search_text: Interpreting Neural Policies with Disentangled Tree Representations 用解开的树表示解释神经策略 The advancement of robots, particularly those functioning in complex human-centric environments, relies on control solutions that are driven by machine learning. Understanding how learning-based controllers make decisions is crucial since robots are often safety-critical systems. This urges a formal and quantitative understanding of the explanatory factors in the interpretability of robot learning. In this paper, we aim to study interpretability of compact neural policies through the lens of disentangled representation. We leverage decision trees to obtain factors of variation [1] for disentanglement in robot learning; these encapsulate skills, behaviors, or strategies toward solving tasks. To assess how well networks uncover the underlying task dynamics, we introduce interpretability metrics that measure disentanglement of learned neural dynamics from a concentration of decisions, mutual information and modularity perspective. We showcase the effectiveness of the connection between interpretability and disentanglement consistently across extensive experimental analysis. 机器人的进步，特别是那些在复杂的以人为中心的环境中运行的机器人，依赖于机器学习驱动的控制解决方案。了解基于学习的控制器如何做出决策至关重要，因为机器人通常是安全关键系统。这促使人们对机器人学习的可解释性的解释因素进行正式和定量的理解。在本文中，我们的目标是通过解开表示的视角来研究紧凑神经策略的可解释性。我们利用决策树来获取变异因素[1]，以解开机器人学习中的纠缠；这些概括了解决任务的技能、行为或策略。为了评估网络如何更好地揭示潜在的任务动态，我们引入了可解释性指标，这些指标从决策集中、相互信息和模块化的角度来衡量学习神经动态的解开程度。我们通过广泛的实验分析一致地展示了可解释性和解开之间联系的有效性。 研究如何通过解耦树表示提升神经策略的可解释性，以理解机器人学习中的决策因素。 Tsun-Hsuan Wang,Wei Xiao,Tim Seyde,Ramin Hasani,Daniela Rus cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.NE,cs.RO,stat.ML

authors_text: Md. Shirajum Munir,Ki Tae Kim,Apurba Adhikary,Walid Saad,Sachin Shetty,Seong-Bae Park,Choong Seon Hong
title: Neuro-symbolic Explainable Artificial Intelligence Twin for Zero-touch IoE in Wireless Network
title_zh: 用于无线网络中零接触 IoE 的神经符号可解释人工智能双胞胎
comment: Submitted to a journal for peer review
comments: Submitted to a journal for peer review
abstract: Explainable artificial intelligence (XAI) twin systems will be a fundamental enabler of zero-touch network and service management (ZSM) for sixth-generation (6G) wireless networks. A reliable XAI twin system for ZSM requires two composites: an extreme analytical ability for discretizing the physical behavior of the Internet of Everything (IoE) and rigorous methods for characterizing the reasoning of such behavior. In this paper, a novel neuro-symbolic explainable artificial intelligence twin framework is proposed to enable trustworthy ZSM for a wireless IoE. The physical space of the XAI twin executes a neural-network-driven multivariate regression to capture the time-dependent wireless IoE environment while determining unconscious decisions of IoE service aggregation. Subsequently, the virtual space of the XAI twin constructs a directed acyclic graph (DAG)-based Bayesian network that can infer a symbolic reasoning score over unconscious decisions through a first-order probabilistic language model. Furthermore, a Bayesian multi-arm bandits-based learning problem is proposed for reducing the gap between the expected explained score and the current obtained score of the proposed neuro-symbolic XAI twin. To address the challenges of extensible, modular, and stateless management functions in ZSM, the proposed neuro-symbolic XAI twin framework consists of two learning systems: 1) an implicit learner that acts as an unconscious learner in physical space, and 2) an explicit leaner that can exploit symbolic reasoning based on implicit learner decisions and prior evidence. Experimental results show that the proposed neuro-symbolic XAI twin can achieve around 96.26% accuracy while guaranteeing from 18% to 44% more trust score in terms of reasoning and closed-loop automation.
summary: Explainable artificial intelligence (XAI) twin systems will be a fundamental enabler of zero-touch network and service management (ZSM) for sixth-generation (6G) wireless networks. A reliable XAI twin system for ZSM requires two composites: an extreme analytical ability for discretizing the physical behavior of the Internet of Everything (IoE) and rigorous methods for characterizing the reasoning of such behavior. In this paper, a novel neuro-symbolic explainable artificial intelligence twin framework is proposed to enable trustworthy ZSM for a wireless IoE. The physical space of the XAI twin executes a neural-network-driven multivariate regression to capture the time-dependent wireless IoE environment while determining unconscious decisions of IoE service aggregation. Subsequently, the virtual space of the XAI twin constructs a directed acyclic graph (DAG)-based Bayesian network that can infer a symbolic reasoning score over unconscious decisions through a first-order probabilistic language model. Furthermore, a Bayesian multi-arm bandits-based learning problem is proposed for reducing the gap between the expected explained score and the current obtained score of the proposed neuro-symbolic XAI twin. To address the challenges of extensible, modular, and stateless management functions in ZSM, the proposed neuro-symbolic XAI twin framework consists of two learning systems: 1) an implicit learner that acts as an unconscious learner in physical space, and 2) an explicit leaner that can exploit symbolic reasoning based on implicit learner decisions and prior evidence. Experimental results show that the proposed neuro-symbolic XAI twin can achieve around 96.26% accuracy while guaranteeing from 18% to 44% more trust score in terms of reasoning and closed-loop automation.
abstract_zh: 可解释的人工智能 (XAI) 双系统将成为第六代 (6G) 无线网络零接触网络和服务管理 (ZSM) 的基本推动者。用于 ZSM 的可靠 XAI 孪生系统需要两种组合：用于离散化万物互联 (IoE) 物理行为的极端分析能力和用于表征此类行为推理的严格方法。在本文中，提出了一种新颖的神经符号可解释人工智能孪生框架，为无线 IoE 提供值得信赖的 ZSM。 XAI 孪生的物理空间执行神经网络驱动的多元回归，以捕获时间相关的无线 IoE 环境，同时确定 IoE 服务聚合的无意识决策。随后，XAI 双胞胎的虚拟空间构建了一个基于有向无环图（DAG）的贝叶斯网络，该网络可以通过一阶概率语言模型推断出无意识决策的符号推理分数。此外，提出了基于贝叶斯多臂老虎机的学习问题，以减少所提出的神经符号 XAI 孪生的预期解释分数与当前获得的分数之间的差距。为了解决 ZSM 中可扩展、模块化和无状态管理功能的挑战，所提出的神经符号 XAI 孪生框架由两个学习系统组成：1）一个隐式学习器，在物理空间中充当无意识学习器；2）一个显式学习器，可以利用基于隐式学习器决策和先前证据的符号推理。实验结果表明，所提出的神经符号 XAI 孪生可以实现约 96.26% 的准确率，同时保证推理和闭环自动化方面的信任分数提高 18% 至 44%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种神经符号可解释人工智能双胞胎框架，用于实现无线物联网环境下的零接触网络与服务管理。
AI.motivation: 现有可解释人工智能（XAI）系统难以满足第六代（6G）无线网络中对零接触管理（ZSM）所需的高可靠性、可扩展性和模块化需求。
AI.method: 结合神经网络驱动的多变量回归与基于有向无环图（DAG）的贝叶斯网络，构建物理空间与虚拟空间双层架构，并引入贝叶斯多臂老虎机算法优化决策差距。
AI.result: 实验表明该框架在准确率上达到96.26%，推理与闭环自动化信任评分提升18%-44%。
AI.conclusion: 神经符号XAI双胞胎框架有效解决了ZSM中扩展性、模块化与无状态管理的挑战，为6G网络提供可信的自动化解决方案。

authors_text: Yuuki Tachioka
title: ditlab system for Dialogue Robot Competition 2022
title_zh: 2022年对话机器人大赛ditlab系统
comment: This paper is part of the proceedings of the Dialogue Robot Competition 2022
comments: This paper is part of the proceedings of the Dialogue Robot Competition 2022
abstract: We developed a dialogue system for Dialogue Robot Competition 2022. Our system is composed of three parts. First part investigates participants' demographic information by rule-based interview. Second part recommends a point of interest (POI) based on the collected demographic information. Third part answers participants' question based on the combination of rule-based answering and deep-learning-based answering with nearby POI search.
summary: We developed a dialogue system for Dialogue Robot Competition 2022. Our system is composed of three parts. First part investigates participants' demographic information by rule-based interview. Second part recommends a point of interest (POI) based on the collected demographic information. Third part answers participants' question based on the combination of rule-based answering and deep-learning-based answering with nearby POI search.
abstract_zh: 我们为2022年对话机器人大赛开发了一个对话系统。我们的系统由三部分组成。第一部分通过基于规则的访谈调查参与者的人口统计信息。第二部分根据收集的人口统计信息推荐兴趣点（POI）。第三部分通过基于规则的回答和基于深度学习的回答与附近POI搜索​​相结合来回答参与者的问题。

AI.tldr: 开发用于对话机器人竞赛的三模块对话系统，包含人口信息收集、POI推荐及混合回答机制。
AI.motivation: 为提升对话机器人在个性化交互与场景化服务中的表现，解决传统系统在动态信息整合与多模态回答方面的不足。
AI.method: 系统分三部分：基于规则的用户人口信息采集模块、结合用户特征的POI推荐模块、融合规则引擎与深度学习模型的问答模块（含附近POI检索）。
AI.result: 系统在竞赛中实现有效的人口信息分析、个性化POI推荐及多策略问答，提升对话流畅性与场景适应性。
AI.conclusion: 混合方法有效平衡规则可解释性与深度学习灵活性，为竞赛场景下的对话系统设计提供可行方案。

authors_text: Eric Ming Chen,Jin Sun,Apoorv Khandelwal,Dani Lischinski,Noah Snavely,Hadar Averbuch-Elor
title: What's in a Decade? Transforming Faces Through Time
title_zh: 十年后会发生什么？随着时间的推移改变面孔
abstract: How can one visually characterize people in a decade? In this work, we assemble the Faces Through Time dataset, which contains over a thousand portrait images from each decade, spanning the 1880s to the present day. Using our new dataset, we present a framework for resynthesizing portrait images across time, imagining how a portrait taken during a particular decade might have looked like, had it been taken in other decades. Our framework optimizes a family of per-decade generators that reveal subtle changes that differentiate decade--such as different hairstyles or makeup--while maintaining the identity of the input portrait. Experiments show that our method is more effective in resynthesizing portraits across time compared to state-of-the-art image-to-image translation methods, as well as attribute-based and language-guided portrait editing models. Our code and data will be available at https://facesthroughtime.github.io
summary: How can one visually characterize people in a decade? In this work, we assemble the Faces Through Time dataset, which contains over a thousand portrait images from each decade, spanning the 1880s to the present day. Using our new dataset, we present a framework for resynthesizing portrait images across time, imagining how a portrait taken during a particular decade might have looked like, had it been taken in other decades. Our framework optimizes a family of per-decade generators that reveal subtle changes that differentiate decade--such as different hairstyles or makeup--while maintaining the identity of the input portrait. Experiments show that our method is more effective in resynthesizing portraits across time compared to state-of-the-art image-to-image translation methods, as well as attribute-based and language-guided portrait editing models. Our code and data will be available at https://facesthroughtime.github.io
abstract_zh: 如何从视觉上描绘十年后的人们？在这项工作中，我们收集了 Faces Through Time 数据集，其中包含从 1880 年代至今每个十年的一千多张肖像图像。使用我们的新数据集，我们提出了一个跨时间重新合成肖像图像的框架，想象在特定十年拍摄的肖像如果在其他几十年拍摄的话会是什么样子。我们的框架优化了一系列每十年的生成器，这些生成器揭示了区分十年的微妙变化（例如不同的发型或化妆），同时保持输入肖像的身份。实验表明，与最先进的图像到图像翻译方法以及基于属性和语言引导的肖像编辑模型相比，我们的方法在跨时间重新合成肖像方面更有效。我们的代码和数据将在 https://facesthroughtime.github.io 上提供

AI.tldr: 本文构建了一个跨越1880年代至当下的肖像数据集，并开发了一种跨时代肖像重合成框架，能够保持人物身份的同时模拟不同年代的发型、妆容等细节变化。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对人物外观随时间演变的系统性分析，且难以生成符合特定历史背景的肖像。本文旨在通过构建大规模时序数据集和优化生成框架，探索跨时代肖像变换的可行性。
AI.method: 收集每个年代超过千张肖像构建数据集，设计基于时代划分的生成器家族，通过优化算法捕捉发型、妆容等细微差异，在保持输入肖像身份特征的前提下实现跨时代重合成。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在跨时代肖像生成任务中优于当前最先进的图像翻译和属性编辑模型，且代码与数据集已公开。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出了首个大规模时序肖像数据集和跨时代重合成框架，验证了基于时代特征的生成模型在保持身份一致性方面的有效性，为历史图像重建提供了新思路。

authors_text: Sri Krishna Vadlamani,Dirk Englund,Ryan Hamerly
title: Transferable Learning on Analog Hardware
title_zh: 模拟硬件上的可迁移学习
abstract: While analog neural network (NN) accelerators promise massive energy and time savings, an important challenge is to make them robust to static fabrication error. Present-day training methods for programmable photonic interferometer circuits, a leading analog NN platform, do not produce networks that perform well in the presence of static hardware errors. Moreover, existing hardware error correction techniques either require individual re-training of every analog NN (which is impractical in an edge setting with millions of devices), place stringent demands on component quality, or introduce hardware overhead. We solve all three problems by introducing one-time error-aware training techniques that produce robust NNs that match the performance of ideal hardware and can be exactly transferred to arbitrary highly faulty photonic NNs with hardware errors up to 5x larger than present-day fabrication tolerances.
summary: While analog neural network (NN) accelerators promise massive energy and time savings, an important challenge is to make them robust to static fabrication error. Present-day training methods for programmable photonic interferometer circuits, a leading analog NN platform, do not produce networks that perform well in the presence of static hardware errors. Moreover, existing hardware error correction techniques either require individual re-training of every analog NN (which is impractical in an edge setting with millions of devices), place stringent demands on component quality, or introduce hardware overhead. We solve all three problems by introducing one-time error-aware training techniques that produce robust NNs that match the performance of ideal hardware and can be exactly transferred to arbitrary highly faulty photonic NNs with hardware errors up to 5x larger than present-day fabrication tolerances.
abstract_zh: 虽然模拟神经网络 (NN) 加速器有望节省大量能源和时间，但一个重要的挑战是使其对静态制造误差具有鲁棒性。目前用于可编程光子干涉仪电路（领先的模拟神经网络平台）的训练方法无法产生在存在静态硬件错误的情况下表现良好的网络。此外，现有的硬件纠错技术要么需要对每个模拟神经网络进行单独的重新训练（这在拥有数百万台设备的边缘设置中是不切实际的），要么对组件质量提出严格的要求，要么引入硬件开销。我们通过引入一次性错误感知训练技术来解决所有三个问题，该技术可产生与理想硬件性能相匹配的鲁棒神经网络，并且可以准确地转移到任意高度错误的光子神经网络，其硬件错误高达当今制造公差的 5 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可迁移学习方法，解决模拟神经网络硬件中的静态制造误差问题，提升其鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有模拟神经网络训练方法无法应对硬件误差，纠错技术存在重新训练成本高、硬件开销大或组件质量要求严苛等问题。
AI.method: 引入一次性错误感知训练技术，生成对硬件误差鲁棒的神经网络，可直接迁移至任意高故障率光子硬件。
AI.result: 所提方法生成的网络性能与理想硬件相当，可迁移至误差容忍度比现有制造公差大5倍的硬件。
AI.conclusion: 该方法同时解决了硬件误差鲁棒性、迁移性及边缘设备部署可行性三大难题。

authors_text: Qi Qi,Shervin Ardeshir,Yi Xu,Tianbao Yang
title: Fairness via Adversarial Attribute Neighbourhood Robust Learning
title_zh: 通过对抗性属性邻域鲁棒学习实现公平
abstract: Improving fairness between privileged and less-privileged sensitive attribute groups (e.g, {race, gender}) has attracted lots of attention. To enhance the model performs uniformly well in different sensitive attributes, we propose a principled \underline{R}obust \underline{A}dversarial \underline{A}ttribute \underline{N}eighbourhood (RAAN) loss to debias the classification head and promote a fairer representation distribution across different sensitive attribute groups. The key idea of RAAN is to mitigate the differences of biased representations between different sensitive attribute groups by assigning each sample an adversarial robust weight, which is defined on the representations of adversarial attribute neighbors, i.e, the samples from different protected groups. To provide efficient optimization algorithms, we cast the RAAN into a sum of coupled compositional functions and propose a stochastic adaptive (Adam-style) and non-adaptive (SGD-style) algorithm framework SCRAAN with provable theoretical guarantee. Extensive empirical studies on fairness-related benchmark datasets verify the effectiveness of the proposed method.
summary: Improving fairness between privileged and less-privileged sensitive attribute groups (e.g, {race, gender}) has attracted lots of attention. To enhance the model performs uniformly well in different sensitive attributes, we propose a principled \underline{R}obust \underline{A}dversarial \underline{A}ttribute \underline{N}eighbourhood (RAAN) loss to debias the classification head and promote a fairer representation distribution across different sensitive attribute groups. The key idea of RAAN is to mitigate the differences of biased representations between different sensitive attribute groups by assigning each sample an adversarial robust weight, which is defined on the representations of adversarial attribute neighbors, i.e, the samples from different protected groups. To provide efficient optimization algorithms, we cast the RAAN into a sum of coupled compositional functions and propose a stochastic adaptive (Adam-style) and non-adaptive (SGD-style) algorithm framework SCRAAN with provable theoretical guarantee. Extensive empirical studies on fairness-related benchmark datasets verify the effectiveness of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 提高特权和特权较低的敏感属性组（例如{种族，性别}）之间的公平性引起了很多关注。为了增强模型在不同敏感属性上的一致表现，我们提出了一种有原则的 \underline{R}obust \underline{A}dversarial \underline{A}ttribute \underline{N}eighbourhood (RAAN) 损失，以消除分类头的偏差，并促进不同敏感属性组之间更公平的表示分布。 RAAN 的关键思想是通过为每个样本分配一个对抗性鲁棒权重来减轻不同敏感属性组之间偏差表示的差异，该权重是在对抗性属性邻居的表示上定义的，即来自不同保护组的样本。为了提供有效的优化算法，我们将 RAAN 转化为耦合组合函数的总和，并提出了具有可证明理论保证的随机自适应（Adam 式）和非自适应（SGD 式）算法框架 SCRAAN。对公平相关基准数据集的广泛实证研究验证了所提出方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种对抗属性邻域鲁棒学习方法（RAAN），通过优化分类头和表示分布来提升模型在不同敏感属性群体间的公平性。
AI.motivation: 现有模型在特权与非特权敏感属性群体（如种族、性别）间表现不均衡，需设计统一优化方法以减少偏差并提升跨群体公平性。
AI.method: 设计RAAN损失函数，为每个样本分配基于对抗属性邻居表示的鲁棒权重，结合耦合函数分解提出SCRAAN算法框架（含自适应与非自适应优化方案）。
AI.result: 在多个公平性基准数据集上验证了RAAN方法的有效性，显著提升了模型跨敏感属性群体的公平性指标。
AI.conclusion: RAAN通过对抗鲁棒学习有效缓解了表示偏差，为公平性优化提供了理论保证与实用算法框架。

ai_content_json.result: 在多个公平性基准数据集上验证了RAAN方法的有效性，显著提升了模型跨敏感属性群体的公平性指标。
ai_content_json.conclusion: RAAN通过对抗鲁棒学习有效缓解了表示偏差，为公平性优化提供了理论保证与实用算法框架。

tldr: 本文提出一种对抗属性邻域鲁棒学习方法（RAAN），通过优化分类头和表示分布来提升模型在不同敏感属性群体间的公平性。
motivation: 现有模型在特权与非特权敏感属性群体（如种族、性别）间表现不均衡，需设计统一优化方法以减少偏差并提升跨群体公平性。
method: 设计RAAN损失函数，为每个样本分配基于对抗属性邻居表示的鲁棒权重，结合耦合函数分解提出SCRAAN算法框架（含自适应与非自适应优化方案）。
result: 在多个公平性基准数据集上验证了RAAN方法的有效性，显著提升了模型跨敏感属性群体的公平性指标。
conclusion: RAAN通过对抗鲁棒学习有效缓解了表示偏差，为公平性优化提供了理论保证与实用算法框架。
search_text: Fairness via Adversarial Attribute Neighbourhood Robust Learning 通过对抗性属性邻域鲁棒学习实现公平 Improving fairness between privileged and less-privileged sensitive attribute groups (e.g, {race, gender}) has attracted lots of attention. To enhance the model performs uniformly well in different sensitive attributes, we propose a principled \underline{R}obust \underline{A}dversarial \underline{A}ttribute \underline{N}eighbourhood (RAAN) loss to debias the classification head and promote a fairer representation distribution across different sensitive attribute groups. The key idea of RAAN is to mitigate the differences of biased representations between different sensitive attribute groups by assigning each sample an adversarial robust weight, which is defined on the representations of adversarial attribute neighbors, i.e, the samples from different protected groups. To provide efficient optimization algorithms, we cast the RAAN into a sum of coupled compositional functions and propose a stochastic adaptive (Adam-style) and non-adaptive (SGD-style) algorithm framework SCRAAN with provable theoretical guarantee. Extensive empirical studies on fairness-related benchmark datasets verify the effectiveness of the proposed method. 提高特权和特权较低的敏感属性组（例如{种族，性别}）之间的公平性引起了很多关注。为了增强模型在不同敏感属性上的一致表现，我们提出了一种有原则的 \underline{R}obust \underline{A}dversarial \underline{A}ttribute \underline{N}eighbourhood (RAAN) 损失，以消除分类头的偏差，并促进不同敏感属性组之间更公平的表示分布。 RAAN 的关键思想是通过为每个样本分配一个对抗性鲁棒权重来减轻不同敏感属性组之间偏差表示的差异，该权重是在对抗性属性邻居的表示上定义的，即来自不同保护组的样本。为了提供有效的优化算法，我们将 RAAN 转化为耦合组合函数的总和，并提出了具有可证明理论保证的随机自适应（Adam 式）和非自适应（SGD 式）算法框架 SCRAAN。对公平相关基准数据集的广泛实证研究验证了所提出方法的有效性。 本文提出一种对抗属性邻域鲁棒学习方法（RAAN），通过优化分类头和表示分布来提升模型在不同敏感属性群体间的公平性。 Qi Qi,Shervin Ardeshir,Yi Xu,Tianbao Yang cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: David Berga,Pau Gallés,Katalin Takáts,Eva Mohedano,Laura Riordan-Chen,Clara Garcia-Moll,David Vilaseca,Javier Marín
title: QMRNet: Quality Metric Regression for EO Image Quality Assessment and Super-Resolution
title_zh: QMRNet：EO 图像质量评估和超分辨率的质量度量回归
abstract: Latest advances in Super-Resolution (SR) have been tested with general purpose images such as faces, landscapes and objects, mainly unused for the task of super-resolving Earth Observation (EO) images. In this research paper, we benchmark state-of-the-art SR algorithms for distinct EO datasets using both Full-Reference and No-Reference Image Quality Assessment (IQA) metrics. We also propose a novel Quality Metric Regression Network (QMRNet) that is able to predict quality (as a No-Reference metric) by training on any property of the image (i.e. its resolution, its distortions...) and also able to optimize SR algorithms for a specific metric objective. This work is part of the implementation of the framework IQUAFLOW which has been developed for evaluating image quality, detection and classification of objects as well as image compression in EO use cases. We integrated our experimentation and tested our QMRNet algorithm on predicting features like blur, sharpness, snr, rer and ground sampling distance (GSD) and obtain validation medRs below 1.0 (out of N=50) and recall rates above 95\%. Overall benchmark shows promising results for LIIF, CAR and MSRN and also the potential use of QMRNet as Loss for optimizing SR predictions. Due to its simplicity, QMRNet could also be used for other use cases and image domains, as its architecture and data processing is fully scalable.
summary: Latest advances in Super-Resolution (SR) have been tested with general purpose images such as faces, landscapes and objects, mainly unused for the task of super-resolving Earth Observation (EO) images. In this research paper, we benchmark state-of-the-art SR algorithms for distinct EO datasets using both Full-Reference and No-Reference Image Quality Assessment (IQA) metrics. We also propose a novel Quality Metric Regression Network (QMRNet) that is able to predict quality (as a No-Reference metric) by training on any property of the image (i.e. its resolution, its distortions...) and also able to optimize SR algorithms for a specific metric objective. This work is part of the implementation of the framework IQUAFLOW which has been developed for evaluating image quality, detection and classification of objects as well as image compression in EO use cases. We integrated our experimentation and tested our QMRNet algorithm on predicting features like blur, sharpness, snr, rer and ground sampling distance (GSD) and obtain validation medRs below 1.0 (out of N=50) and recall rates above 95\%. Overall benchmark shows promising results for LIIF, CAR and MSRN and also the potential use of QMRNet as Loss for optimizing SR predictions. Due to its simplicity, QMRNet could also be used for other use cases and image domains, as its architecture and data processing is fully scalable.
abstract_zh: 超分辨率 (SR) 的最新进展已通过通用图像（例如人脸、风景和物体）进行了测试，主要用于超分辨率地球观测 (EO) 图像的任务。在本研究论文中，我们使用全参考和无参考图像质量评估 (IQA) 指标对不同 EO 数据集的最先进 SR 算法进行基准测试。我们还提出了一种新颖的质量度量回归网络（QMRNet），它能够通过对图像的任何属性（即其分辨率、失真......）进行训练来预测质量（作为无参考度量），并且还能够针对特定度量目标优化 SR 算法。这项工作是 IQUAFLOW 框架实施的一部分，该框架是为评估图像质量、对象检测和分类以及 EO 用例中的图像压缩而开发的。我们集成了我们的实验并测试了我们的 QMRNet 算法来预测模糊、锐度、信噪比、rer 和地面采样距离 (GSD) 等特征，并获得低于 1.0 的验证 medR（N = 50）和高于 95% 的召回率。总体基准显示 LIIF、CAR 和 MSRN 取得了有希望的结果，并且还可以使用 QMRNet 作为损失来优化 SR 预测。由于其简单性，QMRNet 还可以用于其他用例和图像领域，因为其架构和数据处理是完全可扩展的。

AI.tldr: 提出QMRNet网络用于遥感图像质量评估与超分辨率优化，并评估先进SR算法在遥感数据集上的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有超分辨率（SR）技术多针对通用图像，缺乏对遥感图像的有效质量评估方法，需开发专用模型以提升其质量预测与优化能力。
AI.method: 提出QMRNet网络，通过图像属性训练预测无参考质量指标，并用于优化SR算法，集成于IQUAFLOW框架中，处理模糊、锐度、信噪比等特征。
AI.result: 实验显示QMRNet在预测模糊、锐度等特征时验证medRs低于1.0，召回率超95%，且LIIF、CAR、MSRN等SR算法表现良好，QMRNet作为损失函数优化SR潜力显著。
AI.conclusion: QMRNet在遥感图像质量评估与SR优化中效果显著，其模块化设计支持跨领域应用，未来可拓展至其他图像任务。

authors_text: Marc Vucovich,Amogh Tarcar,Penjo Rebelo,Narendra Gade,Ruchi Porwal,Abdul Rahman,Christopher Redino,Kevin Choi,Dhruv Nandakumar,Robert Schiller,Edward Bowen,Alex West,Sanmitra Bhattacharya,Balaji Veeramani
title: Anomaly Detection via Federated Learning
title_zh: 通过联邦学习进行异常检测
abstract: Machine learning has helped advance the field of anomaly detection by incorporating classifiers and autoencoders to decipher between normal and anomalous behavior. Additionally, federated learning has provided a way for a global model to be trained with multiple clients' data without requiring the client to directly share their data. This paper proposes a novel anomaly detector via federated learning to detect malicious network activity on a client's server. In our experiments, we use an autoencoder with a classifier in a federated learning framework to determine if the network activity is benign or malicious. By using our novel min-max scalar and sampling technique, called FedSam, we determined federated learning allows the global model to learn from each client's data and, in turn, provide a means for each client to improve their intrusion detection system's defense against cyber-attacks.
summary: Machine learning has helped advance the field of anomaly detection by incorporating classifiers and autoencoders to decipher between normal and anomalous behavior. Additionally, federated learning has provided a way for a global model to be trained with multiple clients' data without requiring the client to directly share their data. This paper proposes a novel anomaly detector via federated learning to detect malicious network activity on a client's server. In our experiments, we use an autoencoder with a classifier in a federated learning framework to determine if the network activity is benign or malicious. By using our novel min-max scalar and sampling technique, called FedSam, we determined federated learning allows the global model to learn from each client's data and, in turn, provide a means for each client to improve their intrusion detection system's defense against cyber-attacks.
abstract_zh: 机器学习通过结合分类器和自动编码器来破译正常和异常行为，帮助推进了异常检测领域的发展。此外，联邦学习还提供了一种使用多个客户的数据来训练全局模型的方法，而无需客户直接共享其数据。本文提出了一种新颖的异常检测器，通过联合学习来检测客户端服务器上的恶意网络活动。在我们的实验中，我们在联邦学习框架中使用带有分类器的自动编码器来确定网络活动是良性的还是恶意的。通过使用我们称为 FedSam 的新型最小-最大标量和采样技术，我们确定联邦学习允许全局模型从每个客户的数据中学习，进而为每个客户提供一种方法来改进其入侵检测系统对网络攻击的防御。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于联邦学习的异常检测方法，通过结合自编码器和分类器，并引入FedSam技术，在不共享客户端数据的情况下检测恶意网络活动。
AI.motivation: 传统异常检测需直接共享数据，存在隐私风险；联邦学习可在保护数据隐私的同时实现全局模型训练，从而提升客户端入侵检测系统的防御能力。
AI.method: 采用自编码器与分类器结合的联邦学习框架，设计包含最小-最大标准化和采样技术的FedSam方法，使全局模型从各客户端数据中学习并优化本地检测能力。
AI.result: 实验表明，联邦学习使全局模型能有效整合各客户端数据，提升客户端对网络攻击的检测性能，验证了FedSam在隐私保护下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 联邦学习为隐私敏感场景下的异常检测提供了可行方案，FedSam技术能够平衡模型性能与数据隐私，增强分布式环境下的网络安全防御能力。

search_text: Anomaly Detection via Federated Learning 通过联邦学习进行异常检测 Machine learning has helped advance the field of anomaly detection by incorporating classifiers and autoencoders to decipher between normal and anomalous behavior. Additionally, federated learning has provided a way for a global model to be trained with multiple clients' data without requiring the client to directly share their data. This paper proposes a novel anomaly detector via federated learning to detect malicious network activity on a client's server. In our experiments, we use an autoencoder with a classifier in a federated learning framework to determine if the network activity is benign or malicious. By using our novel min-max scalar and sampling technique, called FedSam, we determined federated learning allows the global model to learn from each client's data and, in turn, provide a means for each client to improve their intrusion detection system's defense against cyber-attacks. 机器学习通过结合分类器和自动编码器来破译正常和异常行为，帮助推进了异常检测领域的发展。此外，联邦学习还提供了一种使用多个客户的数据来训练全局模型的方法，而无需客户直接共享其数据。本文提出了一种新颖的异常检测器，通过联合学习来检测客户端服务器上的恶意网络活动。在我们的实验中，我们在联邦学习框架中使用带有分类器的自动编码器来确定网络活动是良性的还是恶意的。通过使用我们称为 FedSam 的新型最小-最大标量和采样技术，我们确定联邦学习允许全局模型从每个客户的数据中学习，进而为每个客户提供一种方法来改进其入侵检测系统对网络攻击的防御。 本文提出了一种基于联邦学习的异常检测方法，通过结合自编码器和分类器，并引入FedSam技术，在不共享客户端数据的情况下检测恶意网络活动。 Marc Vucovich,Amogh Tarcar,Penjo Rebelo,Narendra Gade,Ruchi Porwal,Abdul Rahman,Christopher Redino,Kevin Choi,Dhruv Nandakumar,Robert Schiller,Edward Bowen,Alex West,Sanmitra Bhattacharya,Balaji Veeramani cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CR

authors_text: Lan Feng,Quanyi Li,Zhenghao Peng,Shuhan Tan,Bolei Zhou
title: TrafficGen: Learning to Generate Diverse and Realistic Traffic Scenarios
title_zh: TrafficGen：学习生成多样化且真实的交通场景
abstract: Diverse and realistic traffic scenarios are crucial for evaluating the AI safety of autonomous driving systems in simulation. This work introduces a data-driven method called TrafficGen for traffic scenario generation. It learns from the fragmented human driving data collected in the real world and then can generate realistic traffic scenarios. TrafficGen is an autoregressive generative model with an encoder-decoder architecture. In each autoregressive iteration, it first encodes the current traffic context with the attention mechanism and then decodes a vehicle's initial state followed by generating its long trajectory. We evaluate the trained model in terms of vehicle placement and trajectories and show substantial improvements over baselines. TrafficGen can be also used to augment existing traffic scenarios, by adding new vehicles and extending the fragmented trajectories. We further demonstrate that importing the generated scenarios into a simulator as interactive training environments improves the performance and the safety of driving policy learned from reinforcement learning. More project resource is available at https://metadriverse.github.io/trafficgen
summary: Diverse and realistic traffic scenarios are crucial for evaluating the AI safety of autonomous driving systems in simulation. This work introduces a data-driven method called TrafficGen for traffic scenario generation. It learns from the fragmented human driving data collected in the real world and then can generate realistic traffic scenarios. TrafficGen is an autoregressive generative model with an encoder-decoder architecture. In each autoregressive iteration, it first encodes the current traffic context with the attention mechanism and then decodes a vehicle's initial state followed by generating its long trajectory. We evaluate the trained model in terms of vehicle placement and trajectories and show substantial improvements over baselines. TrafficGen can be also used to augment existing traffic scenarios, by adding new vehicles and extending the fragmented trajectories. We further demonstrate that importing the generated scenarios into a simulator as interactive training environments improves the performance and the safety of driving policy learned from reinforcement learning. More project resource is available at https://metadriverse.github.io/trafficgen
abstract_zh: 多样化且真实的交通场景对于评估模拟中自动驾驶系统的人工智能安全性至关重要。这项工作引入了一种称为 TrafficGen 的数据驱动方法，用于生成交通场景。它从现实世界中收集的碎片化人类驾驶数据中学习，然后可以生成真实的交通场景。 TrafficGen 是一种具有编码器-解码器架构的自回归生成模型。在每次自回归迭代中，它首先使用注意力机制对当前交通环境进行编码，然后解码车辆的初始状态，然后生成其长轨迹。我们根据车辆放置和轨迹评估训练后的模型，并显示出相对于基线的显着改进。 TrafficGen 还可以通过添加新车辆和扩展分散的轨迹来增强现有的交通场景。我们进一步证明，将生成的场景导入模拟器作为交互式训练环境可以提高从强化学习中学到的驾驶策略的性能和安全性。更多项目资源请访问 https://metadriverse.github.io/trafficgen

AI.tldr: 本文提出TrafficGen，一种基于编码器-解码器结构的自回归生成模型，用于生成多样且真实的交通场景以提升自动驾驶系统的安全评估。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶系统在仿真测试中缺乏足够多样和真实的交通场景，难以全面评估AI安全性能，需通过数据驱动方法生成高质量场景。
AI.method: TrafficGen采用自回归生成框架，通过注意力机制编码交通上下文，逐步解码车辆初始状态并生成长期轨迹，支持场景数据增强与模拟训练环境构建。
AI.result: 在车辆位置和轨迹生成任务中显著优于基线方法，场景导入模拟器后可提升强化学习驾驶策略的性能与安全性。
AI.conclusion: TrafficGen有效生成高质量交通场景，为自动驾驶系统的仿真测试与策略训练提供了可靠的数据支持和优化方向。

authors_text: Lakshay Sharma,Michael Everett,Donggun Lee,Xiaoyi Cai,Philip Osteen,Jonathan P. How
title: RAMP: A Risk-Aware Mapping and Planning Pipeline for Fast Off-Road Ground Robot Navigation
title_zh: RAMP：用于快速越野地面机器人导航的风险感知测绘和规划管道
abstract: A key challenge in fast ground robot navigation in 3D terrain is balancing robot speed and safety. Recent work has shown that 2.5D maps (2D representations with additional 3D information) are ideal for real-time safe and fast planning. However, the prevalent approach of generating 2D occupancy grids through raytracing makes the generated map unsafe to plan in, due to inaccurate representation of unknown space. Additionally, existing planners such as MPPI do not consider speeds in known free and unknown space separately, leading to slower overall plans. The RAMP pipeline proposed here solves these issues using new mapping and planning methods. This work first presents ground point inflation with persistent spatial memory as a way to generate accurate occupancy grid maps from classified pointclouds. Then we present an MPPI-based planner with embedded variability in horizon, to maximize speed in known free space while retaining cautionary penetration into unknown space. Finally, we integrate this mapping and planning pipeline with risk constraints arising from 3D terrain, and verify that it enables fast and safe navigation using simulations and hardware demonstrations.
summary: A key challenge in fast ground robot navigation in 3D terrain is balancing robot speed and safety. Recent work has shown that 2.5D maps (2D representations with additional 3D information) are ideal for real-time safe and fast planning. However, the prevalent approach of generating 2D occupancy grids through raytracing makes the generated map unsafe to plan in, due to inaccurate representation of unknown space. Additionally, existing planners such as MPPI do not consider speeds in known free and unknown space separately, leading to slower overall plans. The RAMP pipeline proposed here solves these issues using new mapping and planning methods. This work first presents ground point inflation with persistent spatial memory as a way to generate accurate occupancy grid maps from classified pointclouds. Then we present an MPPI-based planner with embedded variability in horizon, to maximize speed in known free space while retaining cautionary penetration into unknown space. Finally, we integrate this mapping and planning pipeline with risk constraints arising from 3D terrain, and verify that it enables fast and safe navigation using simulations and hardware demonstrations.
abstract_zh: 3D 地形中地面机器人快速导航的一个关键挑战是平衡机器人速度和安全性。最近的研究表明，2.5D 地图（带有附加 3D 信息的 2D 表示）非常适合实时、安全、快速的规划。然而，由于未知空间的不准确表示，通过光线追踪生成 2D 占用网格的流行方法使得生成的地图在规划时不安全。此外，现有的规划器（例如 MPPI）没有单独考虑已知自由空间和未知空间中的速度，导致整体规划速度较慢。这里提出的 RAMP 管道使用新的映射和规划方法解决了这些问题。这项工作首先提出了具有持久空间记忆的地面点膨胀，作为从分类点云生成准确的占用网格图的方法。然后，我们提出了一种基于 MPPI 的规划器，其嵌入了地平线可变性，以最大限度地提高已知自由空间中的速度，同时保持对未知空间的谨慎渗透。最后，我们将此测绘和规划流程与 3D 地形产生的风险约束相集成，并通过模拟和硬件演示验证其是否能够实现快速安全的导航。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RAMP管道，通过改进映射和规划方法解决越野地面机器人导航中速度与安全平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有2.5D地图生成方法存在未知空间表示不准确问题，且规划器未区分已知/未知空间速度策略，导致安全性与效率无法兼顾。
AI.method: 1. 基于分类点云的地面点膨胀与持久空间记忆生成精确占用网格；2. 改进MPPI规划器嵌入时域可变性，在已知空间最大化速度同时谨慎探索未知空间；3. 整合3D地形风险约束。
AI.result: 通过仿真与硬件实验证明，RAMP在保证安全性的前提下显著提升越野机器人导航速度。
AI.conclusion: RAMP通过风险感知的映射规划框架，为复杂地形下的快速安全机器人导航提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Kuan Fang,Patrick Yin,Ashvin Nair,Homer Walke,Gengchen Yan,Sergey Levine
title: Generalization with Lossy Affordances: Leveraging Broad Offline Data for Learning Visuomotor Tasks
title_zh: 有损可供性的泛化：利用广泛的离线数据学习视觉运动任务
abstract: The utilization of broad datasets has proven to be crucial for generalization for a wide range of fields. However, how to effectively make use of diverse multi-task data for novel downstream tasks still remains a grand challenge in robotics. To tackle this challenge, we introduce a framework that acquires goal-conditioned policies for unseen temporally extended tasks via offline reinforcement learning on broad data, in combination with online fine-tuning guided by subgoals in learned lossy representation space. When faced with a novel task goal, the framework uses an affordance model to plan a sequence of lossy representations as subgoals that decomposes the original task into easier problems. Learned from the broad data, the lossy representation emphasizes task-relevant information about states and goals while abstracting away redundant contexts that hinder generalization. It thus enables subgoal planning for unseen tasks, provides a compact input to the policy, and facilitates reward shaping during fine-tuning. We show that our framework can be pre-trained on large-scale datasets of robot experiences from prior work and efficiently fine-tuned for novel tasks, entirely from visual inputs without any manual reward engineering.
summary: The utilization of broad datasets has proven to be crucial for generalization for a wide range of fields. However, how to effectively make use of diverse multi-task data for novel downstream tasks still remains a grand challenge in robotics. To tackle this challenge, we introduce a framework that acquires goal-conditioned policies for unseen temporally extended tasks via offline reinforcement learning on broad data, in combination with online fine-tuning guided by subgoals in learned lossy representation space. When faced with a novel task goal, the framework uses an affordance model to plan a sequence of lossy representations as subgoals that decomposes the original task into easier problems. Learned from the broad data, the lossy representation emphasizes task-relevant information about states and goals while abstracting away redundant contexts that hinder generalization. It thus enables subgoal planning for unseen tasks, provides a compact input to the policy, and facilitates reward shaping during fine-tuning. We show that our framework can be pre-trained on large-scale datasets of robot experiences from prior work and efficiently fine-tuned for novel tasks, entirely from visual inputs without any manual reward engineering.
abstract_zh: 事实证明，广泛数据集的利用对于广泛领域的泛化至关重要。然而，如何有效地利用多样化的多任务数据来完成新颖的下游任务仍然是机器人技术中的一个巨大挑战。为了应对这一挑战，我们引入了一个框架，该框架通过对广泛数据的离线强化学习，结合学习有损表示空间中子目标引导的在线微调，获取用于看不见的时间扩展任务的目标条件策略。当面对新的任务目标时，该框架使用可供性模型来规划一系列有损表示作为子目标，将原始任务分解为更简单的问题。从广泛的数据中学习，有损表示强调有关状态和目标的任务相关信息，同时抽象出阻碍泛化的冗余上下文。因此，它可以对未见过的任务进行子目标规划，为策略提供紧凑的输入，并促进微调期间的奖励形成。我们表明，我们的框架可以在先前工作中的机器人经验的大规模数据集上进行预训练，并针对新任务进行有效的微调，完全来自视觉输入，无需任何手动奖励工程。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用广域离线数据学习视觉运动任务的框架，通过损失性表征空间中的子目标规划实现对新任务的泛化。
AI.motivation: 尽管广域数据对泛化至关重要，但如何有效利用多任务数据解决新型下游任务仍是机器人领域的重大挑战。
AI.method: 结合离线强化学习与在线微调，通过损失性表征空间中的子目标规划分解任务，利用预训练的广域数据生成任务相关表征并指导策略优化。
AI.result: 框架可在大规模机器人经验数据集上预训练，并通过纯视觉输入高效微调新任务，无需人工设计奖励函数。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过抽象冗余信息、聚焦任务关键特征，实现了从广域数据到新任务的高效泛化，降低了视觉运动学习对人工奖励的依赖。

search_text: Generalization with Lossy Affordances: Leveraging Broad Offline Data for Learning Visuomotor Tasks 有损可供性的泛化：利用广泛的离线数据学习视觉运动任务 The utilization of broad datasets has proven to be crucial for generalization for a wide range of fields. However, how to effectively make use of diverse multi-task data for novel downstream tasks still remains a grand challenge in robotics. To tackle this challenge, we introduce a framework that acquires goal-conditioned policies for unseen temporally extended tasks via offline reinforcement learning on broad data, in combination with online fine-tuning guided by subgoals in learned lossy representation space. When faced with a novel task goal, the framework uses an affordance model to plan a sequence of lossy representations as subgoals that decomposes the original task into easier problems. Learned from the broad data, the lossy representation emphasizes task-relevant information about states and goals while abstracting away redundant contexts that hinder generalization. It thus enables subgoal planning for unseen tasks, provides a compact input to the policy, and facilitates reward shaping during fine-tuning. We show that our framework can be pre-trained on large-scale datasets of robot experiences from prior work and efficiently fine-tuned for novel tasks, entirely from visual inputs without any manual reward engineering. 事实证明，广泛数据集的利用对于广泛领域的泛化至关重要。然而，如何有效地利用多样化的多任务数据来完成新颖的下游任务仍然是机器人技术中的一个巨大挑战。为了应对这一挑战，我们引入了一个框架，该框架通过对广泛数据的离线强化学习，结合学习有损表示空间中子目标引导的在线微调，获取用于看不见的时间扩展任务的目标条件策略。当面对新的任务目标时，该框架使用可供性模型来规划一系列有损表示作为子目标，将原始任务分解为更简单的问题。从广泛的数据中学习，有损表示强调有关状态和目标的任务相关信息，同时抽象出阻碍泛化的冗余上下文。因此，它可以对未见过的任务进行子目标规划，为策略提供紧凑的输入，并促进微调期间的奖励形成。我们表明，我们的框架可以在先前工作中的机器人经验的大规模数据集上进行预训练，并针对新任务进行有效的微调，完全来自视觉输入，无需任何手动奖励工程。 本文提出一种利用广域离线数据学习视觉运动任务的框架，通过损失性表征空间中的子目标规划实现对新任务的泛化。 Kuan Fang,Patrick Yin,Ashvin Nair,Homer Walke,Gengchen Yan,Sergey Levine cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Muhammet Balcilar,Bharath Bhushan Damodaran,Pierre Hellier
title: Reducing The Mismatch Between Marginal and Learned Distributions in Neural Video Compression
title_zh: 减少神经视频压缩中边际分布和学习分布之间的不匹配
abstract: During the last four years, we have witnessed the success of end-to-end trainable models for image compression. Compared to decades of incremental work, these machine learning (ML) techniques learn all the components of the compression technique, which explains their actual superiority. However, end-to-end ML models have not yet reached the performance of traditional video codecs such as VVC. Possible explanations can be put forward: lack of data to account for the temporal redundancy, or inefficiency of latent's density estimation in the neural model. The latter problem can be defined by the discrepancy between the latent's marginal distribution and the learned prior distribution. This mismatch, known as amortization gap of entropy model, enlarges the file size of compressed data. In this paper, we propose to evaluate the amortization gap for three state-of-the-art ML video compression methods. Second, we propose an efficient and generic method to solve the amortization gap and show that it leads to an improvement between $2\%$ to $5\%$ without impacting reconstruction quality.
summary: During the last four years, we have witnessed the success of end-to-end trainable models for image compression. Compared to decades of incremental work, these machine learning (ML) techniques learn all the components of the compression technique, which explains their actual superiority. However, end-to-end ML models have not yet reached the performance of traditional video codecs such as VVC. Possible explanations can be put forward: lack of data to account for the temporal redundancy, or inefficiency of latent's density estimation in the neural model. The latter problem can be defined by the discrepancy between the latent's marginal distribution and the learned prior distribution. This mismatch, known as amortization gap of entropy model, enlarges the file size of compressed data. In this paper, we propose to evaluate the amortization gap for three state-of-the-art ML video compression methods. Second, we propose an efficient and generic method to solve the amortization gap and show that it leads to an improvement between $2\%$ to $5\%$ without impacting reconstruction quality.
abstract_zh: 在过去的四年中，我们见证了用于图像压缩的端到端可训练模型的成功。与数十年的增量工作相比，这些机器学习 (ML) 技术学习了压缩技术的所有组成部分，这解释了它们的实际优越性。然而，端到端ML模型尚未达到VVC等传统视频编解码器的性能。可以提出可能的解释：缺乏数据来解释时间冗余，或者神经模型中潜在密度估计效率低下。后一个问题可以通过潜在的边缘分布和学习的先验分布之间的差异来定义。这种不匹配（称为熵模型的摊销差距）会增大压缩数据的文件大小。在本文中，我们建议评估三种最先进的 ML 视频压缩方法的摊销差距。其次，我们提出了一种有效且通用的方法来解决摊销缺口，并表明它可以在不影响重建质量的情况下实现 $2\%$ 到 $5\%$ 之间的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决神经网络视频压缩中潜变量边际分布与先验分布之间的不匹配问题，提出改进方法以提升压缩效率。
AI.motivation: 端到端机器学习视频压缩模型尚未达到传统编解码器（如VVC）的性能，主要受限于潜变量密度估计的不匹配问题（即熵模型的摊销间隙）导致的压缩文件体积增大。
AI.method: 评估三种先进视频压缩方法的摊销间隙，提出一种高效通用的解决方案，通过优化潜变量分布对齐来缩小该间隙。
AI.result: 在不损害重建质量的前提下，压缩效率提升2%至5%。
AI.conclusion: 提出的分布对齐方法有效缓解了摊销间隙问题，为神经网络视频压缩性能提升提供了可行路径。

authors_text: Raghavendra Addanki,David Arbour,Tung Mai,Cameron Musco,Anup Rao
title: Sample Constrained Treatment Effect Estimation
title_zh: 样本约束处理效果估计
comment: Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS) 2022
comments: Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS) 2022
abstract: Treatment effect estimation is a fundamental problem in causal inference. We focus on designing efficient randomized controlled trials, to accurately estimate the effect of some treatment on a population of $n$ individuals. In particular, we study sample-constrained treatment effect estimation, where we must select a subset of $s \ll n$ individuals from the population to experiment on. This subset must be further partitioned into treatment and control groups. Algorithms for partitioning the entire population into treatment and control groups, or for choosing a single representative subset, have been well-studied. The key challenge in our setting is jointly choosing a representative subset and a partition for that set. We focus on both individual and average treatment effect estimation, under a linear effects model. We give provably efficient experimental designs and corresponding estimators, by identifying connections to discrepancy minimization and leverage-score-based sampling used in randomized numerical linear algebra. Our theoretical results obtain a smooth transition to known guarantees when $s$ equals the population size. We also empirically demonstrate the performance of our algorithms.
summary: Treatment effect estimation is a fundamental problem in causal inference. We focus on designing efficient randomized controlled trials, to accurately estimate the effect of some treatment on a population of $n$ individuals. In particular, we study sample-constrained treatment effect estimation, where we must select a subset of $s \ll n$ individuals from the population to experiment on. This subset must be further partitioned into treatment and control groups. Algorithms for partitioning the entire population into treatment and control groups, or for choosing a single representative subset, have been well-studied. The key challenge in our setting is jointly choosing a representative subset and a partition for that set. We focus on both individual and average treatment effect estimation, under a linear effects model. We give provably efficient experimental designs and corresponding estimators, by identifying connections to discrepancy minimization and leverage-score-based sampling used in randomized numerical linear algebra. Our theoretical results obtain a smooth transition to known guarantees when $s$ equals the population size. We also empirically demonstrate the performance of our algorithms.
abstract_zh: 治疗效果估计是因果推理中的一个基本问题。我们专注于设计有效的随机对照试验，以准确估计某些治疗对 $n$ 个体群体的影响。特别是，我们研究样本约束的治疗效果估计，我们必须从人群中选择 $s \ll n$ 个个体的子集进行实验。该子集必须进一步分为治疗组和对照组。将整个群体划分为治疗组和对照组或选择单个代表性子集的算法已得到充分研究。我们设置中的关键挑战是共同选择一个代表性子集和该集的分区。我们在线性效应模型下关注个体和平均治疗效果估计。通过识别随机数值线性代数中使用的差异最小化和基于杠杆分数的采样的联系，我们提供了可证明有效的实验设计和相应的估计器。当 $s$ 等于人口规模时，我们的理论结果可以平滑过渡到已知保证。我们还凭经验证明了我们算法的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在设计高效算法，在样本受限条件下选择子集并划分处理组与对照组，以准确估计个体和平均处理效应。
AI.motivation: 现有算法或处理全体划分或选择单一子集，但联合选择代表性子集与划分存在挑战，需提升估计效率与准确性。
AI.method: 通过差异最小化及杠杆得分采样方法，结合线性效应模型，提出联合子集选择与划分的高效实验设计与估计器。
AI.result: 理论结果证明当样本量等于总体时平滑过渡至已知保证，实证验证了算法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的新方法在理论与实证层面均表现优异，为样本受限场景下的处理效应估计提供了有效解决方案。

search_text: Sample Constrained Treatment Effect Estimation 样本约束处理效果估计 Treatment effect estimation is a fundamental problem in causal inference. We focus on designing efficient randomized controlled trials, to accurately estimate the effect of some treatment on a population of $n$ individuals. In particular, we study sample-constrained treatment effect estimation, where we must select a subset of $s \ll n$ individuals from the population to experiment on. This subset must be further partitioned into treatment and control groups. Algorithms for partitioning the entire population into treatment and control groups, or for choosing a single representative subset, have been well-studied. The key challenge in our setting is jointly choosing a representative subset and a partition for that set. We focus on both individual and average treatment effect estimation, under a linear effects model. We give provably efficient experimental designs and corresponding estimators, by identifying connections to discrepancy minimization and leverage-score-based sampling used in randomized numerical linear algebra. Our theoretical results obtain a smooth transition to known guarantees when $s$ equals the population size. We also empirically demonstrate the performance of our algorithms. 治疗效果估计是因果推理中的一个基本问题。我们专注于设计有效的随机对照试验，以准确估计某些治疗对 $n$ 个体群体的影响。特别是，我们研究样本约束的治疗效果估计，我们必须从人群中选择 $s \ll n$ 个个体的子集进行实验。该子集必须进一步分为治疗组和对照组。将整个群体划分为治疗组和对照组或选择单个代表性子集的算法已得到充分研究。我们设置中的关键挑战是共同选择一个代表性子集和该集的分区。我们在线性效应模型下关注个体和平均治疗效果估计。通过识别随机数值线性代数中使用的差异最小化和基于杠杆分数的采样的联系，我们提供了可证明有效的实验设计和相应的估计器。当 $s$ 等于人口规模时，我们的理论结果可以平滑过渡到已知保证。我们还凭经验证明了我们算法的性能。 本文旨在设计高效算法，在样本受限条件下选择子集并划分处理组与对照组，以准确估计个体和平均处理效应。 Raghavendra Addanki,David Arbour,Tung Mai,Cameron Musco,Anup Rao cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.DS,econ.EM,stat.ME

authors_text: Meir Brand,Itay Naeh,Daniel Teitelman
title: Adversarial Attack Against Image-Based Localization Neural Networks
title_zh: 针对基于图像的定位神经网络的对抗性攻击
abstract: In this paper, we present a proof of concept for adversarially attacking the image-based localization module of an autonomous vehicle. This attack aims to cause the vehicle to perform a wrong navigational decisions and prevent it from reaching a desired predefined destination in a simulated urban environment. A database of rendered images allowed us to train a deep neural network that performs a localization task and implement, develop and assess the adversarial pattern. Our tests show that using this adversarial attack we can prevent the vehicle from turning at a given intersection. This is done by manipulating the vehicle's navigational module to falsely estimate its current position and thus fail to initialize the turning procedure until the vehicle misses the last opportunity to perform a safe turn in a given intersection.
summary: In this paper, we present a proof of concept for adversarially attacking the image-based localization module of an autonomous vehicle. This attack aims to cause the vehicle to perform a wrong navigational decisions and prevent it from reaching a desired predefined destination in a simulated urban environment. A database of rendered images allowed us to train a deep neural network that performs a localization task and implement, develop and assess the adversarial pattern. Our tests show that using this adversarial attack we can prevent the vehicle from turning at a given intersection. This is done by manipulating the vehicle's navigational module to falsely estimate its current position and thus fail to initialize the turning procedure until the vehicle misses the last opportunity to perform a safe turn in a given intersection.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了对抗性攻击自动驾驶车辆基于图像的定位模块的概念证明。这种攻击旨在导致车辆执行错误的导航决策，并阻止其在模拟城市环境中到达所需的预定义目的地。渲染图像数据库使我们能够训练执行定位任务并实施、开发和评估对抗模式的深度神经网络。我们的测试表明，使用这种对抗性攻击，我们可以防止车辆在给定的十字路口转弯。这是通过操纵车辆的导航模块错误地估计其当前位置来完成的，从而无法初始化转弯程序，直到车辆错过在给定交叉路口执行安全转弯的最后机会。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种对抗攻击方法，通过干扰自动驾驶车辆的图像定位模块，使其做出错误导航决策，阻碍车辆到达预设目的地。
AI.motivation: 研究旨在揭示基于图像的定位系统在自动驾驶中的潜在安全漏洞，并展示对抗攻击对导航决策的威胁。
AI.method: 通过构建渲染图像数据库训练定位神经网络，设计并实施对抗性攻击模式，操纵车辆导航模块的位置估计。
AI.result: 实验表明，该对抗攻击能有效阻止车辆在指定交叉口转弯，导致其错过安全转弯时机，无法正确导航。
AI.conclusion: 研究证明了对抗攻击对自动驾驶定位系统的潜在威胁，突显了提升系统鲁棒性的必要性。

authors_text: Baptiste Chatelier,Luc Le Magoarou,Getachew Redieteab
title: Efficient Deep Unfolding for SISO-OFDM Channel Estimation
title_zh: SISO-OFDM 信道估计的高效深度展开
abstract: In modern communication systems, channel state information is of paramount importance to achieve capacity. It is then crucial to accurately estimate the channel. It is possible to perform SISO-OFDM channel estimation using sparse recovery techniques. However, this approach relies on the use of a physical wave propagation model to build a dictionary, which requires perfect knowledge of the system's parameters. In this paper, an unfolded neural network is used to lighten this constraint. Its architecture, based on a sparse recovery algorithm, allows SISO-OFDM channel estimation even if the system's parameters are not perfectly known. Indeed, its unsupervised online learning allows to learn the system's imperfections in order to enhance the estimation performance. The practicality of the proposed method is improved with respect to the state of the art in two aspects: constrained dictionaries are introduced in order to reduce sample complexity and hierarchical search within dictionaries is proposed in order to reduce time complexity. Finally, the performance of the proposed unfolded network is evaluated and compared to several baselines using realistic channel data, showing the great potential of the approach.
summary: In modern communication systems, channel state information is of paramount importance to achieve capacity. It is then crucial to accurately estimate the channel. It is possible to perform SISO-OFDM channel estimation using sparse recovery techniques. However, this approach relies on the use of a physical wave propagation model to build a dictionary, which requires perfect knowledge of the system's parameters. In this paper, an unfolded neural network is used to lighten this constraint. Its architecture, based on a sparse recovery algorithm, allows SISO-OFDM channel estimation even if the system's parameters are not perfectly known. Indeed, its unsupervised online learning allows to learn the system's imperfections in order to enhance the estimation performance. The practicality of the proposed method is improved with respect to the state of the art in two aspects: constrained dictionaries are introduced in order to reduce sample complexity and hierarchical search within dictionaries is proposed in order to reduce time complexity. Finally, the performance of the proposed unfolded network is evaluated and compared to several baselines using realistic channel data, showing the great potential of the approach.
abstract_zh: 在现代通信系统中，信道状态信息对于实现容量至关重要。因此准确估计信道至关重要。使用稀疏恢复技术可以执行 SISO-OFDM 信道估计。然而，这种方法依赖于使用物理波传播模型来构建字典，这需要对系统参数的完美了解。在本文中，使用展开的神经网络来减轻这种约束。其架构基于稀疏恢复算法，即使系统参数并不完全已知，也可以进行 SISO-OFDM 信道估计。事实上，它的无监督在线学习可以了解系统的缺陷，以提高估计性能。相对于现有技术，该方法的实用性在两个方面得到了提高：引入约束字典以降低样本复杂度，并提出字典内的分层搜索以降低时间复杂度。最后，使用实际通道数据评估所提出的展开网络的性能并与几个基线进行比较，显示了该方法的巨大潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度展开的高效神经网络方法，用于在SISO-OFDM系统中进行信道估计，减少对系统参数完美知识的依赖。
AI.motivation: 传统稀疏恢复技术需依赖物理波传播模型构建字典，要求系统参数完美已知，而实际场景中参数可能存在不确定性，需更鲁棒的估计方法。
AI.method: 设计一种展开的神经网络架构，结合稀疏恢复算法，通过无监督在线学习适应系统不完美性，并引入约束字典与分层搜索策略以降低复杂度。
AI.result: 在真实信道数据中，所提方法较基线模型表现出更优估计性能，验证了其有效性和潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过学习系统偏差提升了信道估计鲁棒性，在样本复杂度和时间复杂度上较现有技术有所改进，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Ahmet Orun
title: Automatic Real-time Vehicle Classification by Image Colour Component Based Template Matching
title_zh: 通过基于图像颜色分量的模板匹配自动实时车辆分类
comment: The paper may clash with another submission and dispute of copyright
comments: The paper may clash with another submission and dispute of copyright
abstract: Selection of appropriate template matching algorithms to run effectively on real-time low-cost systems is always major issue. This is due to unpredictable changes in image scene which often necessitate more sophisticated real-time algorithms to retain image consistency. Inefficiency of low cost auxiliary hardware and time limitations are the major constraints in using these sorts of algorithms. The real-time system introduced here copes with these problems utilising a fast running template matching algorithm, which makes use of best colour band selection. The system uses fast running real-time algorithms to achieve template matching and vehicle classification at about 4 frames /sec. on low-cost hardware. The colour image sequences have been taken by a fixed CCTV camera overlooking a busy multi-lane road
summary: Selection of appropriate template matching algorithms to run effectively on real-time low-cost systems is always major issue. This is due to unpredictable changes in image scene which often necessitate more sophisticated real-time algorithms to retain image consistency. Inefficiency of low cost auxiliary hardware and time limitations are the major constraints in using these sorts of algorithms. The real-time system introduced here copes with these problems utilising a fast running template matching algorithm, which makes use of best colour band selection. The system uses fast running real-time algorithms to achieve template matching and vehicle classification at about 4 frames /sec. on low-cost hardware. The colour image sequences have been taken by a fixed CCTV camera overlooking a busy multi-lane road
abstract_zh: 选择适当的模板匹配算法以在实时低成本系统上有效运行始终是主要问题。这是由于图像场景的不可预测的变化通常需要更复杂的实时算法来保持图像的一致性。低成本辅助硬件的低效率和时间限制是使用此类算法的主要限制。这里介绍的实时系统利用快速运行的模板匹配算法来解决这些问题，该算法利用了最佳色带选择。系统采用快速运行的实时算法，以约4帧/秒的速度实现模板匹配和车辆分类。在低成本硬件上。彩色图像序列由固定闭路电视摄像机拍摄，俯瞰繁忙的多车道道路

AI.motivation: 现有实时系统在处理动态场景时面临算法效率低、硬件成本高和时间限制等挑战。
AI.method: 通过选择最佳颜色通道并采用高效模板匹配算法，在低成本硬件上实现实时处理。
AI.result: 系统在固定摄像头拍摄的多车道道路视频序列中，以约4帧/秒的速度完成车辆分类。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效平衡了实时性、成本与分类准确性，适用于低资源环境下的车辆监测场景。

search_text: Automatic Real-time Vehicle Classification by Image Colour Component Based Template Matching 通过基于图像颜色分量的模板匹配自动实时车辆分类 Selection of appropriate template matching algorithms to run effectively on real-time low-cost systems is always major issue. This is due to unpredictable changes in image scene which often necessitate more sophisticated real-time algorithms to retain image consistency. Inefficiency of low cost auxiliary hardware and time limitations are the major constraints in using these sorts of algorithms. The real-time system introduced here copes with these problems utilising a fast running template matching algorithm, which makes use of best colour band selection. The system uses fast running real-time algorithms to achieve template matching and vehicle classification at about 4 frames /sec. on low-cost hardware. authors_text: Kyung Ho Park,Hyunhee Chung,Soonwoo Kwon
title: Towards an Efficient ML System: Unveiling a Trade-off between Task Accuracy and Engineering Efficiency in a Large-scale Car Sharing Platform
title_zh: 迈向高效的机器学习系统：在大型汽车共享平台中实现任务准确性和工程效率之间的权衡
abstract: Upon the significant performance of the supervised deep neural networks, conventional procedures of developing ML system are \textit{task-centric}, which aims to maximize the task accuracy. However, we scrutinized this \textit{task-centric} ML system lacks in engineering efficiency when the ML practitioners solve multiple tasks in their domain. To resolve this problem, we propose an \textit{efficiency-centric} ML system that concatenates numerous datasets, classifiers, out-of-distribution detectors, and prediction tables existing in the practitioners' domain into a single ML pipeline. Under various image recognition tasks in the real world car-sharing platform, our study illustrates how we established the proposed system and lessons learned from this journey as follows. First, the proposed ML system accomplishes supreme engineering efficiency while achieving a competitive task accuracy. Moreover, compared to the \textit{task-centric} paradigm, we discovered that the \textit{efficiency-centric} ML system yields satisfactory prediction results on multi-labelable samples, which frequently exist in the real world. We analyze these benefits derived from the representation power, which learned broader label spaces from the concatenated dataset. Last but not least, our study elaborated how we deployed this \textit{efficiency-centric} ML system is deployed in the real world live cloud environment. Based on the proposed analogies, we highly expect that ML practitioners can utilize our study to elevate engineering efficiency in their domain.
summary: Upon the significant performance of the supervised deep neural networks, conventional procedures of developing ML system are \textit{task-centric}, which aims to maximize the task accuracy. However, we scrutinized this \textit{task-centric} ML system lacks in engineering efficiency when the ML practitioners solve multiple tasks in their domain. To resolve this problem, we propose an \textit{efficiency-centric} ML system that concatenates numerous datasets, classifiers, out-of-distribution detectors, and prediction tables existing in the practitioners' domain into a single ML pipeline. Under various image recognition tasks in the real world car-sharing platform, our study illustrates how we established the proposed system and lessons learned from this journey as follows. First, the proposed ML system accomplishes supreme engineering efficiency while achieving a competitive task accuracy. Moreover, compared to the \textit{task-centric} paradigm, we discovered that the \textit{efficiency-centric} ML system yields satisfactory prediction results on multi-labelable samples, which frequently exist in the real world. We analyze these benefits derived from the representation power, which learned broader label spaces from the concatenated dataset. Last but not least, our study elaborated how we deployed this \textit{efficiency-centric} ML system is deployed in the real world live cloud environment. Based on the proposed analogies, we highly expect that ML practitioners can utilize our study to elevate engineering efficiency in their domain.
abstract_zh: 鉴于有监督深度神经网络的显着性能，开发机器学习系统的传统程序是以任务为中心的，其目的是最大化任务准确性。然而，我们仔细研究了当机器学习从业者解决其领域中的多个任务时，这种以任务为中心的机器学习系统缺乏工程效率。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个以效率为中心的机器学习系统，它将实践者领域中存在的大量数据集、分类器、分布外检测器和预测表连接到一个机器学习管道中。在现实世界汽车共享平台中的各种图像识别任务下，我们的研究说明了我们如何建立所提出的系统以及从这次旅程中吸取的经验教训，如下所示。首先，所提出的机器学习系统实现了最高的工程效率，同时实现了有竞争力的任务准确性。此外，与 \textit{以任务为中心} 范式相比，我们发现 \textit{以效率为中心} ML 系统对现实世界中经常存在的多标记样本产生了令人满意的预测结果。我们分析了表示能力带来的这些好处，表示能力从连接的数据集中学习了更广泛的标签空间。最后但并非最不重要的一点是，我们的研究详细阐述了如何在现实世界的实时云环境中部署这个以效率为中心的机器学习系统。基于所提出的类比，我们高度期望机器学习从业者能够利用我们的研究来提高其领域的工程效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种以工程效率为中心的机器学习系统，通过整合多个任务的数据集和模型组件，在保持任务准确率的同时提升大规模汽车共享平台的工程效率。
AI.motivation: 传统任务中心的ML系统在处理多任务时工程效率低下，难以满足实际场景中多标签样本和复杂任务的需求。
AI.method: 构建整合多数据集、分类器、分布外检测器和预测表的统一ML流水线，通过广义标签空间学习提升模型泛化能力。
AI.result: 系统在工程效率上表现优异且保持竞争力准确率，对多标签样本预测效果显著，已成功部署于实际云环境。
AI.conclusion: 效率中心的ML系统能有效平衡准确率与工程效率，为实际场景的多任务处理提供可复用的解决方案。

authors_text: Eric Nguyen,Karan Goel,Albert Gu,Gordon W. Downs,Preey Shah,Tri Dao,Stephen A. Baccus,Christopher Ré
title: S4ND: Modeling Images and Videos as Multidimensional Signals Using State Spaces
title_zh: S4ND：使用状态空间将图像和视频建模为多维信号
abstract: Visual data such as images and videos are typically modeled as discretizations of inherently continuous, multidimensional signals. Existing continuous-signal models attempt to exploit this fact by modeling the underlying signals of visual (e.g., image) data directly. However, these models have not yet been able to achieve competitive performance on practical vision tasks such as large-scale image and video classification. Building on a recent line of work on deep state space models (SSMs), we propose S4ND, a new multidimensional SSM layer that extends the continuous-signal modeling ability of SSMs to multidimensional data including images and videos. We show that S4ND can model large-scale visual data in $1$D, $2$D, and $3$D as continuous multidimensional signals and demonstrates strong performance by simply swapping Conv2D and self-attention layers with S4ND layers in existing state-of-the-art models. On ImageNet-1k, S4ND exceeds the performance of a Vision Transformer baseline by $1.5\%$ when training with a $1$D sequence of patches, and matches ConvNeXt when modeling images in $2$D. For videos, S4ND improves on an inflated $3$D ConvNeXt in activity classification on HMDB-51 by $4\%$. S4ND implicitly learns global, continuous convolutional kernels that are resolution invariant by construction, providing an inductive bias that enables generalization across multiple resolutions. By developing a simple bandlimiting modification to S4 to overcome aliasing, S4ND achieves strong zero-shot (unseen at training time) resolution performance, outperforming a baseline Conv2D by $40\%$ on CIFAR-10 when trained on $8 \times 8$ and tested on $32 \times 32$ images. When trained with progressive resizing, S4ND comes within $\sim 1\%$ of a high-resolution model while training $22\%$ faster.
summary: Visual data such as images and videos are typically modeled as discretizations of inherently continuous, multidimensional signals. Existing continuous-signal models attempt to exploit this fact by modeling the underlying signals of visual (e.g., image) data directly. However, these models have not yet been able to achieve competitive performance on practical vision tasks such as large-scale image and video classification. Building on a recent line of work on deep state space models (SSMs), we propose S4ND, a new multidimensional SSM layer that extends the continuous-signal modeling ability of SSMs to multidimensional data including images and videos. We show that S4ND can model large-scale visual data in $1$D, $2$D, and $3$D as continuous multidimensional signals and demonstrates strong performance by simply swapping Conv2D and self-attention layers with S4ND layers in existing state-of-the-art models. On ImageNet-1k, S4ND exceeds the performance of a Vision Transformer baseline by $1.5\%$ when training with a $1$D sequence of patches, and matches ConvNeXt when modeling images in $2$D. For videos, S4ND improves on an inflated $3$D ConvNeXt in activity classification on HMDB-51 by $4\%$. S4ND implicitly learns global, continuous convolutional kernels that are resolution invariant by construction, providing an inductive bias that enables generalization across multiple resolutions. By developing a simple bandlimiting modification to S4 to overcome aliasing, S4ND achieves strong zero-shot (unseen at training time) resolution performance, outperforming a baseline Conv2D by $40\%$ on CIFAR-10 when trained on $8 \times 8$ and tested on $32 \times 32$ images. When trained with progressive resizing, S4ND comes within $\sim 1\%$ of a high-resolution model while training $22\%$ faster.
abstract_zh: 图像和视频等视觉数据通常被建模为固有连续的多维信号的离散化。现有的连续信号模型试图通过直接对视觉（例如图像）数据的底层信号进行建模来利用这一事实。然而，这些模型尚未能够在大规模图像和视频分类等实际视觉任务上实现有竞争力的性能。基于最近在深度状态空间模型（SSM）方面的工作，我们提出了 S4ND，这是一种新的多维 SSM 层，它将 SSM 的连续信号建模能力扩展到包括图像和视频在内的多维数据。我们证明，S4ND 可以将 $1$D、$2$D 和 $3$D 中的大规模视觉数据建模为连续多维信号，并通过简单地将 Conv2D 和自注意力层与现有最先进模型中的 S4ND 层交换来展示强大的性能。在 ImageNet-1k 上，当使用 $1$D 的补丁序列进行训练时，S4ND 的性能超出了 Vision Transformer 基线的 $1.5\%$，并且在对 $2$D 中的图像进行建模时与 ConvNeXt 相匹配。对于视频，S4ND 在 HMDB-51 上的活动分类中将夸大的 $3$D ConvNeXt 改进了 $4\%$。 S4ND 隐式学习全局、连续的卷积核，这些核通过构造而保持分辨率不变，从而提供归纳偏差，从而能够跨多个分辨率进行泛化。通过对 S4 进行简单的带宽限制修改来克服混叠，S4ND 实现了强大的零样本（在训练时看不到）分辨率性能，当在 $8 \times 8$ 上训练并在 $32 \times 32$ 图像上进行测试时，在 CIFAR-10 上比基线 Conv2D 高出 $40\%$。当使用渐进调整大小进行训练时，S4ND 与高分辨率模型的差距在 $\sim 1\%$ 之内，同时训练速度更快 $22\%$。

AI.tldr: 本文提出S4ND，一种基于状态空间模型的多维信号建模方法，用于处理图像和视频等视觉数据。
AI.motivation: 现有连续信号模型在处理图像和视频等多维视觉数据时，尚未能在大规模分类等实际任务中达到竞争性性能。
AI.method: 设计多维状态空间模型层（S4ND），通过扩展连续信号建模能力，替代传统卷积和自注意力层，并引入带限修改以解决混叠问题。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1k上超越Vision Transformer基线1.5%，匹配ConvNeXt；在视频任务HMDB-51上提升4%；零样本分辨率测试中优于Conv2D基线40%。
AI.conclusion: S4ND通过多维信号建模和分辨率不变性归纳偏置，实现了高效且跨分辨率的视觉任务性能提升。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出S4ND，一种基于状态空间模型的多维信号建模方法，用于处理图像和视频等视觉数据。
ai_content.motivation: 现有连续信号模型在处理图像和视频等多维视觉数据时，尚未能在大规模分类等实际任务中达到竞争性性能。
ai_content.method: 设计多维状态空间模型层（S4ND），通过扩展连续信号建模能力，替代传统卷积和自注意力层，并引入带限修改以解决混叠问题。
ai_content.result: 在ImageNet-1k上超越Vision Transformer基线1.5%，匹配ConvNeXt；在视频任务HMDB-51上提升4%；零样本分辨率测试中优于Conv2D基线40%。
ai_content.conclusion: S4ND通过多维信号建模和分辨率不变性归纳偏置，实现了高效且跨分辨率的视觉任务性能提升。

search_text: S4ND: Modeling Images and Videos as Multidimensional Signals Using State Spaces S4ND：使用状态空间将图像和视频建模为多维信号 Visual data such as images and videos are typically modeled as discretizations of inherently continuous, multidimensional signals. Existing continuous-signal models attempt to exploit this fact by modeling the underlying signals of visual (e.g., image) data directly. However, these models have not yet been able to achieve competitive performance on practical vision tasks such as large-scale image and video classification. Building on a recent line of work on deep state space models (SSMs), we propose S4ND, a new multidimensional SSM layer that extends the continuous-signal modeling ability of SSMs to multidimensional data including images and videos. We show that S4ND can model large-scale visual data in $1$D, $2$D, and $3$D as continuous multidimensional signals and demonstrates strong performance by simply swapping Conv2D and self-attention layers with S4ND layers in existing state-of-the-art models. On ImageNet-1k, S4ND exceeds the performance of a Vision Transformer baseline by $1.5\%$ when training with a $1$D sequence of patches, and matches ConvNeXt when modeling images in $2$D. For videos, S4ND improves on an inflated $3$D ConvNeXt in activity classification on HMDB-51 by $4\%$. S4ND implicitly learns global, continuous convolutional kernels that are resolution invariant by construction, providing an inductive bias that enables generalization across multiple resolutions. By developing a simple bandlimiting modification to S4 to overcome aliasing, S4ND achieves strong zero-shot (unseen at training time) resolution performance, outperforming a baseline Conv2D by $40\%$ on CIFAR-10 when trained on $8 \times 8$ and tested on $32 \times 32$ images. When trained with progressive resizing, S4ND comes within $\sim 1\%$ of a high-resolution model while training $22\%$ faster. 图像和视频等视觉数据通常被建模为固有连续的多维信号的离散化。现有的连续信号模型试图通过直接对视觉（例如图像）数据的底层信号进行建模来利用这一事实。然而，这些模型尚未能够在大规模图像和视频分类等实际视觉任务上实现有竞争力的性能。基于最近在深度状态空间模型（SSM）方面的工作，我们提出了 S4ND，这是一种新的多维 SSM 层，它将 SSM 的连续信号建模能力扩展到包括图像和视频在内的多维数据。我们证明，S4ND 可以将 $1$D、$2$D 和 $3$D 中的大规模视觉数据建模为连续多维信号，并通过简单地将 Conv2D 和自注意力层与现有最先进模型中的 S4ND 层交换来展示强大的性能。在 ImageNet-1k 上，当使用 $1$D 的补丁序列进行训练时，S4ND 的性能超出了 Vision Transformer 基线的 $1.5\%$，并且在对 $2$D 中的图像进行建模时与 ConvNeXt 相匹配。对于视频，S4ND 在 HMDB-51 上的活动分类中将夸大的 $3$D ConvNeXt 改进了 $4\%$。 S4ND 隐式学习全局、连续的卷积核，这些核通过构造而保持分辨率不变，从而提供归纳偏差，从而能够跨多个分辨率进行泛化。通过对 S4 进行简单的带宽限制修改来克服混叠，S4ND 实现了强大的零样本（在训练时看不到）分辨率性能，当在 $8 \times 8$ 上训练并在 $32 \times 32$ 图像上进行测试时，在 CIFAR-10 上比基线 Conv2D 高出 $40\%$。当使用渐进调整大小进行训练时，S4ND 与高分辨率模型的差距在 $\sim 1\%$ 之内，同时训练速度更快 $22\%$。 本文提出S4ND，一种基于状态空间模型的多维信号建模方法，用于处理图像和视频等视觉数据。 Eric Nguyen,Karan Goel,Albert Gu,Gordon W. Downs,Preey Shah,Tri Dao,Stephen A. Baccus,Christopher Ré cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Fei Ye,Adrian G. Bors
title: Task-Free Continual Learning via Online Discrepancy Distance Learning
title_zh: 通过在线差异远程学习进行无任务持续学习
comment: Accepted at the 36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022)
comments: Accepted at the 36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022)
abstract: Learning from non-stationary data streams, also called Task-Free Continual Learning (TFCL) remains challenging due to the absence of explicit task information. Although recently some methods have been proposed for TFCL, they lack theoretical guarantees. Moreover, forgetting analysis during TFCL was not studied theoretically before. This paper develops a new theoretical analysis framework which provides generalization bounds based on the discrepancy distance between the visited samples and the entire information made available for training the model. This analysis gives new insights into the forgetting behaviour in classification tasks. Inspired by this theoretical model, we propose a new approach enabled by the dynamic component expansion mechanism for a mixture model, namely the Online Discrepancy Distance Learning (ODDL). ODDL estimates the discrepancy between the probabilistic representation of the current memory buffer and the already accumulated knowledge and uses it as the expansion signal to ensure a compact network architecture with optimal performance. We then propose a new sample selection approach that selectively stores the most relevant samples into the memory buffer through the discrepancy-based measure, further improving the performance. We perform several TFCL experiments with the proposed methodology, which demonstrate that the proposed approach achieves the state of the art performance.
summary: Learning from non-stationary data streams, also called Task-Free Continual Learning (TFCL) remains challenging due to the absence of explicit task information. Although recently some methods have been proposed for TFCL, they lack theoretical guarantees. Moreover, forgetting analysis during TFCL was not studied theoretically before. This paper develops a new theoretical analysis framework which provides generalization bounds based on the discrepancy distance between the visited samples and the entire information made available for training the model. This analysis gives new insights into the forgetting behaviour in classification tasks. Inspired by this theoretical model, we propose a new approach enabled by the dynamic component expansion mechanism for a mixture model, namely the Online Discrepancy Distance Learning (ODDL). ODDL estimates the discrepancy between the probabilistic representation of the current memory buffer and the already accumulated knowledge and uses it as the expansion signal to ensure a compact network architecture with optimal performance. We then propose a new sample selection approach that selectively stores the most relevant samples into the memory buffer through the discrepancy-based measure, further improving the performance. We perform several TFCL experiments with the proposed methodology, which demonstrate that the proposed approach achieves the state of the art performance.
abstract_zh: 由于缺乏明确的任务信息，从非平稳数据流中学习（也称为无任务持续学习（TFCL））仍然具有挑战性。尽管最近提出了一些针对 TFCL 的方法，但它们缺乏理论保证。此外，TFCL 期间的遗忘分析之前并未在理论上进行过研究。本文开发了一种新的理论分析框架，该框架根据访问样本与可用于训练模型的整个信息之间的差异距离提供泛化界限。这一分析为分类任务中的遗忘行为提供了新的见解。受该理论模型的启发，我们提出了一种通过混合模型的动态分量扩展机制实现的新方法，即在线差异远程学习（ODDL）。 ODDL估计当前内存缓冲区的概率表示与已经积累的知识之间的差异，并将其用作扩展信号，以确保具有最佳性能的紧凑网络架构。然后，我们提出了一种新的样本选择方法，通过基于差异的测量有选择地将最相关的样本存储到内存缓冲区中，进一步提高了性能。我们使用所提出的方法进行了多次 TFCL 实验，这表明所提出的方法实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为在线差异距离学习（ODDL）的新方法，用于解决无任务信息的连续学习（TFCL）问题，通过理论分析和动态组件扩展机制提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有TFCL方法缺乏理论保证，且未对遗忘行为进行理论分析，导致模型在非平稳数据流中表现受限。
AI.method: 构建基于样本差异距离的理论分析框架，提出动态组件扩展的混合模型机制ODDL，并通过差异度量选择关键样本存入记忆缓冲区。
AI.result: 在多个TFCL实验中，ODDL方法达到当时最先进的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 该理论框架和方法为非平稳数据流学习提供了有效解决方案，同时揭示了分类任务中遗忘行为的新见解。

authors_text: Qiyu Dai,Yan Zhu,Yiran Geng,Ciyu Ruan,Jiazhao Zhang,He Wang
title: GraspNeRF: Multiview-based 6-DoF Grasp Detection for Transparent and Specular Objects Using Generalizable NeRF
title_zh: GraspNeRF：使用通用 NeRF 对透明和镜面物体进行基于多视图的 6-DoF 抓取检测
comment: IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), 2023
comments: IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), 2023
abstract: In this work, we tackle 6-DoF grasp detection for transparent and specular objects, which is an important yet challenging problem in vision-based robotic systems, due to the failure of depth cameras in sensing their geometry. We, for the first time, propose a multiview RGB-based 6-DoF grasp detection network, GraspNeRF, that leverages the generalizable neural radiance field (NeRF) to achieve material-agnostic object grasping in clutter. Compared to the existing NeRF-based 3-DoF grasp detection methods that rely on densely captured input images and time-consuming per-scene optimization, our system can perform zero-shot NeRF construction with sparse RGB inputs and reliably detect 6-DoF grasps, both in real-time. The proposed framework jointly learns generalizable NeRF and grasp detection in an end-to-end manner, optimizing the scene representation construction for the grasping. For training data, we generate a large-scale photorealistic domain-randomized synthetic dataset of grasping in cluttered tabletop scenes that enables direct transfer to the real world. Our extensive experiments in synthetic and real-world environments demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms all the baselines in all the experiments while remaining in real-time. Project page can be found at https://pku-epic.github.io/GraspNeRF
summary: In this work, we tackle 6-DoF grasp detection for transparent and specular objects, which is an important yet challenging problem in vision-based robotic systems, due to the failure of depth cameras in sensing their geometry. We, for the first time, propose a multiview RGB-based 6-DoF grasp detection network, GraspNeRF, that leverages the generalizable neural radiance field (NeRF) to achieve material-agnostic object grasping in clutter. Compared to the existing NeRF-based 3-DoF grasp detection methods that rely on densely captured input images and time-consuming per-scene optimization, our system can perform zero-shot NeRF construction with sparse RGB inputs and reliably detect 6-DoF grasps, both in real-time. The proposed framework jointly learns generalizable NeRF and grasp detection in an end-to-end manner, optimizing the scene representation construction for the grasping. For training data, we generate a large-scale photorealistic domain-randomized synthetic dataset of grasping in cluttered tabletop scenes that enables direct transfer to the real world. Our extensive experiments in synthetic and real-world environments demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms all the baselines in all the experiments while remaining in real-time. Project page can be found at https://pku-epic.github.io/GraspNeRF
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们解决了透明和镜面物体的 6-DoF 抓取检测，这是基于视觉的机器人系统中一个重要但具有挑战性的问题，因为深度相机无法感知其几何形状。我们首次提出了一种基于多视图 RGB 的 6-DoF 抓取检测网络 GraspNeRF，它利用可泛化神经辐射场 (NeRF) 来实现杂乱中与材料无关的对象抓取。与现有的基于 NeRF 的 3-DoF 抓取检测方法（依赖于密集捕获的输入图像和耗时的每个场景优化）相比，我们的系统可以使用稀疏 RGB 输入执行零样本 NeRF 构建，并可靠地实时检测 6-DoF 抓取。所提出的框架以端到端的方式联合学习可泛化 NeRF 和抓取检测，优化抓取的场景表示结构。对于训练数据，我们生成了一个大规模的真实感域随机合成数据集，用于在杂乱的桌面场景中进行抓取，从而可以直接传输到现实世界。我们在合成和现实环境中进行的广泛实验表明，我们的方法在所有实验中显着优于所有基线，同时保持实时性。项目页面可以在 https://pku-epic.github.io/GraspNeRF 找到

AI.tldr: 本文提出GraspNeRF，一种基于多视角RGB图像的6自由度抓取检测方法，用于解决透明和镜面物体在视觉机器人系统中的抓取难题。
AI.motivation: 传统深度相机难以感知透明和镜面物体的几何结构，而现有基于NeRF的3自由度抓取方法依赖密集图像和耗时优化，无法满足实时性需求。
AI.method: 提出端到端框架，联合学习通用NeRF与抓取检测，通过稀疏RGB输入实现零样本NeRF构建，并生成大规模合成数据集支持现实场景迁移。
AI.result: 在合成与真实环境实验中，方法在所有指标上均显著优于基线方法，且保持实时性。
AI.conclusion: GraspNeRF通过通用NeRF与多视角稀疏输入的结合，有效解决了复杂场景下透明/镜面物体的6自由度抓取检测问题。
