tldr: 本文提出GraspNeRF，一种基于多视角RGB图像的6自由度抓取检测方法，用于解决透明和镜面物体在视觉机器人系统中的抓取难题。
motivation: 传统深度相机难以感知透明和镜面物体的几何结构，而现有基于NeRF的3自由度抓取方法依赖密集图像和耗时优化，无法满足实时性需求。
method: 提出端到端框架，联合学习通用NeRF与抓取检测，通过稀疏RGB输入实现零样本NeRF构建，并生成大规模合成数据集支持现实场景迁移。
result: 在合成与真实环境实验中，方法在所有指标上均显著优于基线方法，且保持实时性。
conclusion: GraspNeRF通过通用NeRF与多视角稀疏输入的结合，有效解决了复杂场景下透明/镜面物体的6自由度抓取检测问题。
search_text: GraspNeRF: Multiview-based 6-DoF Grasp Detection for Transparent and Specular Objects Using Generalizable NeRF GraspNeRF：使用通用 NeRF 对透明和镜面物体进行基于多视图的 6-DoF 抓取检测 In this work, we tackle 6-DoF grasp detection for transparent and specular objects, which is an important yet challenging problem in vision-based robotic systems, due to the failure of depth cameras in sensing their geometry. We, for the first time, propose a multiview RGB-based 6-DoF grasp detection network, GraspNeRF, that leverages the generalizable neural radiance field (NeRF) to achieve material-agnostic object grasping in clutter. Compared to the existing NeRF-based 3-DoF grasp detection methods that rely on densely captured input images and time-consuming per-scene optimization, our system can perform zero-shot NeRF construction with sparse RGB inputs and reliably detect 6-DoF grasps, both in real-time. The proposed framework jointly learns generalizable NeRF and grasp detection in an end-to-end manner, optimizing the scene representation construction for the grasping. For training data, we generate a large-scale photorealistic domain-randomized synthetic dataset of grasping in cluttered tabletop scenes that enables direct transfer to the real world. Our extensive experiments in synthetic and real-world environments demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms all the baselines in all the experiments while remaining in real-time. Project page can be found at https://pku-epic.github.io/GraspNeRF 在这项工作中，我们解决了透明和镜面物体的 6-DoF 抓取检测，这是基于视觉的机器人系统中一个重要但具有挑战性的问题，因为深度相机无法感知其几何形状。我们首次提出了一种基于多视图 RGB 的 6-DoF 抓取检测网络 GraspNeRF，它利用可泛化神经辐射场 (NeRF) 来实现杂乱中与材料无关的对象抓取。与现有的基于 NeRF 的 3-DoF 抓取检测方法（依赖于密集捕获的输入图像和耗时的每个场景优化）相比，我们的系统可以使用稀疏 RGB 输入执行零样本 NeRF 构建，并可靠地实时检测 6-DoF 抓取。所提出的框架以端到端的方式联合学习可泛化 NeRF 和抓取检测，优化抓取的场景表示结构。对于训练数据，我们生成了一个大规模的真实感域随机合成数据集，用于在杂乱的桌面场景中进行抓取，从而可以直接传输到现实世界。我们在合成和现实环境中进行的广泛实验表明，我们的方法在所有实验中显着优于所有基线，同时保持实时性。项目页面可以在 https://pku-epic.github.io/GraspNeRF 找到 本文提出GraspNeRF，一种基于多视角RGB图像的6自由度抓取检测方法，用于解决透明和镜面物体在视觉机器人系统中的抓取难题。 Qiyu Dai,Yan Zhu,Yiran Geng,Ciyu Ruan,Jiazhao Zhang,He Wang cs.RO,cs.CV

authors_text: Yuekun Dai,Chongyi Li,Shangchen Zhou,Ruicheng Feng,Chen Change Loy
title: Flare7K: A Phenomenological Nighttime Flare Removal Dataset
title_zh: Flare7K：现象学夜间耀斑去除数据集
comment: Camera-ready version for NeurIPS 2022 Track Datasets and Benchmarks
comments: Camera-ready version for NeurIPS 2022 Track Datasets and Benchmarks
abstract: Artificial lights commonly leave strong lens flare artifacts on images captured at night. Nighttime flare not only affects the visual quality but also degrades the performance of vision algorithms. Existing flare removal methods mainly focus on removing daytime flares and fail in nighttime. Nighttime flare removal is challenging because of the unique luminance and spectrum of artificial lights and the diverse patterns and image degradation of the flares captured at night. The scarcity of nighttime flare removal datasets limits the research on this crucial task. In this paper, we introduce, Flare7K, the first nighttime flare removal dataset, which is generated based on the observation and statistics of real-world nighttime lens flares. It offers 5,000 scattering and 2,000 reflective flare images, consisting of 25 types of scattering flares and 10 types of reflective flares. The 7,000 flare patterns can be randomly added to flare-free images, forming the flare-corrupted and flare-free image pairs. With the paired data, we can train deep models to restore flare-corrupted images taken in the real world effectively. Apart from abundant flare patterns, we also provide rich annotations, including the labeling of light source, glare with shimmer, reflective flare, and streak, which are commonly absent from existing datasets. Hence, our dataset can facilitate new work in nighttime flare removal and more fine-grained analysis of flare patterns. Extensive experiments show that our dataset adds diversity to existing flare datasets and pushes the frontier of nighttime flare removal.

abstract_zh: 人造光通常会在夜间拍摄的图像上留下强烈的镜头眩光伪影。夜间耀斑不仅影响视觉质量，还会降低视觉算法的性能。现有的耀斑清除方法主要集中在白天清除耀斑，而在夜间则失效。由于人造光的独特亮度和光谱以及夜间捕获的耀斑的不同图案和图像退化，夜间耀斑去除具有挑战性。夜间耀斑去除数据集的稀缺限制了这一关键任务的研究。在本文中，我们介绍了第一个夜间耀斑去除数据集 Flare7K，该数据集是基于对现实世界夜间镜头耀斑的观察和统计而生成的。它提供 5,000 个散射光斑和 2,000 个反射光斑图像，由 25 种散射光斑和 10 种反射光斑组成。 7,000 个光斑图案可以随机添加到无光斑图像中，形成光斑损坏和无光斑图像对。利用配对数据，我们可以训练深度模型来有效地恢复在现实世界中拍摄的被耀斑损坏的图像。除了丰富的耀斑图案之外，我们还提供了丰富的注释，包括光源的标签、闪光眩光、反射耀斑和条纹，这些在现有数据集中通常是不存在的。因此，我们的数据集可以促进夜间耀斑去除和耀斑模式更细粒度的分析方面的新工作。大量实验表明，我们的数据集增加了现有耀斑数据集的多样性，并推动了夜间耀斑去除的前沿。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Flare7K，首个针对夜间镜头眩光去除的大型数据集，包含7000种夜间眩光模式及详细标注。
AI.motivation: 现有去眩光方法多针对白天场景，夜间因光源特性与眩光模式差异导致效果不佳，且缺乏专门的夜间眩光数据集制约研究进展。
AI.method: 基于真实夜间眩光观测统计生成数据集，包含5000张散射 flare 与2000张反射 flare 图像，提供光源、光晕、反射及光斑等标注，并通过配对图像训练深度模型。
AI.result: 实验表明该数据集显著提升夜间眩光去除模型性能，推动相关算法前沿进展。
AI.conclusion: Flare7K填补了夜间眩光数据空白，为细粒度眩光分析与算法优化提供关键支持。

authors_text: Denis Jered McInerney,Geoffrey Young,Jan-Willem van de Meent,Byron C. Wallace
title: That's the Wrong Lung! Evaluating and Improving the Interpretability of Unsupervised Multimodal Encoders for Medical Data
title_zh: 那是错误的肺！评估和提高医疗数据无监督多模态编码器的可解释性
comment: ef:Proceedings of the 2022 Conference on Empirical Methods in Natural Language Processing
comments: ef:Proceedings of the 2022 Conference on Empirical Methods in Natural Language Processing
abstract: Pretraining multimodal models on Electronic Health Records (EHRs) provides a means of learning representations that can transfer to downstream tasks with minimal supervision. Recent multimodal models induce soft local alignments between image regions and sentences. This is of particular interest in the medical domain, where alignments might highlight regions in an image relevant to specific phenomena described in free-text. While past work has suggested that attention "heatmaps" can be interpreted in this manner, there has been little evaluation of such alignments. We compare alignments from a state-of-the-art multimodal (image and text) model for EHR with human annotations that link image regions to sentences. Our main finding is that the text has an often weak or unintuitive influence on attention; alignments do not consistently reflect basic anatomical information. Moreover, synthetic modifications -- such as substituting "left" for "right" -- do not substantially influence highlights. Simple techniques such as allowing the model to opt out of attending to the image and few-shot finetuning show promise in terms of their ability to improve alignments with very little or no supervision. We make our code and checkpoints open-source.
summary: Pretraining multimodal models on Electronic Health Records (EHRs) provides a means of learning representations that can transfer to downstream tasks with minimal supervision. Recent multimodal models induce soft local alignments between image regions and sentences. This is of particular interest in the medical domain, where alignments might highlight regions in an image relevant to specific phenomena described in free-text. While past work has suggested that attention "heatmaps" can be interpreted in this manner, there has been little evaluation of such alignments. We compare alignments from a state-of-the-art multimodal (image and text) model for EHR with human annotations that link image regions to sentences. Our main finding is that the text has an often weak or unintuitive influence on attention; alignments do not consistently reflect basic anatomical information. Moreover, synthetic modifications -- such as substituting "left" for "right" -- do not substantially influence highlights. Simple techniques such as allowing the model to opt out of attending to the image and few-shot finetuning show promise in terms of their ability to improve alignments with very little or no supervision. We make our code and checkpoints open-source.
abstract_zh: 在电子健康记录 (EHR) 上预训练多模态模型提供了一种学习表示的方法，可以在最少的监督下转移到下游任务。最近的多模态模型引起图像区域和句子之间的软局部对齐。这在医学领域特别令人感兴趣，其中对齐可能会突出显示图像中与自由文本中描述的特定现象相关的区域。虽然过去的工作表明注意力“热图”可以以这种方式解释，但对这种对齐方式的评估很少。我们将最先进的 EHR 多模态（图像和文本）模型与将图像区域链接到句子的人类注释进行比较。我们的主要发现是文本对注意力的影响通常很弱或不直观；对齐并不能一致地反映基本的解剖信息。此外，综合修改——例如用“左”代替“右”——不会对亮点产生实质性影响。允许模型选择不关注图像和少量镜头微调等简单技术显示出在很少或没有监督的情况下改善对齐的能力。我们将代码和检查点开源。

AI.tldr: 本文评估并改进无监督多模态编码器在医疗数据中的可解释性，通过比较模型生成的注意力对齐与人类标注的差异，并探索提升对齐效果的简单方法。
AI.motivation: 医疗领域需要可解释的多模态模型以确保临床可信度，但现有研究缺乏对注意力机制与解剖学关联性的系统评估，且模型对文本的依赖性不足。
AI.method: 基于EHR数据训练多模态模型，对比模型生成的图像-文本注意力对齐与人工标注的差异；通过替换文本方向词（如左右）等合成修改测试模型鲁棒性，并尝试允许模型跳过图像模态或使用少量样本微调以优化对齐。
AI.result: 模型注意力对齐常与解剖学知识矛盾，文本对注意力的影响较弱；简单技术（如允许跳过图像、少量样本微调）可显著提升对齐效果且无需大量监督。
AI.conclusion: 当前无监督多模态模型在医疗场景的可解释性不足，但通过设计简单约束和微调策略可有效改善对齐质量，为低监督医疗AI开发提供可行方向。

tldr: 本文评估并改进无监督多模态编码器在医疗数据中的可解释性，通过比较模型生成的注意力对齐与人类标注的差异，并探索提升对齐效果的简单方法。
motivation: 医疗领域需要可解释的多模态模型以确保临床可信度，但现有研究缺乏对注意力机制与解剖学关联性的系统评估，且模型对文本的依赖性不足。
method: 基于EHR数据训练多模态模型，对比模型生成的图像-文本注意力对齐与人工标注的差异；通过替换文本方向词（如左右）等合成修改测试模型鲁棒性，并尝试允许模型跳过图像模态或使用少量样本微调以优化对齐。
result: 模型注意力对齐常与解剖学知识矛盾，文本对注意力的影响较弱；简单技术（如允许跳过图像、少量样本微调）可显著提升对齐效果且无需大量监督。
conclusion: 当前无监督多模态模型在医疗场景的可解释性不足，但通过设计简单约束和微调策略可有效改善对齐质量，为低监督医疗AI开发提供可行方向。
search_text: That's the Wrong Lung! Evaluating and Improving the Interpretability of Unsupervised Multimodal Encoders for Medical Data 那是错误的肺！评估和提高医疗数据无监督多模态编码器的可解释性 Pretraining multimodal models on Electronic Health Records (EHRs) provides a means of learning representations that can transfer to downstream tasks with minimal supervision. Recent multimodal models induce soft local alignments between image regions and sentences. This is of particular interest in the medical domain, where alignments might highlight regions in an image relevant to specific phenomena described in free-text. While past work has suggested that attention "heatmaps" can be interpreted in this manner, there has been little evaluation of such alignments. We compare alignments from a state-of-the-art multimodal (image and text) model for EHR with human annotations that link image regions to sentences. Our main finding is that the text has an often weak or unintuitive influence on attention; alignments do not consistently reflect basic anatomical information. Moreover, synthetic modifications -- such as substituting "left" for "right" -- do not substantially influence highlights. Simple techniques such as allowing the model to opt out of attending to the image and few-shot finetuning show promise in terms of their ability to improve alignments with very little or no supervision. We make our code and checkpoints open-source. 在电子健康记录 (EHR) 上预训练多模态模型提供了一种学习表示的方法，可以在最少的监督下转移到下游任务。最近的多模态模型引起图像区域和句子之间的软局部对齐。这在医学领域特别令人感兴趣，其中对齐可能会突出显示图像中与自由文本中描述的特定现象相关的区域。虽然过去的工作表明注意力“热图”可以以这种方式解释，但对这种对齐方式的评估很少。我们将最先进的 EHR 多模态（图像和文本）模型与将图像区域链接到句子的人类注释进行比较。我们的主要发现是文本对注意力的影响通常很弱或不直观；对齐并不能一致地反映基本的解剖信息。此外，综合修改——例如用“左”代替“右”——不会对亮点产生实质性影响。允许模型选择不关注图像和少量镜头微调等简单技术显示出在很少或没有监督的情况下改善对齐的能力。我们将代码和检查点开源。 本文评估并改进无监督多模态编码器在医疗数据中的可解释性，通过比较模型生成的注意力对齐与人类标注的差异，并探索提升对齐效果的简单方法。 Denis Jered McInerney,Geoffrey Young,Jan-Willem van de Meent,Byron C. Wallace cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Gaëlle Richer,Alexis Pister,Moataz Abdelaal,Jean-Daniel Fekete,Michael Sedlmair,Daniel Weiskopf
title: Scalability in Visualization
title_zh: 可视化的可扩展性
abstract: We introduce a conceptual model for scalability designed for visualization research. With this model, we systematically analyze over 120 visualization publications from 1990-2020 to characterize the different notions of scalability in these works. While many papers have addressed scalability issues, our survey identifies a lack of consistency in the use of the term in the visualization research community. We address this issue by introducing a consistent terminology meant to help visualization researchers better characterize the scalability aspects in their research. It also helps in providing multiple methods for supporting the claim that a work is "scalable". Our model is centered around an effort function with inputs and outputs. The inputs are the problem size and resources, whereas the outputs are the actual efforts, for instance, in terms of computational run time or visual clutter. We select representative examples to illustrate different approaches and facets of what scalability can mean in visualization literature. Finally, targeting the diverse crowd of visualization researchers without a scalability tradition, we provide a set of recommendations for how scalability can be presented in a clear and consistent way to improve fair comparison between visualization techniques and systems and foster reproducibility.
summary: We introduce a conceptual model for scalability designed for visualization research. With this model, we systematically analyze over 120 visualization publications from 1990-2020 to characterize the different notions of scalability in these works. While many papers have addressed scalability issues, our survey identifies a lack of consistency in the use of the term in the visualization research community. We address this issue by introducing a consistent terminology meant to help visualization researchers better characterize the scalability aspects in their research. It also helps in providing multiple methods for supporting the claim that a work is "scalable". Our model is centered around an effort function with inputs and outputs. The inputs are the problem size and resources, whereas the outputs are the actual efforts, for instance, in terms of computational run time or visual clutter. We select representative examples to illustrate different approaches and facets of what scalability can mean in visualization literature. Finally, targeting the diverse crowd of visualization researchers without a scalability tradition, we provide a set of recommendations for how scalability can be presented in a clear and consistent way to improve fair comparison between visualization techniques and systems and foster reproducibility.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一个专为可视化研究而设计的可扩展性概念模型。通过这个模型，我们系统地分析了 1990 年至 2020 年的 120 多个可视化出版物，以描述这些作品中不同的可扩展性概念。虽然许多论文都解决了可扩展性问题，但我们的调查发现可视化研究社区中该术语的使用缺乏一致性。我们通过引入一致的术语来解决这个问题，旨在帮助可视化研究人员更好地描述其研究中的可扩展性方面。它还有助于提供多种方法来支持作品是“可扩展的”这一主张。我们的模型以具有输入和输出的努力函数为中心。输入是问题的大小和资源，而输出是实际的努力，例如，在计算运行时间或视觉混乱方面。我们选择代表性示例来说明可扩展性在可视化文献中的不同方法和方面。最后，针对没有可扩展性传统的多元化可视化研究人员群体，我们提供了一系列关于如何以清晰一致的方式呈现可扩展性的建议，以改善可视化技术和系统之间的公平比较并促进可重复性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个可视化研究中的可扩展性概念模型，并通过分析1990-2020年的120多篇论文，解决可视化领域对'可扩展性'术语使用不一致的问题。
AI.motivation: 可视化研究社区对'可扩展性'的定义和使用缺乏统一标准，导致研究比较和可重复性困难。
AI.method: 系统分析120+篇论文，构建以'努力函数'为核心的模型，定义输入（问题规模、资源）和输出（计算时间、视觉混乱等），并提供示例与术语建议。
AI.result: 识别出术语不一致性，提出统一模型和多种可扩展性验证方法，给出清晰表述建议以促进公平比较与可重复性。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为可视化研究提供标准化术语和评估框架，有助于提升领域内研究的可比性与可重复性。

authors_text: Konstanty Junosza-Szaniawski,Dariusz Nogalski,Paweł Rzążewski
title: Exact and approximation algorithms for sensor placement against DDoS attacks
title_zh: 针对 DDoS 攻击的传感器放置的精确和近似算法
abstract: In a DDoS attack (Distributed Denial of Service), an attacker gains control of many network users through a virus. Then the controlled users send many requests to a victim, leading to its resources being depleted. DDoS attacks are hard to defend because of their distributed nature, large scale and various attack techniques. One possible mode of defense is to place sensors in a network that can detect and stop an unwanted request. However, such sensors are expensive so there is a natural question as to the minimum number of sensors and the optimal placement required to get the necessary level of safety. Presented below are two mixed integer models for optimal sensor placement against DDoS attacks. Both models lead to a trade-off between the number of deployed sensors and the volume of uncontrolled flow. Since the above placement problems are NP-hard, two efficient heuristics are designed, implemented and compared experimentally with exact mixed integer linear programming solvers.
summary: In a DDoS attack (Distributed Denial of Service), an attacker gains control of many network users through a virus. Then the controlled users send many requests to a victim, leading to its resources being depleted. DDoS attacks are hard to defend because of their distributed nature, large scale and various attack techniques. One possible mode of defense is to place sensors in a network that can detect and stop an unwanted request. However, such sensors are expensive so there is a natural question as to the minimum number of sensors and the optimal placement required to get the necessary level of safety. Presented below are two mixed integer models for optimal sensor placement against DDoS attacks. Both models lead to a trade-off between the number of deployed sensors and the volume of uncontrolled flow. Since the above placement problems are NP-hard, two efficient heuristics are designed, implemented and compared experimentally with exact mixed integer linear programming solvers.
abstract_zh: 在 DDoS 攻击（分布式拒绝服务）中，攻击者通过病毒获得对许多网络用户的控制。然后，受控用户向受害者发送大量请求，导致其资源耗尽。 DDoS攻击具有分布式、规模大、攻击手段多样等特点，难以防御。一种可能的防御模式是将传感器放置在网络中，以检测并阻止不需要的请求。然而，此类传感器价格昂贵，因此自然存在一个问题：传感器的最少数量以及获得必要安全级别所需的最佳放置位置。下面介绍了两个混合整数模型，用于针对 DDoS 攻击实现最佳传感器放置。这两种模型都会导致部署的传感器数量和不受控制的流量之间的权衡。由于上述放置问题是 NP 困难的，因此设计、实现了两种有效的启发式算法，并与精确混合整数线性规划求解器进行了实验比较。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过最优传感器部署防御DDoS攻击，提出两种混合整数模型及高效启发式算法。
AI.motivation: DDoS攻击因分布式特性难以防御，而传感器部署成本高，需平衡安全性和经济性。
AI.method: 构建两个混合整数模型描述传感器部署问题，并设计两种启发式算法解决NP难问题。
AI.result: 实验显示启发式算法在传感器数量与未控制流量之间取得有效权衡，性能接近精确求解器。
AI.conclusion: 提出的模型和算法为实际网络防御提供了兼顾成本与安全的传感器部署方案。

authors_text: Andrea Apicella,Francesco Isgrò,Andrea Pollastro,Roberto Prevete
title: Toward the application of XAI methods in EEG-based systems
title_zh: XAI 方法在基于 EEG 的系统中的应用
comment: Accepted at XAI.it 2022 - Italian Workshop on Explainable Artificial Intelligence (https://ceur-ws.org/Vol-3277/paper1.pdf)
comments: Accepted at XAI.it 2022 - Italian Workshop on Explainable Artificial Intelligence (https://ceur-ws.org/Vol-3277/paper1.pdf)
abstract: An interesting case of the well-known Dataset Shift Problem is the classification of Electroencephalogram (EEG) signals in the context of Brain-Computer Interface (BCI). The non-stationarity of EEG signals can lead to poor generalisation performance in BCI classification systems used in different sessions, also from the same subject. In this paper, we start from the hypothesis that the Dataset Shift problem can be alleviated by exploiting suitable eXplainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) methods to locate and transform the relevant characteristics of the input for the goal of classification. In particular, we focus on an experimental analysis of explanations produced by several XAI methods on an ML system trained on a typical EEG dataset for emotion recognition. Results show that many relevant components found by XAI methods are shared across the sessions and can be used to build a system able to generalise better. However, relevant components of the input signal also appear to be highly dependent on the input itself.
summary: An interesting case of the well-known Dataset Shift Problem is the classification of Electroencephalogram (EEG) signals in the context of Brain-Computer Interface (BCI). The non-stationarity of EEG signals can lead to poor generalisation performance in BCI classification systems used in different sessions, also from the same subject. In this paper, we start from the hypothesis that the Dataset Shift problem can be alleviated by exploiting suitable eXplainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) methods to locate and transform the relevant characteristics of the input for the goal of classification. In particular, we focus on an experimental analysis of explanations produced by several XAI methods on an ML system trained on a typical EEG dataset for emotion recognition. Results show that many relevant components found by XAI methods are shared across the sessions and can be used to build a system able to generalise better. However, relevant components of the input signal also appear to be highly dependent on the input itself.
abstract_zh: 众所周知的数据集转移问题的一个有趣案例是脑机接口 (BCI) 背景下的脑电图 (EEG) 信号分类。 EEG 信号的非平稳性可能导致不同会话（也来自同一主题）中使用的 BCI 分类系统的泛化性能较差。在本文中，我们从这样的假设开始：通过利用合适的可解释人工智能（XAI）方法来定位和转换输入的相关特征以实现分类目标，可以缓解数据集转移问题。特别是，我们专注于对几种 XAI 方法在机器学习系统上产生的解释进行实验分析，该机器学习系统是在典型的 EEG 数据集上进行训练的，用于情感识别。结果表明，XAI 方法找到的许多相关组件在会话之间共享，并且可用于构建能够更好泛化的系统。然而，输入信号的相关分量似乎也高度依赖于输入本身。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在基于脑电图（EEG）的系统中应用可解释人工智能（XAI）方法以缓解数据集偏移问题。
AI.motivation: 由于EEG信号的非平稳性，脑机接口（BCI）分类系统在不同会话中表现不佳，因此需要寻找方法以提高其泛化能力。
AI.method: 本文通过实验分析了几种XAI方法在情绪识别任务中对输入信号的解释，以定位和转换相关特征。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，XAI方法发现的许多相关成分在不同会话中是共享的，可用于构建泛化能力更强的系统。
AI.conclusion: XAI方法能够帮助识别输入信号的相关成分，但这些成分在一定程度上仍依赖于输入本身。

authors_text: Manuel Muñoz Sánchez,Jos Elfring,Emilia Silvas,René van de Molengraft
title: Scenario-based Evaluation of Prediction Models for Automated Vehicles
title_zh: 自动驾驶汽车预测模型的场景评估
comment: To be published in IEEE Intelligent Transportation Systems Conference 2022
comments: To be published in IEEE Intelligent Transportation Systems Conference 2022
abstract: To operate safely, an automated vehicle (AV) must anticipate how the environment around it will evolve. For that purpose, it is important to know which prediction models are most appropriate for every situation. Currently, assessment of prediction models is often performed over a set of trajectories without distinction of the type of movement they capture, resulting in the inability to determine the suitability of each model for different situations. In this work we illustrate how standardized evaluation methods result in wrong conclusions regarding a model's predictive capabilities, preventing a clear assessment of prediction models and potentially leading to dangerous on-road situations. We argue that following evaluation practices in safety assessment for AVs, assessment of prediction models should be performed in a scenario-based fashion. To encourage scenario-based assessment of prediction models and illustrate the dangers of improper assessment, we categorize trajectories of the Waymo Open Motion dataset according to the type of movement they capture. Next, three different models are thoroughly evaluated for different trajectory types and prediction horizons. Results show that common evaluation methods are insufficient and the assessment should be performed depending on the application in which the model will operate.
summary: To operate safely, an automated vehicle (AV) must anticipate how the environment around it will evolve. For that purpose, it is important to know which prediction models are most appropriate for every situation. Currently, assessment of prediction models is often performed over a set of trajectories without distinction of the type of movement they capture, resulting in the inability to determine the suitability of each model for different situations. In this work we illustrate how standardized evaluation methods result in wrong conclusions regarding a model's predictive capabilities, preventing a clear assessment of prediction models and potentially leading to dangerous on-road situations. We argue that following evaluation practices in safety assessment for AVs, assessment of prediction models should be performed in a scenario-based fashion. To encourage scenario-based assessment of prediction models and illustrate the dangers of improper assessment, we categorize trajectories of the Waymo Open Motion dataset according to the type of movement they capture. Next, three different models are thoroughly evaluated for different trajectory types and prediction horizons. Results show that common evaluation methods are insufficient and the assessment should be performed depending on the application in which the model will operate.
abstract_zh: 为了安全运行，自动驾驶车辆 (AV) 必须预测周围环境将如何演变。为此，了解哪种预测模型最适合每种情况非常重要。目前，预测模型的评估通常是在一组轨迹上进行的，而不区分它们捕获的运动类型，导致无法确定每个模型对于不同情况的适用性。在这项工作中，我们说明了标准化评估方法如何导致有关模型预测能力的错误结论，从而妨碍对预测模型的清晰评估，并可能导致危险的道路情况。我们认为，按照自动驾驶汽车安全评估的评估实践，预测模型的评估应该以基于场景的方式进行。为了鼓励对预测模型进行基于场景的评估并说明评估不当的危险，我们根据 Waymo Open Motion 数据集捕获的运动类型对轨迹进行分类。接下来，针对不同的轨迹类型和预测范围对三种不同的模型进行彻底评估。结果表明，通用的评估方法是不够的，应根据模型运行的应用进行评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于场景的自动驾驶预测模型评估方法，以替代传统标准化评估方式。
AI.motivation: 当前预测模型评估未区分轨迹类型，导致无法准确判断模型在不同场景下的适用性，可能引发道路安全风险。
AI.method: 对Waymo Open Motion数据集轨迹按运动类型分类，针对不同轨迹类型和预测时间范围评估三个模型表现。
AI.result: 传统评估方法无法全面反映模型能力，模型表现显著依赖具体应用场景和预测时间范围。
AI.conclusion: 预测模型评估应结合实际应用场景进行，场景化评估能更准确反映模型安全性与实用性。

authors_text: Wentao Zhu,Xiaoxuan Ma,Zhaoyang Liu,Libin Liu,Wayne Wu,Yizhou Wang
title: MotionBERT: A Unified Perspective on Learning Human Motion Representations
title_zh: MotionBERT：学习人体运动表示的统一视角
abstract: We present a unified perspective on tackling various human-centric video tasks by learning human motion representations from large-scale and heterogeneous data resources. Specifically, we propose a pretraining stage in which a motion encoder is trained to recover the underlying 3D motion from noisy partial 2D observations. The motion representations acquired in this way incorporate geometric, kinematic, and physical knowledge about human motion, which can be easily transferred to multiple downstream tasks. We implement the motion encoder with a Dual-stream Spatio-temporal Transformer (DSTformer) neural network. It could capture long-range spatio-temporal relationships among the skeletal joints comprehensively and adaptively, exemplified by the lowest 3D pose estimation error so far when trained from scratch. Furthermore, our proposed framework achieves state-of-the-art performance on all three downstream tasks by simply finetuning the pretrained motion encoder with a simple regression head (1-2 layers), which demonstrates the versatility of the learned motion representations. Code and models are available at https://motionbert.github.io/
summary: We present a unified perspective on tackling various human-centric video tasks by learning human motion representations from large-scale and heterogeneous data resources. Specifically, we propose a pretraining stage in which a motion encoder is trained to recover the underlying 3D motion from noisy partial 2D observations. The motion representations acquired in this way incorporate geometric, kinematic, and physical knowledge about human motion, which can be easily transferred to multiple downstream tasks. We implement the motion encoder with a Dual-stream Spatio-temporal Transformer (DSTformer) neural network. It could capture long-range spatio-temporal relationships among the skeletal joints comprehensively and adaptively, exemplified by the lowest 3D pose estimation error so far when trained from scratch. Furthermore, our proposed framework achieves state-of-the-art performance on all three downstream tasks by simply finetuning the pretrained motion encoder with a simple regression head (1-2 layers), which demonstrates the versatility of the learned motion representations. Code and models are available at https://motionbert.github.io/
abstract_zh: 我们通过从大规模和异构数据资源中学习人体运动表示，提出了处理各种以人为中心的视频任务的统一视角。具体来说，我们提出了一个预训练阶段，其中训练运动编码器以从嘈杂的部分 2D 观察中恢复底层 3D 运动。以这种方式获得的运动表示结合了有关人体运动的几何、运动学和物理知识，可以轻松地转移到多个下游任务。我们使用双流时空变换器（DSTformer）神经网络来实现运动编码器。它可以全面、自适应地捕获骨骼关节之间的远程时空关系，从头开始训练时迄今为止最低的 3D 姿态估计误差就是例证。此外，我们提出的框架通过简单地使用简单的回归头（1-2 层）微调预训练的运动编码器，在所有三个下游任务上实现了最先进的性能，这证明了所学习的运动表示的多功能性。代码和模型可在 https://motionbert.github.io/ 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出MotionBERT，通过大规模异构数据学习人类运动表示，以统一处理多种以人为中心的视频任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理人类运动任务时缺乏统一表示，且难以跨任务迁移。本文旨在构建一个通用的运动编码器，通过预训练捕捉几何、运动学和物理知识，实现多任务适应。
AI.method: 设计双流时空Transformer（DSTformer）作为运动编码器，通过预训练阶段从噪声2D观测中恢复3D运动，捕捉骨骼关节的长程时空关系，并通过简单回归头微调适配下游任务。
AI.result: 在从头训练的3D姿态估计中达到最低误差，并在三个下游任务中取得SOTA性能，验证了运动表示的通用性。
AI.conclusion: MotionBERT展示了预训练运动表示的跨任务迁移能力，为人类运动分析提供了统一且高效的解决方案。

motivation: 现有方法在处理人类运动任务时缺乏统一表示，且难以跨任务迁移。本文旨在构建一个通用的运动编码器，通过预训练捕捉几何、运动学和物理知识，实现多任务适应。
method: 设计双流时空Transformer（DSTformer）作为运动编码器，通过预训练阶段从噪声2D观测中恢复3D运动，捕捉骨骼关节的长程时空关系，并通过简单回归头微调适配下游任务。
result: 在从头训练的3D姿态估计中达到最低误差，并在三个下游任务中取得SOTA性能，验证了运动表示的通用性。
conclusion: MotionBERT展示了预训练运动表示的跨任务迁移能力，为人类运动分析提供了统一且高效的解决方案。
search_text: MotionBERT: A Unified Perspective on Learning Human Motion Representations MotionBERT：学习人体运动表示的统一视角 We present a unified perspective on tackling various human-centric video tasks by learning human motion representations from large-scale and heterogeneous data resources. Specifically, we propose a pretraining stage in which a motion encoder is trained to recover the underlying 3D motion from noisy partial 2D observations. The motion representations acquired in this way incorporate geometric, kinematic, and physical knowledge about human motion, which can be easily transferred to multiple downstream tasks. We implement the motion encoder with a Dual-stream Spatio-temporal Transformer (DSTformer) neural network. It could capture long-range spatio-temporal relationships among the skeletal joints comprehensively and adaptively, exemplified by the lowest 3D pose estimation error so far when trained from scratch. Furthermore, our proposed framework achieves state-of-the-art performance on all three downstream tasks by simply finetuning the pretrained motion encoder with a simple regression head (1-2 layers), which demonstrates the versatility of the learned motion representations. Code and models are available at https://motionbert.github.io/ 我们通过从大规模和异构数据资源中学习人体运动表示，提出了处理各种以人为中心的视频任务的统一视角。具体来说，我们提出了一个预训练阶段，其中训练运动编码器以从嘈杂的部分 2D 观察中恢复底层 3D 运动。以这种方式获得的运动表示结合了有关人体运动的几何、运动学和物理知识，可以轻松地转移到多个下游任务。我们使用双流时空变换器（DSTformer）神经网络来实现运动编码器。它可以全面、自适应地捕获骨骼关节之间的远程时空关系，从头开始训练时迄今为止最低的 3D 姿态估计误差就是例证。此外，我们提出的框架通过简单地使用简单的回归头（1-2 层）微调预训练的运动编码器，在所有三个下游任务上实现了最先进的性能，这证明了所学习的运动表示的多功能性。代码和模型可在 https://motionbert.github.io/ 获取 本文提出MotionBERT，通过大规模异构数据学习人类运动表示，以统一处理多种以人为中心的视频任务。 Wentao Zhu,Xiaoxuan Ma,Zhaoyang Liu,Libin Liu,Wayne Wu,Yizhou Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Christopher Morency,Daniel J. Stilwell
title: Evaluating the Benefit of Using Multiple Low-Cost Forward-Looking Sonar Beams for Collision Avoidance in Small AUVs
title_zh: 评估使用多个低成本前视声纳波束避免小型 AUV 碰撞的好处
abstract: We seek to rigorously evaluate the benefit of using a few beams rather than a single beam for a low-cost obstacle avoidance sonar for small AUVs. For a small low-cost AUV, the complexity, cost, and volume required for a multi-beam forward looking sonar are prohibitive. In contrast, a single-beam system is relatively easy to integrate into a small AUV, but does not provide the performance of a multi-beam solution. To better understand this trade-off, we seek to rigorously quantify the improvement with respect to obstacle avoidance performance of adding just a few beams to a single-beam forward looking sonar relative to the performance of the single-beam system. Our work fundamentally supports the goal of using small low-cost AUV systems in cluttered and unstructured environments. Specifically, we investigate the benefit of incorporating a port and starboard beam to a single-beam sonar system for collision avoidance. A methodology for collision avoidance is developed to obtain a fair comparison between a single-beam and multi-beam system, explicitly incorporating the geometry of the beam patterns from forward-looking sonars with large beam angles, and simulated using a high-fidelity representation of acoustic signal propagation.
summary: We seek to rigorously evaluate the benefit of using a few beams rather than a single beam for a low-cost obstacle avoidance sonar for small AUVs. For a small low-cost AUV, the complexity, cost, and volume required for a multi-beam forward looking sonar are prohibitive. In contrast, a single-beam system is relatively easy to integrate into a small AUV, but does not provide the performance of a multi-beam solution. To better understand this trade-off, we seek to rigorously quantify the improvement with respect to obstacle avoidance performance of adding just a few beams to a single-beam forward looking sonar relative to the performance of the single-beam system. Our work fundamentally supports the goal of using small low-cost AUV systems in cluttered and unstructured environments. Specifically, we investigate the benefit of incorporating a port and starboard beam to a single-beam sonar system for collision avoidance. A methodology for collision avoidance is developed to obtain a fair comparison between a single-beam and multi-beam system, explicitly incorporating the geometry of the beam patterns from forward-looking sonars with large beam angles, and simulated using a high-fidelity representation of acoustic signal propagation.
abstract_zh: 我们寻求严格评估使用几个波束而不是单个波束来为小型 AUV 提供低成本避障声纳的好处。对于小型低成本 AUV 而言，多波束前视声纳所需的复杂性、成本和体积令人望而却步。相比之下，单波束系统相对容易集成到小型 AUV 中，但无法提供多波束解决方案的性能。为了更好地理解这种权衡，我们寻求严格量化在单波束前视声纳中添加几个波束相对于单波束系统性能的避障性能的改进。我们的工作从根本上支持在杂乱和非结构化环境中使用小型低成本 AUV 系统的目标。具体来说，我们研究了将左舷和右舷波束合并到单波束声纳系统中以避免碰撞的好处。开发了一种避免碰撞的方法，以获得单波束和多波束系统之间的公平比较，明确地结合了具有大波束角度的前视声纳的波束图案的几何形状，并使用声学信号传播的高保真表示进行模拟。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在评估在小型AUV中使用多个低成本前视声纳波束对避障性能的提升效果。
AI.motivation: 小型AUV由于体积和成本限制难以集成多波束声纳系统，而单波束系统在复杂环境中避障性能不足，因此需要评估增加少量波束的性能提升。
AI.method: 研究开发了一种避障方法，通过模拟高保真声波传播，结合大波束角度的声纳几何特性，对单波束和多波束系统进行公平比较。
AI.result: 研究表明，在单波束系统中增加少量波束（如左舷和右舷波束）可显著提升避障性能，尤其是在复杂和非结构化环境中。
AI.conclusion: 在小型AUV中使用少量多波束声纳系统可有效提高避障性能，为在复杂环境中使用低成本AUV提供理论支持。

authors_text: Christopher Morency,Daniel J. Stilwell,Sebastian Hess
title: Development of a Simulation Environment for Evaluation of a Forward Looking Sonar System for Small AUVs
title_zh: 开发用于评估小型 AUV 前视声纳系统的仿真环境
abstract: This paper describes a high-fidelity sonar model and a simulation environment that implements the model. The model and simulation environment have been developed to aid in the design of a forward looking sonar for autonomous underwater vehicles (AUVs). The simulator achieves real-time visualization through ray tracing and approximation. The simulator facilitates the assessment of sonar design choices, such as beam pattern and beam location, and assessment of obstacle detection and tracking algorithms. An obstacle detection model is proposed for which the null hypothesis is estimated from the environmental model. Sonar data is generated from the simulator and compared to the expected results from the detection model demonstrating the benefits and limitations of the proposed approach.
summary: This paper describes a high-fidelity sonar model and a simulation environment that implements the model. The model and simulation environment have been developed to aid in the design of a forward looking sonar for autonomous underwater vehicles (AUVs). The simulator achieves real-time visualization through ray tracing and approximation. The simulator facilitates the assessment of sonar design choices, such as beam pattern and beam location, and assessment of obstacle detection and tracking algorithms. An obstacle detection model is proposed for which the null hypothesis is estimated from the environmental model. Sonar data is generated from the simulator and compared to the expected results from the detection model demonstrating the benefits and limitations of the proposed approach.
abstract_zh: 本文描述了高保真声纳模型和实现该模型的仿真环境。该模型和仿真环境的开发旨在帮助设计用于自主水下航行器（AUV）的前瞻性声纳。模拟器通过光线追踪和近似实现实时可视化。该模拟器有助于评估声纳设计选择，例如波束图案和波束位置，以及障碍物检测和跟踪算法的评估。提出了一种障碍物检测模型，其零假设是根据环境模型估计的。声纳数据是从模拟器生成的，并与检测模型的预期结果进行比较，证明了所提出方法的优点和局限性。

AI.tldr: 开发高保真声呐模型与仿真环境，用于评估小型自主水下航行器（AUV）的前视声呐系统。
AI.motivation: 为辅助设计AUV前视声呐系统，提供实时可视化与参数评估工具，降低实际测试成本并优化设计选择。
AI.method: 基于光线追踪与近似算法构建实时仿真环境，提出障碍物检测模型并利用环境模型估计零假设，通过仿真数据与理论结果对比验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 验证了声呐设计参数（如波束模式）与障碍物检测算法的性能，明确了所提方法在准确性与局限性方面的表现。
AI.conclusion: 该仿真环境有效支持AUV声呐系统设计评估，为参数优化与算法验证提供可靠依据，同时揭示了模型的适用边界。

authors_text: Anjith George,Amir Mohammadi,Sebastien Marcel
title: Prepended Domain Transformer: Heterogeneous Face Recognition without Bells and Whistles
title_zh: 预置域转换器：无需花哨的异构人脸识别
comment: 16 pages. Accepted for publication in IEEE TIFS
comments: 16 pages. Accepted for publication in IEEE TIFS
abstract: Heterogeneous Face Recognition (HFR) refers to matching face images captured in different domains, such as thermal to visible images (VIS), sketches to visible images, near-infrared to visible, and so on. This is particularly useful in matching visible spectrum images to images captured from other modalities. Though highly useful, HFR is challenging because of the domain gap between the source and target domain. Often, large-scale paired heterogeneous face image datasets are absent, preventing training models specifically for the heterogeneous task. In this work, we propose a surprisingly simple, yet, very effective method for matching face images across different sensing modalities. The core idea of the proposed approach is to add a novel neural network block called Prepended Domain Transformer (PDT) in front of a pre-trained face recognition (FR) model to address the domain gap. Retraining this new block with few paired samples in a contrastive learning setup was enough to achieve state-of-the-art performance in many HFR benchmarks. The PDT blocks can be retrained for several source-target combinations using the proposed general framework. The proposed approach is architecture agnostic, meaning they can be added to any pre-trained FR models. Further, the approach is modular and the new block can be trained with a minimal set of paired samples, making it much easier for practical deployment. The source code and protocols will be made available publicly.
summary: Heterogeneous Face Recognition (HFR) refers to matching face images captured in different domains, such as thermal to visible images (VIS), sketches to visible images, near-infrared to visible, and so on. This is particularly useful in matching visible spectrum images to images captured from other modalities. Though highly useful, HFR is challenging because of the domain gap between the source and target domain. Often, large-scale paired heterogeneous face image datasets are absent, preventing training models specifically for the heterogeneous task. In this work, we propose a surprisingly simple, yet, very effective method for matching face images across different sensing modalities. The core idea of the proposed approach is to add a novel neural network block called Prepended Domain Transformer (PDT) in front of a pre-trained face recognition (FR) model to address the domain gap. Retraining this new block with few paired samples in a contrastive learning setup was enough to achieve state-of-the-art performance in many HFR benchmarks. The PDT blocks can be retrained for several source-target combinations using the proposed general framework. The proposed approach is architecture agnostic, meaning they can be added to any pre-trained FR models. Further, the approach is modular and the new block can be trained with a minimal set of paired samples, making it much easier for practical deployment. The source code and protocols will be made available publicly.
abstract_zh: 异构人脸识别（HFR）是指将不同领域捕获的人脸图像进行匹配，例如热图像与可见光图像（VIS）、草图与可见光图像、近红外与可见光等。这对于将可见光谱图像与从其他模式捕获的图像进行匹配特别有用。尽管 HFR 非常有用，但由于源域和目标域之间存在域差距，因此具有挑战性。通常，大规模配对的异构人脸图像数据集不存在，从而阻碍了专门针对异构任务的训练模型。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种令人惊讶的简单但非常有效的方法来匹配不同传感模式的人脸图像。该方法的核心思想是在预训练的人脸识别（FR）模型前面添加一个称为预置域变换器（PDT）的新型神经网络块来解决域差距。在对比学习设置中使用少量配对样本重新训练这个新模块足以在许多 HFR 基准测试中实现最先进的性能。可以使用所提出的通用框架针对多个源-目标组合重新训练 PDT 块。所提出的方法与架构无关，这意味着它们可以添加到任何预先训练的 FR 模型中。此外，该方法是模块化的，并且可以使用最少的配对样本集来训练新块，从而使实际部署变得更加容易。源代码和协议将公开提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种简单有效的异构人脸识别方法，通过添加预置域变换器（PDT）模块解决不同模态人脸图像的域差距问题。
AI.motivation: 异构人脸识别因源域与目标域间的域差距及缺乏大规模配对数据集而面临挑战，现有方法复杂且难以实际部署。
AI.method: 在预训练人脸识别模型前添加PDT模块，通过少量配对样本的对比学习微调该模块，实现跨模态人脸匹配。
AI.result: 在多个异构人脸识别基准测试中达到最先进性能，且方法模块化、无需复杂架构，易于实际应用。
AI.conclusion: PDT方法以简洁架构有效解决域差距问题，为异构人脸识别提供通用框架，具有重要实践价值。

search_text: Prepended Domain Transformer: Heterogeneous Face Recognition without Bells and Whistles 预置域转换器：无需花哨的异构人脸识别 Heterogeneous Face Recognition (HFR) refers to matching face images captured in different domains, such as thermal to visible images (VIS), sketches to visible images, near-infrared to visible, and so on. This is particularly useful in matching visible spectrum images to images captured from other modalities. Though highly useful, HFR is challenging because of the domain gap between the source and target domain. Often, large-scale paired heterogeneous face image datasets are absent, preventing training models specifically for the heterogeneous task. In this work, we propose a surprisingly simple, yet, very effective method for matching face images across different sensing modalities. The core idea of the proposed approach is to add a novel neural network block called Prepended Domain Transformer (PDT) in front of a pre-trained face recognition (FR) model to address the domain gap. Retraining this new block with few paired samples in a contrastive learning setup was enough to achieve state-of-the-art performance in many HFR benchmarks. The PDT blocks can be retrained for several source-target combinations using the proposed general framework. The proposed approach is architecture agnostic, meaning they can be added to any pre-trained FR models. Further, the approach is modular and the new block can be trained with a minimal set of paired samples, making it much easier for practical deployment. The source code and protocols will be made available publicly. 异构人脸识别（HFR）是指将不同领域捕获的人脸图像进行匹配，例如热图像与可见光图像（VIS）、草图与可见光图像、近红外与可见光等。这对于将可见光谱图像与从其他模式捕获的图像进行匹配特别有用。尽管 HFR 非常有用，但由于源域和目标域之间存在域差距，因此具有挑战性。通常，大规模配对的异构人脸图像数据集不存在，从而阻碍了专门针对异构任务的训练模型。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种令人惊讶的简单但非常有效的方法来匹配不同传感模式的人脸图像。该方法的核心思想是在预训练的人脸识别（FR）模型前面添加一个称为预置域变换器（PDT）的新型神经网络块来解决域差距。在对比学习设置中使用少量配对样本重新训练这个新模块足以在许多 HFR 基准测试中实现最先进的性能。可以使用所提出的通用框架针对多个源-目标组合重新训练 PDT 块。所提出的方法与架构无关，这意味着它们可以添加到任何预先训练的 FR 模型中。此外，该方法是模块化的，并且可以使用最少的配对样本集来训练新块，从而使实际部署变得更加容易。源代码和协议将公开提供。 本文提出一种简单有效的异构人脸识别方法，通过添加预置域变换器（PDT）模块解决不同模态人脸图像的域差距问题。 Anjith George,Amir Mohammadi,Sebastien Marcel cs.CV,cs.CR

authors_text: Qinqing Zheng,Mikael Henaff,Brandon Amos,Aditya Grover
title: Semi-Supervised Offline Reinforcement Learning with Action-Free Trajectories
title_zh: 具有无动作轨迹的半监督离线强化学习
abstract: Natural agents can effectively learn from multiple data sources that differ in size, quality, and types of measurements. We study this heterogeneity in the context of offline reinforcement learning (RL) by introducing a new, practically motivated semi-supervised setting. Here, an agent has access to two sets of trajectories: labelled trajectories containing state, action and reward triplets at every timestep, along with unlabelled trajectories that contain only state and reward information. For this setting, we develop and study a simple meta-algorithmic pipeline that learns an inverse dynamics model on the labelled data to obtain proxy-labels for the unlabelled data, followed by the use of any offline RL algorithm on the true and proxy-labelled trajectories. Empirically, we find this simple pipeline to be highly successful -- on several D4RL benchmarks~\cite{fu2020d4rl}, certain offline RL algorithms can match the performance of variants trained on a fully labelled dataset even when we label only 10\% of trajectories which are highly suboptimal. To strengthen our understanding, we perform a large-scale controlled empirical study investigating the interplay of data-centric properties of the labelled and unlabelled datasets, with algorithmic design choices (e.g., choice of inverse dynamics, offline RL algorithm) to identify general trends and best practices for training RL agents on semi-supervised offline datasets.
summary: Natural agents can effectively learn from multiple data sources that differ in size, quality, and types of measurements. We study this heterogeneity in the context of offline reinforcement learning (RL) by introducing a new, practically motivated semi-supervised setting. Here, an agent has access to two sets of trajectories: labelled trajectories containing state, action and reward triplets at every timestep, along with unlabelled trajectories that contain only state and reward information. For this setting, we develop and study a simple meta-algorithmic pipeline that learns an inverse dynamics model on the labelled data to obtain proxy-labels for the unlabelled data, followed by the use of any offline RL algorithm on the true and proxy-labelled trajectories. Empirically, we find this simple pipeline to be highly successful -- on several D4RL benchmarks~\cite{fu2020d4rl}, certain offline RL algorithms can match the performance of variants trained on a fully labelled dataset even when we label only 10\% of trajectories which are highly suboptimal. To strengthen our understanding, we perform a large-scale controlled empirical study investigating the interplay of data-centric properties of the labelled and unlabelled datasets, with algorithmic design choices (e.g., choice of inverse dynamics, offline RL algorithm) to identify general trends and best practices for training RL agents on semi-supervised offline datasets.
abstract_zh: 自然代理可以有效地从大小、质量和测量类型不同的多个数据源中学习。我们通过引入一种新的、以实践为动机的半监督环境，在离线强化学习（RL）的背景下研究这种异质性。在这里，代理可以访问两组轨迹：在每个时间步包含状态、动作和奖励三元组的标记轨迹，以及仅包含状态和奖励信息的未标记轨迹。对于这种设置，我们开发和研究了一个简单的元算法管道，该管道在标记数据上学习逆动力学模型，以获得未标记数据的代理标签，然后在真实和代理标记轨迹上使用任何离线 RL 算法。根据经验，我们发现这个简单的流程非常成功——在几个 D4RL 基准测试中~\cite{fu2020d4rl}，某些离线 RL 算法可以匹配在完全标记的数据集上训练的变体的性能，即使我们只标记 10% 的高度次优的轨迹。为了加强我们的理解，我们进行了一项大规模的受控实证研究，调查标记和未标记数据集的以数据为中心的属性之间的相互作用，并通过算法设计选择（例如，逆动态的选择、离线强化学习算法）来确定在半监督离线数据集上训练强化学习智能体的一般趋势和最佳实践。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半监督离线强化学习方法，利用包含动作标签的有标签轨迹和不含动作信息的无标签轨迹，通过逆动力学模型生成伪标签以提升学习效果。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中数据来源多样且质量不一，传统离线强化学习依赖完全标注数据，难以适应部分数据缺失动作信息的实际情况。
AI.method: 设计元算法框架：首先基于有标签数据训练逆动力学模型生成无标签数据的伪动作标签，再结合真实标签与伪标签数据，使用任意离线RL算法进行训练。
AI.result: 在D4RL基准测试中，仅用10%低质量标注数据时，部分算法性能可接近全标注数据效果，且通过大规模实验分析了数据特性与算法设计的交互影响。
AI.conclusion: 半监督框架有效利用异构数据，数据质量与逆动力学模型选择是关键因素，为离线RL在现实场景的应用提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Yi Zeng,Minzhou Pan,Himanshu Jahagirdar,Ming Jin,Lingjuan Lyu,Ruoxi Jia
title: How to Sift Out a Clean Data Subset in the Presence of Data Poisoning?
title_zh: 存在数据中毒的情况下如何筛选出干净的数据子集？
abstract: Given the volume of data needed to train modern machine learning models, external suppliers are increasingly used. However, incorporating external data poses data poisoning risks, wherein attackers manipulate their data to degrade model utility or integrity. Most poisoning defenses presume access to a set of clean data (or base set). While this assumption has been taken for granted, given the fast-growing research on stealthy poisoning attacks, a question arises: can defenders really identify a clean subset within a contaminated dataset to support defenses? This paper starts by examining the impact of poisoned samples on defenses when they are mistakenly mixed into the base set. We analyze five defenses and find that their performance deteriorates dramatically with less than 1% poisoned points in the base set. These findings suggest that sifting out a base set with high precision is key to these defenses' performance. Motivated by these observations, we study how precise existing automated tools and human inspection are at identifying clean data in the presence of data poisoning. Unfortunately, neither effort achieves the precision needed. Worse yet, many of the outcomes are worse than random selection. In addition to uncovering the challenge, we propose a practical countermeasure, Meta-Sift. Our method is based on the insight that existing attacks' poisoned samples shifts from clean data distributions. Hence, training on the clean portion of a dataset and testing on the corrupted portion will result in high prediction loss. Leveraging the insight, we formulate a bilevel optimization to identify clean data and further introduce a suite of techniques to improve efficiency and precision. Our evaluation shows that Meta-Sift can sift a clean base set with 100% precision under a wide range of poisoning attacks. The selected base set is large enough to give rise to successful defenses.

Leveraging the insight, we formulate a bilevel optimization to identify clean data and further introduce a suite of techniques to improve efficiency and precision. Our evaluation shows that Meta-Sift can sift a clean base set with 100% precision under a wide range of poisoning attacks. The selected base set is large enough to give rise to successful defenses.
abstract_zh: 鉴于训练现代机器学习模型所需的数据量很大，越来越多地使用外部供应商。然而，合并外部数据会带来数据中毒风险，其中攻击者操纵他们的数据来降低模型的实用性或完整性。大多数中毒防御都假定可以访问一组干净的数据（或基本集）。虽然这种假设被认为是理所当然的，但考虑到对隐形中毒攻击的快速增长的研究，出现了一个问题：防御者真的可以在受污染的数据集中识别出干净的子集来支持防御吗？本文首先研究了有毒样本被错误地混合到基础集中时对防御的影响。我们分析了五种防御，发现它们的性能急剧恶化，基础集中的中毒点不到 1%。这些发现表明，高精度筛选基础集是这些防御性能的关键。受这些观察的启发，我们研究了现有的自动化工具和人工检查在存在数据中毒的情况下识别干净数据的精确度。不幸的是，这两种努力都没有达到所需的精度。更糟糕的是，许多结果比随机选择更糟糕。除了揭示这一挑战之外，我们还提出了一种实用的对策：Meta-Sift。我们的方法基于这样的见解：现有攻击的中毒样本从干净的数据分布中转移。因此，对数据集的干净部分进行训练并在损坏部分进行测试将导致较高的预测损失。利用这种洞察力，我们制定了双层优化来识别干净的数据，并进一步引入一套技术来提高效率和精度。我们的评估表明，Meta-Sift 可以在大范围的中毒攻击下以 100% 的精度筛选干净的基础集。所选的基础集足够大，足以产生成功的防御。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在数据中毒攻击存在的情况下，如何从受污染的数据集中筛选出干净数据子集以支持防御机制。
AI.motivation: 现有防御方法依赖于假设存在干净数据集，但随着隐蔽性数据中毒攻击的增多，即使少量 poisoned 数据混入也会显著降低防御效果，因此需要精确筛选干净数据子集。
AI.method: 提出 Meta-Sift 方法，通过双层优化利用中毒样本与干净数据分布的差异，训练时使用干净数据部分，测试时在受污染部分产生高预测损失，从而识别干净数据。
AI.result: Meta-Sift 能在多种中毒攻击下以 100% 精度筛选出足够大的干净数据子集，有效支持后续防御。
AI.conclusion: 精确筛选干净数据是防御数据中毒的关键，Meta-Sift 通过分布差异分析实现了高效且高精度的解决方案。

search_text: How to Sift Out a Clean Data Subset in the Presence of Data Poisoning? 存在数据中毒的情况下如何筛选出干净的数据子集？ Given the volume of data needed to train modern machine learning models, external suppliers are increasingly used. However, incorporating external data poses data poisoning risks, wherein attackers manipulate their data to degrade model utility or integrity. Most poisoning defenses presume access to a set of clean data (or base set). While this assumption has been taken for granted, given the fast-growing research on stealthy poisoning attacks, a question arises: can defenders really identify a clean subset within a contaminated dataset to support defenses? This paper starts by examining the impact of poisoned samples on defenses when they are mistakenly mixed into the base set. We analyze five defenses and find that their performance deteriorates dramatically with less than 1% poisoned points in the base set. These findings suggest that sifting out a base set with high precision is key to these defenses' performance. Motivated by these observations, we study how precise existing automated tools and human inspection are at identifying clean data in the presence of data poisoning. Unfortunately, neither effort achieves the precision needed. Worse yet, many of the outcomes are worse than random selection. In addition to uncovering the challenge, we propose a practical countermeasure, Meta-Sift. Our method is based on the insight that existing attacks' poisoned samples shifts from clean data distributions. Hence, training on the clean portion of a dataset and testing on the corrupted portion will result in high prediction loss. Leveraging the insight, we formulate a bilevel optimization to identify clean data and further introduce a suite of techniques to improve efficiency and precision. Our evaluation shows that Meta-Sift can sift a clean base set with 100% precision under a wide range of poisoning attacks. The selected base set is large enough to give rise to successful defenses. 鉴于训练现代机器学习模型所需的数据量很大，越来越多地使用外部供应商。然而，合并外部数据会带来数据中毒风险，其中攻击者操纵他们的数据来降低模型的实用性或完整性。大多数中毒防御都假定可以访问一组干净的数据（或基本集）。虽然这种假设被认为是理所当然的，但考虑到对隐形中毒攻击的快速增长的研究，出现了一个问题：防御者真的可以在受污染的数据集中识别出干净的子集来支持防御吗？本文首先研究了有毒样本被错误地混合到基础集中时对防御的影响。我们分析了五种防御，发现它们的性能急剧恶化，基础集中的中毒点不到 1%。这些发现表明，高精度筛选基础集是这些防御性能的关键。受这些观察的启发，我们研究了现有的自动化工具和人工检查在存在数据中毒的情况下识别干净数据的精确度。不幸的是，这两种努力都没有达到所需的精度。更糟糕的是，许多结果比随机选择更糟糕。除了揭示这一挑战之外，我们还提出了一种实用的对策：Meta-Sift。我们的方法基于这样的见解：现有攻击的中毒样本从干净的数据分布中转移。因此，对数据集的干净部分进行训练并在损坏部分进行测试将导致较高的预测损失。利用这种洞察力，我们制定了双层优化来识别干净的数据，并进一步引入一套技术来提高效率和精度。我们的评估表明，Meta-Sift 可以在大范围的中毒攻击下以 100% 的精度筛选干净的基础集。所选的基础集足够大，足以产生成功的防御。 本文研究了在数据中毒攻击存在的情况下，如何从受污染的数据集中筛选出干净数据子集以支持防御机制。 Yi Zeng,Minzhou Pan,Himanshu Jahagirdar,Ming Jin,Lingjuan Lyu,Ruoxi Jia cs.CR,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Zhenyu Yang,Kyle Lafata,Eugene Vaios,Zongsheng Hu,Trey Mullikin,Fang-Fang Yin,Chunhao Wang
title: Quantifying U-Net Uncertainty in Multi-Parametric MRI-based Glioma Segmentation by Spherical Image Projection
title_zh: 通过球形图像投影量化基于多参数 MRI 的神经胶质瘤分割中的 U-Net 不确定性
abstract: The projection of planar MRI data onto a spherical surface is equivalent to a nonlinear image transformation that retains global anatomical information. By incorporating this image transformation process in our proposed spherical projection-based U-Net (SPU-Net) segmentation model design, multiple independent segmentation predictions can be obtained from a single MRI. The final segmentation is the average of all available results, and the variation can be visualized as a pixel-wise uncertainty map. An uncertainty score was introduced to evaluate and compare the performance of uncertainty measurements. The proposed SPU-Net model was implemented on the basis of 369 glioma patients with MP-MRI scans (T1, T1-Ce, T2, and FLAIR). Three SPU-Net models were trained to segment enhancing tumor (ET), tumor core (TC), and whole tumor (WT), respectively. The SPU-Net model was compared with (1) the classic U-Net model with test-time augmentation (TTA) and (2) linear scaling-based U-Net (LSU-Net) segmentation models in terms of both segmentation accuracy (Dice coefficient, sensitivity, specificity, and accuracy) and segmentation uncertainty (uncertainty map and uncertainty score). The developed SPU-Net model successfully achieved low uncertainty for correct segmentation predictions (e.g., tumor interior or healthy tissue interior) and high uncertainty for incorrect results (e.g., tumor boundaries). This model could allow the identification of missed tumor targets or segmentation errors in U-Net. Quantitatively, the SPU-Net model achieved the highest uncertainty scores for three segmentation targets (ET/TC/WT): 0.826/0.848/0.936, compared to 0.784/0.643/0.872 using the U-Net with TTA and 0.743/0.702/0.876 with the LSU-Net (scaling factor = 2). The SPU-Net also achieved statistically significantly higher Dice coefficients, underscoring the improved segmentation accuracy.

The SPU-Net model was compared with (1) the classic U-Net model with test-time augmentation (TTA) and (2) linear scaling-based U-Net (LSU-Net) segmentation models in terms of both segmentation accuracy (Dice coefficient, sensitivity, specificity, and accuracy) and segmentation uncertainty (uncertainty map and uncertainty score). The developed SPU-Net model successfully achieved low uncertainty for correct segmentation predictions (e.g., tumor interior or healthy tissue interior) and high uncertainty for incorrect results (e.g., tumor boundaries). Quantitatively, the SPU-Net model achieved the highest uncertainty scores for three segmentation targets (ET/TC/WT): 0.826/0.848/0.936, compared to 0.784/0.643/0.872 using the U-Net with TTA and 0.743/0.702/0.876 with the LSU-Net (scaling factor = 2). abstract_zh: 将平面 MRI 数据投影到球面上相当于保留全局解剖信息的非线性图像变换。通过将此图像变换过程合并到我们提出的基于球形投影的 U-Net (SPU-Net) 分割模型设计中，可以从单个 MRI 获得多个独立的分割预测。最终的分割是所有可用结果的平均值，并且变化可以可视化为像素级不确定性图。引入不确定性评分来评估和比较不确定性测量的性能。所提出的 SPU-Net 模型是在 369 名神经胶质瘤患者的 MP-MRI 扫描（T1、T1-Ce、T2 和 FLAIR）的基础上实施的。三个 SPU-Net 模型分别被训练来分割增强肿瘤 (ET)、肿瘤核心 (TC) 和整个肿瘤 (WT)。将 SPU-Net 模型与 (1) 具有测试时间增强 (TTA) 的经典 U-Net 模型和 (2) 基于线性缩放的 U-Net (LSU-Net) 分割模型在分割精度（Dice 系数、灵敏度、特异性和准确性）和分割不确定性（不确定性图和不确定性得分）方面进行比较。开发的 SPU-Net 模型成功实现了正确分割预测（例如肿瘤内部或健康组织内部）的低不确定性和错误结果（例如肿瘤边界）的高不确定性。该模型可以识别 U-Net 中遗漏的肿瘤目标或分割错误。从数量上来说，SPU-Net 模型在三个分割目标 (ET/TC/WT) 上取得了最高的不确定性分数：0.826/0.848/0.936，而使用带有 TTA 的 U-Net 得到了 0.784/0.643/0.872，使用 LSU-Net 得到了 0.743/0.702/0.876（缩放因子 = 2）。 SPU-Net 还实现了统计上显着更高的 Dice 系数，强调了分割精度的提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于球面图像投影的U-Net模型（SPU-Net），用于多参数MRI胶质瘤分割中的不确定性量化。
AI.motivation: 传统U-Net模型在分割复杂区域（如肿瘤边界）时存在不确定性，难以准确评估分割可靠性，需改进不确定性量化方法。
AI.method: 将平面MRI数据投影到球面表面，通过多视角独立分割预测生成像素级不确定性图，并引入不确定性评分进行模型比较。
AI.result: SPU-Net在ET/TC/WT分割目标上不确定性评分分别为0.826/0.848/0.936，显著高于经典U-Net（0.784/0.643/0.872）和LSU-Net（0.743/0.702/0.876），Dice系数也显著提升。
AI.conclusion: SPU-Net通过球面投影有效提升了分割准确性与不确定性量化能力，可识别传统模型遗漏的肿瘤目标或分割错误。

The SPU-Net also achieved statistically significantly higher Dice coefficients, underscoring the improved segmentation accuracy. 将平面 MRI 数据投影到球面上相当于保留全局解剖信息的非线性图像变换。通过将此图像变换过程合并到我们提出的基于球形投影的 U-Net (SPU-Net) 分割模型设计中，可以从单个 MRI 获得多个独立的分割预测。最终的分割是所有可用结果的平均值，并且变化可以可视化为像素级不确定性图。引入不确定性评分来评估和比较不确定性测量的性能。所提出的 SPU-Net 模型是在 369 名神经胶质瘤患者的 MP-MRI 扫描（T1、T1-Ce、T2 和 FLAIR）的基础上实施的。三个 SPU-Net 模型分别被训练来分割增强肿瘤 (ET)、肿瘤核心 (TC) 和整个肿瘤 (WT)。将 SPU-Net 模型与 (1) 具有测试时间增强 (TTA) 的经典 U-Net 模型和 (2) 基于线性缩放的 U-Net (LSU-Net) 分割模型在分割精度（Dice 系数、灵敏度、特异性和准确性）和分割不确定性（不确定性图和不确定性得分）方面进行比较。开发的 SPU-Net 模型成功实现了正确分割预测（例如肿瘤内部或健康组织内部）的低不确定性和错误结果（例如肿瘤边界）的高不确定性。该模型可以识别 U-Net 中遗漏的肿瘤目标或分割错误。从数量上来说，SPU-Net 模型在三个分割目标 (ET/TC/WT) 上取得了最高的不确定性分数：0.826/0.848/0.936，而使用带有 TTA 的 U-Net 得到了 0.784/0.643/0.872，使用 LSU-Net 得到了 0.743/0.702/0.876（缩放因子 = 2）。 SPU-Net 还实现了统计上显着更高的 Dice 系数，强调了分割精度的提高。 本文提出了一种基于球面图像投影的U-Net模型（SPU-Net），用于多参数MRI胶质瘤分割中的不确定性量化。 Zhenyu Yang,Kyle Lafata,Eugene Vaios,Zongsheng Hu,Trey Mullikin,Fang-Fang Yin,Chunhao Wang q-bio.QM,cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Stephen T. Krauss,Daniel J. Stilwell
title: Unscented Kalman Filtering on Manifolds for AUV Navigation -- Experimental Results
title_zh: AUV 导航歧管上的无迹卡尔曼滤波——实验结果
abstract: In this work, we present an aided inertial navigation system for an autonomous underwater vehicle (AUV) using an unscented Kalman filter on manifolds (UKF-M). The inertial navigation estimate is aided by a Doppler velocity log (DVL), depth sensor, acoustic range and, while on the surface, GPS. The sensor model for each navigation sensor on the AUV is explicitly described, including compensation for lever arm offsets between the IMU and each sensor. Additionally, an outlier rejection step is proposed to reject measurement outliers that would degrade navigation performance. The UKF-M for AUV navigation is implemented for real-time navigation on the Virginia Tech 690 AUV and validated in the field. Finally, by post-processing the navigation sensor data, we show experimentally that the UKF-M is able to converge to the correct heading in the presence of arbitrarily large initial heading error.
summary: In this work, we present an aided inertial navigation system for an autonomous underwater vehicle (AUV) using an unscented Kalman filter on manifolds (UKF-M). The inertial navigation estimate is aided by a Doppler velocity log (DVL), depth sensor, acoustic range and, while on the surface, GPS. The sensor model for each navigation sensor on the AUV is explicitly described, including compensation for lever arm offsets between the IMU and each sensor. Additionally, an outlier rejection step is proposed to reject measurement outliers that would degrade navigation performance. The UKF-M for AUV navigation is implemented for real-time navigation on the Virginia Tech 690 AUV and validated in the field. Finally, by post-processing the navigation sensor data, we show experimentally that the UKF-M is able to converge to the correct heading in the presence of arbitrarily large initial heading error.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种用于自主水下航行器（AUV）的辅助惯性导航系统，该系统使用歧管上的无味卡尔曼滤波器（UKF-M）。惯性导航估计得到多普勒速度计程仪 (DVL)、深度传感器、声学范围以及地面 GPS 的帮助。明确描述了 AUV 上每个导航传感器的传感器模型，包括对 IMU 和每个传感器之间的杠杆臂偏移的补偿。此外，提出了异常值拒绝步骤来拒绝会降低导航性能的测量异常值。用于 AUV 导航的 UKF-M 在弗吉尼亚理工大学 690 AUV 上实现实时导航，并在现场进行了验证。最后，通过对导航传感器数据进行后处理，我们通过实验证明 UKF-M 能够在存在任意大的初始航向误差的情况下收敛到正确的航向。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于水下自主航行器（AUV）导航的改进型无迹卡尔曼滤波器（UKF-M），并进行了实验验证。
AI.motivation: 传统的惯性导航系统在水下环境中容易积累误差，因此需要一种能够融合多传感器数据并有效处理初始误差的导航方法。
AI.method: 本文采用无迹卡尔曼滤波器（UKF-M）来融合惯性测量单元（IMU）、多普勒速度计（DVL）、深度传感器、声学测距仪和GPS等传感器数据，并提出了一种异常值剔除方法以提高导航性能。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，UKF-M能够在存在较大初始航向误差的情况下收敛到正确的航向，且在实际航行中表现良好。
AI.conclusion: UKF-M是一种适用于AUV导航的有效方法，能够提高水下环境中的导航精度和鲁棒性。

authors_text: Di Tang,Rui Zhu,XiaoFeng Wang,Haixu Tang,Yi Chen
title: Understanding Impacts of Task Similarity on Backdoor Attack and Detection
title_zh: 了解任务相似性对后门攻击和检测的影响
abstract: With extensive studies on backdoor attack and detection, still fundamental questions are left unanswered regarding the limits in the adversary's capability to attack and the defender's capability to detect. We believe that answers to these questions can be found through an in-depth understanding of the relations between the primary task that a benign model is supposed to accomplish and the backdoor task that a backdoored model actually performs. For this purpose, we leverage similarity metrics in multi-task learning to formally define the backdoor distance (similarity) between the primary task and the backdoor task, and analyze existing stealthy backdoor attacks, revealing that most of them fail to effectively reduce the backdoor distance and even for those that do, still much room is left to further improve their stealthiness. So we further design a new method, called TSA attack, to automatically generate a backdoor model under a given distance constraint, and demonstrate that our new attack indeed outperforms existing attacks, making a step closer to understanding the attacker's limits. Most importantly, we provide both theoretic results and experimental evidence on various datasets for the positive correlation between the backdoor distance and backdoor detectability, demonstrating that indeed our task similarity analysis help us better understand backdoor risks and has the potential to identify more effective mitigations.
summary: With extensive studies on backdoor attack and detection, still fundamental questions are left unanswered regarding the limits in the adversary's capability to attack and the defender's capability to detect. We believe that answers to these questions can be found through an in-depth understanding of the relations between the primary task that a benign model is supposed to accomplish and the backdoor task that a backdoored model actually performs. For this purpose, we leverage similarity metrics in multi-task learning to formally define the backdoor distance (similarity) between the primary task and the backdoor task, and analyze existing stealthy backdoor attacks, revealing that most of them fail to effectively reduce the backdoor distance and even for those that do, still much room is left to further improve their stealthiness. So we further design a new method, called TSA attack, to automatically generate a backdoor model under a given distance constraint, and demonstrate that our new attack indeed outperforms existing attacks, making a step closer to understanding the attacker's limits. Most importantly, we provide both theoretic results and experimental evidence on various datasets for the positive correlation between the backdoor distance and backdoor detectability, demonstrating that indeed our task similarity analysis help us better understand backdoor risks and has the potential to identify more effective mitigations.
abstract_zh: 随着对后门攻击和检测的广泛研究，关于对手攻击能力和防御者检测能力的限制的基本问题仍然没有得到解答。我们相信，通过深入理解良性模型应该完成的主要任务与后门模型实际执行的后门任务之间的关系，可以找到这些问题的答案。为此，我们利用多任务学习中的相似性度量来正式定义主任务和后门任务之间的后门距离（相似性），并分析现有的隐秘后门攻击，发现大多数攻击都未能有效地减少后门距离，即使是那些能够有效减少后门距离的攻击，仍然有很大的空间来进一步提高其隐秘性。因此，我们进一步设计了一种新方法，称为 TSA 攻击，在给定距离约束下自动生成后门模型，并证明我们的新攻击确实优于现有攻击，使我们更接近了解攻击者的极限。最重要的是，我们提供了各种数据集的理论结果和实验证据，证明后门距离和后门可检测性之间的正相关性，证明我们的任务相似性分析确实有助于我们更好地理解后门风险，并有可能找到更有效的缓解措施。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究任务相似性对后门攻击与检测的影响，通过定义后门距离并设计新型攻击方法TSA，揭示攻击效果与检测性的关联。
AI.motivation: 现有研究未明确后门攻击能力边界及检测限制，需通过分析主任务与后门任务关系以理解攻击与防御的潜在约束。
AI.method: 利用多任务学习相似性度量定义后门距离，分析现有攻击方法，设计TSA攻击在距离约束下生成后门模型，并通过理论与实验验证关联性。
AI.result: TSA攻击优于现有方法，实验表明后门距离与检测性呈正相关，任务相似性分析可提升对后门风险的理解与缓解效果。
AI.conclusion: 任务相似性分析为理解后门攻击限制及检测性提供新视角，未来可基于此设计更有效的防御策略。

authors_text: Yaser Souri,Yazan Abu Farha,Emad Bahrami,Gianpiero Francesca,Juergen Gall
title: Robust Action Segmentation from Timestamp Supervision
title_zh: 来自时间戳监督的稳健动作分割
abstract: Action segmentation is the task of predicting an action label for each frame of an untrimmed video. As obtaining annotations to train an approach for action segmentation in a fully supervised way is expensive, various approaches have been proposed to train action segmentation models using different forms of weak supervision, e.g., action transcripts, action sets, or more recently timestamps. Timestamp supervision is a promising type of weak supervision as obtaining one timestamp per action is less expensive than annotating all frames, but it provides more information than other forms of weak supervision. However, previous works assume that every action instance is annotated with a timestamp, which is a restrictive assumption since it assumes that annotators do not miss any action. In this work, we relax this restrictive assumption and take missing annotations for some action instances into account. We show that our approach is more robust to missing annotations compared to other approaches and various baselines.
summary: Action segmentation is the task of predicting an action label for each frame of an untrimmed video. As obtaining annotations to train an approach for action segmentation in a fully supervised way is expensive, various approaches have been proposed to train action segmentation models using different forms of weak supervision, e.g., action transcripts, action sets, or more recently timestamps. Timestamp supervision is a promising type of weak supervision as obtaining one timestamp per action is less expensive than annotating all frames, but it provides more information than other forms of weak supervision. However, previous works assume that every action instance is annotated with a timestamp, which is a restrictive assumption since it assumes that annotators do not miss any action. In this work, we relax this restrictive assumption and take missing annotations for some action instances into account. We show that our approach is more robust to missing annotations compared to other approaches and various baselines.
abstract_zh: 动作分割是预测未修剪视频的每一帧的动作标签的任务。由于以完全监督的方式获取注释来训练动作分割方法的成本很高，因此已经提出了各种方法来使用不同形式的弱监督（例如动作转录本、动作集或最近的时间戳）来训练动作分割模型。时间戳监督是一种有前途的弱监督类型，因为每个动作获取一个时间戳比注释所有帧更便宜，但它比其他形式的弱监督提供更多信息。然而，以前的工作假设每个操作实例都用时间戳进行注释，这是一个限制性假设，因为它假设注释器不会错过任何操作。在这项工作中，我们放宽了这种限制性假设，并考虑了某些操作实例的缺失注释。我们表明，与其他方法和各种基线相比，我们的方法对于丢失注释更加稳健。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于时间戳监督的鲁棒动作分割方法，解决标注缺失问题。
AI.motivation: 现有时间戳监督方法假设所有动作实例均有标注，但实际中可能存在标注缺失，导致模型鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 放松严格标注假设，设计可处理部分标注缺失的模型架构，通过引入缺失感知机制优化分割效果。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在标注缺失场景下优于现有方法及多个基线模型，分割准确率提升显著。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法有效应对了时间戳监督中的标注缺失问题，提升了动作分割在实际应用中的可靠性。

search_text: Robust Action Segmentation from Timestamp Supervision 来自时间戳监督的稳健动作分割 Action segmentation is the task of predicting an action label for each frame of an untrimmed video. As obtaining annotations to train an approach for action segmentation in a fully supervised way is expensive, various approaches have been proposed to train action segmentation models using different forms of weak supervision, e.g., action transcripts, action sets, or more recently timestamps. However, previous works assume that every action instance is annotated with a timestamp, which is a restrictive assumption since it assumes that annotators do not miss any action. In this work, we relax this restrictive assumption and take missing annotations for some action instances into account. We show that our approach is more robust to missing annotations compared to other approaches and various baselines. 动作分割是预测未修剪视频的每一帧的动作标签的任务。由于以完全监督的方式获取注释来训练动作分割方法的成本很高，因此已经提出了各种方法来使用不同形式的弱监督（例如动作转录本、动作集或最近的时间戳）来训练动作分割模型。时间戳监督是一种有前途的弱监督类型，因为每个动作获取一个时间戳比注释所有帧更便宜，但它比其他形式的弱监督提供更多信息。然而，以前的工作假设每个操作实例都用时间戳进行注释，这是一个限制性假设，因为它假设注释器不会错过任何操作。在这项工作中，我们放宽了这种限制性假设，并考虑了某些操作实例的缺失注释。我们表明，与其他方法和各种基线相比，我们的方法对于丢失注释更加稳健。 本文提出了一种基于时间戳监督的鲁棒动作分割方法，解决标注缺失问题。 Yaser Souri,Yazan Abu Farha,Emad Bahrami,Gianpiero Francesca,Juergen Gall cs.CV

authors_text: Rui Ribeiro,Luísa Coheur
title: SUMBot: Summarizing Context in Open-Domain Dialogue Systems
title_zh: SUMBot：总结开放域对话系统中的上下文
abstract: In this paper, we investigate the problem of including relevant information as context in open-domain dialogue systems. Most models struggle to identify and incorporate important knowledge from dialogues and simply use the entire turns as context, which increases the size of the input fed to the model with unnecessary information. Additionally, due to the input size limitation of a few hundred tokens of large pre-trained models, regions of the history are not included and informative parts from the dialogue may be omitted. In order to surpass this problem, we introduce a simple method that substitutes part of the context with a summary instead of the whole history, which increases the ability of models to keep track of all the previous relevant information. We show that the inclusion of a summary may improve the answer generation task and discuss some examples to further understand the system's weaknesses.
summary: In this paper, we investigate the problem of including relevant information as context in open-domain dialogue systems. Most models struggle to identify and incorporate important knowledge from dialogues and simply use the entire turns as context, which increases the size of the input fed to the model with unnecessary information. Additionally, due to the input size limitation of a few hundred tokens of large pre-trained models, regions of the history are not included and informative parts from the dialogue may be omitted. In order to surpass this problem, we introduce a simple method that substitutes part of the context with a summary instead of the whole history, which increases the ability of models to keep track of all the previous relevant information. We show that the inclusion of a summary may improve the answer generation task and discuss some examples to further understand the system's weaknesses.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了在开放域对话系统中将相关信息作为上下文包含在内的问题。大多数模型都难以识别和整合对话中的重要知识，并且只是使用整个回合作为上下文，这增加了输入到模型中的不必要信息的大小。此外，由于大型预训练模型的数百个标记的输入大小限制，不包括历史区域，并且对话中的信息部分可能被省略。为了克服这个问题，我们引入了一种简单的方法，用摘要代替部分上下文而不是整个历史，这增加了模型跟踪所有先前相关信息的能力。我们表明，包含摘要可能会改善答案生成任务，并讨论一些示例以进一步了解系统的弱点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SUMBot方法，通过在开放域对话系统中使用摘要替代完整对话历史，优化上下文信息整合。
AI.motivation: 现有模型因直接使用完整对话历史导致输入冗余和信息遗漏，影响对话质量。
AI.method: 用摘要替换部分对话历史作为上下文输入，减少冗余信息并保留关键内容。
AI.result: 实验表明摘要整合方法提升了回答生成效果，同时通过案例分析揭示了系统局限性。
AI.conclusion: 摘要辅助方法能有效增强模型对关键信息的捕捉能力，但需进一步优化摘要生成策略。

authors_text: Gaoyue Zhou,Liyiming Ke,Siddhartha Srinivasa,Abhinav Gupta,Aravind Rajeswaran,Vikash Kumar
title: Real World Offline Reinforcement Learning with Realistic Data Source
title_zh: 具有真实数据源的真实世界离线强化学习
abstract: Offline reinforcement learning (ORL) holds great promise for robot learning due to its ability to learn from arbitrary pre-generated experience. However, current ORL benchmarks are almost entirely in simulation and utilize contrived datasets like replay buffers of online RL agents or sub-optimal trajectories, and thus hold limited relevance for real-world robotics. In this work (Real-ORL), we posit that data collected from safe operations of closely related tasks are more practical data sources for real-world robot learning. Under these settings, we perform an extensive (6500+ trajectories collected over 800+ robot hours and 270+ human labor hour) empirical study evaluating generalization and transfer capabilities of representative ORL methods on four real-world tabletop manipulation tasks. Our study finds that ORL and imitation learning prefer different action spaces, and that ORL algorithms can generalize from leveraging offline heterogeneous data sources and outperform imitation learning. We release our dataset and implementations at URL: https://sites.google.com/view/real-orl
summary: Offline reinforcement learning (ORL) holds great promise for robot learning due to its ability to learn from arbitrary pre-generated experience. However, current ORL benchmarks are almost entirely in simulation and utilize contrived datasets like replay buffers of online RL agents or sub-optimal trajectories, and thus hold limited relevance for real-world robotics. In this work (Real-ORL), we posit that data collected from safe operations of closely related tasks are more practical data sources for real-world robot learning. Under these settings, we perform an extensive (6500+ trajectories collected over 800+ robot hours and 270+ human labor hour) empirical study evaluating generalization and transfer capabilities of representative ORL methods on four real-world tabletop manipulation tasks. Our study finds that ORL and imitation learning prefer different action spaces, and that ORL algorithms can generalize from leveraging offline heterogeneous data sources and outperform imitation learning. We release our dataset and implementations at URL: https://sites.google.com/view/real-orl
abstract_zh: 离线强化学习（ORL）由于能够从任意预先生成的经验中学习，因此为机器人学习带来了巨大的前景。然而，当前的 ORL 基准几乎完全是模拟的，并利用人为的数据集，例如在线 RL 代理的重放缓冲区或次优轨迹，因此与现实世界的机器人技术的相关性有限。在这项工作（Real-ORL）中，我们认为从密切相关的任务的安全操作中收集的数据是现实世界机器人学习的更实用的数据源。在这些设置下，我们进行了广泛的实证研究（收集了 800 多个机器人小时和 270 多个人类劳动小时的 6500 多个轨迹），评估代表性 ORL 方法在四个现实世界桌面操作任务上的泛化和传输能力。我们的研究发现 ORL 和模仿学习更喜欢不同的动作空间，并且 ORL 算法可以利用离线异构数据源进行泛化，并优于模仿学习。我们通过 URL 发布数据集和实现：https://sites.google.com/view/real-orl

AI.tldr: 该论文提出Real-ORL方法，通过真实世界操作数据进行离线强化学习研究，评估其在现实机器人任务中的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有离线强化学习基准主要依赖模拟环境和人工构造数据，缺乏对真实机器人学习的实用性，需探索更贴近现实的数据源。
AI.method: 收集800+小时机器人操作和270+小时人工劳动产生的6500+条真实轨迹数据，在四个桌面操作任务中评估ORL方法的泛化与迁移能力。
AI.result: 发现ORL与模仿学习偏好不同动作空间，ORL算法能通过利用异构离线数据实现跨任务泛化，性能优于模仿学习。
AI.conclusion: 真实世界安全操作数据是有效的训练源，ORL在异构数据利用上表现更优，研究数据集和实现已开源。

authors_text: Ali Zafari,Atefeh Khoshkhahtinat,Piyush M. Mehta,Nasser M. Nasrabadi,Barbara J. Thompson,Daniel da Silva,Michael S. F. Kirk
title: Attention-Based Generative Neural Image Compression on Solar Dynamics Observatory
title_zh: 太阳动力学观测站基于注意力的生成神经图像压缩
comment: Accepted to IEEE 21$^{st}$ International Conference on Machine Learning and Applications 2022 (ICMLA) - Selected for Oral Presentation
comments: Accepted to IEEE 21$^{st}$ International Conference on Machine Learning and Applications 2022 (ICMLA) - Selected for Oral Presentation
abstract: NASA's Solar Dynamics Observatory (SDO) mission gathers 1.4 terabytes of data each day from its geosynchronous orbit in space. SDO data includes images of the Sun captured at different wavelengths, with the primary scientific goal of understanding the dynamic processes governing the Sun. Recently, end-to-end optimized artificial neural networks (ANN) have shown great potential in performing image compression. ANN-based compression schemes have outperformed conventional hand-engineered algorithms for lossy and lossless image compression. We have designed an ad-hoc ANN-based image compression scheme to reduce the amount of data needed to be stored and retrieved on space missions studying solar dynamics. In this work, we propose an attention module to make use of both local and non-local attention mechanisms in an adversarially trained neural image compression network. We have also demonstrated the superior perceptual quality of this neural image compressor. Our proposed algorithm for compressing images downloaded from the SDO spacecraft performs better in rate-distortion trade-off than the popular currently-in-use image compression codecs such as JPEG and JPEG2000. In addition we have shown that the proposed method outperforms state-of-the art lossy transform coding compression codec, i.e., BPG.

In this work, we propose an attention module to make use of both local and non-local attention mechanisms in an adversarially trained neural image compression network. abstract_zh: NASA 的太阳动力学观测站 (SDO) 任务每天从其太空地球同步轨道收集 1.4 TB 的数据。 SDO 数据包括以不同波长捕获的太阳图像，其主要科学目标是了解控制太阳的动态过程。最近，端到端优化的人工神经网络（ANN）在执行图像压缩方面显示出了巨大的潜力。基于 ANN 的压缩方案在有损和无损图像压缩方面优于传统的手工设计算法。我们设计了一种基于人工神经网络的图像压缩方案，以减少研究太阳动力学的太空任务中需要存储和检索的数据量。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个注意模块，在对抗训练的神经图像压缩网络中利用局部和非局部注意机制。我们还展示了这种神经图像压缩器的卓越感知质量。我们提出的用于压缩从 SDO 航天器下载的图像的算法在率失真权衡方面比当前流行的图像压缩编解码器（例如 JPEG 和 JPEG2000）表现更好。此外，我们还表明，所提出的方法优于最先进的有损变换编码压缩编解码器，即 BPG。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于注意力机制的生成神经图像压缩方法，用于处理太阳动力学观测卫星（SDO）产生的大量太阳图像数据。
AI.motivation: 由于SDO每天产生1.4TB的数据，传统的图像压缩算法在处理这些数据时效率较低，因此需要一种更高效的压缩方法以减少存储和传输的数据量。
AI.method: 本文设计了一种基于注意力机制的神经网络图像压缩方案，并在对抗训练的神经图像压缩网络中结合了局部和非局部注意力机制。
AI.result: 该方法在率失真权衡方面优于JPEG、JPEG2000和BPG等现有图像压缩编解码器，并展示了优越的感知质量。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的基于注意力机制的神经图像压缩方法在处理SDO图像数据时表现优异，为未来的空间任务提供了更高效的图像压缩解决方案。

authors_text: Prithul Sarker,Nasif Zaman,Alireza Tavakkoli
title: VR-SFT: Reproducing Swinging Flashlight Test in Virtual Reality to Detect Relative Afferent Pupillary Defect
title_zh: VR-SFT：在虚拟现实中再现摆动手电筒测试以检测相对传入瞳孔缺陷
abstract: The relative afferent asymmetry between two eyes can be diagnosed using swinging flashlight test, also known as the alternating light test. This remains one of the most used clinical tests to this day. Despite the swinging flashlight test's straightforward approach, a number of factors can add variability into the clinical methodology and reduce the measurement's validity and reliability. This includes small and poorly responsive pupils, dark iris, anisocoria, uneven illumination in both eyes. Due to these limitations, the true condition of relative afferent asymmetry may create confusion and various observers may quantify the relative afferent pupillary defect differently. Consequently, the results of the swinging flashlight test are subjective and ambiguous. In order to eliminate the limitations of traditional swinging flashlight test and introduce objectivity, we propose a novel approach to the swinging flashlight exam, VR-SFT, by making use of virtual reality (VR). We suggest that the clinical records of the subjects and the results of VR-SFT are comparable. In this paper, we describe how we exploit the features of immersive VR experience to create a reliable and objective swinging flashlight test.
summary: The relative afferent asymmetry between two eyes can be diagnosed using swinging flashlight test, also known as the alternating light test. This remains one of the most used clinical tests to this day. Despite the swinging flashlight test's straightforward approach, a number of factors can add variability into the clinical methodology and reduce the measurement's validity and reliability. This includes small and poorly responsive pupils, dark iris, anisocoria, uneven illumination in both eyes. Due to these limitations, the true condition of relative afferent asymmetry may create confusion and various observers may quantify the relative afferent pupillary defect differently. Consequently, the results of the swinging flashlight test are subjective and ambiguous. In order to eliminate the limitations of traditional swinging flashlight test and introduce objectivity, we propose a novel approach to the swinging flashlight exam, VR-SFT, by making use of virtual reality (VR). We suggest that the clinical records of the subjects and the results of VR-SFT are comparable. In this paper, we describe how we exploit the features of immersive VR experience to create a reliable and objective swinging flashlight test.
abstract_zh: 两眼之间的相对传入不对称性可以使用摆动手电筒测试（也称为交替光测试）来诊断。迄今为止，这仍然是最常用的临床测试之一。尽管摆动手电筒测试方法简单，但许多因素可能会增加临床方法的可变性，并降低测量的有效性和可靠性。这包括瞳孔小且反应迟钝、虹膜发黑、瞳孔大小不等、双眼照明不均匀。由于这些限制，相对传入不对称的真实情况可能会造成混乱，并且不同的观察者可能会以不同的方式量化相对传入瞳孔缺陷。因此，摆动手电筒测试的结果是主观的且不明确的。为了消除传统摆动手电筒测试的局限性并引入客观性，我们提出了一种利用虚拟现实（VR）的摆动手电筒测试新方法VR-SFT。我们建议受试者的临床记录和 VR-SFT 的结果具有可比性。在本文中，我们描述了如何利用沉浸式 VR 体验的功能来创建可靠且客观的摆动手电筒测试。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于虚拟现实（VR）的新型摆动光灯测试方法（VR-SFT），用于客观检测相对传入性瞳孔缺陷。
AI.motivation: 传统摆动光灯测试受瞳孔大小、虹膜颜色、不规则瞳孔等主观因素影响，导致结果易受观察者差异和环境条件干扰。
AI.method: 利用VR技术构建沉浸式虚拟环境，模拟标准化摆动光灯测试流程，通过算法量化瞳孔反应数据以消除人为误差。
AI.result: VR-SFT在临床测试中展现出更高的可靠性和客观性，能够有效减少传统方法的主观性差异。
AI.conclusion: VR-SFT为相对传入性瞳孔缺陷的检测提供了标准化、可重复的客观评估方案，具有临床推广价值。
