search_text: Quantum divide and conquer 量子分而治之 The divide-and-conquer framework, used extensively in classical algorithm design, recursively breaks a problem of size $n$ into smaller subproblems (say, $a$ copies of size $n/b$ each), along with some auxiliary work of cost $C^{\textrm{aux}}(n)$, to give a recurrence relation $$C(n) \leq a \, C(n/b) + C^{\textrm{aux}}(n)$$ for the classical complexity $C(n)$. We describe a quantum divide-and-conquer framework that, in certain cases, yields an analogous recurrence relation $$C_Q(n) \leq \sqrt{a} \, C_Q(n/b) + O(C^{\textrm{aux}}_Q(n))$$ that characterizes the quantum query complexity. We apply this framework to obtain near-optimal quantum query complexities for various string problems, such as (i) recognizing regular languages; (ii) decision versions of String Rotation and String Suffix; and natural parameterized versions of (iii) Longest Increasing Subsequence and (iv) Longest Common Subsequence. 经典算法设计中广泛使用的分而治之框架，递归地将大小为 $n$ 的问题分解为较小的子问题（例如，每个大小为 $n/b$ 的 $a$ 副本），以及成本 $C^{\textrm{aux}}(n)$ 的一些辅助工作，以给出经典算法的递归关系 $$C(n) \leq a \, C(n/b) + C^{\textrm{aux}}(n)$$复杂度$C(n)$。我们描述了一个量子分治框架，在某些情况下，产生一个类似的递归关系 $$C_Q(n) \leq \sqrt{a} \, C_Q(n/b) + O(C^{\textrm{aux}}_Q(n))$$ 来表征量子查询复杂性。我们应用这个框架来获得各种字符串问题的接近最优的量子查询复杂性，例如（i）识别常规语言； (ii) 字符串旋转和字符串后缀的决策版本；以及 (iii) 最长递增子序列和 (iv) 最长公共子序列的自然参数化版本。 提出量子分治框架，用于解决多个字符串问题，降低量子查询复杂度。 Andrew M. Childs,Robin Kothari,Matt Kovacs-Deak,Aarthi Sundaram,Daochen Wang quant-ph,cs.DS

authors_text: Ieva Staliūnaitė,Philip John Gorinski,Ignacio Iacobacci
title: Relational Graph Convolutional Neural Networks for Multihop Reasoning: A Comparative Study
title_zh: 用于多跳推理的关系图卷积神经网络：比较研究
abstract: Multihop Question Answering is a complex Natural Language Processing task that requires multiple steps of reasoning to find the correct answer to a given question. Previous research has explored the use of models based on Graph Neural Networks for tackling this task. Various architectures have been proposed, including Relational Graph Convolutional Networks (RGCN). For these many node types and relations between them have been introduced, such as simple entity co-occurrences, modelling coreferences, or "reasoning paths" from questions to answers via intermediary entities. Nevertheless, a thoughtful analysis on which relations, node types, embeddings and architecture are the most beneficial for this task is still missing. In this paper we explore a number of RGCN-based Multihop QA models, graph relations, and node embeddings, and empirically explore the influence of each on Multihop QA performance on the WikiHop dataset.
summary: Multihop Question Answering is a complex Natural Language Processing task that requires multiple steps of reasoning to find the correct answer to a given question. Previous research has explored the use of models based on Graph Neural Networks for tackling this task. Various architectures have been proposed, including Relational Graph Convolutional Networks (RGCN). For these many node types and relations between them have been introduced, such as simple entity co-occurrences, modelling coreferences, or "reasoning paths" from questions to answers via intermediary entities. Nevertheless, a thoughtful analysis on which relations, node types, embeddings and architecture are the most beneficial for this task is still missing. In this paper we explore a number of RGCN-based Multihop QA models, graph relations, and node embeddings, and empirically explore the influence of each on Multihop QA performance on the WikiHop dataset.
abstract_zh: 多跳问答是一项复杂的自然语言处理任务，需要多个推理步骤才能找到给定问题的正确答案。先前的研究探索了使用基于图神经网络的模型来解决此任务。人们已经提出了各种架构，包括关系图卷积网络（RGCN）。对于这些许多节点类型和它们之间的关系已经被引入，例如简单的实体共现、建模共指或通过中间实体从问题到答案的“推理路径”。然而，仍然缺乏对哪些关系、节点类型、嵌入和架构最有利于这项任务的深入分析。在本文中，我们探索了许多基于 RGCN 的多跳 QA 模型、图关系和节点嵌入，并实证探索了每种模型对 WikiHop 数据集上的多跳 QA 性能的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文主要研究基于关系图卷积神经网络（RGCN）的多跳问答模型，通过比较不同图关系、节点类型和嵌入方法对多跳问答任务的影响。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有研究使用图神经网络（如RGCN）处理多跳问答任务，但缺乏对不同图关系、节点类型、嵌入方式及架构的系统性分析。
AI.method: 作者在WikiHop数据集上实验了多种RGCN-based模型，探索不同图关系（如实体共现、核心ference、推理路径）、节点嵌入方法及架构对多跳问答性能的影响。
AI.result: 实验证明，特定的图关系（如推理路径）和节点嵌入方式能显著提升多跳问答效果，而某些架构设计对性能影响较小。
AI.conclusion: 本文为多跳问答任务中的图关系建模和架构选择提供了实证依据，建议优先采用基于推理路径的图关系和优化嵌入策略。

authors_text: Agapi Rissaki,Bruno Scarone,David Liu,Aditeya Pandey,Brennan Klein,Tina Eliassi-Rad,Michelle A. Borkin
title: BiaScope: Visual Unfairness Diagnosis for Graph Embeddings
title_zh: BiaScope：图嵌入的视觉不公平诊断
comment: Accepted to VDS at IEEE VIS 2022
comments: Accepted to VDS at IEEE VIS 2022
abstract: The issue of bias (i.e., systematic unfairness) in machine learning models has recently attracted the attention of both researchers and practitioners. For the graph mining community in particular, an important goal toward algorithmic fairness is to detect and mitigate bias incorporated into graph embeddings since they are commonly used in human-centered applications, e.g., social-media recommendations. However, simple analytical methods for detecting bias typically involve aggregate statistics which do not reveal the sources of unfairness. Instead, visual methods can provide a holistic fairness characterization of graph embeddings and help uncover the causes of observed bias. In this work, we present BiaScope, an interactive visualization tool that supports end-to-end visual unfairness diagnosis for graph embeddings. The tool is the product of a design study in collaboration with domain experts. It allows the user to (i) visually compare two embeddings with respect to fairness, (ii) locate nodes or graph communities that are unfairly embedded, and (iii) understand the source of bias by interactively linking the relevant embedding subspace with the corresponding graph topology. Experts' feedback confirms that our tool is effective at detecting and diagnosing unfairness. Thus, we envision our tool both as a companion for researchers in designing their algorithms as well as a guide for practitioners who use off-the-shelf graph embeddings.
summary: The issue of bias (i.e., systematic unfairness) in machine learning models has recently attracted the attention of both researchers and practitioners. For the graph mining community in particular, an important goal toward algorithmic fairness is to detect and mitigate bias incorporated into graph embeddings since they are commonly used in human-centered applications, e.g., social-media recommendations. However, simple analytical methods for detecting bias typically involve aggregate statistics which do not reveal the sources of unfairness. Instead, visual methods can provide a holistic fairness characterization of graph embeddings and help uncover the causes of observed bias. In this work, we present BiaScope, an interactive visualization tool that supports end-to-end visual unfairness diagnosis for graph embeddings. The tool is the product of a design study in collaboration with domain experts. It allows the user to (i) visually compare two embeddings with respect to fairness, (ii) locate nodes or graph communities that are unfairly embedded, and (iii) understand the source of bias by interactively linking the relevant embedding subspace with the corresponding graph topology. Experts' feedback confirms that our tool is effective at detecting and diagnosing unfairness. Thus, we envision our tool both as a companion for researchers in designing their algorithms as well as a guide for practitioners who use off-the-shelf graph embeddings.
abstract_zh: 机器学习模型中的偏差（即系统性不公平）问题最近引起了研究人员和实践者的关注。特别是对于图挖掘社区来说，算法公平性的一个重要目标是检测和减轻图嵌入中的偏差，因为它们通常用于以人为中心的应用程序，例如社交媒体推荐。然而，用于检测偏见的简单分析方法通常涉及汇总统计数据，而这些统计数据并不能揭示不公平的根源。相反，视觉方法可以提供图嵌入的整体公平性表征，并帮助揭示观察到的偏差的原因。在这项工作中，我们提出了 BiaScope，一种交互式可视化工具，支持图嵌入的端到端视觉不公平诊断。该工具是与领域专家合作设计研究的产物。它允许用户（i）直观地比较两个嵌入的公平性，（ii）定位不公平嵌入的节点或图形社区，以及（iii）通过交互式链接相关嵌入子空间与相应的图形拓扑来了解偏差的来源。专家的反馈证实我们的工具可以有效地检测和诊断不公平现象。因此，我们设想我们的工具既可以作为研究人员设计算法的伴侣，也可以作为使用现成图嵌入的从业者的指南。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BiaScope，一种用于图嵌入中视觉不公平诊断的交互式可视化工具，旨在检测和诊断图嵌入中的系统性偏见。
AI.motivation: 现有图嵌入的偏见检测方法依赖聚合统计信息，无法揭示不公平的根源，而可视化方法能更全面地表征公平性并定位问题来源。
AI.method: 通过与领域专家合作设计BiaScope工具，支持用户比较嵌入公平性、定位不公平节点/社区，并通过交互链接嵌入子空间与图拓扑结构分析偏见来源。
AI.result: 专家反馈证实该工具能有效检测和诊断不公平性，为研究人员和从业者提供算法设计及嵌入使用指导。
AI.conclusion: BiaScope为图嵌入的算法开发和实际应用提供了可视化公平性分析的有效工具。

It allows the user to (i) visually compare two embeddings with respect to fairness, (ii) locate nodes or graph communities that are unfairly embedded, and (iii) understand the source of bias by interactively linking the relevant embedding subspace with the corresponding graph topology. Experts' feedback confirms that our tool is effective at detecting and diagnosing unfairness. Thus, we envision our tool both as a companion for researchers in designing their algorithms as well as a guide for practitioners who use off-the-shelf graph embeddings. 机器学习模型中的偏差（即系统性不公平）问题最近引起了研究人员和实践者的关注。特别是对于图挖掘社区来说，算法公平性的一个重要目标是检测和减轻图嵌入中的偏差，因为它们通常用于以人为中心的应用程序，例如社交媒体推荐。然而，用于检测偏见的简单分析方法通常涉及汇总统计数据，而这些统计数据并不能揭示不公平的根源。相反，视觉方法可以提供图嵌入的整体公平性表征，并帮助揭示观察到的偏差的原因。在这项工作中，我们提出了 BiaScope，一种交互式可视化工具，支持图嵌入的端到端视觉不公平诊断。该工具是与领域专家合作设计研究的产物。它允许用户（i）直观地比较两个嵌入的公平性，（ii）定位不公平嵌入的节点或图形社区，以及（iii）通过交互式链接相关嵌入子空间与相应的图形拓扑来了解偏差的来源。专家的反馈证实我们的工具可以有效地检测和诊断不公平现象。因此，我们设想我们的工具既可以作为研究人员设计算法的伴侣，也可以作为使用现成图嵌入的从业者的指南。 本文提出BiaScope，一种用于图嵌入中视觉不公平诊断的交互式可视化工具，旨在检测和诊断图嵌入中的系统性偏见。 Agapi Rissaki,Bruno Scarone,David Liu,Aditeya Pandey,Brennan Klein,Tina Eliassi-Rad,Michelle A. Borkin cs.HC,cs.CY,cs.GR,cs.SI

authors_text: Amit Kachroo,Sai Prashanth Chinnapalli
title: Quantifying Uncertainty with Probabilistic Machine Learning Modeling in Wireless Sensing
title_zh: 通过无线传感中的概率机器学习建模来量化不确定性
comment: 6 pages, 3 figures, Submitted to IEEE CCNC 2023
comments: 6 pages, 3 figures, Submitted to IEEE CCNC 2023
abstract: The application of machine learning (ML) techniques in wireless communication domain has seen a tremendous growth over the years especially in the wireless sensing domain. However, the questions surrounding the ML model's inference reliability, and uncertainty associated with its predictions are never answered or communicated properly. This itself raises a lot of questions on the transparency of these ML systems. Developing ML systems with probabilistic modeling can solve this problem easily, where one can quantify uncertainty whether it is arising from the data (irreducible error or aleotoric uncertainty) or from the model itself (reducible or epistemic uncertainty). This paper describes the idea behind these types of uncertainty quantification in detail and uses a real example of WiFi channel state information (CSI) based sensing for motion/no-motion cases to demonstrate the uncertainty modeling. This work will serve as a template to model uncertainty in predictions not only for WiFi sensing but for most wireless sensing applications ranging from WiFi to millimeter wave radar based sensing that utilizes AI/ML models.
summary: The application of machine learning (ML) techniques in wireless communication domain has seen a tremendous growth over the years especially in the wireless sensing domain. However, the questions surrounding the ML model's inference reliability, and uncertainty associated with its predictions are never answered or communicated properly. This itself raises a lot of questions on the transparency of these ML systems. Developing ML systems with probabilistic modeling can solve this problem easily, where one can quantify uncertainty whether it is arising from the data (irreducible error or aleotoric uncertainty) or from the model itself (reducible or epistemic uncertainty). This paper describes the idea behind these types of uncertainty quantification in detail and uses a real example of WiFi channel state information (CSI) based sensing for motion/no-motion cases to demonstrate the uncertainty modeling. This work will serve as a template to model uncertainty in predictions not only for WiFi sensing but for most wireless sensing applications ranging from WiFi to millimeter wave radar based sensing that utilizes AI/ML models.
abstract_zh: 机器学习（ML）技术在无线通信领域的应用多年来取得了巨大的增长，尤其是在无线传感领域。然而，围绕机器学习模型的推理可靠性以及与其预测相关的不确定性的问题从未得到正确的回答或传达。这本身就对这些机器学习系统的透明度提出了很多问题。使用概率建模开发机器学习系统可以轻松解决这个问题，人们可以量化不确定性，无论它是来自数据（不可约误差或随机不确定性）还是来自模型本身（可约或认知不确定性）。本文详细描述了这些类型的不确定性量化背后的想法，并使用基于 WiFi 信道状态信息 (CSI) 的运动/无运动情况感知的真实示例来演示不确定性建模。这项工作将作为一个模板来模拟预测的不确定性，不仅适用于 WiFi 传感，而且适用于大多数无线传感应用，从 WiFi 到利用 AI/ML 模型的基于毫米波雷达的传感。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用概率机器学习模型量化无线传感中的不确定性，通过WiFi信道状态信息（CSI）案例展示不确定性建模方法。
AI.motivation: 现有机器学习模型在无线传感中的预测可靠性与不确定性缺乏有效表征，影响系统透明度，需通过概率建模解决不确定性量化问题。
AI.method: 采用概率机器学习框架区分数据固有不确定性（aleatoric）与模型不确定性（epistemic），结合WiFi CSI实际场景进行不确定性建模验证。
AI.result: 成功构建了可区分两类不确定性的模型框架，并通过WiFi运动/静止检测案例验证有效性，为无线传感领域提供通用建模模板。
AI.conclusion: 概率建模方法显著提升无线传感中机器学习系统的可靠性与透明度，为未来AI/ML在无线领域的应用提供理论支持与实践参考。

authors_text: Tom Rindell,Berat Yenilen,Niklas Halonen,Arttu Pönni,Ilkka Tittonen,Matti Raasakka
title: Exploring the optimality of approximate state preparation quantum circuits with a genetic algorithm
title_zh: 用遗传算法探索近似状态准备量子电路的最优性
comment: 22 pages, 4 figures; version 2 changes: title changed, numerical analysis extended to 1000 random states, references added, other minor improvements, conclusions remain unaltered
comments: 22 pages, 4 figures; version 2 changes: title changed, numerical analysis extended to 1000 random states, references added, other minor improvements, conclusions remain unaltered
abstract: We study the approximate state preparation problem on noisy intermediate-scale quantum (NISQ) computers by applying a genetic algorithm to generate quantum circuits for state preparation. The algorithm can account for the specific characteristics of the physical machine in the evaluation of circuits, such as the native gate set and qubit connectivity. We use our genetic algorithm to optimize the circuits provided by the low-rank state preparation algorithm introduced by Araujo et al., and find substantial improvements to the fidelity in preparing Haar random states with a limited number of CNOT gates. Moreover, we observe that already for a 5-qubit quantum processor with limited qubit connectivity and significant noise levels (IBM Falcon 5T), the maximal fidelity for Haar random states is achieved by a short approximate state preparation circuit instead of the exact preparation circuit. We also present a theoretical analysis of approximate state preparation circuit complexity to motivate our findings. Our genetic algorithm for quantum circuit discovery is freely available at https://github.com/beratyenilen/qc-ga .
summary: We study the approximate state preparation problem on noisy intermediate-scale quantum (NISQ) computers by applying a genetic algorithm to generate quantum circuits for state preparation. The algorithm can account for the specific characteristics of the physical machine in the evaluation of circuits, such as the native gate set and qubit connectivity. We use our genetic algorithm to optimize the circuits provided by the low-rank state preparation algorithm introduced by Araujo et al., and find substantial improvements to the fidelity in preparing Haar random states with a limited number of CNOT gates. Moreover, we observe that already for a 5-qubit quantum processor with limited qubit connectivity and significant noise levels (IBM Falcon 5T), the maximal fidelity for Haar random states is achieved by a short approximate state preparation circuit instead of the exact preparation circuit. We also present a theoretical analysis of approximate state preparation circuit complexity to motivate our findings. Our genetic algorithm for quantum circuit discovery is freely available at https://github.com/beratyenilen/qc-ga .
abstract_zh: 我们通过应用遗传算法生成用于状态准备的量子电路来研究噪声中级量子（NISQ）计算机上的近似状态准备问题。该算法可以在电路评估中考虑物理机的具体特征，例如本机门集和量子位连接性。我们使用遗传算法来优化 Araujo 等人引入的低秩状态准备算法提供的电路，并发现用有限数量的 CNOT 门准备 Haar 随机状态的保真度得到了实质性改进。此外，我们观察到，对于具有有限量子位连接性和显着噪声水平的 5 量子位量子处理器（IBM Falcon 5T），哈尔随机状态的最大保真度是通过短的近似状态准备电路而不是精确的准备电路来实现的。我们还提出了近似状态准备电路复杂性的理论分析，以激发我们的发现。我们用于量子电路发现的遗传算法可以在 https://github.com/beratyenilen/qc-ga 上免费获得。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在嘈杂中等规模量子计算机（NISQ）上使用遗传算法生成近似量子态制备电路的最优性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有量子态制备方法在NISQ设备上因受限的量子比特连接性和噪声导致保真度不足，需探索更高效的近似制备方案。
AI.method: 基于遗传算法优化量子电路，结合物理设备特性（原生门集、量子比特连接性），改进Araujo等人的低秩态制备算法，并在IBM Falcon 5T设备上验证。
AI.result: 在5量子比特设备上，使用少量CNOT门的近似电路比精确制备电路实现更高保真度；理论分析支持近似电路复杂度的优化潜力。
AI.conclusion: 针对NISQ设备的近似态制备电路通过遗传算法优化可显著提升保真度，且开源工具为后续研究提供支持。

authors_text: Shaobo Lin,Xingyu Zeng,Rui Zhao
title: A Unified Framework with Meta-dropout for Few-shot Learning
title_zh: 用于小样本学习的具有元丢失的统一框架
abstract: Conventional training of deep neural networks usually requires a substantial amount of data with expensive human annotations. In this paper, we utilize the idea of meta-learning to explain two very different streams of few-shot learning, i.e., the episodic meta-learning-based and pre-train finetune-based few-shot learning, and form a unified meta-learning framework. In order to improve the generalization power of our framework, we propose a simple yet effective strategy named meta-dropout, which is applied to the transferable knowledge generalized from base categories to novel categories. The proposed strategy can effectively prevent neural units from co-adapting excessively in the meta-training stage. Extensive experiments on the few-shot object detection and few-shot image classification datasets, i.e., Pascal VOC, MS COCO, CUB, and mini-ImageNet, validate the effectiveness of our method.
summary: Conventional training of deep neural networks usually requires a substantial amount of data with expensive human annotations. In this paper, we utilize the idea of meta-learning to explain two very different streams of few-shot learning, i.e., the episodic meta-learning-based and pre-train finetune-based few-shot learning, and form a unified meta-learning framework. In order to improve the generalization power of our framework, we propose a simple yet effective strategy named meta-dropout, which is applied to the transferable knowledge generalized from base categories to novel categories. The proposed strategy can effectively prevent neural units from co-adapting excessively in the meta-training stage. Extensive experiments on the few-shot object detection and few-shot image classification datasets, i.e., Pascal VOC, MS COCO, CUB, and mini-ImageNet, validate the effectiveness of our method.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络的传统训练通常需要大量数据和昂贵的人工注释。在本文中，我们利用元学习的思想来解释两种截然不同的少样本学习流，即基于情景元学习和基于预训练微调的少样本学习，并形成一个统一的元学习框架。为了提高我们框架的泛化能力，我们提出了一种简单而有效的策略，称为元丢弃，该策略应用于从基本类别泛化到新类别的可迁移知识。所提出的策略可以有效防止神经单元在元训练阶段过度地共同适应。在少样本目标检测和少样本图像分类数据集（即 Pascal VOC、MS COCO、CUB 和 mini-ImageNet）上进行的大量实验验证了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合元学习和meta-dropout策略的统一框架，用于解决少样本学习问题。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习依赖大量标注数据，而少样本学习需在数据稀缺场景下提升模型泛化能力，现有方法分散且缺乏统一框架。
AI.method: 构建统一元学习框架整合两类少样本学习方法，并引入meta-dropout策略防止元训练阶段神经元过度共适应。
AI.result: 在Pascal VOC、MS COCO、CUB和mini-ImageNet等数据集上验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的统一框架与meta-dropout策略有效提升了少样本学习的性能与泛化能力。

search_text: A Unified Framework with Meta-dropout for Few-shot Learning 用于小样本学习的具有元丢失的统一框架 Conventional training of deep neural networks usually requires a substantial amount of data with expensive human annotations. In this paper, we utilize the idea of meta-learning to explain two very different streams of few-shot learning, i.e., the episodic meta-learning-based and pre-train finetune-based few-shot learning, and form a unified meta-learning framework. In order to improve the generalization power of our framework, we propose a simple yet effective strategy named meta-dropout, which is applied to the transferable knowledge generalized from base categories to novel categories. The proposed strategy can effectively prevent neural units from co-adapting excessively in the meta-training stage. Extensive experiments on the few-shot object detection and few-shot image classification datasets, i.e., Pascal VOC, MS COCO, CUB, and mini-ImageNet, validate the effectiveness of our method. 深度神经网络的传统训练通常需要大量数据和昂贵的人工注释。在本文中，我们利用元学习的思想来解释两种截然不同的少样本学习流，即基于情景元学习和基于预训练微调的少样本学习，并形成一个统一的元学习框架。为了提高我们框架的泛化能力，我们提出了一种简单而有效的策略，称为元丢弃，该策略应用于从基本类别泛化到新类别的可迁移知识。所提出的策略可以有效防止神经单元在元训练阶段过度地共同适应。在少样本目标检测和少样本图像分类数据集（即 Pascal VOC、MS COCO、CUB 和 mini-ImageNet）上进行的大量实验验证了我们方法的有效性。 本文提出一种结合元学习和meta-dropout策略的统一框架，用于解决少样本学习问题。 Shaobo Lin,Xingyu Zeng,Rui Zhao cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Ishan Jindal,Alexandre Rademaker,Khoi-Nguyen Tran,Huaiyu Zhu,Hiroshi Kanayama,Marina Danilevsky,Yunyao Li
title: PriMeSRL-Eval: A Practical Quality Metric for Semantic Role Labeling Systems Evaluation
title_zh: PriMeSRL-Eval：语义角色标签系统评估的实用质量指标
abstract: Semantic role labeling (SRL) identifies the predicate-argument structure in a sentence. This task is usually accomplished in four steps: predicate identification, predicate sense disambiguation, argument identification, and argument classification. Errors introduced at one step propagate to later steps. Unfortunately, the existing SRL evaluation scripts do not consider the full effect of this error propagation aspect. They either evaluate arguments independent of predicate sense (CoNLL09) or do not evaluate predicate sense at all (CoNLL05), yielding an inaccurate SRL model performance on the argument classification task. In this paper, we address key practical issues with existing evaluation scripts and propose a more strict SRL evaluation metric PriMeSRL. We observe that by employing PriMeSRL, the quality evaluation of all SoTA SRL models drops significantly, and their relative rankings also change. We also show that PriMeSRLsuccessfully penalizes actual failures in SoTA SRL models.
summary: Semantic role labeling (SRL) identifies the predicate-argument structure in a sentence. This task is usually accomplished in four steps: predicate identification, predicate sense disambiguation, argument identification, and argument classification. Errors introduced at one step propagate to later steps. Unfortunately, the existing SRL evaluation scripts do not consider the full effect of this error propagation aspect. They either evaluate arguments independent of predicate sense (CoNLL09) or do not evaluate predicate sense at all (CoNLL05), yielding an inaccurate SRL model performance on the argument classification task. In this paper, we address key practical issues with existing evaluation scripts and propose a more strict SRL evaluation metric PriMeSRL. We observe that by employing PriMeSRL, the quality evaluation of all SoTA SRL models drops significantly, and their relative rankings also change. We also show that PriMeSRLsuccessfully penalizes actual failures in SoTA SRL models.
abstract_zh: 语义角色标记（SRL）识别句子中的谓语-论元结构。这项任务通常分四个步骤完成：谓词识别、谓词意义消歧、论元识别和论元分类。在某一步骤中引入的错误会传播到后续步骤。不幸的是，现有的 SRL 评估脚本没有考虑这个错误传播方面的全部影响。它们要么评估独立于谓词意义的参数 (CoNLL09)，要么根本不评估谓词意义 (CoNLL05)，从而在参数分类任务上产生不准确的 SRL 模型性能。在本文中，我们解决了现有评估脚本的关键实际问题，并提出了更严格的 SRL 评估指标 PriMeSRL。我们观察到，通过使用 PriMeSRL，所有 SoTA SRL 模型的质量评估显着下降，并且它们的相对排名也发生变化。我们还表明，PriMeSRL 成功地惩罚了 SoTA SRL 模型中的实际故障。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PriMeSRL-Eval评估指标，解决现有语义角色标注（SRL）评估方法未充分考虑错误传播问题的缺陷。
AI.motivation: 现有SRL评估脚本（如CoNLL09/CoNLL05）未完整考虑错误传播影响，导致对模型性能评估不准确，尤其在论元分类任务中存在偏差。
AI.method: 设计PriMeSRL评估指标，通过同时评估谓词识别与论元分类的关联性，严格衡量错误传播对整体性能的影响。
AI.result: PriMeSRL使当前所有SOTA SRL模型的评估质量显著下降，模型相对排名发生改变，且能有效识别模型实际失效点。
AI.conclusion: PriMeSRL提供了更严格的SRL评估框架，能更真实反映模型性能，推动SRL系统改进。

authors_text: Corey Lynch,Ayzaan Wahid,Jonathan Tompson,Tianli Ding,James Betker,Robert Baruch,Travis Armstrong,Pete Florence
title: Interactive Language: Talking to Robots in Real Time
title_zh: 互动语言：与机器人实时对话
abstract: We present a framework for building interactive, real-time, natural language-instructable robots in the real world, and we open source related assets (dataset, environment, benchmark, and policies). Trained with behavioral cloning on a dataset of hundreds of thousands of language-annotated trajectories, a produced policy can proficiently execute an order of magnitude more commands than previous works: specifically we estimate a 93.5% success rate on a set of 87,000 unique natural language strings specifying raw end-to-end visuo-linguo-motor skills in the real world. We find that the same policy is capable of being guided by a human via real-time language to address a wide range of precise long-horizon rearrangement goals, e.g. "make a smiley face out of blocks". The dataset we release comprises nearly 600,000 language-labeled trajectories, an order of magnitude larger than prior available datasets. We hope the demonstrated results and associated assets enable further advancement of helpful, capable, natural-language-interactable robots. See videos at https://interactive-language.github.io.
summary: We present a framework for building interactive, real-time, natural language-instructable robots in the real world, and we open source related assets (dataset, environment, benchmark, and policies). Trained with behavioral cloning on a dataset of hundreds of thousands of language-annotated trajectories, a produced policy can proficiently execute an order of magnitude more commands than previous works: specifically we estimate a 93.5% success rate on a set of 87,000 unique natural language strings specifying raw end-to-end visuo-linguo-motor skills in the real world. We find that the same policy is capable of being guided by a human via real-time language to address a wide range of precise long-horizon rearrangement goals, e.g. "make a smiley face out of blocks". The dataset we release comprises nearly 600,000 language-labeled trajectories, an order of magnitude larger than prior available datasets. We hope the demonstrated results and associated assets enable further advancement of helpful, capable, natural-language-interactable robots. See videos at https://interactive-language.github.io.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个在现实世界中构建交互式、实时、自然语言可指导的机器人的框架，并开源相关资产（数据集、环境、基准和策略）。通过在数十万个语言注释轨迹的数据集上进行行为克隆训练，生成的策略可以比以前的作品熟练地执行更多数量级的命令：具体来说，我们估计在一组 87,000 个独特的自然语言字符串上的成功率为 93.5%，这些字符串指定了现实世界中原始的端到端视觉语言运动技能。我们发现相同的策略能够由人类通过实时语言来指导，以解决各种精确的长期重新安排目标，例如“用积木制作笑脸”。我们发布的数据集包含近 600,000 个语言标记的轨迹，比之前可用的数据集大一个数量级。我们希望所展示的结果和相关资产能够进一步发展有用的、有能力的、可自然语言交互的机器人。请参阅 https://interactive-language.github.io 上的视频。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于构建实时自然语言指令控制现实世界机器人的框架，并开源了相关数据集和策略。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人对自然语言指令的执行能力有限，且缺乏足够规模的标注数据支撑复杂任务。
AI.method: 基于数百万条语言标注轨迹数据，通过行为克隆训练出可执行端到端视觉-语言-运动技能的策略模型。
AI.result: 策略模型在87,000个独特指令上达到93.5%成功率，支持实时语言交互完成复杂排列任务，发布包含60万条轨迹的全球最大标注数据集。
AI.conclusion: 该成果为开发具备自然语言交互能力的实用机器人提供了关键技术框架和基础数据支持。

See videos at https://interactive-language.github.io. 我们提出了一个在现实世界中构建交互式、实时、自然语言可指导的机器人的框架，并开源相关资产（数据集、环境、基准和策略）。通过在数十万个语言注释轨迹的数据集上进行行为克隆训练，生成的策略可以比以前的作品熟练地执行更多数量级的命令：具体来说，我们估计在一组 87,000 个独特的自然语言字符串上的成功率为 93.5%，这些字符串指定了现实世界中原始的端到端视觉语言运动技能。我们发现相同的策略能够由人类通过实时语言来指导，以解决各种精确的长期重新安排目标，例如“用积木制作笑脸”。我们发布的数据集包含近 600,000 个语言标记的轨迹，比之前可用的数据集大一个数量级。我们希望所展示的结果和相关资产能够进一步发展有用的、有能力的、可自然语言交互的机器人。请参阅 https://interactive-language.github.io 上的视频。 本文提出了一种用于构建实时自然语言指令控制现实世界机器人的框架，并开源了相关数据集和策略。 Corey Lynch,Ayzaan Wahid,Jonathan Tompson,Tianli Ding,James Betker,Robert Baruch,Travis Armstrong,Pete Florence cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Zhipeng Cai,Vladlen Koltun,Ozan Sener
title: Improving information retention in large scale online continual learning
title_zh: 提高大规模在线持续学习中的信息保留
abstract: Given a stream of data sampled from non-stationary distributions, online continual learning (OCL) aims to adapt efficiently to new data while retaining existing knowledge. The typical approach to address information retention (the ability to retain previous knowledge) is keeping a replay buffer of a fixed size and computing gradients using a mixture of new data and the replay buffer. Surprisingly, the recent work (Cai et al., 2021) suggests that information retention remains a problem in large scale OCL even when the replay buffer is unlimited, i.e., the gradients are computed using all past data. This paper focuses on this peculiarity to understand and address information retention. To pinpoint the source of this problem, we theoretically show that, given limited computation budgets at each time step, even without strict storage limit, naively applying SGD with constant or constantly decreasing learning rates fails to optimize information retention in the long term. We propose using a moving average family of methods to improve optimization for non-stationary objectives. Specifically, we design an adaptive moving average (AMA) optimizer and a moving-average-based learning rate schedule (MALR). We demonstrate the effectiveness of AMA+MALR on large-scale benchmarks, including Continual Localization (CLOC), Google Landmarks, and ImageNet. Code will be released upon publication.
summary: Given a stream of data sampled from non-stationary distributions, online continual learning (OCL) aims to adapt efficiently to new data while retaining existing knowledge. The typical approach to address information retention (the ability to retain previous knowledge) is keeping a replay buffer of a fixed size and computing gradients using a mixture of new data and the replay buffer. Surprisingly, the recent work (Cai et al., 2021) suggests that information retention remains a problem in large scale OCL even when the replay buffer is unlimited, i.e., the gradients are computed using all past data. This paper focuses on this peculiarity to understand and address information retention. To pinpoint the source of this problem, we theoretically show that, given limited computation budgets at each time step, even without strict storage limit, naively applying SGD with constant or constantly decreasing learning rates fails to optimize information retention in the long term. We propose using a moving average family of methods to improve optimization for non-stationary objectives. Specifically, we design an adaptive moving average (AMA) optimizer and a moving-average-based learning rate schedule (MALR). We demonstrate the effectiveness of AMA+MALR on large-scale benchmarks, including Continual Localization (CLOC), Google Landmarks, and ImageNet. Code will be released upon publication.
abstract_zh: 给定从非平稳分布中采样的数据流，在线持续学习（OCL）旨在有效地适应新数据，同时保留现有知识。解决信息保留（保留先前知识的能力）的典型方法是保持固定大小的重播缓冲区并使用新数据和重播缓冲区的混合来计算梯度。令人惊讶的是，最近的工作（Cai 等人，2021）表明，即使重放缓冲区是无限的，即使用所有过去的数据计算梯度，信息保留在大规模 OCL 中仍然是一个问题。本文重点关注这一特性，以理解和解决信息保留问题。为了查明这个问题的根源，我们从理论上证明，鉴于每个时间步的计算预算有限，即使没有严格的存储限制，天真地应用具有恒定或不断降低的学习率的 SGD 也无法从长远来看优化信息保留。我们建议使用移动平均法系列来改进非平稳目标的优化。具体来说，我们设计了一个自适应移动平均（AMA）优化器和一个基于移动平均的学习率计划（MALR）。我们在大规模基准测试上展示了 AMA+MALR 的有效性，包括持续本地化 (CLOC)、Google Landmarks 和 ImageNet。代码将在发布后发布。

AI.tldr: 本文针对大规模在线持续学习中的信息保留问题，提出改进方法以提升模型在非平稳数据流下的知识保持能力。
AI.motivation: 现有研究发现，即使使用无限回放缓冲区，大规模在线持续学习仍存在信息保留不足的问题，传统SGD优化方法在计算预算有限时无法有效解决该问题。
AI.method: 提出自适应移动平均优化器（AMA）和基于移动平均的学习率调度（MALR），通过动态调整梯度更新策略应对非平稳目标函数的优化挑战。
AI.result: 在CLOC、Google Landmarks和ImageNet等大规模基准测试中验证了AMA+MALR方法的有效性，显著提升了信息保留性能。
AI.conclusion: 移动平均方法能有效解决大规模在线持续学习中的信息保留难题，为非平稳环境下的优化提供了新思路。

authors_text: Hans Hao-Hsun Hsu,Yuesong Shen,Christian Tomani,Daniel Cremers
title: What Makes Graph Neural Networks Miscalibrated?
title_zh: 是什么导致图神经网络校准错误？
abstract: Given the importance of getting calibrated predictions and reliable uncertainty estimations, various post-hoc calibration methods have been developed for neural networks on standard multi-class classification tasks. However, these methods are not well suited for calibrating graph neural networks (GNNs), which presents unique challenges such as accounting for the graph structure and the graph-induced correlations between the nodes. In this work, we conduct a systematic study on the calibration qualities of GNN node predictions. In particular, we identify five factors which influence the calibration of GNNs: general under-confident tendency, diversity of nodewise predictive distributions, distance to training nodes, relative confidence level, and neighborhood similarity. Furthermore, based on the insights from this study, we design a novel calibration method named Graph Attention Temperature Scaling (GATS), which is tailored for calibrating graph neural networks. GATS incorporates designs that address all the identified influential factors and produces nodewise temperature scaling using an attention-based architecture. GATS is accuracy-preserving, data-efficient, and expressive at the same time. Our experiments empirically verify the effectiveness of GATS, demonstrating that it can consistently achieve state-of-the-art calibration results on various graph datasets for different GNN backbones.
summary: Given the importance of getting calibrated predictions and reliable uncertainty estimations, various post-hoc calibration methods have been developed for neural networks on standard multi-class classification tasks. However, these methods are not well suited for calibrating graph neural networks (GNNs), which presents unique challenges such as accounting for the graph structure and the graph-induced correlations between the nodes. In this work, we conduct a systematic study on the calibration qualities of GNN node predictions. In particular, we identify five factors which influence the calibration of GNNs: general under-confident tendency, diversity of nodewise predictive distributions, distance to training nodes, relative confidence level, and neighborhood similarity. Furthermore, based on the insights from this study, we design a novel calibration method named Graph Attention Temperature Scaling (GATS), which is tailored for calibrating graph neural networks. GATS incorporates designs that address all the identified influential factors and produces nodewise temperature scaling using an attention-based architecture. GATS is accuracy-preserving, data-efficient, and expressive at the same time. Our experiments empirically verify the effectiveness of GATS, demonstrating that it can consistently achieve state-of-the-art calibration results on various graph datasets for different GNN backbones.
abstract_zh: 考虑到获得校准预测和可靠的不确定性估计的重要性，针对标准多类分类任务的神经网络开发了各种事后校准方法。然而，这些方法不太适合校准图神经网络（GNN），这带来了独特的挑战，例如考虑图结构和节点之间图引起的相关性。在这项工作中，我们对 GNN 节点预测的校准质量进行了系统研究。特别是，我们确定了影响 GNN 校准的五个因素：一般的不自信倾向、节点预测分布的多样性、到训练节点的距离、相对置信度和邻域相似性。此外，根据这项研究的见解，我们设计了一种新颖的校准方法，称为图注意温度缩放（GATS），该方法专为校准图神经网络而定制。 GATS 结合了解决所有已确定的影响因素的设计，并使用基于注意力的架构产生节点温度缩放。 GATS 同时保持准确性、数据高效且富有表现力。我们的实验凭经验验证了 GATS 的有效性，证明它可以在不同 GNN 主干的各种图数据集上一致地实现最先进的校准结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究图神经网络（GNN）预测结果校准不佳的原因，并提出一种名为GATS的校准方法。
AI.motivation: 现有针对标准神经网络的校准方法难以适应GNN的特性，如图结构和节点间相关性，导致校准效果不佳。
AI.method: 通过系统分析确定五个影响GNN校准的因素，并设计基于注意力机制的温度缩放方法GATS，针对性解决这些因素。
AI.result: 实验验证GATS在多个图数据集上实现最先进的校准效果，且保持准确性、数据效率和表达性。
AI.conclusion: GATS通过结合图结构特性有效解决了GNN校准问题，为后续研究提供新思路。

authors_text: Lang Feng,Qianhui Liu,Huajin Tang,De Ma,Gang Pan
title: Multi-Level Firing with Spiking DS-ResNet: Enabling Better and Deeper Directly-Trained Spiking Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用尖峰 DS-ResNet 进行多级激发：实现更好、更深的直接训练尖峰神经网络
comment: Accepted by the Thirty-First International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence (IJCAI-22)
comments: Accepted by the Thirty-First International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence (IJCAI-22)
abstract: Spiking neural networks (SNNs) are bio-inspired neural networks with asynchronous discrete and sparse characteristics, which have increasingly manifested their superiority in low energy consumption. Recent research is devoted to utilizing spatio-temporal information to directly train SNNs by backpropagation. However, the binary and non-differentiable properties of spike activities force directly trained SNNs to suffer from serious gradient vanishing and network degradation, which greatly limits the performance of directly trained SNNs and prevents them from going deeper. In this paper, we propose a multi-level firing (MLF) method based on the existing spatio-temporal back propagation (STBP) method, and spiking dormant-suppressed residual network (spiking DS-ResNet). MLF enables more efficient gradient propagation and the incremental expression ability of the neurons. Spiking DS-ResNet can efficiently perform identity mapping of discrete spikes, as well as provide a more suitable connection for gradient propagation in deep SNNs. With the proposed method, our model achieves superior performances on a non-neuromorphic dataset and two neuromorphic datasets with much fewer trainable parameters and demonstrates the great ability to combat the gradient vanishing and degradation problem in deep SNNs.
summary: Spiking neural networks (SNNs) are bio-inspired neural networks with asynchronous discrete and sparse characteristics, which have increasingly manifested their superiority in low energy consumption. Recent research is devoted to utilizing spatio-temporal information to directly train SNNs by backpropagation. However, the binary and non-differentiable properties of spike activities force directly trained SNNs to suffer from serious gradient vanishing and network degradation, which greatly limits the performance of directly trained SNNs and prevents them from going deeper. In this paper, we propose a multi-level firing (MLF) method based on the existing spatio-temporal back propagation (STBP) method, and spiking dormant-suppressed residual network (spiking DS-ResNet). MLF enables more efficient gradient propagation and the incremental expression ability of the neurons. Spiking DS-ResNet can efficiently perform identity mapping of discrete spikes, as well as provide a more suitable connection for gradient propagation in deep SNNs. With the proposed method, our model achieves superior performances on a non-neuromorphic dataset and two neuromorphic datasets with much fewer trainable parameters and demonstrates the great ability to combat the gradient vanishing and degradation problem in deep SNNs.
abstract_zh: 尖峰神经网络（SNN）是一种具有异步离散、稀疏特性的仿生神经网络，越来越体现出其低能耗的优势。最近的研究致力于利用时空信息通过反向传播直接训练 SNN。然而，尖峰活动的二元和不可微的特性迫使直接训练的SNN遭受严重的梯度消失和网络退化，这极大地限制了直接训练的SNN的性能并阻止其深入。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于现有时空反向传播（STBP）方法和尖峰休眠抑制残差网络（尖峰DS-ResNet）的多级激发（MLF）方法。 MLF能够实现更有效的梯度传播和神经元的增量表达能力。 Spiking DS-ResNet 可以有效地执行离散尖峰的恒等映射，并为深度 SNN 中的梯度传播提供更合适的连接。通过所提出的方法，我们的模型在非神经形态数据集和两个可训练参数少得多的神经形态数据集上实现了卓越的性能，并展示了解决深度 SNN 中梯度消失和退化问题的强大能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多级发放（MLF）和脉冲DS-ResNet的方法，以改善直接训练的脉冲神经网络（SNN）的梯度消失和网络退化问题，从而实现更高效、更深的SNN模型。
AI.motivation: 直接训练的SNN由于脉冲活动的二值性和非可微性，存在严重的梯度消失和网络退化问题，限制了其性能和深度扩展。
AI.method: 提出多级发放（MLF）方法改进梯度传播效率，并设计脉冲DS-ResNet结构，通过离散脉冲的恒等映射和优化连接方式增强深度SNN的梯度传播能力。
AI.result: 在非神经形态和神经形态数据集上均取得优异性能，参数量更少，显著缓解了深度SNN的梯度消失和退化问题。
AI.conclusion: MLF与脉冲DS-ResNet的结合有效解决了深度SNN训练中的关键挑战，为构建更高效、更深的SNN提供了可行方案。

search_text: Multi-Level Firing with Spiking DS-ResNet: Enabling Better and Deeper Directly-Trained Spiking Neural Networks 使用尖峰 DS-ResNet 进行多级激发：实现更好、更深的直接训练尖峰神经网络 Spiking neural networks (SNNs) are bio-inspired neural networks with asynchronous discrete and sparse characteristics, which have increasingly manifested their superiority in low energy consumption. Recent research is devoted to utilizing spatio-temporal information to directly train SNNs by backpropagation. However, the binary and non-differentiable properties of spike activities force directly trained SNNs to suffer from serious gradient vanishing and network degradation, which greatly limits the performance of directly trained SNNs and prevents them from going deeper. In this paper, we propose a multi-level firing (MLF) method based on the existing spatio-temporal back propagation (STBP) method, and spiking dormant-suppressed residual network (spiking DS-ResNet). MLF enables more efficient gradient propagation and the incremental expression ability of the neurons. Spiking DS-ResNet can efficiently perform identity mapping of discrete spikes, as well as provide a more suitable connection for gradient propagation in deep SNNs. With the proposed method, our model achieves superior performances on a non-neuromorphic dataset and two neuromorphic datasets with much fewer trainable parameters and demonstrates the great ability to combat the gradient vanishing and degradation problem in deep SNNs. 尖峰神经网络（SNN）是一种具有异步离散、稀疏特性的仿生神经网络，越来越体现出其低能耗的优势。最近的研究致力于利用时空信息通过反向传播直接训练 SNN。然而，尖峰活动的二元和不可微的特性迫使直接训练的SNN遭受严重的梯度消失和网络退化，这极大地限制了直接训练的SNN的性能并阻止其深入。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于现有时空反向传播（STBP）方法和尖峰休眠抑制残差网络（尖峰DS-ResNet）的多级激发（MLF）方法。 MLF能够实现更有效的梯度传播和神经元的增量表达能力。 Spiking DS-ResNet 可以有效地执行离散尖峰的恒等映射，并为深度 SNN 中的梯度传播提供更合适的连接。通过所提出的方法，我们的模型在非神经形态数据集和两个可训练参数少得多的神经形态数据集上实现了卓越的性能，并展示了解决深度 SNN 中梯度消失和退化问题的强大能力。 本文提出了一种基于多级发放（MLF）和脉冲DS-ResNet的方法，以改善直接训练的脉冲神经网络（SNN）的梯度消失和网络退化问题，从而实现更高效、更深的SNN模型。 Lang Feng,Qianhui Liu,Huajin Tang,De Ma,Gang Pan cs.NE,cs.AI

authors_text: Shuo Wang,Chen Qin,Chengyan Wang,Kang Wang,Haoran Wang,Chen Chen,Cheng Ouyang,Xutong Kuang,Chengliang Dai,Yuanhan Mo,Zhang Shi,Chenchen Dai,Xinrong Chen,He Wang,Wenjia Bai
title: The Extreme Cardiac MRI Analysis Challenge under Respiratory Motion (CMRxMotion)
title_zh: 呼吸运动下的极端心脏 MRI 分析挑战 (CMRxMotion)
abstract: The quality of cardiac magnetic resonance (CMR) imaging is susceptible to respiratory motion artifacts. The model robustness of automated segmentation techniques in face of real-world respiratory motion artifacts is unclear. This manuscript describes the design of extreme cardiac MRI analysis challenge under respiratory motion (CMRxMotion Challenge). The challenge aims to establish a public benchmark dataset to assess the effects of respiratory motion on image quality and examine the robustness of segmentation models. The challenge recruited 40 healthy volunteers to perform different breath-hold behaviors during one imaging visit, obtaining paired cine imaging with artifacts. Radiologists assessed the image quality and annotated the level of respiratory motion artifacts. For those images with diagnostic quality, radiologists further segmented the left ventricle, left ventricle myocardium and right ventricle. The images of training set (20 volunteers) along with the annotations are released to the challenge participants, to develop an automated image quality assessment model (Task 1) and an automated segmentation model (Task 2). The images of validation set (5 volunteers) are released to the challenge participants but the annotations are withheld for online evaluation of submitted predictions. Both the images and annotations of the test set (15 volunteers) were withheld and only used for offline evaluation of submitted containerized dockers. The image quality assessment task is quantitatively evaluated by the Cohen's kappa statistics and the segmentation task is evaluated by the Dice scores and Hausdorff distances.
summary: The quality of cardiac magnetic resonance (CMR) imaging is susceptible to respiratory motion artifacts. The model robustness of automated segmentation techniques in face of real-world respiratory motion artifacts is unclear. This manuscript describes the design of extreme cardiac MRI analysis challenge under respiratory motion (CMRxMotion Challenge). The challenge aims to establish a public benchmark dataset to assess the effects of respiratory motion on image quality and examine the robustness of segmentation models. The images of training set (20 volunteers) along with the annotations are released to the challenge participants, to develop an automated image quality assessment model (Task 1) and an automated segmentation model (Task 2). The images of validation set (5 volunteers) are released to the challenge participants but the annotations are withheld for online evaluation of submitted predictions. Both the images and annotations of the test set (15 volunteers) were withheld and only used for offline evaluation of submitted containerized dockers. The image quality assessment task is quantitatively evaluated by the Cohen's kappa statistics and the segmentation task is evaluated by the Dice scores and Hausdorff distances.
abstract_zh: 心脏磁共振 (CMR) 成像的质量容易受到呼吸运动伪影的影响。面对现实世界的呼吸运动伪影，自动分割技术的模型鲁棒性尚不清楚。本手稿描述了呼吸运动下极端心脏 MRI 分析挑战（CMRxMotion Challenge）的设计。该挑战赛旨在建立一个公共基准数据集，以评估呼吸运动对图像质量的影响并检查分割模型的稳健性。该挑战招募了 40 名健康志愿者，在一次成像访问期间执行不同的屏气行为，获得与伪影配对的电影成像。放射科医生评估了图像质量并注释了呼吸运动伪影的水平。对于那些具有诊断质量的图像，放射科医生进一步分割了左心室、左心室心肌和右心室。将训练集（20 名志愿者）的图像以及注释发布给挑战参与者，以开发自动图像质量评估模型（任务 1）和自动分割模型（任务 2）。验证集（5 名志愿者）的图像被发布给挑战参与者，但保留注释以用于在线评估提交的预测。测试集（15 名志愿者）的图像和注释均被保留，仅用于对提交的集装箱码头工人进行离线评估。图像质量评估任务通过Cohen's kappa统计进行定量评估，分割任务通过Dice分数和Hausdorff距离进行评估。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了CMRxMotion挑战赛，旨在通过公开数据集评估呼吸运动对心脏MRI图像质量的影响及分割模型的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 心脏MRI图像易受呼吸运动伪影影响，现有自动化分割技术在真实场景下的鲁棒性尚未明确，需建立基准数据集进行评估。
AI.method: 招募40名健康志愿者进行不同屏气行为的扫描，获取含伪影的配对 cine 图像。放射科医生评估图像质量并标注伪影等级，对诊断质量图像进行分割标注。数据集分为训练集（20人）、验证集（5人）和测试集（15人），分别用于模型开发、在线评估和离线评估。
AI.result: 通过Cohen's kappa统计量评估图像质量分析任务，通过Dice分数和Hausdorff距离评估分割任务，验证模型性能。
AI.conclusion: CMRxMotion挑战赛为研究呼吸运动下心脏MRI图像分析技术提供了标准化基准，推动鲁棒模型的发展。

authors_text: Chao-Han Huck Yang,Jun Qi,Sabato Marco Siniscalchi,Chin-Hui Lee
title: An Ensemble Teacher-Student Learning Approach with Poisson Sub-sampling to Differential Privacy Preserving Speech Recognition
title_zh: 一种基于泊松子采样的集成师生学习方法以实现差分隐私保护语音识别
comment: Accepted to ISCA, ISCSLP 2022, Singapore. 5 Pages
comments: Accepted to ISCA, ISCSLP 2022, Singapore. 5 Pages
abstract: We propose an ensemble learning framework with Poisson sub-sampling to effectively train a collection of teacher models to issue some differential privacy (DP) guarantee for training data. Through boosting under DP, a student model derived from the training data suffers little model degradation from the models trained with no privacy protection. Our proposed solution leverages upon two mechanisms, namely: (i) a privacy budget amplification via Poisson sub-sampling to train a target prediction model that requires less noise to achieve a same level of privacy budget, and (ii) a combination of the sub-sampling technique and an ensemble teacher-student learning framework that introduces DP-preserving noise at the output of the teacher models and transfers DP-preserving properties via noisy labels. Privacy-preserving student models are then trained with the noisy labels to learn the knowledge with DP-protection from the teacher model ensemble. Experimental evidences on spoken command recognition and continuous speech recognition of Mandarin speech show that our proposed framework greatly outperforms existing DP-preserving algorithms in both speech processing tasks.
summary: We propose an ensemble learning framework with Poisson sub-sampling to effectively train a collection of teacher models to issue some differential privacy (DP) guarantee for training data. Through boosting under DP, a student model derived from the training data suffers little model degradation from the models trained with no privacy protection. Our proposed solution leverages upon two mechanisms, namely: (i) a privacy budget amplification via Poisson sub-sampling to train a target prediction model that requires less noise to achieve a same level of privacy budget, and (ii) a combination of the sub-sampling technique and an ensemble teacher-student learning framework that introduces DP-preserving noise at the output of the teacher models and transfers DP-preserving properties via noisy labels. Privacy-preserving student models are then trained with the noisy labels to learn the knowledge with DP-protection from the teacher model ensemble. Experimental evidences on spoken command recognition and continuous speech recognition of Mandarin speech show that our proposed framework greatly outperforms existing DP-preserving algorithms in both speech processing tasks.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种具有泊松子采样的集成学习框架，可以有效地训练一组教师模型，从而为训练数据提供一些差分隐私（DP）保证。通过 DP 下的 boosting，从训练数据导出的学生模型与没有隐私保护的训练模型相比几乎没有遭受模型退化。我们提出的解决方案利用两种机制，即：（i）通过泊松子采样放大隐私预算来训练目标预测模型，该模型需要更少的噪声来实现相同水平的隐私预算；（ii）子采样技术和集成师生学习框架的组合，该框架在教师模型的输出处引入DP保留噪声并通过噪声标签传输DP保留属性。然后使用噪声标签训练保护隐私的学生模型，以从教师模型集合中学习具有 DP 保护的知识。口语命令识别和普通话连续语音识别的实验证据表明，我们提出的框架在两种语音处理任务中都大大优于现有的 DP 保留算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合泊松子抽样与集成教师-学生学习框架的差分隐私保护语音识别方法，旨在提升隐私保护下的模型性能。
AI.motivation: 传统差分隐私方法在语音识别中需添加大量噪声以保证隐私，导致模型性能显著下降，亟需更高效的隐私保护与模型精度平衡方案。
AI.method: 通过泊松子抽样放大隐私预算减少噪声需求，并结合集成教师-学生框架，在教师模型输出添加噪声标签传递差分隐私属性，最终训练隐私保护的学生模型。
AI.result: 在普通话语音指令识别和连续语音识别任务中，该框架相较现有差分隐私算法显著提升了识别准确率。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效平衡了隐私保护与模型性能，为差分隐私语音识别提供了新的技术路径。

search_text: An Ensemble Teacher-Student Learning Approach with Poisson Sub-sampling to Differential Privacy Preserving Speech Recognition 一种基于泊松子采样的集成师生学习方法以实现差分隐私保护语音识别 We propose an ensemble learning framework with Poisson sub-sampling to effectively train a collection of teacher models to issue some differential privacy (DP) guarantee for training data. Through boosting under DP, a student model derived from the training data suffers little model degradation from the models trained with no privacy protection. Our proposed solution leverages upon two mechanisms, namely: (i) a privacy budget amplification via Poisson sub-sampling to train a target prediction model that requires less noise to achieve a same level of privacy budget, and (ii) a combination of the sub-sampling technique and an ensemble teacher-student learning framework that introduces DP-preserving noise at the output of the teacher models and transfers DP-preserving properties via noisy labels. Privacy-preserving student models are then trained with the noisy labels to learn the knowledge with DP-protection from the teacher model ensemble. Experimental evidences on spoken command recognition and continuous speech recognition of Mandarin speech show that our proposed framework greatly outperforms existing DP-preserving algorithms in both speech processing tasks. 我们提出了一种具有泊松子采样的集成学习框架，可以有效地训练一组教师模型，从而为训练数据提供一些差分隐私（DP）保证。通过 DP 下的 boosting，从训练数据导出的学生模型与没有隐私保护的训练模型相比几乎没有遭受模型退化。我们提出的解决方案利用两种机制，即：（i）通过泊松子采样放大隐私预算来训练目标预测模型，该模型需要更少的噪声来实现相同水平的隐私预算；（ii）子采样技术和集成师生学习框架的组合，该框架在教师模型的输出处引入DP保留噪声并通过噪声标签传输DP保留属性。然后使用噪声标签训练保护隐私的学生模型，以从教师模型集合中学习具有 DP 保护的知识。口语命令识别和普通话连续语音识别的实验证据表明，我们提出的框架在两种语音处理任务中都大大优于现有的 DP 保留算法。 本文提出一种结合泊松子抽样与集成教师-学生学习框架的差分隐私保护语音识别方法，旨在提升隐私保护下的模型性能。 Chao-Han Huck Yang,Jun Qi,Sabato Marco Siniscalchi,Chin-Hui Lee eess.AS,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.SD,eess.SP

authors_text: Marios Constantinides,Daniele Quercia
title: Good Intentions, Bad Inventions: How Employees Judge Pervasive Technologies in the Workplace
title_zh: 良好的意图，糟糕的发明：员工如何评价工作场所中普遍存在的技术
abstract: Pervasive technologies combined with powerful AI have been recently introduced to enhance work productivity. Yet, some of these technologies are judged to be invasive. To identify which ones, we should understand how employees tend to judge these technologies. We considered 16 technologies that track productivity, and conducted a study in which 131 crowd-workers judged these scenarios. We found that a technology was judged to be right depending on the following three aspects of increasing importance. That is, whether the technology: 1) was currently supported by existing tools; 2) did not interfere with work or was fit for purpose; and 3) did not cause any harm or did not infringe on any individual rights. Ubicomp research currently focuses on how to design better technologies by making them more accurate, or by increasingly blending them into the background. It might be time to design better ubiquitous technologies by unpacking AI ethics as well.
summary: Pervasive technologies combined with powerful AI have been recently introduced to enhance work productivity. Yet, some of these technologies are judged to be invasive. To identify which ones, we should understand how employees tend to judge these technologies. We considered 16 technologies that track productivity, and conducted a study in which 131 crowd-workers judged these scenarios. We found that a technology was judged to be right depending on the following three aspects of increasing importance. That is, whether the technology: 1) was currently supported by existing tools; 2) did not interfere with work or was fit for purpose; and 3) did not cause any harm or did not infringe on any individual rights. Ubicomp research currently focuses on how to design better technologies by making them more accurate, or by increasingly blending them into the background. It might be time to design better ubiquitous technologies by unpacking AI ethics as well.
abstract_zh: 最近引入了普及技术与强大的人工智能相结合来提高工作效率。然而，其中一些技术被认为是侵入性的。为了确定哪些技术，我们应该了解员工倾向于如何判断这些技术。我们考虑了 16 种追踪生产力的技术，并进行了一项研究，其中 131 名群众工作者对这些场景进行了判断。我们发现，判断一项技术是否正确取决于以下三个日益重要的方面。即该技术是否：1）目前是否得到现有工具的支持； 2) 不干扰工作或适合工作目的； 3) 没有造成任何损害或侵犯任何个人权利。 Ubicomp 研究目前的重点是如何通过使技术更加准确或将其越来越多地融入背景来设计更好的技术。也许是时候通过解开人工智能伦理来设计更好的无处不在的技术了。

AI.tldr: 研究员工如何评估工作场所中无处不在的技术
AI.motivation: 尽管无处不在的技术旨在提升生产力，但可能因侵入性引发争议，需明确员工判断技术合理性的标准
AI.method: 调查131名众包工作者对16种生产力追踪技术的场景评估
AI.result: 技术合理性判断依以下因素递增重要：1) 是否有现有工具支持；2) 是否不干扰工作或适配场景；3) 是否无害且不侵犯个人权利
AI.conclusion: 建议在设计无处不在技术时，需结合AI伦理框架，而不仅关注技术准确性与隐蔽性

authors_text: Manish Prajapat,Matteo Turchetta,Melanie N. Zeilinger,Andreas Krause
title: Near-Optimal Multi-Agent Learning for Safe Coverage Control
title_zh: 用于安全覆盖控制的近乎最优多智能体学习
abstract: In multi-agent coverage control problems, agents navigate their environment to reach locations that maximize the coverage of some density. In practice, the density is rarely known $\textit{a priori}$, further complicating the original NP-hard problem. Moreover, in many applications, agents cannot visit arbitrary locations due to $\textit{a priori}$ unknown safety constraints. In this paper, we aim to efficiently learn the density to approximately solve the coverage problem while preserving the agents' safety. We first propose a conditionally linear submodular coverage function that facilitates theoretical analysis. Utilizing this structure, we develop MacOpt, a novel algorithm that efficiently trades off the exploration-exploitation dilemma due to partial observability, and show that it achieves sublinear regret. Next, we extend results on single-agent safe exploration to our multi-agent setting and propose SafeMac for safe coverage and exploration. We analyze SafeMac and give first of its kind results: near optimal coverage in finite time while provably guaranteeing safety. We extensively evaluate our algorithms on synthetic and real problems, including a bio-diversity monitoring task under safety constraints, where SafeMac outperforms competing methods.
summary: In multi-agent coverage control problems, agents navigate their environment to reach locations that maximize the coverage of some density. In practice, the density is rarely known $\textit{a priori}$, further complicating the original NP-hard problem. Moreover, in many applications, agents cannot visit arbitrary locations due to $\textit{a priori}$ unknown safety constraints. In this paper, we aim to efficiently learn the density to approximately solve the coverage problem while preserving the agents' safety. We first propose a conditionally linear submodular coverage function that facilitates theoretical analysis. Utilizing this structure, we develop MacOpt, a novel algorithm that efficiently trades off the exploration-exploitation dilemma due to partial observability, and show that it achieves sublinear regret. Next, we extend results on single-agent safe exploration to our multi-agent setting and propose SafeMac for safe coverage and exploration. We analyze SafeMac and give first of its kind results: near optimal coverage in finite time while provably guaranteeing safety. We extensively evaluate our algorithms on synthetic and real problems, including a bio-diversity monitoring task under safety constraints, where SafeMac outperforms competing methods.
abstract_zh: 在多智能体覆盖控制问题中，智能体导航其环境以到达最大化某些密度覆盖的位置。在实践中，密度很少是已知的 $\textit{apriori}$，这使得原始的 NP 困难问题进一步复杂化。此外，在许多应用中，由于$\textit{先验}$未知的安全约束，代理无法访问任意位置。在本文中，我们的目标是有效地学习密度以近似解决覆盖问题，同时保证代理的安全。我们首先提出了一个有利于理论分析的条件线性子模覆盖函数。利用这种结构，我们开发了 MacOpt，这是一种新颖的算法，可以有效地权衡由于部分可观察性而导致的探索-利用困境，并证明它实现了亚线性遗憾。接下来，我们将单代理安全探索的结果扩展到多代理设置，并提出 SafeMac 进行安全覆盖和探索。我们分析 SafeMac 并给出了首个此类结果：在有限时间内接近最佳覆盖范围，同时可证明保证安全性。我们针对合成问题和实际问题广泛评估了我们的算法，包括安全约束下的生物多样性监测任务，其中 SafeMac 的性能优于竞争方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种近似最优的多智能体学习方法，用于在安全约束下解决覆盖控制问题。
AI.motivation: 在多智能体覆盖控制中，密度函数和安全约束通常未知，导致问题复杂度高且难以保证安全性。
AI.method: 提出条件线性子模覆盖函数，设计MacOpt算法平衡探索与利用，并扩展单智能体安全探索方法至多智能体，提出SafeMac算法。
AI.result: MacOpt实现次线性遗憾，SafeMac在有限时间内达到近似最优覆盖并保证安全性，实验显示其优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法有效解决了未知密度与安全约束下的多智能体覆盖控制问题，实现了安全与效率的平衡。

search_text: Near-Optimal Multi-Agent Learning for Safe Coverage Control 用于安全覆盖控制的近乎最优多智能体学习 In multi-agent coverage control problems, agents navigate their environment to reach locations that maximize the coverage of some density. In practice, the density is rarely known $\textit{a priori}$, further complicating the original NP-hard problem. Moreover, in many applications, agents cannot visit arbitrary locations due to $\textit{a priori}$ unknown safety constraints. In this paper, we aim to efficiently learn the density to approximately solve the coverage problem while preserving the agents' safety. We first propose a conditionally linear submodular coverage function that facilitates theoretical analysis. Utilizing this structure, we develop MacOpt, a novel algorithm that efficiently trades off the exploration-exploitation dilemma due to partial observability, and show that it achieves sublinear regret. Next, we extend results on single-agent safe exploration to our multi-agent setting and propose SafeMac for safe coverage and exploration. We analyze SafeMac and give first of its kind results: near optimal coverage in finite time while provably guaranteeing safety. We extensively evaluate our algorithms on synthetic and real problems, including a bio-diversity monitoring task under safety constraints, where SafeMac outperforms competing methods. 在多智能体覆盖控制问题中，智能体导航其环境以到达最大化某些密度覆盖的位置。在实践中，密度很少是已知的 $\textit{apriori}$，这使得原始的 NP 困难问题进一步复杂化。此外，在许多应用中，由于$\textit{先验}$未知的安全约束，代理无法访问任意位置。在本文中，我们的目标是有效地学习密度以近似解决覆盖问题，同时保证代理的安全。我们首先提出了一个有利于理论分析的条件线性子模覆盖函数。利用这种结构，我们开发了 MacOpt，这是一种新颖的算法，可以有效地权衡由于部分可观察性而导致的探索-利用困境，并证明它实现了亚线性遗憾。接下来，我们将单代理安全探索的结果扩展到多代理设置，并提出 SafeMac 进行安全覆盖和探索。我们分析 SafeMac 并给出了首个此类结果：在有限时间内接近最佳覆盖范围，同时可证明保证安全性。我们针对合成问题和实际问题广泛评估了我们的算法，包括安全约束下的生物多样性监测任务，其中 SafeMac 的性能优于竞争方法。 本文提出了一种近似最优的多智能体学习方法，用于在安全约束下解决覆盖控制问题。 Manish Prajapat,Matteo Turchetta,Melanie N. Zeilinger,Andreas Krause cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.MA,cs.RO,math.OC

authors_text: Gregor Geigle,Chen Cecilia Liu,Jonas Pfeiffer,Iryna Gurevych
title: One does not fit all! On the Complementarity of Vision Encoders for Vision and Language Tasks
title_zh: 一种并不适合所有！关于视觉和语言任务的视觉编码器的互补性
abstract: Current multimodal models, aimed at solving Vision and Language (V+L) tasks, predominantly repurpose Vision Encoders (VE) as feature extractors. While many VEs -- of different architectures, trained on different data and objectives -- are publicly available, they are not designed for the downstream V+L tasks. Nonetheless, most current work assumes that a \textit{single} pre-trained VE can serve as a general-purpose encoder. In this work, we focus on analysis and aim to understand whether the information stored within different VEs is complementary, i.e. if providing the model with features from multiple VEs can improve the performance on a target task, and how they are combined. We exhaustively experiment with three popular VEs on six downstream V+L tasks and analyze the attention and VE-dropout patterns. Our analyses suggest that diverse VEs complement each other, resulting in improved downstream V+L task performance, where the improvements are not due to simple ensemble effects (i.e. the performance does not always improve when increasing the number of encoders). We demonstrate that future VEs, which are not \textit{repurposed}, but explicitly \textit{designed} for V+L tasks, have the potential of improving performance on the target V+L tasks.
summary: Current multimodal models, aimed at solving Vision and Language (V+L) tasks, predominantly repurpose Vision Encoders (VE) as feature extractors. While many VEs -- of different architectures, trained on different data and objectives -- are publicly available, they are not designed for the downstream V+L tasks. Nonetheless, most current work assumes that a \textit{single} pre-trained VE can serve as a general-purpose encoder. In this work, we focus on analysis and aim to understand whether the information stored within different VEs is complementary, i.e. if providing the model with features from multiple VEs can improve the performance on a target task, and how they are combined. We exhaustively experiment with three popular VEs on six downstream V+L tasks and analyze the attention and VE-dropout patterns. Our analyses suggest that diverse VEs complement each other, resulting in improved downstream V+L task performance, where the improvements are not due to simple ensemble effects (i.e. the performance does not always improve when increasing the number of encoders). We demonstrate that future VEs, which are not \textit{repurposed}, but explicitly \textit{designed} for V+L tasks, have the potential of improving performance on the target V+L tasks.
abstract_zh: 当前的多模态模型旨在解决视觉和语言（V+L）任务，主要将视觉编码器（VE）重新用作特征提取器。虽然许多具有不同架构、接受不同数据和目标训练的 VE 是公开可用的，但它们并不是为下游 V+L 任务而设计的。尽管如此，当前大多数工作都假设 \textit{single} 预训练的 VE 可以用作通用编码器。在这项工作中，我们专注于分析，旨在了解不同 VE 中存储的信息是否互补，即为模型提供多个 VE 的特征是否可以提高目标任务的性能，以及它们如何组合。我们在六个下游 V+L 任务上对三种流行的 VE 进行了详尽的实验，并分析了注意力和 VE 丢失模式。我们的分析表明，不同的 VE 相互补充，从而提高了下游 V+L 任务性能，其中的改进并不是由于简单的集成效应（即增加编码器数量时性能并不总是提高）。我们证明，未来的 VE 不是重新调整用途，而是明确为 V+L 任务设计的，具有提高目标 V+L 任务性能的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了不同视觉编码器在视觉与语言任务中的互补性，并分析了它们如何结合以提升任务性能。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态模型通常使用单一预训练视觉编码器作为通用特征提取器，但不同视觉编码器可能存储了互补信息，本文旨在研究这种互补性及其对任务性能的影响。
AI.method: 作者在六个下游视觉与语言任务上对三种流行的视觉编码器进行了详尽实验，并分析了注意力和视觉编码器丢弃模式。
AI.result: 实验表明，不同视觉编码器之间具有互补性，结合多个编码器可以提升任务性能，但性能提升并非简单依赖于编码器数量的增加。
AI.conclusion: 未来专门设计用于视觉与语言任务的视觉编码器，而非简单复用的编码器，有望进一步提升任务性能。

authors_text: Sirui Song,Kirk Saunders,Ye Yue,Jundong Liu
title: Smooth Trajectory Collision Avoidance through Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 通过深度强化学习实现平滑轨迹碰撞避免
abstract: Collision avoidance is a crucial task in vision-guided autonomous navigation. Solutions based on deep reinforcement learning (DRL) has become increasingly popular. In this work, we proposed several novel agent state and reward function designs to tackle two critical issues in DRL-based navigation solutions: 1) smoothness of the trained flight trajectories; and 2) model generalization to handle unseen environments. Formulated under a DRL framework, our model relies on margin reward and smoothness constraints to ensure UAVs fly smoothly while greatly reducing the chance of collision. The proposed smoothness reward minimizes a combination of first-order and second-order derivatives of flight trajectories, which can also drive the points to be evenly distributed, leading to stable flight speed. To enhance the agent's capability of handling new unseen environments, two practical setups are proposed to improve the invariance of both the state and reward function when deploying in different scenes. Experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our overall design and individual components.
summary: Collision avoidance is a crucial task in vision-guided autonomous navigation. Solutions based on deep reinforcement learning (DRL) has become increasingly popular. In this work, we proposed several novel agent state and reward function designs to tackle two critical issues in DRL-based navigation solutions: 1) smoothness of the trained flight trajectories; and 2) model generalization to handle unseen environments. Formulated under a DRL framework, our model relies on margin reward and smoothness constraints to ensure UAVs fly smoothly while greatly reducing the chance of collision. The proposed smoothness reward minimizes a combination of first-order and second-order derivatives of flight trajectories, which can also drive the points to be evenly distributed, leading to stable flight speed. To enhance the agent's capability of handling new unseen environments, two practical setups are proposed to improve the invariance of both the state and reward function when deploying in different scenes. Experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our overall design and individual components.
abstract_zh: 避免碰撞是视觉引导自主导航中的一项关键任务。基于深度强化学习（DRL）的解决方案变得越来越流行。在这项工作中，我们提出了几种新颖的代理状态和奖励函数设计，以解决基于 DRL 的导航解决方案中的两个关键问题：1）训练飞行轨迹的平滑性； 2）模型泛化以处理未见过的环境。我们的模型是在 DRL 框架下制定的，依靠边际奖励和平滑度约束来确保无人机平稳飞行，同时大大减少碰撞的机会。所提出的平滑度奖励最小化了飞行轨迹的一阶和二阶导数的组合，这也可以驱动点均匀分布，从而实现稳定的飞行速度。为了增强代理处理新的未见过的环境的能力，提出了两种实用的设置来提高在不同场景中部署时状态和奖励函数的不变性。实验证明了我们整体设计和各个组件的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于深度强化学习的无人机轨迹平滑避障方法，解决轨迹不光滑和模型泛化能力不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度强化学习导航方案存在轨迹不平滑及难以适应新环境的缺陷，需提升飞行稳定性与环境适应性。
AI.method: 设计新型状态表示与奖励函数，结合边际奖励与平滑约束，通过一阶二阶导数最小化实现轨迹平滑，并提出两种环境不变性增强方案。
AI.result: 实验验证了方法在轨迹平滑性、碰撞避免效果及跨场景泛化能力方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过奖励机制创新与环境不变性设计，显著提升了无人机导航的平滑性与适应性。

search_text: Smooth Trajectory Collision Avoidance through Deep Reinforcement Learning 通过深度强化学习实现平滑轨迹碰撞避免 Collision avoidance is a crucial task in vision-guided autonomous navigation. Solutions based on deep reinforcement learning (DRL) has become increasingly popular. In this work, we proposed several novel agent state and reward function designs to tackle two critical issues in DRL-based navigation solutions: 1) smoothness of the trained flight trajectories; and 2) model generalization to handle unseen environments. Formulated under a DRL framework, our model relies on margin reward and smoothness constraints to ensure UAVs fly smoothly while greatly reducing the chance of collision. The proposed smoothness reward minimizes a combination of first-order and second-order derivatives of flight trajectories, which can also drive the points to be evenly distributed, leading to stable flight speed. authors_text: Daniel Loureiro,Alípio Mário Jorge
title: Probing Commonsense Knowledge in Pre-trained Language Models with Sense-level Precision and Expanded Vocabulary
title_zh: 以语义级精度和扩展词汇量探索预训练语言模型中的常识知识
abstract: Progress on commonsense reasoning is usually measured from performance improvements on Question Answering tasks designed to require commonsense knowledge. However, fine-tuning large Language Models (LMs) on these specific tasks does not directly evaluate commonsense learned during pre-training. The most direct assessments of commonsense knowledge in pre-trained LMs are arguably cloze-style tasks targeting commonsense assertions (e.g., A pen is used for [MASK].). However, this approach is restricted by the LM's vocabulary available for masked predictions, and its precision is subject to the context provided by the assertion. In this work, we present a method for enriching LMs with a grounded sense inventory (i.e., WordNet) available at the vocabulary level, without further training. This modification augments the prediction space of cloze-style prompts to the size of a large ontology while enabling finer-grained (sense-level) queries and predictions. In order to evaluate LMs with higher precision, we propose SenseLAMA, a cloze-style task featuring verbalized relations from disambiguated triples sourced from WordNet, WikiData, and ConceptNet. Applying our method to BERT, producing a WordNet-enriched version named SynBERT, we find that LMs can learn non-trivial commonsense knowledge from self-supervision, covering numerous relations, and more effectively than comparable similarity-based approaches.
summary: Progress on commonsense reasoning is usually measured from performance improvements on Question Answering tasks designed to require commonsense knowledge. However, fine-tuning large Language Models (LMs) on these specific tasks does not directly evaluate commonsense learned during pre-training. The most direct assessments of commonsense knowledge in pre-trained LMs are arguably cloze-style tasks targeting commonsense assertions (e.g., A pen is used for [MASK].). However, this approach is restricted by the LM's vocabulary available for masked predictions, and its precision is subject to the context provided by the assertion. In this work, we present a method for enriching LMs with a grounded sense inventory (i.e., WordNet) available at the vocabulary level, without further training. This modification augments the prediction space of cloze-style prompts to the size of a large ontology while enabling finer-grained (sense-level) queries and predictions. In order to evaluate LMs with higher precision, we propose SenseLAMA, a cloze-style task featuring verbalized relations from disambiguated triples sourced from WordNet, WikiData, and ConceptNet. Applying our method to BERT, producing a WordNet-enriched version named SynBERT, we find that LMs can learn non-trivial commonsense knowledge from self-supervision, covering numerous relations, and more effectively than comparable similarity-based approaches.
abstract_zh: 常识推理的进展通常通过旨在需要常识知识的问答任务的性能改进来衡量。然而，在这些特定任务上微调大型语言模型（LM）并不能直接评估预训练期间学到的常识。在预训练的 LM 中，对常识知识最直接的评估可以说是针对常识断言的完形填空式任务（例如，一支笔用于 [MASK]）。然而，这种方法受到 LM 可用于屏蔽预测的词汇的限制，并且其精度取决于断言提供的上下文。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种通过词汇层面可用的扎根意义清单（即 WordNet）来丰富 LM 的方法，而无需进一步培训。此修改将完形填空式提示的预测空间扩大到大型本体的大小，同时实现更细粒度（意义级别）的查询和预测。为了更高精度地评估 LM，我们提出了 SenseLAMA，这是一种完形填空式任务，其特点是来自 WordNet、WikiData 和 ConceptNet 的消歧三元组的语言化关系。将我们的方法应用于 BERT，生成一个名为 SynBERT 的 WordNet 丰富版本，我们发现 LM 可以通过自我监督学习重要的常识知识，涵盖大量关系，并且比类似的基于相似性的方法更有效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过扩展词汇和引入WordNet等知识库来提升预训练语言模型常识推理能力的方法，并设计了SenseLAMA任务进行评估。
AI.motivation: 现有常识推理评估方法受限于模型词汇量和上下文精度，无法准确衡量预训练阶段习得的常识知识。
AI.method: 在不进行额外训练的前提下，将WordNet等本体知识注入模型词汇空间，构建基于消歧三元组的SenseLAMA填空任务进行评估。
AI.result: 改进后的SynBERT模型在常识推理任务中展现出优于相似度基线方法的性能，验证了模型能通过自监督学习习得复杂常识关系。
AI.conclusion: 通过词汇级知识注入和细粒度语义查询，可更精确地评估预训练语言模型的常识知识掌握程度。

However, fine-tuning large Language Models (LMs) on these specific tasks does not directly evaluate commonsense learned during pre-training. authors_text: Caleb Koch,Carmen Strassle,Li-Yang Tan
title: Superpolynomial Lower Bounds for Decision Tree Learning and Testing
title_zh: 决策树学习和测试的超多项式下界
abstract: We establish new hardness results for decision tree optimization problems, adding to a line of work that dates back to Hyafil and Rivest in 1976. We prove, under randomized ETH, superpolynomial lower bounds for two basic problems: given an explicit representation of a function $f$ and a generator for a distribution $\mathcal{D}$, construct a small decision tree approximator for $f$ under $\mathcal{D}$, and decide if there is a small decision tree approximator for $f$ under $\mathcal{D}$. Our results imply new lower bounds for distribution-free PAC learning and testing of decision trees, settings in which the algorithm only has restricted access to $f$ and $\mathcal{D}$. Specifically, we show: $n$-variable size-$s$ decision trees cannot be properly PAC learned in time $n^{\tilde{O}(\log\log s)}$, and depth-$d$ decision trees cannot be tested in time $\exp(d^{\,O(1)})$. For learning, the previous best lower bound only ruled out $\text{poly}(n)$-time algorithms (Alekhnovich, Braverman, Feldman, Klivans, and Pitassi, 2009). For testing, recent work gives similar though incomparable bounds in the setting where $f$ is random and $\mathcal{D}$ is nonexplicit (Blais, Ferreira Pinto Jr., and Harms, 2021). Assuming a plausible conjecture on the hardness of Set-Cover, we show our lower bound for learning decision trees can be improved to $n^{Ω(\log s)}$, matching the best known upper bound of $n^{O(\log s)}$ due to Ehrenfeucht and Haussler (1989). We obtain our results within a unified framework that leverages recent progress in two lines of work: the inapproximability of Set-Cover and XOR lemmas for query complexity. Our framework is versatile and yields results for related concept classes such as juntas and DNF formulas.

We prove, under randomized ETH, superpolynomial lower bounds for two basic problems: given an explicit representation of a function $f$ and a generator for a distribution $\mathcal{D}$, construct a small decision tree approximator for $f$ under $\mathcal{D}$, and decide if there is a small decision tree approximator for $f$ under $\mathcal{D}$. Our results imply new lower bounds for distribution-free PAC learning and testing of decision trees, settings in which the algorithm only has restricted access to $f$ and $\mathcal{D}$. Specifically, we show: $n$-variable size-$s$ decision trees cannot be properly PAC learned in time $n^{\tilde{O}(\log\log s)}$, and depth-$d$ decision trees cannot be tested in time $\exp(d^{\,O(1)})$. For learning, the previous best lower bound only ruled out $\text{poly}(n)$-time algorithms (Alekhnovich, Braverman, Feldman, Klivans, and Pitassi, 2009). For testing, recent work gives similar though incomparable bounds in the setting where $f$ is random and $\mathcal{D}$ is nonexplicit (Blais, Ferreira Pinto Jr., and Harms, 2021). Assuming a plausible conjecture on the hardness of Set-Cover, we show our lower bound for learning decision trees can be improved to $n^{Ω(\log s)}$, matching the best known upper bound of $n^{O(\log s)}$ due to Ehrenfeucht and Haussler (1989). We obtain our results within a unified framework that leverages recent progress in two lines of work: the inapproximability of Set-Cover and XOR lemmas for query complexity. Our framework is versatile and yields results for related concept classes such as juntas and DNF formulas.
abstract_zh: 我们为决策树优化问题建立了新的硬度结果，增加了可追溯到 1976 年 Hyafil 和 Rivest 的一系列工作。我们在随机 ETH 下证明了两个基本问题的超多项式下界：给定函数 $f$ 的显式表示和分布 $\mathcal{D}$ 的生成器，在 $\mathcal{D}$ 下为 $f$ 构建一个小型决策树近似器，并确定是否存在一个小型决策树近似器$\mathcal{D}$下的$f$。我们的结果意味着无分布 PAC 学习和决策树测试的新下限，其中算法仅限制访问 $f$ 和 $\mathcal{D}$。具体来说，我们表明：$n$-变量大小-$s$决策树无法在$n^{\tilde{O}(\log\log s)}$时间内正确学习PAC，并且深度-$d$决策树无法在$\exp(d^{\,O(1)})$时间内进行测试。对于学习而言，之前的最佳下界仅排除了 $\text{poly}(n)$ 时间算法（Alekhnovich、Braverman、Feldman、Klivans 和 Pitassi，2009）。为了进行测试，最近的工作在 $f$ 是随机的且 $\mathcal{D}$ 是非显式的设置中给出了类似但无法比较的界限（Blais、Ferreira Pinto Jr. 和 Harms，2021）。假设对集合覆盖的难度有一个合理的猜想，我们表明学习决策树的下限可以提高到 $n^{Ω(\log s)}$，与 Ehrenfeucht 和 Haussler (1989) 提出的最著名的 $n^{O(\log s)}$ 上限相匹配。我们在一个统一的框架内获得结果，该框架利用了两方面工作的最新进展：Set-Cover 和 XOR 引理对于查询复杂性的不可近似性。我们的框架用途广泛，可为相关概念类别（例如军政府和 DNF 公式）生成结果。

AI.tldr: 本文证明了在随机化ETH假设下，决策树学习和测试问题存在超多项式下界，改进了此前的多项式时间下界结果。
AI.motivation: 决策树作为经典机器学习模型，其学习与测试效率的理论极限研究对计算学习理论具有基础性意义，此前多项式时间下界未能充分反映问题难度。
AI.method: 结合随机化ETH假设与集合覆盖难题的硬度猜想，构建统一框架，利用不可近似性理论与查询复杂度的XOR引理进行分析。
AI.result: 证明n变量s大小决策树无法在n~O(log log s)时间内被正确PAC学习，深度d决策树测试需exp(d^{O(1)})时间，且在集合覆盖猜想下学习下界提升至n^{Ω(log s)}。
AI.conclusion: 该框架不仅深化了决策树复杂性理论，还为相关概念类（如junta、DNF公式）提供了统一分析工具，揭示了分布无关学习场景的固有困难性。

authors_text: Lei Li,Nicolas Donati,Maks Ovsjanikov
title: Learning Multi-resolution Functional Maps with Spectral Attention for Robust Shape Matching
title_zh: 通过光谱注意力学习多分辨率功能图以实现稳健的形状匹配
abstract: In this work, we present a novel non-rigid shape matching framework based on multi-resolution functional maps with spectral attention. Existing functional map learning methods all rely on the critical choice of the spectral resolution hyperparameter, which can severely affect the overall accuracy or lead to overfitting, if not chosen carefully. In this paper, we show that spectral resolution tuning can be alleviated by introducing spectral attention. Our framework is applicable in both supervised and unsupervised settings, and we show that it is possible to train the network so that it can adapt the spectral resolution, depending on the given shape input. More specifically, we propose to compute multi-resolution functional maps that characterize correspondence across a range of spectral resolutions, and introduce a spectral attention network that helps to combine this representation into a single coherent final correspondence. Our approach is not only accurate with near-isometric input, for which a high spectral resolution is typically preferred, but also robust and able to produce reasonable matching even in the presence of significant non-isometric distortion, which poses great challenges to existing methods. We demonstrate the superior performance of our approach through experiments on a suite of challenging near-isometric and non-isometric shape matching benchmarks.
summary: In this work, we present a novel non-rigid shape matching framework based on multi-resolution functional maps with spectral attention. Existing functional map learning methods all rely on the critical choice of the spectral resolution hyperparameter, which can severely affect the overall accuracy or lead to overfitting, if not chosen carefully. In this paper, we show that spectral resolution tuning can be alleviated by introducing spectral attention. Our framework is applicable in both supervised and unsupervised settings, and we show that it is possible to train the network so that it can adapt the spectral resolution, depending on the given shape input. More specifically, we propose to compute multi-resolution functional maps that characterize correspondence across a range of spectral resolutions, and introduce a spectral attention network that helps to combine this representation into a single coherent final correspondence. Our approach is not only accurate with near-isometric input, for which a high spectral resolution is typically preferred, but also robust and able to produce reasonable matching even in the presence of significant non-isometric distortion, which poses great challenges to existing methods. We demonstrate the superior performance of our approach through experiments on a suite of challenging near-isometric and non-isometric shape matching benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于具有光谱注意力的多分辨率功能图的新型非刚性形状匹配框架。现有的功能图学习方法都依赖于光谱分辨率超参数的关键选择，如果不仔细选择，可能会严重影响整体精度或导致过度拟合。在本文中，我们表明可以通过引入光谱注意力来减轻光谱分辨率调整。我们的框架适用于有监督和无监督的设置，并且我们表明可以训练网络，使其能够根据给定的形状输入来调整光谱分辨率。更具体地说，我们建议计算多分辨率功能图，该图表征一系列光谱分辨率的对应关系，并引入光谱注意网络，有助于将这种表示组合成单个连贯的最终对应关系。我们的方法不仅对于近等距输入（通常优选高光谱分辨率）是准确的，而且即使在存在显着的非等距失真的情况下也很稳健并且能够产生合理的匹配，这对现有方法提出了巨大的挑战。我们通过在一系列具有挑战性的近等距和非等距形状匹配基准上进行实验，展示了我们的方法的卓越性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多分辨率函数映射和谱注意力的非刚性形状匹配框架。
AI.motivation: 现有的函数映射学习方法依赖于关键的谱分辨率超参数选择，如果选择不当，会影响整体准确性或导致过拟合。
AI.method: 引入谱注意力机制，通过计算多分辨率函数映射并结合谱注意力网络，适应不同形状输入的谱分辨率。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在近等距和非等距形状匹配基准测试中表现出色，具有高准确性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过谱注意力机制有效缓解了谱分辨率调整的问题，适用于监督和非监督设置，并能处理显著非等距变形的形状匹配。
