search_text: AISFormer: Amodal Instance Segmentation with Transformer AISFormer：使用 Transformer 进行非模态实例分割 Amodal Instance Segmentation (AIS) aims to segment the region of both visible and possible occluded parts of an object instance. While Mask R-CNN-based AIS approaches have shown promising results, they are unable to model high-level features coherence due to the limited receptive field. The most recent transformer-based models show impressive performance on vision tasks, even better than Convolution Neural Networks (CNN). In this work, we present AISFormer, an AIS framework, with a Transformer-based mask head. AISFormer explicitly models the complex coherence between occluder, visible, amodal, and invisible masks within an object's regions of interest by treating them as learnable queries. Specifically, AISFormer contains four modules: (i) feature encoding: extract ROI and learn both short-range and long-range visual features. (ii) mask transformer decoding: generate the occluder, visible, and amodal mask query embeddings by a transformer decoder (iii) invisible mask embedding: model the coherence between the amodal and visible masks, and (iv) mask predicting: estimate output masks including occluder, visible, amodal and invisible. We conduct extensive experiments and ablation studies on three challenging benchmarks i.e. KINS, D2SA, and COCOA-cls to evaluate the effectiveness of AISFormer. The code is available at: https://github.com/UARK-AICV/AISFormer 非模态实例分割（AIS）旨在分割对象实例的可见部分和可能被遮挡部分的区域。虽然基于 Mask R-CNN 的 AIS 方法已显示出有希望的结果，但由于感受野有限，它们无法对高级特征一致性进行建模。最新的基于 Transformer 的模型在视觉任务上表现出了令人印象深刻的性能，甚至比卷积神经网络 (CNN) 还要好。在这项工作中，我们提出了 AISFormer，一个 AIS 框架，带有基于 Transformer 的掩模头。 AISFormer 通过将对象感兴趣区域内的遮挡物、可见、非模态和不可见掩模视为可学习的查询，对它们之间的复杂一致性进行显式建模。具体来说，AISFormer包含四个模块：（i）特征编码：提取ROI并学习短程和长程视觉特征。 （ii）掩模变换器解码：通过变换器解码器生成遮挡物、可见和非模态掩模查询嵌入（iii）不可见掩模嵌入：对非模态和可见掩模之间的一致性进行建模，以及（iv）掩模预测：估计包括遮挡物、可见、非模态和不可见的输出掩模。我们对三个具有挑战性的基准（即 KINS、D2SA 和 COCOA-cls）进行了广泛的实验和消融研究，以评估 AISFormer 的有效性。代码位于：https://github.com/UARK-AICV/AISFormer 本文提出AISFormer框架，利用Transformer模型解决Amodal Instance Segmentation（AIS）问题，旨在同时分割物体可见和被遮挡的部分。 Minh Tran,Khoa Vo,Kashu Yamazaki,Arthur Fernandes,Michael Kidd,Ngan Le cs.CV

authors_text: Kotaro Funakoshi
title: Non-Axiomatic Term Logic: A Computational Theory of Cognitive Symbolic Reasoning
title_zh: 非公理术语逻辑：认知符号推理的计算理论
abstract: This paper presents Non-Axiomatic Term Logic (NATL) as a theoretical computational framework of humanlike symbolic reasoning in artificial intelligence. NATL unites a discrete syntactic system inspired from Aristotle's term logic and a continuous semantic system based on the modern idea of distributed representations, or embeddings. This paper positions the proposed approach in the phylogeny and the literature of logic, and explains the framework. As it is yet no more than a theory and it requires much further elaboration to implement it, no quantitative evaluation is presented. Instead, qualitative analyses of arguments using NATL, some applications to possible cognitive science/robotics-related research, and remaining issues towards a machinery implementation are discussed.
summary: This paper presents Non-Axiomatic Term Logic (NATL) as a theoretical computational framework of humanlike symbolic reasoning in artificial intelligence. NATL unites a discrete syntactic system inspired from Aristotle's term logic and a continuous semantic system based on the modern idea of distributed representations, or embeddings. This paper positions the proposed approach in the phylogeny and the literature of logic, and explains the framework. As it is yet no more than a theory and it requires much further elaboration to implement it, no quantitative evaluation is presented. Instead, qualitative analyses of arguments using NATL, some applications to possible cognitive science/robotics-related research, and remaining issues towards a machinery implementation are discussed.
abstract_zh: 本文提出非公理项逻辑（NATL）作为人工智能中类人符号推理的理论计算框架。 NATL 结合了受亚里士多德术语逻辑启发的离散句法系统和基于分布式表示或嵌入的现代思想的连续语义系统。本文将所提出的方法定位在逻辑学的系统发育和文献中，并解释了该框架。由于它还只是一个理论，需要进一步阐述才能实现，因此没有提出定量评估。相反，我们讨论了使用 NATL 进行论点的定性分析、可能的认知科学/机器人相关研究的一些应用以及机械实现的剩余问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出非公理术语逻辑（NATL），作为人工智能中类人符号推理的计算理论框架，结合离散句法系统与连续语义系统。
AI.motivation: 传统逻辑系统与现代分布式表示存在割裂，需构建统一框架以模拟人类认知推理过程，推动AI与认知科学的发展。
AI.method: 融合亚里士多德术语逻辑的离散句法与现代嵌入式语义，建立NATL理论框架，但尚未实现具体计算模型。
AI.result: 未提供定量评估，通过定性分析展示NATL在认知科学与机器人学的潜在应用，并讨论实现该框架的挑战。
AI.conclusion: NATL为符号推理提供新理论方向，需进一步研究其计算实现及跨学科应用潜力。

authors_text: Zonglin Li,Chong You,Srinadh Bhojanapalli,Daliang Li,Ankit Singh Rawat,Sashank J. Reddi,Ke Ye,Felix Chern,Felix Yu,Ruiqi Guo,Sanjiv Kumar
title: The Lazy Neuron Phenomenon: On Emergence of Activation Sparsity in Transformers
title_zh: 惰性神经元现象：变形金刚中激活稀疏性的出现
comment: A short version was presented at ICLR 2023. Previous title: Large Models are Parsimonious Learners: Activation Sparsity in Trained Transformers
comments: A short version was presented at ICLR 2023. Previous title: Large Models are Parsimonious Learners: Activation Sparsity in Trained Transformers
abstract: This paper studies the curious phenomenon for machine learning models with Transformer architectures that their activation maps are sparse. By activation map we refer to the intermediate output of the multi-layer perceptrons (MLPs) after a ReLU activation function, and by sparse we mean that on average very few entries (e.g., 3.0% for T5-Base and 6.3% for ViT-B16) are nonzero for each input to MLP. Moreover, larger Transformers with more layers and wider MLP hidden dimensions are sparser as measured by the percentage of nonzero entries. Through extensive experiments we demonstrate that the emergence of sparsity is a prevalent phenomenon that occurs for both natural language processing and vision tasks, on both training and evaluation data, for Transformers of various configurations, at layers of all depth levels, as well as for other architectures including MLP-mixers and 2-layer MLPs. We show that sparsity also emerges using training datasets with random labels, or with random inputs, or with infinite amount of data, demonstrating that sparsity is not a result of a specific family of datasets. We discuss how sparsity immediately implies a way to significantly reduce the FLOP count and improve efficiency for Transformers. Moreover, we demonstrate perhaps surprisingly that enforcing an even sparser activation via Top-k thresholding with a small value of k brings a collection of desired but missing properties for Transformers, namely less sensitivity to noisy training data, more robustness to input corruptions, and better calibration for their prediction confidence.
summary: This paper studies the curious phenomenon for machine learning models with Transformer architectures that their activation maps are sparse. By activation map we refer to the intermediate output of the multi-layer perceptrons (MLPs) after a ReLU activation function, and by sparse we mean that on average very few entries (e.g., 3.0% for T5-Base and 6.3% for ViT-B16) are nonzero for each input to MLP. Moreover, larger Transformers with more layers and wider MLP hidden dimensions are sparser as measured by the percentage of nonzero entries. Through extensive experiments we demonstrate that the emergence of sparsity is a prevalent phenomenon that occurs for both natural language processing and vision tasks, on both training and evaluation data, for Transformers of various configurations, at layers of all depth levels, as well as for other architectures including MLP-mixers and 2-layer MLPs. We show that sparsity also emerges using training datasets with random labels, or with random inputs, or with infinite amount of data, demonstrating that sparsity is not a result of a specific family of datasets. We discuss how sparsity immediately implies a way to significantly reduce the FLOP count and improve efficiency for Transformers. Moreover, we demonstrate perhaps surprisingly that enforcing an even sparser activation via Top-k thresholding with a small value of k brings a collection of desired but missing properties for Transformers, namely less sensitivity to noisy training data, more robustness to input corruptions, and better calibration for their prediction confidence.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了具有 Transformer 架构的机器学习模型的激活图稀疏的奇怪现象。通过激活图，我们指的是 ReLU 激活函数之后的多层感知器 (MLP) 的中间输出，通过稀疏，我们意味着平均而言，对于 MLP 的每个输入来说，很少有条目（例如，T5-Base 为 3.0%，ViT-B16 为 6.3%）非零。此外，根据非零条目的百分比来衡量，具有更多层和更宽的 MLP 隐藏维度的较大 Transformer 更加稀疏。通过大量的实验，我们证明了稀疏性的出现是一种普遍现象，在自然语言处理和视觉任务、训练和评估数据、各种配置的 Transformer、所有深度级别的层以及包括 MLP 混合器和 2 层 MLP 在内的其他架构中都会出现。我们表明，使用具有随机标签、随机输入或无限量数据的训练数据集也会出现稀疏性，这表明稀疏性不是特定数据集系列的结果。我们讨论稀疏性如何立即意味着显着减少 FLOP 计数并提高 Transformer 效率的方法。此外，我们可能令人惊讶地证明，通过具有较小 k 值的 Top-k 阈值来强制执行更稀疏的激活，可以为 Transformer 带来一系列所需但缺失的属性，即对噪声训练数据的敏感性较低，对输入损坏的鲁棒性更强，以及对其预测置信度的更好校准。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了Transformer模型中激活图的稀疏性现象，并探讨了其对模型效率和鲁棒性的影响。
AI.motivation: Transformer模型的激活图表现出显著的稀疏性，但这一现象的成因及其影响尚未被深入研究，因此本文旨在探讨该现象的普遍性及其对模型性能的影响。
AI.method: 通过大量实验，作者分析了不同任务、不同配置的Transformer模型的激活图稀疏性，并测试了在训练数据和评估数据中的表现。此外，还通过随机标签、随机输入和无限数据集验证了稀疏性的普遍性，并利用Top-k阈值方法进一步增强稀疏性。
AI.result: 实验表明，Transformer模型的激活图在各种任务、模型配置和数据集上均表现出显著稀疏性，且稀疏性随模型规模增加而增强。进一步的稀疏化处理可提升模型对噪声数据的鲁棒性和预测置信度的校准能力。
AI.conclusion: 激活图的稀疏性是Transformer模型的普遍现象，具有重要的效率优化潜力。通过强制稀疏化可以提升模型鲁棒性和校准能力，为模型优化提供了新的方向。

conclusion: 激活图的稀疏性是Transformer模型的普遍现象，具有重要的效率优化潜力。通过强制稀疏化可以提升模型鲁棒性和校准能力，为模型优化提供了新的方向。
search_text: The Lazy Neuron Phenomenon: On Emergence of Activation Sparsity in Transformers 惰性神经元现象：变形金刚中激活稀疏性的出现 This paper studies the curious phenomenon for machine learning models with Transformer architectures that their activation maps are sparse. By activation map we refer to the intermediate output of the multi-layer perceptrons (MLPs) after a ReLU activation function, and by sparse we mean that on average very few entries (e.g., 3.0% for T5-Base and 6.3% for ViT-B16) are nonzero for each input to MLP. Moreover, larger Transformers with more layers and wider MLP hidden dimensions are sparser as measured by the percentage of nonzero entries. Through extensive experiments we demonstrate that the emergence of sparsity is a prevalent phenomenon that occurs for both natural language processing and vision tasks, on both training and evaluation data, for Transformers of various configurations, at layers of all depth levels, as well as for other architectures including MLP-mixers and 2-layer MLPs. We show that sparsity also emerges using training datasets with random labels, or with random inputs, or with infinite amount of data, demonstrating that sparsity is not a result of a specific family of datasets. We discuss how sparsity immediately implies a way to significantly reduce the FLOP count and improve efficiency for Transformers. Moreover, we demonstrate perhaps surprisingly that enforcing an even sparser activation via Top-k thresholding with a small value of k brings a collection of desired but missing properties for Transformers, namely less sensitivity to noisy training data, more robustness to input corruptions, and better calibration for their prediction confidence. 本文研究了具有 Transformer 架构的机器学习模型的激活图稀疏的奇怪现象。通过激活图，我们指的是 ReLU 激活函数之后的多层感知器 (MLP) 的中间输出，通过稀疏，我们意味着平均而言，对于 MLP 的每个输入来说，很少有条目（例如，T5-Base 为 3.0%，ViT-B16 为 6.3%）非零。此外，根据非零条目的百分比来衡量，具有更多层和更宽的 MLP 隐藏维度的较大 Transformer 更加稀疏。通过大量的实验，我们证明了稀疏性的出现是一种普遍现象，在自然语言处理和视觉任务、训练和评估数据、各种配置的 Transformer、所有深度级别的层以及包括 MLP 混合器和 2 层 MLP 在内的其他架构中都会出现。我们表明，使用具有随机标签、随机输入或无限量数据的训练数据集也会出现稀疏性，这表明稀疏性不是特定数据集系列的结果。我们讨论稀疏性如何立即意味着显着减少 FLOP 计数并提高 Transformer 效率的方法。此外，我们可能令人惊讶地证明，通过具有较小 k 值的 Top-k 阈值来强制执行更稀疏的激活，可以为 Transformer 带来一系列所需但缺失的属性，即对噪声训练数据的敏感性较低，对输入损坏的鲁棒性更强，以及对其预测置信度的更好校准。 本文研究了Transformer模型中激活图的稀疏性现象，并探讨了其对模型效率和鲁棒性的影响。 Zonglin Li,Chong You,Srinadh Bhojanapalli,Daliang Li,Ankit Singh Rawat,Sashank J. Reddi,Ke Ye,Felix Chern,Felix Yu,Ruiqi Guo,Sanjiv Kumar cs.LG,cs.CL,cs.CV,stat.ML

authors_text: Harry Walsh,Ben Saunders,Richard Bowden
title: Changing the Representation: Examining Language Representation for Neural Sign Language Production
title_zh: 改变表征：检查神经手语生成的语言表征
abstract: Neural Sign Language Production (SLP) aims to automatically translate from spoken language sentences to sign language videos. Historically the SLP task has been broken into two steps; Firstly, translating from a spoken language sentence to a gloss sequence and secondly, producing a sign language video given a sequence of glosses. In this paper we apply Natural Language Processing techniques to the first step of the SLP pipeline. We use language models such as BERT and Word2Vec to create better sentence level embeddings, and apply several tokenization techniques, demonstrating how these improve performance on the low resource translation task of Text to Gloss. We introduce Text to HamNoSys (T2H) translation, and show the advantages of using a phonetic representation for sign language translation rather than a sign level gloss representation. Furthermore, we use HamNoSys to extract the hand shape of a sign and use this as additional supervision during training, further increasing the performance on T2H. Assembling best practise, we achieve a BLEU-4 score of 26.99 on the MineDGS dataset and 25.09 on PHOENIX14T, two new state-of-the-art baselines.
summary: Neural Sign Language Production (SLP) aims to automatically translate from spoken language sentences to sign language videos. Historically the SLP task has been broken into two steps; Firstly, translating from a spoken language sentence to a gloss sequence and secondly, producing a sign language video given a sequence of glosses. In this paper we apply Natural Language Processing techniques to the first step of the SLP pipeline. We use language models such as BERT and Word2Vec to create better sentence level embeddings, and apply several tokenization techniques, demonstrating how these improve performance on the low resource translation task of Text to Gloss. We introduce Text to HamNoSys (T2H) translation, and show the advantages of using a phonetic representation for sign language translation rather than a sign level gloss representation. Furthermore, we use HamNoSys to extract the hand shape of a sign and use this as additional supervision during training, further increasing the performance on T2H. Assembling best practise, we achieve a BLEU-4 score of 26.99 on the MineDGS dataset and 25.09 on PHOENIX14T, two new state-of-the-art baselines.
abstract_zh: 神经手语制作（SLP）旨在自动将口语句子翻译成手语视频。从历史上看，SLP 任务分为两个步骤：首先，将口语句子翻译为注释序列，其次，根据注释序列生成手语视频。在本文中，我们将自然语言处理技术应用于 SLP 管道的第一步。我们使用 BERT 和 Word2Vec 等语言模型来创建更好的句子级嵌入，并应用多种标记化技术，展示这些技术如何提高 Text to Gloss 低资源翻译任务的性能。我们介绍了文本到 HamNoSys (T2H) 翻译，并展示了使用语音表示进行手语翻译而不是使用符号级注释表示的优势。此外，我们使用 HamNoSys 提取手势的手形，并将其用作训练期间的额外监督，进一步提高 T2H 的性能。通过整合最佳实践，我们在 MineDGS 数据集上获得了 26.99 的 BLEU-4 分数，在 PHOENIX14T 上获得了 25.09 的 BLEU-4 分数，这两个新的最先进的基线。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过自然语言处理技术改进神经手语生成（SLP）中的文本到手语符号（Gloss）翻译任务。
AI.motivation: 传统SLP方法在低资源场景下表现不佳，且手语符号表示方式存在局限性，需探索更高效的语言表示和翻译策略。
AI.method: 采用BERT和Word2Vec生成句子嵌入，结合多种分词技术；引入基于音素的手语符号表示（HamNoSys），并利用手部形状信息作为训练监督。
AI.result: 在MineDGS和PHOENIX14T数据集上分别达到BLEU-4得分26.99和25.09，建立新的SOTA基线。
AI.conclusion: 基于音素表示和多模态监督的改进方法显著提升了文本到手语符号的翻译性能，为SLP任务提供了新方向。

authors_text: Bin Xiao,Chien-Liang Liu,Wen-Hoar Hsaio
title: Semantic Cross Attention for Few-shot Learning
title_zh: 用于小样本学习的语义交叉注意力
abstract: Few-shot learning (FSL) has attracted considerable attention recently. Among existing approaches, the metric-based method aims to train an embedding network that can make similar samples close while dissimilar samples as far as possible and achieves promising results. FSL is characterized by using only a few images to train a model that can generalize to novel classes in image classification problems, but this setting makes it difficult to learn the visual features that can identify the images' appearance variations. The model training is likely to move in the wrong direction, as the images in an identical semantic class may have dissimilar appearances, whereas the images in different semantic classes may share a similar appearance. We argue that FSL can benefit from additional semantic features to learn discriminative feature representations. Thus, this study proposes a multi-task learning approach to view semantic features of label text as an auxiliary task to help boost the performance of the FSL task. Our proposed model uses word-embedding representations as semantic features to help train the embedding network and a semantic cross-attention module to bridge the semantic features into the typical visual modal. The proposed approach is simple, but produces excellent results. We apply our proposed approach to two previous metric-based FSL methods, all of which can substantially improve performance. The source code for our model is accessible from github.
summary: Few-shot learning (FSL) has attracted considerable attention recently. Among existing approaches, the metric-based method aims to train an embedding network that can make similar samples close while dissimilar samples as far as possible and achieves promising results. FSL is characterized by using only a few images to train a model that can generalize to novel classes in image classification problems, but this setting makes it difficult to learn the visual features that can identify the images' appearance variations. The model training is likely to move in the wrong direction, as the images in an identical semantic class may have dissimilar appearances, whereas the images in different semantic classes may share a similar appearance. We argue that FSL can benefit from additional semantic features to learn discriminative feature representations. Thus, this study proposes a multi-task learning approach to view semantic features of label text as an auxiliary task to help boost the performance of the FSL task. Our proposed model uses word-embedding representations as semantic features to help train the embedding network and a semantic cross-attention module to bridge the semantic features into the typical visual modal. The proposed approach is simple, but produces excellent results. We apply our proposed approach to two previous metric-based FSL methods, all of which can substantially improve performance. The source code for our model is accessible from github.
abstract_zh: 小样本学习（FSL）最近引起了相当大的关注。在现有的方法中，基于度量的方法旨在训练一个嵌入网络，使相似样本尽可能接近，而不同样本尽可能接近，并取得有希望的结果。 FSL 的特点是仅使用少量图像来训练模型，该模型可以泛化到图像分类问题中的新类别，但这种设置使得学习可以识别图像外观变化的视觉特征变得困难。模型训练可能会朝着错误的方向发展，因为同一语义类别中的图像可能具有不同的外观，而不同语义类别中的图像可能具有相似的外观。我们认为 FSL 可以受益于额外的语义特征来学习判别性特征表示。因此，本研究提出了一种多任务学习方法，将标签文本的语义特征视为辅助任务，以帮助提高 FSL 任务的性能。我们提出的模型使用词嵌入表示作为语义特征来帮助训练嵌入网络和语义交叉注意模块以将语义特征桥接到典型的视觉模式中。所提出的方法很简单，但产生了出色的结果。我们将我们提出的方法应用于之前两种基于度量的 FSL 方法，所有这些方法都可以显着提高性能。我们模型的源代码可以从 github 访问。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合语义特征的少样本学习方法，通过语义交叉注意力机制提升模型对图像外观变化的判别能力。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本学习方法在少量样本下难以捕捉语义类别的外观差异，导致同类图像外观差异大、异类图像外观相似的问题。
AI.method: 设计多任务学习框架，利用词嵌入提取文本语义特征，并通过语义交叉注意力模块将语义信息与视觉特征融合。
AI.result: 该方法在两个基准模型上均显著提升少样本分类性能，代码已开源验证有效性。
AI.conclusion: 引入语义特征可有效增强少样本学习的判别能力，简单且通用的跨模态注意力机制具有广泛适用性。

authors_text: Pakorn Uttayopas,Xiaoxiao Cheng,Udaya Bhaskar Rongala,Henrik Jörntell,Etienne Burdet
title: Dynamic neuronal networks efficiently achieve classification in robotic interactions with real-world objects
title_zh: 动态神经网络有效地实现机器人与现实世界物体交互的分类
comment: 9 pages, 8 figures.aim to use it for ph-coding reporting and further
comments: 9 pages, 8 figures.aim to use it for ph-coding reporting and further
abstract: Biological cortical networks are potentially fully recurrent networks without any distinct output layer, where recognition may instead rely on the distribution of activity across its neurons. Because such biological networks can have rich dynamics, they are well-designed to cope with dynamical interactions of the types that occur in nature, while traditional machine learning networks may struggle to make sense of such data. Here we connected a simple model neuronal network (based on the 'linear summation neuron model' featuring biologically realistic dynamics (LSM), consisting of 10 of excitatory and 10 inhibitory neurons, randomly connected) to a robot finger with multiple types of force sensors when interacting with materials of different levels of compliance. Scope: to explore the performance of the network on classification accuracy. Therefore, we compared the performance of the network output with principal component analysis of statistical features of the sensory data as well as its mechanical properties. Remarkably, even though the LSM was a very small and untrained network, and merely designed to provide rich internal network dynamics while the neuron model itself was highly simplified, we found that the LSM outperformed these other statistical approaches in terms of accuracy.
summary: Biological cortical networks are potentially fully recurrent networks without any distinct output layer, where recognition may instead rely on the distribution of activity across its neurons. Because such biological networks can have rich dynamics, they are well-designed to cope with dynamical interactions of the types that occur in nature, while traditional machine learning networks may struggle to make sense of such data. Here we connected a simple model neuronal network (based on the 'linear summation neuron model' featuring biologically realistic dynamics (LSM), consisting of 10 of excitatory and 10 inhibitory neurons, randomly connected) to a robot finger with multiple types of force sensors when interacting with materials of different levels of compliance. Scope: to explore the performance of the network on classification accuracy. Therefore, we compared the performance of the network output with principal component analysis of statistical features of the sensory data as well as its mechanical properties. Remarkably, even though the LSM was a very small and untrained network, and merely designed to provide rich internal network dynamics while the neuron model itself was highly simplified, we found that the LSM outperformed these other statistical approaches in terms of accuracy.
abstract_zh: 生物皮层网络是潜在的完全循环网络，没有任何不同的输出层，其中识别可能依赖于其神经元的活动分布。由于此类生物网络可以具有丰富的动态，因此它们经过精心设计，可以应对自然界中发生的类型的动态交互，而传统的机器学习网络可能难以理解此类数据。在这里，我们将一个简单的模型神经元网络（基于具有生物现实动力学（LSM）的“线性求和神经元模型”，由随机连接的 10 个兴奋性神经元和 10 个抑制性神经元组成）与具有多种类型的力传感器的机器人手指连接，当与不同顺应性级别的材料交互时。范围：探讨网络对分类准确率的表现。因此，我们将网络输出的性能与传感数据的统计特征及其机械性能的主成分分析进行比较。值得注意的是，尽管 LSM 是一个非常小的且未经训练的网络，并且仅仅旨在提供丰富的内部网络动态，而神经元模型本身被高度简化，但我们发现 LSM 在准确性方面优于这些其他统计方法。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究动态神经网络在机器人与真实世界物体交互中的分类性能。
AI.motivation: 生物皮层网络具有丰富的动态特性，可能比传统机器学习方法更擅长处理自然界的动态交互数据。
AI.method: 将基于生物真实动态的线性求和神经元模型（LSM）连接到装有多种力传感器的机械手指，通过比较LSM输出与主成分分析及机械特性分析的分类准确性进行评估。
AI.result: 未经过训练的微型LSM网络在分类准确率上优于传统统计方法。
AI.conclusion: 动态神经网络能高效实现机器人对现实物体的分类，为类脑计算提供新思路。

authors_text: Yitian Liu,Zhouhui Lian
title: FontTransformer: Few-shot High-resolution Chinese Glyph Image Synthesis via Stacked Transformers
title_zh: FontTransformer：通过堆叠变压器进行少量高分辨率中文字形图像合成
abstract: Automatic generation of high-quality Chinese fonts from a few online training samples is a challenging task, especially when the amount of samples is very small. Existing few-shot font generation methods can only synthesize low-resolution glyph images that often possess incorrect topological structures or/and incomplete strokes. To address the problem, this paper proposes FontTransformer, a novel few-shot learning model, for high-resolution Chinese glyph image synthesis by using stacked Transformers. The key idea is to apply the parallel Transformer to avoid the accumulation of prediction errors and utilize the serial Transformer to enhance the quality of synthesized strokes. Meanwhile, we also design a novel encoding scheme to feed more glyph information and prior knowledge to our model, which further enables the generation of high-resolution and visually-pleasing glyph images. Both qualitative and quantitative experimental results demonstrate the superiority of our method compared to other existing approaches in the few-shot Chinese font synthesis task.
summary: Automatic generation of high-quality Chinese fonts from a few online training samples is a challenging task, especially when the amount of samples is very small. Existing few-shot font generation methods can only synthesize low-resolution glyph images that often possess incorrect topological structures or/and incomplete strokes. To address the problem, this paper proposes FontTransformer, a novel few-shot learning model, for high-resolution Chinese glyph image synthesis by using stacked Transformers. The key idea is to apply the parallel Transformer to avoid the accumulation of prediction errors and utilize the serial Transformer to enhance the quality of synthesized strokes. Meanwhile, we also design a novel encoding scheme to feed more glyph information and prior knowledge to our model, which further enables the generation of high-resolution and visually-pleasing glyph images. Both qualitative and quantitative experimental results demonstrate the superiority of our method compared to other existing approaches in the few-shot Chinese font synthesis task.
abstract_zh: 从少量在线训练样本自动生成高质量的中文字体是一项具有挑战性的任务，特别是当样本量非常小时。现有的少样本字体生成方法只能合成低分辨率的字形图像，这些图像通常具有不正确的拓扑结构或/和不完整的笔画。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了 FontTransformer，一种新颖的少样本学习模型，通过使用堆叠 Transformer 来合成高分辨率中文字形图像。其核心思想是应用并行Transformer来避免预测误差的累积，并利用串行Transformer来提高合成笔划的质量。同时，我们还设计了一种新颖的编码方案，为我们的模型提供更多的字形信息和先验知识，这进一步能够生成高分辨率且视觉上令人愉悦的字形图像。定性和定量实验结果都证明了我们的方法在少样本中文字体合成任务中相对于其他现有方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FontTransformer模型，通过堆叠Transformer实现基于少量样本的高分辨率汉字字形图像合成。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本字体生成方法生成的字形图像分辨率低且存在拓扑结构错误或笔画不完整问题，亟需提升生成质量与分辨率的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用并行Transformer避免预测误差累积，串行Transformer增强笔画质量，并设计新型编码方案注入更多字形信息与先验知识。
AI.result: 定性与定量实验均表明该方法在少样本汉字字体合成任务中优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: FontTransformer通过堆叠Transformer架构与编码优化，有效解决了少样本条件下高分辨率汉字字形生成的难题。

authors_text: Louis Ohl,Pierre-Alexandre Mattei,Charles Bouveyron,Warith Harchaoui,Mickaël Leclercq,Arnaud Droit,Frederic Precioso
title: Generalised Mutual Information for Discriminative Clustering
title_zh: 判别聚类的广义互信息
comment: To be published in Neural Information Processing Systems 2022
comments: To be published in Neural Information Processing Systems 2022
abstract: In the last decade, recent successes in deep clustering majorly involved the mutual information (MI) as an unsupervised objective for training neural networks with increasing regularisations. While the quality of the regularisations have been largely discussed for improvements, little attention has been dedicated to the relevance of MI as a clustering objective. In this paper, we first highlight how the maximisation of MI does not lead to satisfying clusters. We identified the Kullback-Leibler divergence as the main reason of this behaviour. Hence, we generalise the mutual information by changing its core distance, introducing the generalised mutual information (GEMINI): a set of metrics for unsupervised neural network training. Unlike MI, some GEMINIs do not require regularisations when training. Some of these metrics are geometry-aware thanks to distances or kernels in the data space. Finally, we highlight that GEMINIs can automatically select a relevant number of clusters, a property that has been little studied in deep clustering context where the number of clusters is a priori unknown.
summary: In the last decade, recent successes in deep clustering majorly involved the mutual information (MI) as an unsupervised objective for training neural networks with increasing regularisations. While the quality of the regularisations have been largely discussed for improvements, little attention has been dedicated to the relevance of MI as a clustering objective. In this paper, we first highlight how the maximisation of MI does not lead to satisfying clusters. We identified the Kullback-Leibler divergence as the main reason of this behaviour. Hence, we generalise the mutual information by changing its core distance, introducing the generalised mutual information (GEMINI): a set of metrics for unsupervised neural network training. Unlike MI, some GEMINIs do not require regularisations when training. Some of these metrics are geometry-aware thanks to distances or kernels in the data space. Finally, we highlight that GEMINIs can automatically select a relevant number of clusters, a property that has been little studied in deep clustering context where the number of clusters is a priori unknown.
abstract_zh: 在过去的十年中，深度聚类最近的成功主要涉及互信息（MI）作为训练神经网络的无监督目标，并增加正则化。虽然人们广泛讨论了正则化的质量以寻求改进，但很少有人关注 MI 作为聚类目标的相关性。在本文中，我们首先强调 MI 的最大化如何不会导致令人满意的聚类。我们认为 Kullback-Leibler 分歧是这种行为的主要原因。因此，我们通过改变其核心距离来概括互信息，引入广义互信息（GEMINI）：一组用于无监督神经网络训练的指标。与 MI 不同，一些 GEMINI 在训练时不需要正则化。由于数据空间中的距离或内核，其中一些度量是几何感知的。最后，我们强调 GEMINI 可以自动选择相关数量的簇，这一特性在深度聚类环境中很少被研究，其中簇的数量是先验未知的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种广义互信息（GEMINI）方法，用于改进深度聚类中互信息作为聚类目标的不足，通过改变核心距离实现更优的聚类效果。
AI.motivation: 传统深度聚类中互信息最大化存在聚类效果不佳的问题，主要归因于KL散度的影响，需寻找更有效的聚类目标函数。
AI.method: 通过改变互信息的核心距离，提出广义互信息（GEMINI）系列度量，部分度量无需正则化，利用数据空间距离或核函数实现几何感知，并具备自动选择聚类数的能力。
AI.result: GEMINI方法在无需正则化时表现更优，部分度量能自动确定聚类数量，解决了传统深度聚类中聚类数需预先设定的难题。
AI.conclusion: GEMINI作为新型度量标准，有效改进了深度聚类效果，克服了传统互信息的局限性，并具备自动选择聚类数的特性。

ai_content_json.conclusion: GEMINI作为新型度量标准，有效改进了深度聚类效果，克服了传统互信息的局限性，并具备自动选择聚类数的特性。

tldr: 本文提出了一种广义互信息（GEMINI）方法，用于改进深度聚类中互信息作为聚类目标的不足，通过改变核心距离实现更优的聚类效果。
motivation: 传统深度聚类中互信息最大化存在聚类效果不佳的问题，主要归因于KL散度的影响，需寻找更有效的聚类目标函数。
method: 通过改变互信息的核心距离，提出广义互信息（GEMINI）系列度量，部分度量无需正则化，利用数据空间距离或核函数实现几何感知，并具备自动选择聚类数的能力。
result: GEMINI方法在无需正则化时表现更优，部分度量能自动确定聚类数量，解决了传统深度聚类中聚类数需预先设定的难题。
conclusion: GEMINI作为新型度量标准，有效改进了深度聚类效果，克服了传统互信息的局限性，并具备自动选择聚类数的特性。
search_text: Generalised Mutual Information for Discriminative Clustering 判别聚类的广义互信息 In the last decade, recent successes in deep clustering majorly involved the mutual information (MI) as an unsupervised objective for training neural networks with increasing regularisations. While the quality of the regularisations have been largely discussed for improvements, little attention has been dedicated to the relevance of MI as a clustering objective. In this paper, we first highlight how the maximisation of MI does not lead to satisfying clusters. We identified the Kullback-Leibler divergence as the main reason of this behaviour. Hence, we generalise the mutual information by changing its core distance, introducing the generalised mutual information (GEMINI): a set of metrics for unsupervised neural network training. Unlike MI, some GEMINIs do not require regularisations when training. Some of these metrics are geometry-aware thanks to distances or kernels in the data space. Finally, we highlight that GEMINIs can automatically select a relevant number of clusters, a property that has been little studied in deep clustering context where the number of clusters is a priori unknown. 在过去的十年中，深度聚类最近的成功主要涉及互信息（MI）作为训练神经网络的无监督目标，并增加正则化。虽然人们广泛讨论了正则化的质量以寻求改进，但很少有人关注 MI 作为聚类目标的相关性。在本文中，我们首先强调 MI 的最大化如何不会导致令人满意的聚类。我们认为 Kullback-Leibler 分歧是这种行为的主要原因。因此，我们通过改变其核心距离来概括互信息，引入广义互信息（GEMINI）：一组用于无监督神经网络训练的指标。与 MI 不同，一些 GEMINI 在训练时不需要正则化。由于数据空间中的距离或内核，其中一些度量是几何感知的。最后，我们强调 GEMINI 可以自动选择相关数量的簇，这一特性在深度聚类环境中很少被研究，其中簇的数量是先验未知的。 本文提出了一种广义互信息（GEMINI）方法，用于改进深度聚类中互信息作为聚类目标的不足，通过改变核心距离实现更优的聚类效果。 Louis Ohl,Pierre-Alexandre Mattei,Charles Bouveyron,Warith Harchaoui,Mickaël Leclercq,Arnaud Droit,Frederic Precioso stat.ML,cs.AI,cs.IT,cs.LG,stat.ME

authors_text: Marawan Gamal Abdel Hameed,Ali Mosleh,Marzieh S. Tahaei,Vahid Partovi Nia
title: SeKron: A Decomposition Method Supporting Many Factorization Structures
title_zh: SeKron：一种支持多种因式分解结构的分解方法
abstract: While convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have become the de facto standard for most image processing and computer vision applications, their deployment on edge devices remains challenging. Tensor decomposition methods provide a means of compressing CNNs to meet the wide range of device constraints by imposing certain factorization structures on their convolution tensors. However, being limited to the small set of factorization structures presented by state-of-the-art decomposition approaches can lead to sub-optimal performance. We propose SeKron, a novel tensor decomposition method that offers a wide variety of factorization structures, using sequences of Kronecker products. By recursively finding approximating Kronecker factors, we arrive at optimal decompositions for each of the factorization structures. We show that SeKron is a flexible decomposition that generalizes widely used methods, such as Tensor-Train (TT), Tensor-Ring (TR), Canonical Polyadic (CP) and Tucker decompositions. Crucially, we derive an efficient convolution projection algorithm shared by all SeKron structures, leading to seamless compression of CNN models. We validate SeKron for model compression on both high-level and low-level computer vision tasks and find that it outperforms state-of-the-art decomposition methods.
summary: While convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have become the de facto standard for most image processing and computer vision applications, their deployment on edge devices remains challenging. Tensor decomposition methods provide a means of compressing CNNs to meet the wide range of device constraints by imposing certain factorization structures on their convolution tensors. However, being limited to the small set of factorization structures presented by state-of-the-art decomposition approaches can lead to sub-optimal performance. We propose SeKron, a novel tensor decomposition method that offers a wide variety of factorization structures, using sequences of Kronecker products. By recursively finding approximating Kronecker factors, we arrive at optimal decompositions for each of the factorization structures. We show that SeKron is a flexible decomposition that generalizes widely used methods, such as Tensor-Train (TT), Tensor-Ring (TR), Canonical Polyadic (CP) and Tucker decompositions. Crucially, we derive an efficient convolution projection algorithm shared by all SeKron structures, leading to seamless compression of CNN models. We validate SeKron for model compression on both high-level and low-level computer vision tasks and find that it outperforms state-of-the-art decomposition methods.
abstract_zh: 虽然卷积神经网络 (CNN) 已成为大多数图像处理和计算机视觉应用的事实上的标准，但它们在边缘设备上的部署仍然具有挑战性。张量分解方法提供了一种压缩 CNN 的方法，通过在卷积张量上施加某些因式分解结构来满足各种设备约束。然而，仅限于由最先进的分解方法呈现的一小组因式分解结构可能会导致性能次优。我们提出了 SeKron，一种新颖的张量分解方法，它使用克罗内克乘积序列提供多种因式分解结构。通过递归地寻找近似克罗内克因子，我们得出每个因式分解结构的最佳分解。我们证明 SeKron 是一种灵活的分解，它概括了广泛使用的方法，例如张量训练（TT）、张量环（TR）、正则多元（CP）和塔克分解。至关重要的是，我们推导出所有 SeKron 结构共享的高效卷积投影算法，从而实现 CNN 模型的无缝压缩。我们在高级和低级计算机视觉任务上验证 SeKron 的模型压缩，发现它优于最先进的分解方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为SeKron的张量分解方法，通过序列化Kronecker积实现多种分解结构，以高效压缩卷积神经网络（CNN）模型。
AI.motivation: 现有张量分解方法受限于固定的分解结构，导致CNN模型压缩效果不佳，难以满足边缘设备的部署需求。
AI.method: SeKron利用递归寻找近似Kronecker因子的方式，支持包括Tensor-Train、Tensor-Ring等在内的多种分解结构，并设计统一的卷积投影算法实现模型压缩。
AI.result: 实验表明，SeKron在高低层次计算机视觉任务中均优于现有分解方法，显著提升压缩效率与模型性能。
AI.conclusion: SeKron通过灵活的分解结构和高效算法，为CNN模型压缩提供了更优解决方案，适用于资源受限的边缘设备场景。

authors_text: Yiqun Duan,Zhen Wang,Yi Li,Jianhang Tang,Yu-Kai Wang,Chin-Teng Lin
title: Cross Task Neural Architecture Search for EEG Signal Classifications
title_zh: EEG 信号分类的跨任务神经架构搜索
abstract: Electroencephalograms (EEGs) are brain dynamics measured outside the brain, which have been widely utilized in non-invasive brain-computer interface applications. Recently, various neural network approaches have been proposed to improve the accuracy of EEG signal recognition. However, these approaches severely rely on manually designed network structures for different tasks which generally are not sharing the same empirical design cross-task-wise. In this paper, we propose a cross-task neural architecture search (CTNAS-EEG) framework for EEG signal recognition, which can automatically design the network structure across tasks and improve the recognition accuracy of EEG signals. Specifically, a compatible search space for cross-task searching and an efficient constrained searching method is proposed to overcome challenges brought by EEG signals. By unifying structure search on different EEG tasks, this work is the first to explore and analyze the searched structure difference cross-task-wise. Moreover, by introducing architecture search, this work is the first to analyze model performance by customizing model structure for each human subject. Detailed experimental results suggest that the proposed CTNAS-EEG could reach state-of-the-art performance on different EEG tasks, such as Motor Imagery (MI) and Emotion recognition. Extensive experiments and detailed analysis are provided as a good reference for follow-up researchers.
summary: Electroencephalograms (EEGs) are brain dynamics measured outside the brain, which have been widely utilized in non-invasive brain-computer interface applications. Recently, various neural network approaches have been proposed to improve the accuracy of EEG signal recognition. However, these approaches severely rely on manually designed network structures for different tasks which generally are not sharing the same empirical design cross-task-wise. In this paper, we propose a cross-task neural architecture search (CTNAS-EEG) framework for EEG signal recognition, which can automatically design the network structure across tasks and improve the recognition accuracy of EEG signals. Specifically, a compatible search space for cross-task searching and an efficient constrained searching method is proposed to overcome challenges brought by EEG signals. By unifying structure search on different EEG tasks, this work is the first to explore and analyze the searched structure difference cross-task-wise. Moreover, by introducing architecture search, this work is the first to analyze model performance by customizing model structure for each human subject. Detailed experimental results suggest that the proposed CTNAS-EEG could reach state-of-the-art performance on different EEG tasks, such as Motor Imagery (MI) and Emotion recognition. Extensive experiments and detailed analysis are provided as a good reference for follow-up researchers.
abstract_zh: 脑电图（EEG）是在大脑外部测量的大脑动态，已广泛应用于非侵入性脑机接口应用。最近，已经提出了各种神经网络方法来提高脑电图信号识别的准确性。然而，这些方法严重依赖于针对不同任务手动设计的网络结构，这些网络结构通常不跨任务共享相同的经验设计。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于脑电信号识别的跨任务神经架构搜索（CTNAS-EEG）框架，该框架可以自动设计跨任务的网络结构，提高脑电信号的识别精度。具体来说，提出了用于跨任务搜索的兼容搜索空间和有效的约束搜索方法来克服脑电信号带来的挑战。通过统一不同脑电图任务上的结构搜索，这项工作首次探索和分析了跨任务的搜索结构差异。此外，通过引入架构搜索，这项工作首次通过为每个人类受试者定制模型结构来分析模型性能。详细的实验结果表明，所提出的 CTNAS-EEG 可以在不同的 EEG 任务上达到最先进的性能，例如运动想象（MI）和情绪识别。大量的实验和详细的分析为后续研究人员提供了很好的参考。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种跨任务神经网络架构搜索框架CTNAS-EEG，用于自动设计EEG信号分类的网络结构以提高识别准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有EEG信号分类方法依赖人工设计的网络结构，不同任务间缺乏共享设计经验，导致效率低下且难以适应个体差异。
AI.method: 构建兼容跨任务搜索的统一结构空间，结合高效约束搜索算法，首次实现跨任务结构差异分析与个性化模型定制。
AI.result: 在运动想象(MI)和情绪识别等任务中达到SOTA性能，实验验证了方法在多任务和多受试者场景下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: CTNAS-EEG通过自动化架构搜索显著提升EEG分类性能，为后续研究提供了跨任务结构分析和个性化建模的新方向。

Moreover, by introducing architecture search, this work is the first to analyze model performance by customizing model structure for each human subject. Detailed experimental results suggest that the proposed CTNAS-EEG could reach state-of-the-art performance on different EEG tasks, such as Motor Imagery (MI) and Emotion recognition. Extensive experiments and detailed analysis are provided as a good reference for follow-up researchers. 脑电图（EEG）是在大脑外部测量的大脑动态，已广泛应用于非侵入性脑机接口应用。最近，已经提出了各种神经网络方法来提高脑电图信号识别的准确性。然而，这些方法严重依赖于针对不同任务手动设计的网络结构，这些网络结构通常不跨任务共享相同的经验设计。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于脑电信号识别的跨任务神经架构搜索（CTNAS-EEG）框架，该框架可以自动设计跨任务的网络结构，提高脑电信号的识别精度。具体来说，提出了用于跨任务搜索的兼容搜索空间和有效的约束搜索方法来克服脑电信号带来的挑战。通过统一不同脑电图任务上的结构搜索，这项工作首次探索和分析了跨任务的搜索结构差异。此外，通过引入架构搜索，这项工作首次通过为每个人类受试者定制模型结构来分析模型性能。详细的实验结果表明，所提出的 CTNAS-EEG 可以在不同的 EEG 任务上达到最先进的性能，例如运动想象（MI）和情绪识别。大量的实验和详细的分析为后续研究人员提供了很好的参考。 本文提出了一种跨任务神经网络架构搜索框架CTNAS-EEG，用于自动设计EEG信号分类的网络结构以提高识别准确率。 Yiqun Duan,Zhen Wang,Yi Li,Jianhang Tang,Yu-Kai Wang,Chin-Teng Lin eess.SP,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Thinh Phan,Duc Le,Patel Brijesh,Donald Adjeroh,Jingxian Wu,Morten Olgaard Jensen,Ngan Le
title: Multimodality Multi-Lead ECG Arrhythmia Classification using Self-Supervised Learning
title_zh: 使用自我监督学习的多模态多导联心电图心律失常分类
abstract: Electrocardiogram (ECG) signal is one of the most effective sources of information mainly employed for the diagnosis and prediction of cardiovascular diseases (CVDs) connected with the abnormalities in heart rhythm. Clearly, single modality ECG (i.e. time series) cannot convey its complete characteristics, thus, exploiting both time and time-frequency modalities in the form of time-series data and spectrogram is needed. Leveraging the cutting-edge self-supervised learning (SSL) technique on unlabeled data, we propose SSL-based multimodality ECG classification. Our proposed network follows SSL learning paradigm and consists of two modules corresponding to pre-stream task, and down-stream task, respectively. In the SSL-pre-stream task, we utilize self-knowledge distillation (KD) techniques with no labeled data, on various transformations and in both time and frequency domains. In the down-stream task, which is trained on labeled data, we propose a gate fusion mechanism to fuse information from multimodality.To evaluate the effectiveness of our approach, ten-fold cross validation on the 12-lead PhysioNet 2020 dataset has been conducted.
summary: Electrocardiogram (ECG) signal is one of the most effective sources of information mainly employed for the diagnosis and prediction of cardiovascular diseases (CVDs) connected with the abnormalities in heart rhythm. Clearly, single modality ECG (i.e. time series) cannot convey its complete characteristics, thus, exploiting both time and time-frequency modalities in the form of time-series data and spectrogram is needed. Leveraging the cutting-edge self-supervised learning (SSL) technique on unlabeled data, we propose SSL-based multimodality ECG classification. Our proposed network follows SSL learning paradigm and consists of two modules corresponding to pre-stream task, and down-stream task, respectively. In the SSL-pre-stream task, we utilize self-knowledge distillation (KD) techniques with no labeled data, on various transformations and in both time and frequency domains. In the down-stream task, which is trained on labeled data, we propose a gate fusion mechanism to fuse information from multimodality.To evaluate the effectiveness of our approach, ten-fold cross validation on the 12-lead PhysioNet 2020 dataset has been conducted.
abstract_zh: 心电图（ECG）信号是最有效的信息来源之一，主要用于诊断和预测与心律异常相关的心血管疾病（CVD）。显然，单一模态心电图（即时间​​序列）无法表达其完整特征，因此需要以时间序列数据和频谱图的形式利用时间和时频模态。利用针对未标记数据的尖端自监督学习 (SSL) 技术，我们提出了基于 SSL 的多模态心电图分类。我们提出的网络遵循 SSL 学习范式，由分别对应于预流任务和下游任务的两个模块组成。在 SSL 预流任务中，我们在时域和频域的各种变换上利用无标记数据的自知识蒸馏 (KD) 技术。在使用标记数据进行训练的下游任务中，我们提出了一种门融合机制来融合来自多模态的信息。为了评估我们方法的有效性，我们对 12 导联 PhysioNet 2020 数据集进行了十倍交叉验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自监督学习的多模态多导联心电图（ECG）心律失常分类方法。
AI.motivation: 单模态ECG信号无法完全反映其特征，因此需要结合时间序列和时频域（如频谱图）的多模态数据。此外，利用自监督学习可以有效利用未标记数据。
AI.method: 该方法采用自监督学习框架，分为预训练阶段和下游任务阶段。预训练阶段利用自知识蒸馏技术在无标签数据上进行训练；下游任务阶段采用门控融合机制对多模态信息进行融合，并在标记数据上进行训练。
AI.result: 在12导联PhysioNet 2020数据集上进行的十折交叉验证结果表明，该方法在心律失常分类任务中表现良好。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的基于自监督学习的多模态ECG分类方法在心律失常检测任务中具有较高的有效性，为ECG信号分析提供了新的思路。

authors_text: Di Wu,Jie Yang,Mohamad Sawan
title: Transfer Learning on Electromyography (EMG) Tasks: Approaches and Beyond
title_zh: 肌电图 (EMG) 任务的迁移学习：方法及其他
abstract: Machine learning on electromyography (EMG) has recently achieved remarkable success on a variety of tasks, while such success relies heavily on the assumption that the training and future data must be of the same data distribution. However, this assumption may not hold in many real-world applications. Model calibration is required via data re-collection and label annotation, which is generally very expensive and time-consuming. To address this problem, transfer learning (TL), which aims to improve target learners' performance by transferring the knowledge from related source domains, is emerging as a new paradigm to reduce the amount of calibration effort. In this survey, we assess the eligibility of more than fifty published peer-reviewed representative transfer learning approaches for EMG applications. Unlike previous surveys on purely transfer learning or EMG-based machine learning, this survey aims to provide an insight into the biological foundations of existing transfer learning methods on EMG-related analysis. In specific, we first introduce the physiological structure of the muscles and the EMG generating mechanism, and the recording of EMG to provide biological insights behind existing transfer learning approaches. Further, we categorize existing research endeavors into data based, model based, training scheme based, and adversarial based. This survey systematically summarizes and categorizes existing transfer learning approaches for EMG related machine learning applications. In addition, we discuss possible drawbacks of existing works and point out the future direction of better EMG transfer learning algorithms to enhance practicality for real-world applications.
summary: Machine learning on electromyography (EMG) has recently achieved remarkable success on a variety of tasks, while such success relies heavily on the assumption that the training and future data must be of the same data distribution. However, this assumption may not hold in many real-world applications. Model calibration is required via data re-collection and label annotation, which is generally very expensive and time-consuming. To address this problem, transfer learning (TL), which aims to improve target learners' performance by transferring the knowledge from related source domains, is emerging as a new paradigm to reduce the amount of calibration effort. In this survey, we assess the eligibility of more than fifty published peer-reviewed representative transfer learning approaches for EMG applications. Unlike previous surveys on purely transfer learning or EMG-based machine learning, this survey aims to provide an insight into the biological foundations of existing transfer learning methods on EMG-related analysis. In specific, we first introduce the physiological structure of the muscles and the EMG generating mechanism, and the recording of EMG to provide biological insights behind existing transfer learning approaches. Further, we categorize existing research endeavors into data based, model based, training scheme based, and adversarial based. This survey systematically summarizes and categorizes existing transfer learning approaches for EMG related machine learning applications. In addition, we discuss possible drawbacks of existing works and point out the future direction of better EMG transfer learning algorithms to enhance practicality for real-world applications.
abstract_zh: 肌电图 (EMG) 机器学习最近在各种任务上取得了显着的成功，而这种成功在很大程度上依赖于训练数据和未来数据必须具有相同数据分布的假设。然而，这种假设在许多实际应用中可能并不成立。模型校准需要通过数据重新收集和标签标注来进行，这通常非常昂贵且耗时。为了解决这个问题，迁移学习（TL）作为一种减少校准工作量的新范式正在兴起，它的目的是通过迁移相关源领域的知识来提高目标学习者的表现。在这项调查中，我们评估了 50 多个已发表的经同行评审的代表性迁移学习方法用于 EMG 应用的资格。与之前纯粹迁移学习或基于肌电图的机器学习的调查不同，本次调查旨在深入了解现有迁移学习方法在肌电图相关分析上的生物学基础。具体来说，我们首先介绍肌肉的生理结构和肌电图生成机制，以及肌电图的记录，以提供现有迁移学习方法背后的生物学见解。此外，我们将现有的研究工作分类为基于数据、基于模型、基于训练方案和基于对抗性。这项调查系统地总结和分类了肌电图相关机器学习应用的现有迁移学习方法。此外，我们讨论了现有工作可能存在的缺点，并指出了更好的肌电图迁移学习算法的未来方向，以增强实际应用的实用性。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了超过50种用于肌电信号（EMG）任务的迁移学习方法，并探讨其生物学基础及未来方向。
AI.motivation: 传统EMG机器学习依赖训练数据与未来数据同分布的假设，但实际应用中数据分布可能变化，导致校准成本高昂，需通过迁移学习减少依赖。
AI.method: 从肌肉生理结构和EMG生成机制切入，将现有方法分为数据驱动、模型驱动、训练方案驱动和对抗驱动四类，并分析其优缺点。
AI.result: 系统分类了EMG迁移学习方法，总结了当前研究的局限性，并提出了提升实际应用可行性的未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 迁移学习为EMG任务提供了减少校准需求的新范式，但需进一步结合生物学特性优化算法以适应真实场景。

authors_text: Xinyao Hou,Shengmei Qin,Jianbo Su
title: Two-stream Network for ECG Signal Classification
title_zh: 用于心电信号分类的双流网络
abstract: Electrocardiogram (ECG), a technique for medical monitoring of cardiac activity, is an important method for identifying cardiovascular disease. However, analyzing the increasing quantity of ECG data consumes a lot of medical resources. This paper explores an effective algorithm for automatic classifications of multi-classes of heartbeat types based on ECG. Most neural network based methods target the individual heartbeats, ignoring the secrets embedded in the temporal sequence. And the ECG signal has temporal variation and unique individual characteristics, which means that the same type of ECG signal varies among patients under different physical conditions. A two-stream architecture is used in this paper and presents an enhanced version of ECG recognition based on this. The architecture achieves classification of holistic ECG signal and individual heartbeat and incorporates identified and temporal stream networks. Identified networks are used to extract features of individual heartbeats, while temporal networks aim to extract temporal correlations between heartbeats. Results on the MIT-BIH Arrhythmia Database demonstrate that the proposed algorithm performs an accuracy of 99.38\%. In addition, the proposed algorithm reaches an 88.07\% positive accuracy on massive data in real life, showing that the proposed algorithm can efficiently categorize different classes of heartbeat with high diagnostic performance.
summary: Electrocardiogram (ECG), a technique for medical monitoring of cardiac activity, is an important method for identifying cardiovascular disease. However, analyzing the increasing quantity of ECG data consumes a lot of medical resources. This paper explores an effective algorithm for automatic classifications of multi-classes of heartbeat types based on ECG. Most neural network based methods target the individual heartbeats, ignoring the secrets embedded in the temporal sequence. And the ECG signal has temporal variation and unique individual characteristics, which means that the same type of ECG signal varies among patients under different physical conditions. A two-stream architecture is used in this paper and presents an enhanced version of ECG recognition based on this. The architecture achieves classification of holistic ECG signal and individual heartbeat and incorporates identified and temporal stream networks. Identified networks are used to extract features of individual heartbeats, while temporal networks aim to extract temporal correlations between heartbeats. Results on the MIT-BIH Arrhythmia Database demonstrate that the proposed algorithm performs an accuracy of 99.38\%. In addition, the proposed algorithm reaches an 88.07\% positive accuracy on massive data in real life, showing that the proposed algorithm can efficiently categorize different classes of heartbeat with high diagnostic performance.
abstract_zh: 心电图（ECG）是一种心脏活动的医学监测技术，是识别心血管疾病的重要方法。然而，分析不断增加的心电图数据消耗了大量的医疗资源。本文探讨了一种基于心电图的多类心跳类型自动分类的有效算法。大多数基于神经网络的方法都以个体心跳为目标，忽略了嵌入时间序列中的秘密。而且心电信号具有时间变化和独特的个体特征，这意味着同一类型的心电信号在不同身体条件下的患者之间存在差异。本文采用双流架构，并在此基础上提出了心电图识别的增强版本。该架构实现了整体心电图信号和个体心跳的分类，并结合了识别和时间流网络。识别网络用于提取个体心跳的特征，而时间网络旨在提取心跳之间的时间相关性。 MIT-BIH 心律失常数据库的结果表明，所提出的算法的准确度为 99.38%。此外，该算法在现实生活中的海量数据上达到了88.07％的阳性准确率，表明该算法可以有效地对不同类别的心跳进行分类，具有较高的诊断性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种双流网络架构，用于对心电图（ECG）信号进行多类别心跳类型分类。
AI.motivation: 传统神经网络方法仅关注单个心跳，忽略了ECG信号的时序特征和个体差异，导致分类效率不足。
AI.method: 采用双流架构，其中识别流提取单个心跳特征，时序流捕捉心跳间的时序关联，结合两种流的信息进行分类。
AI.result: 在MIT-BIH心律失常数据库中达到99.38%的准确率，在实际大规模数据中达到88.07%的正向准确率。
AI.conclusion: 双流网络能有效分类不同类别的心跳，具有高诊断性能和实际应用价值。

authors_text: Aurora Saibene,Silvia Corchs,Mirko Caglioni,Francesca Gasparini
title: The evolution of AI approaches for motor imagery EEG-based BCIs
title_zh: 基于运动想象脑电图的脑机接口人工智能方法的演变
comment: Submitted to Italian Workshop on Artificial Intelligence for Human Machine Interaction (AIxHMI 2022), December 02, 2022, Udine, Italy
comments: Submitted to Italian Workshop on Artificial Intelligence for Human Machine Interaction (AIxHMI 2022), December 02, 2022, Udine, Italy
abstract: The Motor Imagery (MI) electroencephalography (EEG) based Brain Computer Interfaces (BCIs) allow the direct communication between humans and machines by exploiting the neural pathways connected to motor imagination. Therefore, these systems open the possibility of developing applications that could span from the medical field to the entertainment industry. In this context, Artificial Intelligence (AI) approaches become of fundamental importance especially when wanting to provide a correct and coherent feedback to BCI users. Moreover, publicly available datasets in the field of MI EEG-based BCIs have been widely exploited to test new techniques from the AI domain. In this work, AI approaches applied to datasets collected in different years and with different devices but with coherent experimental paradigms are investigated with the aim of providing a concise yet sufficiently comprehensive survey on the evolution and influence of AI techniques on MI EEG-based BCI data.
summary: The Motor Imagery (MI) electroencephalography (EEG) based Brain Computer Interfaces (BCIs) allow the direct communication between humans and machines by exploiting the neural pathways connected to motor imagination. Therefore, these systems open the possibility of developing applications that could span from the medical field to the entertainment industry. In this context, Artificial Intelligence (AI) approaches become of fundamental importance especially when wanting to provide a correct and coherent feedback to BCI users. Moreover, publicly available datasets in the field of MI EEG-based BCIs have been widely exploited to test new techniques from the AI domain. In this work, AI approaches applied to datasets collected in different years and with different devices but with coherent experimental paradigms are investigated with the aim of providing a concise yet sufficiently comprehensive survey on the evolution and influence of AI techniques on MI EEG-based BCI data.
abstract_zh: 基于运动想象 (MI) 脑电图 (EEG) 的脑机接口 (BCI) 通过利用与运动想象力相关的神经通路，允许人与机器之间进行直接通信。因此，这些系统开启了开发从医疗领域到娱乐行业的应用程序的可能性。在这种背景下，人工智能 (AI) 方法变得至关重要，尤其是当想要向 BCI 用户提供正确且一致的反馈时。此外，基于 MI EEG 的 BCI 领域的公开数据集已被广泛用于测试 AI 领域的新技术。在这项工作中，研究了应用于不同年份、使用不同设备但具有连贯实验范式收集的数据集的人工智能方法，目的是就人工智能技术对基于 MI EEG 的 BCI 数据的演变和影响提供简洁但足够全面的调查。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了人工智能技术在基于运动想象脑电图（MI EEG）的脑机接口（BCI）中的应用演变及其对数据处理的影响。
AI.motivation: 运动想象EEG脑机接口需要有效的人工智能方法以提供准确反馈，且公开数据集为AI技术验证提供了基础，因此需系统分析AI技术的发展与应用。
AI.method: 通过分析不同年份和设备采集的、实验范式一致的公开数据集，调查AI技术在MI EEG BCI中的应用演变。
AI.result: 梳理了AI技术在MI EEG BCI中的发展历程，总结了不同算法对数据处理效果的影响及趋势。
AI.conclusion: 人工智能技术显著推动了MI EEG BCI的性能提升，未来需结合更复杂的模型与多模态数据进一步优化系统。

authors_text: Zhiying Song,Fuxi Wen,Hailiang Zhang,Jun Li
title: A Cooperative Perception System Robust to Localization Errors
title_zh: 一种对定位误差具有鲁棒性的协作感知系统
abstract: Cooperative perception is challenging for safety-critical autonomous driving applications.The errors in the shared position and pose cause an inaccurate relative transform estimation and disrupt the robust mapping of the Ego vehicle. We propose a distributed object-level cooperative perception system called OptiMatch, in which the detected 3D bounding boxes and local state information are shared between the connected vehicles. To correct the noisy relative transform, the local measurements of both connected vehicles (bounding boxes) are utilized, and an optimal transport theory-based algorithm is developed to filter out those objects jointly detected by the vehicles along with their correspondence, constructing an associated co-visible set. A correction transform is estimated from the matched object pairs and further applied to the noisy relative transform, followed by global fusion and dynamic mapping. Experiment results show that robust performance is achieved for different levels of location and heading errors, and the proposed framework outperforms the state-of-the-art benchmark fusion schemes, including early, late, and intermediate fusion, on average precision by a large margin when location and/or heading errors occur.
summary: Cooperative perception is challenging for safety-critical autonomous driving applications.The errors in the shared position and pose cause an inaccurate relative transform estimation and disrupt the robust mapping of the Ego vehicle. We propose a distributed object-level cooperative perception system called OptiMatch, in which the detected 3D bounding boxes and local state information are shared between the connected vehicles. To correct the noisy relative transform, the local measurements of both connected vehicles (bounding boxes) are utilized, and an optimal transport theory-based algorithm is developed to filter out those objects jointly detected by the vehicles along with their correspondence, constructing an associated co-visible set. A correction transform is estimated from the matched object pairs and further applied to the noisy relative transform, followed by global fusion and dynamic mapping. Experiment results show that robust performance is achieved for different levels of location and heading errors, and the proposed framework outperforms the state-of-the-art benchmark fusion schemes, including early, late, and intermediate fusion, on average precision by a large margin when location and/or heading errors occur.
abstract_zh: 协作感知对于安全关键的自动驾驶应用来说是一个挑战。共享位置和姿态中的错误会导致相对变换估计不准确，并破坏 Ego 车辆的鲁棒映射。我们提出了一种名为 OptiMatch 的分布式对象级协作感知系统，其中检测到的 3D 边界框和局部状态信息在联网车辆之间共享。为了校正噪声相对变换，利用两个连接车辆（边界框）的局部测量，并开发基于最佳传输理论的算法来过滤掉车辆共同检测到的那些对象及其对应关系，构建关联的共同可见集。根据匹配的对象对估计校正变换，并进一步应用于噪声相对变换，然后进行全局融合和动态映射。实验结果表明，对于不同级别的位置和航向误差，该框架都实现了稳健的性能，并且当发生位置和/或航向误差时，所提出的框架在平均精度上大大优于最先进的基准融合方案，包括早期、晚期和中间融合。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种抗定位误差的协作感知系统OptiMatch，通过共享车辆检测信息和最优运输算法提升自动驾驶的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 协作感知在自动驾驶中因定位误差导致相对变换估计不准确，影响地图构建和安全性，需解决多车协同下的误差校正问题。
AI.method: 设计分布式OptiMatch系统，共享3D包围框与本地状态信息，利用最优运输理论过滤共检测目标并构建关联集，通过匹配对象对估计校正变换后进行全局融合。
AI.result: 实验显示系统在定位/航向误差下保持鲁棒性，平均精度显著优于早期、晚期及中间融合等现有方案。
AI.conclusion: OptiMatch框架有效缓解定位误差影响，为多车协作感知提供更精确的动态映射与目标检测方法。

tldr: 本文提出一种抗定位误差的协作感知系统OptiMatch，通过共享车辆检测信息和最优运输算法提升自动驾驶的鲁棒性。
motivation: 协作感知在自动驾驶中因定位误差导致相对变换估计不准确，影响地图构建和安全性，需解决多车协同下的误差校正问题。
method: 设计分布式OptiMatch系统，共享3D包围框与本地状态信息，利用最优运输理论过滤共检测目标并构建关联集，通过匹配对象对估计校正变换后进行全局融合。
result: 实验显示系统在定位/航向误差下保持鲁棒性，平均精度显著优于早期、晚期及中间融合等现有方案。
conclusion: OptiMatch框架有效缓解定位误差影响，为多车协作感知提供更精确的动态映射与目标检测方法。
search_text: A Cooperative Perception System Robust to Localization Errors 一种对定位误差具有鲁棒性的协作感知系统 Cooperative perception is challenging for safety-critical autonomous driving applications.The errors in the shared position and pose cause an inaccurate relative transform estimation and disrupt the robust mapping of the Ego vehicle. We propose a distributed object-level cooperative perception system called OptiMatch, in which the detected 3D bounding boxes and local state information are shared between the connected vehicles. To correct the noisy relative transform, the local measurements of both connected vehicles (bounding boxes) are utilized, and an optimal transport theory-based algorithm is developed to filter out those objects jointly detected by the vehicles along with their correspondence, constructing an associated co-visible set. A correction transform is estimated from the matched object pairs and further applied to the noisy relative transform, followed by global fusion and dynamic mapping. Experiment results show that robust performance is achieved for different levels of location and heading errors, and the proposed framework outperforms the state-of-the-art benchmark fusion schemes, including early, late, and intermediate fusion, on average precision by a large margin when location and/or heading errors occur. 协作感知对于安全关键的自动驾驶应用来说是一个挑战。共享位置和姿态中的错误会导致相对变换估计不准确，并破坏 Ego 车辆的鲁棒映射。我们提出了一种名为 OptiMatch 的分布式对象级协作感知系统，其中检测到的 3D 边界框和局部状态信息在联网车辆之间共享。为了校正噪声相对变换，利用两个连接车辆（边界框）的局部测量，并开发基于最佳传输理论的算法来过滤掉车辆共同检测到的那些对象及其对应关系，构建关联的共同可见集。根据匹配的对象对估计校正变换，并进一步应用于噪声相对变换，然后进行全局融合和动态映射。实验结果表明，对于不同级别的位置和航向误差，该框架都实现了稳健的性能，并且当发生位置和/或航向误差时，所提出的框架在平均精度上大大优于最先进的基准融合方案，包括早期、晚期和中间融合。 本文提出一种抗定位误差的协作感知系统OptiMatch，通过共享车辆检测信息和最优运输算法提升自动驾驶的鲁棒性。 Zhiying Song,Fuxi Wen,Hailiang Zhang,Jun Li cs.MA,cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Jiawei Liao,Lars Widmer,Xiaying Wang,Alfio Di Mauro,Samuel R. Nason-Tomaszewski,Cynthia A. Chestek,Luca Benini,Taekwang Jang
title: An Energy-Efficient Spiking Neural Network for Finger Velocity Decoding for Implantable Brain-Machine Interface
title_zh: 用于植入式脑机接口手指速度解码的节能尖峰神经网络
comment: ef:2022 IEEE 4th International Conference on Artificial Intelligence Circuits and Systems (AICAS), 2022, pp. 134-137
comments: ef:2022 IEEE 4th International Conference on Artificial Intelligence Circuits and Systems (AICAS), 2022, pp. 134-137
abstract: Brain-machine interfaces (BMIs) are promising for motor rehabilitation and mobility augmentation. High-accuracy and low-power algorithms are required to achieve implantable BMI systems. In this paper, we propose a novel spiking neural network (SNN) decoder for implantable BMI regression tasks. The SNN is trained with enhanced spatio-temporal backpropagation to fully leverage its ability in handling temporal problems. The proposed SNN decoder achieves the same level of correlation coefficient as the state-of-the-art ANN decoder in offline finger velocity decoding tasks, while it requires only 6.8% of the computation operations and 9.4% of the memory access.
summary: Brain-machine interfaces (BMIs) are promising for motor rehabilitation and mobility augmentation. High-accuracy and low-power algorithms are required to achieve implantable BMI systems. In this paper, we propose a novel spiking neural network (SNN) decoder for implantable BMI regression tasks. The SNN is trained with enhanced spatio-temporal backpropagation to fully leverage its ability in handling temporal problems. The proposed SNN decoder achieves the same level of correlation coefficient as the state-of-the-art ANN decoder in offline finger velocity decoding tasks, while it requires only 6.8% of the computation operations and 9.4% of the memory access.
abstract_zh: 脑机接口（BMI）在运动康复和行动增强方面很有前景。实现植入式 BMI 系统需要高精度和低功耗算法。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于植入式 BMI 回归任务的新型尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 解码器。 SNN 经过增强的时空反向传播训练，以充分利用其处理时间问题的能力。所提出的 SNN 解码器在离线手指速度解码任务中实现了与最先进的 ANN 解码器相同水平的相关系数，而它只需要 6.8% 的计算操作和 9.4% 的内存访问。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于可植入脑机接口的高效脉冲神经网络，用于解码手指速度。
AI.motivation: 可植入脑机接口需要同时满足高精度和低功耗的要求，传统人工神经网络存在功耗过高的问题。
AI.method: 设计基于增强时空反向传播训练的脉冲神经网络解码器，优化其时序处理能力。
AI.result: 在离线手指速度解码任务中，SNN解码器达到与ANN相当的精度，但计算量和内存访问量分别降低6.8%和9.4%。
AI.conclusion: 该SNN解码器在保持性能的同时显著降低计算资源需求，适合可植入式脑机接口应用。

authors_text: Aochuan Chen,Peter Lorenz,Yuguang Yao,Pin-Yu Chen,Sijia Liu
title: Visual Prompting for Adversarial Robustness
title_zh: 对抗鲁棒性的视觉提示
abstract: In this work, we leverage visual prompting (VP) to improve adversarial robustness of a fixed, pre-trained model at testing time. Compared to conventional adversarial defenses, VP allows us to design universal (i.e., data-agnostic) input prompting templates, which have plug-and-play capabilities at testing time to achieve desired model performance without introducing much computation overhead. Although VP has been successfully applied to improving model generalization, it remains elusive whether and how it can be used to defend against adversarial attacks. We investigate this problem and show that the vanilla VP approach is not effective in adversarial defense since a universal input prompt lacks the capacity for robust learning against sample-specific adversarial perturbations. To circumvent it, we propose a new VP method, termed Class-wise Adversarial Visual Prompting (C-AVP), to generate class-wise visual prompts so as to not only leverage the strengths of ensemble prompts but also optimize their interrelations to improve model robustness. Our experiments show that C-AVP outperforms the conventional VP method, with 2.1X standard accuracy gain and 2X robust accuracy gain. Compared to classical test-time defenses, C-AVP also yields a 42X inference time speedup.
summary: In this work, we leverage visual prompting (VP) to improve adversarial robustness of a fixed, pre-trained model at testing time. Compared to conventional adversarial defenses, VP allows us to design universal (i.e., data-agnostic) input prompting templates, which have plug-and-play capabilities at testing time to achieve desired model performance without introducing much computation overhead. Although VP has been successfully applied to improving model generalization, it remains elusive whether and how it can be used to defend against adversarial attacks. We investigate this problem and show that the vanilla VP approach is not effective in adversarial defense since a universal input prompt lacks the capacity for robust learning against sample-specific adversarial perturbations. To circumvent it, we propose a new VP method, termed Class-wise Adversarial Visual Prompting (C-AVP), to generate class-wise visual prompts so as to not only leverage the strengths of ensemble prompts but also optimize their interrelations to improve model robustness. Our experiments show that C-AVP outperforms the conventional VP method, with 2.1X standard accuracy gain and 2X robust accuracy gain. Compared to classical test-time defenses, C-AVP also yields a 42X inference time speedup.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们利用视觉提示（VP）来提高测试时固定的预训练模型的对抗鲁棒性。与传统的对抗性防御相比，VP 允许我们设计通用（即与​​数据无关）的输入提示模板，这些模板在测试时具有即插即用功能，可以在不引入太多计算开销的情况下实现所需的模型性能。尽管 VP 已成功应用于提高模型泛化能力，但它是否以及如何用于防御对抗性攻击仍然难以捉摸。我们研究了这个问题，并表明普通 VP 方法在对抗性防御中并不有效，因为通用输入提示缺乏针对特定样本的对抗性扰动进行稳健学习的能力。为了规避这个问题，我们提出了一种新的 VP 方法，称为类明智对抗视觉提示（C-AVP），来生成类明智视觉提示，以便不仅利用集成提示的优势，而且优化它们的相互关系以提高模型的鲁棒性。我们的实验表明，C-AVP 优于传统 VP 方法，具有 2.1 倍标准精度增益和 2 倍鲁棒精度增益。与经典的测试时间防御相比，C-AVP 还可以将推理时间加速 42 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为C-AVP的视觉提示方法，通过生成类别级别的视觉提示来提升模型的对抗鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统对抗防御方法计算开销大且效果有限，而视觉提示（VP）虽能提升模型泛化能力，但其通用性提示模板难以有效防御样本特定的对抗扰动。
AI.method: 设计类别的视觉提示（C-AVP），通过优化不同类别提示的关联性，增强模型对对抗样本的鲁棒性。
AI.result: C-AVP相比传统VP方法在标准准确率提升2.1倍，鲁棒准确率提升2倍，且推理速度比经典防御方法快42倍。
AI.conclusion: C-AVP通过类别级提示优化有效提升了对抗鲁棒性，在准确率和效率上均优于现有方法。

search_text: Visual Prompting for Adversarial Robustness 对抗鲁棒性的视觉提示 In this work, we leverage visual prompting (VP) to improve adversarial robustness of a fixed, pre-trained model at testing time. Compared to conventional adversarial defenses, VP allows us to design universal (i.e., data-agnostic) input prompting templates, which have plug-and-play capabilities at testing time to achieve desired model performance without introducing much computation overhead. Although VP has been successfully applied to improving model generalization, it remains elusive whether and how it can be used to defend against adversarial attacks. We investigate this problem and show that the vanilla VP approach is not effective in adversarial defense since a universal input prompt lacks the capacity for robust learning against sample-specific adversarial perturbations. To circumvent it, we propose a new VP method, termed Class-wise Adversarial Visual Prompting (C-AVP), to generate class-wise visual prompts so as to not only leverage the strengths of ensemble prompts but also optimize their interrelations to improve model robustness. Our experiments show that C-AVP outperforms the conventional VP method, with 2.1X standard accuracy gain and 2X robust accuracy gain. Compared to classical test-time defenses, C-AVP also yields a 42X inference time speedup. 在这项工作中，我们利用视觉提示（VP）来提高测试时固定的预训练模型的对抗鲁棒性。与传统的对抗性防御相比，VP 允许我们设计通用（即与​​数据无关）的输入提示模板，这些模板在测试时具有即插即用功能，可以在不引入太多计算开销的情况下实现所需的模型性能。尽管 VP 已成功应用于提高模型泛化能力，但它是否以及如何用于防御对抗性攻击仍然难以捉摸。我们研究了这个问题，并表明普通 VP 方法在对抗性防御中并不有效，因为通用输入提示缺乏针对特定样本的对抗性扰动进行稳健学习的能力。为了规避这个问题，我们提出了一种新的 VP 方法，称为类明智对抗视觉提示（C-AVP），来生成类明智视觉提示，以便不仅利用集成提示的优势，而且优化它们的相互关系以提高模型的鲁棒性。我们的实验表明，C-AVP 优于传统 VP 方法，具有 2.1 倍标准精度增益和 2 倍鲁棒精度增益。与经典的测试时间防御相比，C-AVP 还可以将推理时间加速 42 倍。 本文提出一种名为C-AVP的视觉提示方法，通过生成类别级别的视觉提示来提升模型的对抗鲁棒性。 Aochuan Chen,Peter Lorenz,Yuguang Yao,Pin-Yu Chen,Sijia Liu cs.CV,cs.CR,cs.LG

authors_text: Aditya Sharma,Apoorv Saxena,Chitrank Gupta,Seyed Mehran Kazemi,Partha Talukdar,Soumen Chakrabarti
title: TwiRGCN: Temporally Weighted Graph Convolution for Question Answering over Temporal Knowledge Graphs
title_zh: TwiRGCN：用于时态知识图问答的时态加权图卷积
abstract: Recent years have witnessed much interest in temporal reasoning over knowledge graphs (KG) for complex question answering (QA), but there remains a substantial gap in human capabilities. We explore how to generalize relational graph convolutional networks (RGCN) for temporal KGQA. Specifically, we propose a novel, intuitive and interpretable scheme to modulate the messages passed through a KG edge during convolution, based on the relevance of its associated time period to the question. We also introduce a gating device to predict if the answer to a complex temporal question is likely to be a KG entity or time and use this prediction to guide our scoring mechanism. We evaluate the resulting system, which we call TwiRGCN, on TimeQuestions, a recently released, challenging dataset for multi-hop complex temporal QA. We show that TwiRGCN significantly outperforms state-of-the-art systems on this dataset across diverse question types. Notably, TwiRGCN improves accuracy by 9--10 percentage points for the most difficult ordinal and implicit question types.
summary: Recent years have witnessed much interest in temporal reasoning over knowledge graphs (KG) for complex question answering (QA), but there remains a substantial gap in human capabilities. We explore how to generalize relational graph convolutional networks (RGCN) for temporal KGQA. Specifically, we propose a novel, intuitive and interpretable scheme to modulate the messages passed through a KG edge during convolution, based on the relevance of its associated time period to the question. We also introduce a gating device to predict if the answer to a complex temporal question is likely to be a KG entity or time and use this prediction to guide our scoring mechanism. We evaluate the resulting system, which we call TwiRGCN, on TimeQuestions, a recently released, challenging dataset for multi-hop complex temporal QA. We show that TwiRGCN significantly outperforms state-of-the-art systems on this dataset across diverse question types. Notably, TwiRGCN improves accuracy by 9--10 percentage points for the most difficult ordinal and implicit question types.
abstract_zh: 近年来，人们对用于复杂问答（QA）的知识图（KG）时间推理产生了浓厚的兴趣，但人类的能力仍然存在很大差距。我们探索如何将关系图卷积网络（RGCN）推广到时间 KGQA。具体来说，我们提出了一种新颖、直观且可解释的方案，根据其相关时间段与问题的相关性来调制在卷积期间通过 KG 边缘传递的消息。我们还引入了一个门控设备来预测复杂时间问题的答案是否可能是 KG 实体或时间，并使用此预测来指导我们的评分机制。我们在 TimeQuestions 上评估生成的系统（我们称之为 TwiRGCN），TimeQuestions 是最近发布的用于多跳复杂时间 QA 的具有挑战性的数据集。我们表明，TwiRGCN 在不同问题类型的数据集上显着优于最先进的系统。值得注意的是，对于最困难的序数和隐式问题类型，TwiRGCN 将准确性提高了 9--10 个百分点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TwiRGCN模型，通过时间加权图卷积和门控机制提升时序知识图谱上的复杂问答性能。
AI.motivation: 现有知识图谱问答系统在处理时序推理时存在人类能力与算法性能的显著差距，需改进关系图卷积网络以适应时序特性。
AI.method: 设计时间相关性加权的消息传递机制，结合门控装置预测答案类型并指导评分机制，基于TimeQuestions数据集进行验证。
AI.result: 在多跳复杂时序问答任务中，TwiRGCN相较最先进方法准确率提升9-10个百分点，尤其在序数和隐式问题类型表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 时间加权与门控机制有效增强了模型对时序知识图谱的推理能力，为复杂时序问答提供了新解决方案。

search_text: TwiRGCN: Temporally Weighted Graph Convolution for Question Answering over Temporal Knowledge Graphs TwiRGCN：用于时态知识图问答的时态加权图卷积 Recent years have witnessed much interest in temporal reasoning over knowledge graphs (KG) for complex question answering (QA), but there remains a substantial gap in human capabilities. We explore how to generalize relational graph convolutional networks (RGCN) for temporal KGQA. Specifically, we propose a novel, intuitive and interpretable scheme to modulate the messages passed through a KG edge during convolution, based on the relevance of its associated time period to the question. We also introduce a gating device to predict if the answer to a complex temporal question is likely to be a KG entity or time and use this prediction to guide our scoring mechanism. We evaluate the resulting system, which we call TwiRGCN, on TimeQuestions, a recently released, challenging dataset for multi-hop complex temporal QA. We show that TwiRGCN significantly outperforms state-of-the-art systems on this dataset across diverse question types. Notably, TwiRGCN improves accuracy by 9--10 percentage points for the most difficult ordinal and implicit question types. 近年来，人们对用于复杂问答（QA）的知识图（KG）时间推理产生了浓厚的兴趣，但人类的能力仍然存在很大差距。我们探索如何将关系图卷积网络（RGCN）推广到时间 KGQA。具体来说，我们提出了一种新颖、直观且可解释的方案，根据其相关时间段与问题的相关性来调制在卷积期间通过 KG 边缘传递的消息。我们还引入了一个门控设备来预测复杂时间问题的答案是否可能是 KG 实体或时间，并使用此预测来指导我们的评分机制。我们在 TimeQuestions 上评估生成的系统（我们称之为 TwiRGCN），TimeQuestions 是最近发布的用于多跳复杂时间 QA 的具有挑战性的数据集。我们表明，TwiRGCN 在不同问题类型的数据集上显着优于最先进的系统。值得注意的是，对于最困难的序数和隐式问题类型，TwiRGCN 将准确性提高了 9--10 个百分点。 本文提出TwiRGCN模型，通过时间加权图卷积和门控机制提升时序知识图谱上的复杂问答性能。 Aditya Sharma,Apoorv Saxena,Chitrank Gupta,Seyed Mehran Kazemi,Partha Talukdar,Soumen Chakrabarti cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Zhuosheng Zhang,Shuohang Wang,Yichong Xu,Yuwei Fang,Wenhao Yu,Yang Liu,Hai Zhao,Chenguang Zhu,Michael Zeng
title: Task Compass: Scaling Multi-task Pre-training with Task Prefix
title_zh: 任务指南针：使用任务前缀扩展多任务预训练
abstract: Leveraging task-aware annotated data as supervised signals to assist with self-supervised learning on large-scale unlabeled data has become a new trend in pre-training language models. Existing studies show that multi-task learning with large-scale supervised tasks suffers from negative effects across tasks. To tackle the challenge, we propose a task prefix guided multi-task pre-training framework to explore the relationships among tasks. We conduct extensive experiments on 40 datasets, which show that our model can not only serve as the strong foundation backbone for a wide range of tasks but also be feasible as a probing tool for analyzing task relationships. The task relationships reflected by the prefixes align transfer learning performance between tasks. They also suggest directions for data augmentation with complementary tasks, which help our model achieve human-parity results on commonsense reasoning leaderboards. Code is available at https://github.com/cooelf/CompassMTL
summary: Leveraging task-aware annotated data as supervised signals to assist with self-supervised learning on large-scale unlabeled data has become a new trend in pre-training language models. Existing studies show that multi-task learning with large-scale supervised tasks suffers from negative effects across tasks. To tackle the challenge, we propose a task prefix guided multi-task pre-training framework to explore the relationships among tasks. We conduct extensive experiments on 40 datasets, which show that our model can not only serve as the strong foundation backbone for a wide range of tasks but also be feasible as a probing tool for analyzing task relationships. The task relationships reflected by the prefixes align transfer learning performance between tasks. They also suggest directions for data augmentation with complementary tasks, which help our model achieve human-parity results on commonsense reasoning leaderboards. Code is available at https://github.com/cooelf/CompassMTL
abstract_zh: 利用任务感知的标注数据作为监督信号，协助对大规模无标签数据进行自监督学习，已成为预训练语言模型的新趋势。现有研究表明，大规模监督任务的多任务学习会受到跨任务的负面影响。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一个任务前缀引导的多任务预训练框架来探索任务之间的关系。我们对 40 个数据集进行了广泛的实验，结果表明我们的模型不仅可以作为广泛任务的强大基础骨干，而且可以作为分析任务关系的探测工具。前缀反映的任务关系使任务之间的迁移学习性能保持一致。他们还提出了通过补充任务进行数据增强的方向，这有助于我们的模型在常识推理排行榜上实现与人类同等的结果。代码可在 https://github.com/cooelf/CompassMTL 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于任务前缀的多任务预训练框架，通过探索任务间关系解决跨任务负面影响问题。
AI.motivation: 现有大规模监督任务的多任务学习存在跨任务负面影响，需通过任务关系分析提升模型效果。
AI.method: 设计任务前缀引导的多任务预训练框架，在40个数据集上验证模型作为基础骨干和任务关系分析工具的有效性。
AI.result: 模型在多种任务中表现优异，任务前缀反映的迁移性能与数据增强方向使模型在常识推理榜单达到人类水平。
AI.conclusion: 任务前缀框架有效提升多任务学习效果，为任务关系分析和互补数据增强提供可行方案。

authors_text: Yuxuan Xue,Haolong Li,Stefan Leutenegger,Jörg Stückler
title: Event-based Non-Rigid Reconstruction from Contours
title_zh: 基于事件的轮廓非刚性重建
abstract: Visual reconstruction of fast non-rigid object deformations over time is a challenge for conventional frame-based cameras. In this paper, we propose a novel approach for reconstructing such deformations using measurements from event-based cameras. Under the assumption of a static background, where all events are generated by the motion, our approach estimates the deformation of objects from events generated at the object contour in a probabilistic optimization framework. It associates events to mesh faces on the contour and maximizes the alignment of the line of sight through the event pixel with the associated face. In experiments on synthetic and real data, we demonstrate the advantages of our method over state-of-the-art optimization and learning-based approaches for reconstructing the motion of human hands. A video of the experiments is available at https://youtu.be/gzfw7i5OKjg
summary: Visual reconstruction of fast non-rigid object deformations over time is a challenge for conventional frame-based cameras. In this paper, we propose a novel approach for reconstructing such deformations using measurements from event-based cameras. Under the assumption of a static background, where all events are generated by the motion, our approach estimates the deformation of objects from events generated at the object contour in a probabilistic optimization framework. It associates events to mesh faces on the contour and maximizes the alignment of the line of sight through the event pixel with the associated face. In experiments on synthetic and real data, we demonstrate the advantages of our method over state-of-the-art optimization and learning-based approaches for reconstructing the motion of human hands. A video of the experiments is available at https://youtu.be/gzfw7i5OKjg
abstract_zh: 对于传统的基于帧的相机来说，随着时间的推移快速非刚性物体变形的视觉重建是一个挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用基于事件的相机的测量来重建此类变形的新方法。在静态背景的假设下，所有事件都是由运动生成的，我们的方法根据概率优化框架中对象轮廓处生成的事件来估计对象的变形。它将事件与轮廓上的网格面相关联，并最大化通过事件像素的视线与相关面的对齐。在合成数据和真实数据的实验中，我们证明了我们的方法相对于最先进的优化和基于学习的重建人手运动的方法的优势。实验视频请访问 https://youtu.be/gzfw7i5OKjg

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于事件相机的非刚性物体变形重建方法，通过物体轮廓的事件数据进行概率优化估计。
AI.motivation: 传统帧式相机难以捕捉快速非刚性变形，而事件相机能高效记录动态信息，结合静态背景假设可有效分离运动事件。
AI.method: 在概率优化框架下，将轮廓事件关联到网格面片并最大化视线对齐，通过事件像素与对应面片的几何关系进行重建。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据实验中，该方法在手部运动重建任务上优于现有优化和基于学习的方法。
AI.conclusion: 事件相机轮廓重建方法为快速非刚性变形提供了新思路，验证了其在动态场景中的有效性。
