It associates events to mesh faces on the contour and maximizes the alignment of the line of sight through the event pixel with the associated face. In experiments on synthetic and real data, we demonstrate the advantages of our method over state-of-the-art optimization and learning-based approaches for reconstructing the motion of human hands. A video of the experiments is available at https://youtu.be/gzfw7i5OKjg 对于传统的基于帧的相机来说，随着时间的推移快速非刚性物体变形的视觉重建是一个挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用基于事件的相机的测量来重建此类变形的新方法。在静态背景的假设下，所有事件都是由运动生成的，我们的方法根据概率优化框架中对象轮廓处生成的事件来估计对象的变形。它将事件与轮廓上的网格面相关联，并最大化通过事件像素的视线与相关面的对齐。在合成数据和真实数据的实验中，我们证明了我们的方法相对于最先进的优化和基于学习的重建人手运动的方法的优势。实验视频请访问 https://youtu.be/gzfw7i5OKjg 本文提出了一种基于事件相机的非刚性物体变形重建方法，通过物体轮廓的事件数据进行概率优化估计。 Yuxuan Xue,Haolong Li,Stefan Leutenegger,Jörg Stückler cs.CV

authors_text: Alpay Sabuncuoglu,T. Metin Sezgin
title: Exploring Children's Use of Self-Made Tangibles in Programming
title_zh: 探索儿童在编程中使用自制的有形物品
abstract: Defining abstract algorithmic structures like functions and variables using self-made tangibles can enhance the usability and affordability of the tangible programming experience by maintaining the input modality and physical interaction throughout the activity and reducing the dependence on electronic devices. However, existing tangible programming environments use digital interfaces to save abstract definitions such as functions and variables, as designing new tangibles is challenging for children due to their limited experience using abstract definitions. We conducted a series of design workshops with children to understand their self-made tangible creation abilities and develop design considerations for tangible computing such as paper programming. This paper reports: 1) Our insights on how students conceptualize and design tangible programming blocks, 2) Design considerations of self-made tangibles to yield higher understandability and memorability, 3) Tests of our design considerations in creating self-made tangibles in real-life coding activities.
summary: Defining abstract algorithmic structures like functions and variables using self-made tangibles can enhance the usability and affordability of the tangible programming experience by maintaining the input modality and physical interaction throughout the activity and reducing the dependence on electronic devices. However, existing tangible programming environments use digital interfaces to save abstract definitions such as functions and variables, as designing new tangibles is challenging for children due to their limited experience using abstract definitions. We conducted a series of design workshops with children to understand their self-made tangible creation abilities and develop design considerations for tangible computing such as paper programming. This paper reports: 1) Our insights on how students conceptualize and design tangible programming blocks, 2) Design considerations of self-made tangibles to yield higher understandability and memorability, 3) Tests of our design considerations in creating self-made tangibles in real-life coding activities.
abstract_zh: 使用自制的有形对象定义抽象算法结构（例如函数和变量）可以通过在整个活动中保持输入模式和物理交互并减少对电子设备的依赖来增强有形编程体验的可用性和可负担性。然而，现有的有形编程环境使用数字接口来保存函数和变量等抽象定义，因为儿童使用抽象定义的经验有限，因此设计新的有形对象对他们来说具有挑战性。我们与孩子们一起举办了一系列设计研讨会，以了解他们自制的有形创造能力，并为有形计算（例如纸质编程）开发设计考虑因素。本文报告：1）我们对学生如何概念化和设计有形编程块的见解，2）自制有形物体的设计考虑因素，以产生更高的可理解性和记忆性，3）我们在现实生活编码活动中创建自制有形物体的设计考虑因素的测试。

AI.tldr: 本论文探讨儿童在编程中使用自制实体物件的可行性，并提出提升理解度与记忆度的设计考量。
AI.motivation: 现有实体编程环境依赖数字接口存储抽象概念，而儿童因缺乏抽象经验难以设计新实体物件，需探索低成本且易用的替代方案。
AI.method: 通过设计工作坊与儿童互动，分析其自制实体物件的能力，并总结纸编程等实体计算的设计原则。
AI.result: 提出儿童如何概念化编程模块的见解，归纳提升可理解性的设计考量，并验证其在实际编程活动中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 自制实体物件能增强编程体验的亲和力与可及性，但需结合具体设计原则以确保学习效果。

authors_text: Agnieszka Tomczak,Aarushi Gupta,Slobodan Ilic,Nassir Navab,Shadi Albarqouni
title: What can we learn about a generated image corrupting its latent representation?
title_zh: 关于生成的图像破坏其潜在表示，我们能了解到什么？
abstract: Generative adversarial networks (GANs) offer an effective solution to the image-to-image translation problem, thereby allowing for new possibilities in medical imaging. They can translate images from one imaging modality to another at a low cost. For unpaired datasets, they rely mostly on cycle loss. Despite its effectiveness in learning the underlying data distribution, it can lead to a discrepancy between input and output data. The purpose of this work is to investigate the hypothesis that we can predict image quality based on its latent representation in the GANs bottleneck. We achieve this by corrupting the latent representation with noise and generating multiple outputs. The degree of differences between them is interpreted as the strength of the representation: the more robust the latent representation, the fewer changes in the output image the corruption causes. Our results demonstrate that our proposed method has the ability to i) predict uncertain parts of synthesized images, and ii) identify samples that may not be reliable for downstream tasks, e.g., liver segmentation task.
summary: Generative adversarial networks (GANs) offer an effective solution to the image-to-image translation problem, thereby allowing for new possibilities in medical imaging. They can translate images from one imaging modality to another at a low cost. For unpaired datasets, they rely mostly on cycle loss. Despite its effectiveness in learning the underlying data distribution, it can lead to a discrepancy between input and output data. The purpose of this work is to investigate the hypothesis that we can predict image quality based on its latent representation in the GANs bottleneck. We achieve this by corrupting the latent representation with noise and generating multiple outputs. The degree of differences between them is interpreted as the strength of the representation: the more robust the latent representation, the fewer changes in the output image the corruption causes. Our results demonstrate that our proposed method has the ability to i) predict uncertain parts of synthesized images, and ii) identify samples that may not be reliable for downstream tasks, e.g., liver segmentation task.
abstract_zh: 生成对抗网络（GAN）为图像到图像的转换问题提供了有效的解决方案，从而为医学成像带来了新的可能性。他们可以以低成本将图像从一种成像方式转换为另一种成像方式。对于未配对的数据集，它们主要依赖于循环损失。尽管它在学习底层数据分布方面很有效，但它可能会导致输入和输出数据之间的差异。这项工作的目的是研究这样一个假设：我们可以根据 GAN 瓶颈中的潜在表示来预测图像质量。我们通过用噪声破坏潜在表示并生成多个输出来实现这一点。它们之间的差异程度被解释为表示的强度：潜在表示越稳健，损坏导致的输出图像变化越少。我们的结果表明，我们提出的方法能够i）预测合成图像的不确定部分，ii）识别对于下游任务（例如肝脏分割任务）可能不可靠的样本。

AI.tldr: 本文研究通过破坏生成图像的潜在表示来预测图像质量并识别不可靠样本的方法。
AI.motivation: 生成对抗网络（GANs）在图像翻译中存在输入输出数据差异问题，需寻找基于潜在表示的图像质量评估方法以提高下游任务可靠性。
AI.method: 通过向潜在表示添加噪声生成多组输出，根据输出差异程度评估潜在表示的鲁棒性：差异越小表示潜在表示越稳定。
AI.result: 该方法能预测合成图像的不确定区域，并识别可能影响后续任务（如肝脏分割）可靠性的样本。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为评估生成图像质量及可靠性提供了新视角，有助于优化医学影像等领域的图像翻译应用。

authors_text: Ke-Han Lu,Kuan-Yu Chen
title: A context-aware knowledge transferring strategy for CTC-based ASR
title_zh: 基于 CTC 的 ASR 的上下文感知知识转移策略
abstract: Non-autoregressive automatic speech recognition (ASR) modeling has received increasing attention recently because of its fast decoding speed and superior performance. Among representatives, methods based on the connectionist temporal classification (CTC) are still a dominating stream. However, the theoretically inherent flaw, the assumption of independence between tokens, creates a performance barrier for the school of works. To mitigate the challenge, we propose a context-aware knowledge transferring strategy, consisting of a knowledge transferring module and a context-aware training strategy, for CTC-based ASR. The former is designed to distill linguistic information from a pre-trained language model, and the latter is framed to modulate the limitations caused by the conditional independence assumption. As a result, a knowledge-injected context-aware CTC-based ASR built upon the wav2vec2.0 is presented in this paper. A series of experiments on the AISHELL-1 and AISHELL-2 datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method.
summary: Non-autoregressive automatic speech recognition (ASR) modeling has received increasing attention recently because of its fast decoding speed and superior performance. Among representatives, methods based on the connectionist temporal classification (CTC) are still a dominating stream. However, the theoretically inherent flaw, the assumption of independence between tokens, creates a performance barrier for the school of works. To mitigate the challenge, we propose a context-aware knowledge transferring strategy, consisting of a knowledge transferring module and a context-aware training strategy, for CTC-based ASR. The former is designed to distill linguistic information from a pre-trained language model, and the latter is framed to modulate the limitations caused by the conditional independence assumption. As a result, a knowledge-injected context-aware CTC-based ASR built upon the wav2vec2.0 is presented in this paper. A series of experiments on the AISHELL-1 and AISHELL-2 datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 非自回归自动语音识别（ASR）建模因其快速的解码速度和优越的性能而受到越来越多的关注。在代表中，基于联结主义时间分类（CTC）的方法仍然是主流。然而，理论上的固有缺陷，即代币之间独立性的假设，为作品学派造成了性能障碍。为了缓解这一挑战，我们针对基于 CTC 的 ASR 提出了一种上下文感知知识转移策略，该策略由知识转移模块和上下文感知训练策略组成。前者旨在从预先训练的语言模型中提取语言信息，后者旨在调节条件独立假设造成的限制。因此，本文提出了一种基于 wav2vec2.0 的知识注入、上下文感知、基于 CTC 的 ASR。在AISHELL-1和AISHELL-2数据集上的一系列实验证明了该方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于上下文感知的知识迁移策略，用于改进CTC-based自动语音识别（ASR）系统的性能。
AI.motivation: CTC方法因标记间独立性假设存在理论缺陷，导致性能瓶颈，需通过引入上下文信息进行优化。
AI.method: 设计知识迁移模块从预训练语言模型提取语言信息，并结合上下文感知训练策略调整条件独立性假设的限制。
AI.result: 在AISHELL-1和AISHELL-2数据集上的实验验证了所提方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该策略有效提升了CTC-based ASR的性能，为相关研究提供了新思路。

motivation: CTC方法因标记间独立性假设存在理论缺陷，导致性能瓶颈，需通过引入上下文信息进行优化。
method: 设计知识迁移模块从预训练语言模型提取语言信息，并结合上下文感知训练策略调整条件独立性假设的限制。
result: 在AISHELL-1和AISHELL-2数据集上的实验验证了所提方法的有效性。
conclusion: 该策略有效提升了CTC-based ASR的性能，为相关研究提供了新思路。
search_text: A context-aware knowledge transferring strategy for CTC-based ASR 基于 CTC 的 ASR 的上下文感知知识转移策略 Non-autoregressive automatic speech recognition (ASR) modeling has received increasing attention recently because of its fast decoding speed and superior performance. Among representatives, methods based on the connectionist temporal classification (CTC) are still a dominating stream. However, the theoretically inherent flaw, the assumption of independence between tokens, creates a performance barrier for the school of works. To mitigate the challenge, we propose a context-aware knowledge transferring strategy, consisting of a knowledge transferring module and a context-aware training strategy, for CTC-based ASR. The former is designed to distill linguistic information from a pre-trained language model, and the latter is framed to modulate the limitations caused by the conditional independence assumption. As a result, a knowledge-injected context-aware CTC-based ASR built upon the wav2vec2.0 is presented in this paper. A series of experiments on the AISHELL-1 and AISHELL-2 datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method. 非自回归自动语音识别（ASR）建模因其快速的解码速度和优越的性能而受到越来越多的关注。在代表中，基于联结主义时间分类（CTC）的方法仍然是主流。然而，理论上的固有缺陷，即代币之间独立性的假设，为作品学派造成了性能障碍。为了缓解这一挑战，我们针对基于 CTC 的 ASR 提出了一种上下文感知知识转移策略，该策略由知识转移模块和上下文感知训练策略组成。前者旨在从预先训练的语言模型中提取语言信息，后者旨在调节条件独立假设造成的限制。因此，本文提出了一种基于 wav2vec2.0 的知识注入、上下文感知、基于 CTC 的 ASR。在AISHELL-1和AISHELL-2数据集上的一系列实验证明了该方法的有效性。 本文提出一种基于上下文感知的知识迁移策略，用于改进CTC-based自动语音识别（ASR）系统的性能。 Ke-Han Lu,Kuan-Yu Chen cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Sang-Hyun Je
title: Entity Aware Negative Sampling with Auxiliary Loss of False Negative Prediction for Knowledge Graph Embedding
title_zh: 知识图嵌入的实体感知负采样与假负预测的辅助损失
abstract: Knowledge graph (KG) embedding is widely used in many downstream applications using KGs. Generally, since KGs contain only ground truth triples, it is necessary to construct arbitrary negative samples for representation learning of KGs. Recently, various methods for sampling high-quality negatives have been studied because the quality of negative triples has great effect on KG embedding. In this paper, we propose a novel method called Entity Aware Negative Sampling (EANS), which is able to sample negative entities resemble to positive one by adopting Gaussian distribution to the aligned entity index space. Additionally, we introduce auxiliary loss for false negative prediction that can alleviate the impact of the sampled false negative triples. The proposed method can generate high-quality negative samples regardless of negative sample size and effectively mitigate the influence of false negative samples. The experimental results on standard benchmarks show that our EANS outperforms existing the state-of-the-art methods of negative sampling on several knowledge graph embedding models. Moreover, the proposed method achieves competitive performance even when the number of negative samples is limited to only one.
summary: Knowledge graph (KG) embedding is widely used in many downstream applications using KGs. Generally, since KGs contain only ground truth triples, it is necessary to construct arbitrary negative samples for representation learning of KGs. Recently, various methods for sampling high-quality negatives have been studied because the quality of negative triples has great effect on KG embedding. In this paper, we propose a novel method called Entity Aware Negative Sampling (EANS), which is able to sample negative entities resemble to positive one by adopting Gaussian distribution to the aligned entity index space. Additionally, we introduce auxiliary loss for false negative prediction that can alleviate the impact of the sampled false negative triples. The proposed method can generate high-quality negative samples regardless of negative sample size and effectively mitigate the influence of false negative samples. The experimental results on standard benchmarks show that our EANS outperforms existing the state-of-the-art methods of negative sampling on several knowledge graph embedding models. Moreover, the proposed method achieves competitive performance even when the number of negative samples is limited to only one.
abstract_zh: 知识图（KG）嵌入广泛应用于许多使用 KG 的下游应用程序中。一般来说，由于知识图谱仅包含真实三元组，因此需要构造任意负样本来进行知识图谱的表示学习。最近，人们研究了各种对高质量负例进行采样的方法，因为负例三元组的质量对 KG 嵌入有很大影响。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为实体感知负采样（EANS）的新颖方法，该方法能够通过对对齐的实体索引空间采用高斯分布来对类似于正实体的负实体进行采样。此外，我们引入了用于假阴性预测的辅助损失，可以减轻采样的假阴性三元组的影响。该方法无论负样本大小如何都可以生成高质量的负样本，并有效减轻假负样本的影响。标准基准的实验结果表明，我们的 EANS 在多个知识图嵌入模型上优于现有最先进的负采样方法。此外，即使负样本的数量仅限于一个，所提出的方法也能实现有竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为EANS的实体感知负采样方法，结合辅助损失函数以提升知识图谱嵌入中负样本的质量。
AI.motivation: 知识图谱嵌入依赖高质量负样本进行训练，但传统方法生成的负样本质量参差不齐，影响模型性能。
AI.method: 通过在对齐的实体索引空间中应用高斯分布采样相似实体，并引入虚假负样本预测的辅助损失函数以减少干扰。
AI.result: 在标准基准测试中，EANS在多个知识图谱嵌入模型上优于现有方法，且在负样本数量极少时仍表现良好。
AI.conclusion: EANS通过提升负样本质量及缓解虚假负样本影响，为知识图谱嵌入提供了更有效的采样策略。

authors_text: Yuanyuan Liu,Chengjiang Long,Zhaoxuan Zhang,Bokai Liu,Qiang Zhang,Baocai Yin,Xin Yang
title: Explore Contextual Information for 3D Scene Graph Generation
title_zh: 探索 3D 场景图生成的上下文信息
abstract: 3D scene graph generation (SGG) has been of high interest in computer vision. Although the accuracy of 3D SGG on coarse classification and single relation label has been gradually improved, the performance of existing works is still far from being perfect for fine-grained and multi-label situations. In this paper, we propose a framework fully exploring contextual information for the 3D SGG task, which attempts to satisfy the requirements of fine-grained entity class, multiple relation labels, and high accuracy simultaneously. Our proposed approach is composed of a Graph Feature Extraction module and a Graph Contextual Reasoning module, achieving appropriate information-redundancy feature extraction, structured organization, and hierarchical inferring. Our approach achieves superior or competitive performance over previous methods on the 3DSSG dataset, especially on the relationship prediction sub-task.
summary: 3D scene graph generation (SGG) has been of high interest in computer vision. Although the accuracy of 3D SGG on coarse classification and single relation label has been gradually improved, the performance of existing works is still far from being perfect for fine-grained and multi-label situations. In this paper, we propose a framework fully exploring contextual information for the 3D SGG task, which attempts to satisfy the requirements of fine-grained entity class, multiple relation labels, and high accuracy simultaneously. Our proposed approach is composed of a Graph Feature Extraction module and a Graph Contextual Reasoning module, achieving appropriate information-redundancy feature extraction, structured organization, and hierarchical inferring. Our approach achieves superior or competitive performance over previous methods on the 3DSSG dataset, especially on the relationship prediction sub-task.
abstract_zh: 3D 场景图生成 (SGG) 一直受到计算机视觉领域的高度关注。尽管3D SGG在粗分类和单关系标签上的准确率已逐渐提高，但现有工作对于细粒度和多标签情况的性能仍远未达到完美。在本文中，我们提出了一个充分探索 3D SGG 任务上下文信息的框架，试图同时满足细粒度实体类、多个关系标签和高精度的要求。我们提出的方法由图特征提取模块和图上下文推理模块组成，实现适当的信息冗余特征提取、结构化组织和层次推理。我们的方法在 3DSSG 数据集上比以前的方法实现了优越或有竞争力的性能，特别是在关系预测子任务上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用上下文信息的框架，以提升3D场景图生成在细粒度实体分类和多标签关系预测中的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有3D场景图生成方法在细粒度分类和多标签关系预测任务中表现不足，需更有效的上下文信息建模。
AI.method: 设计包含图特征提取模块和图上下文推理模块的框架，实现信息冗余控制、结构化组织与分层推理。
AI.result: 在3DSSG数据集上关系预测子任务表现优于现有方法，整体性能具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 通过上下文信息建模可有效提升3D场景图生成精度，为细粒度多标签任务提供新思路。

authors_text: Yingji Zhang,Danilo S. Carvalho,André Freitas
title: Quasi-symbolic Semantic Geometry over Transformer-based Variational AutoEncoder
title_zh: 基于 Transformer 的变分自动编码器的准符号语义几何
abstract: Formal/symbolic semantics can provide canonical, rigid controllability and interpretability to sentence representations due to their \textit{localisation} or \textit{composition} property. How can we deliver such property to the current distributional sentence representations to control and interpret the generation of language models (LMs)? In this work, we theoretically frame the sentence semantics as the composition of \textit{semantic role - word content} features and propose the formal semantic geometry. To inject such geometry into Transformer-based LMs (i.e. GPT2), we deploy Transformer-based Variational AutoEncoder with a supervision approach, where the sentence generation can be manipulated and explained over low-dimensional latent Gaussian space. In addition, we propose a new probing algorithm to guide the movement of sentence vectors over such geometry. Experimental results reveal that the formal semantic geometry can potentially deliver better control and interpretation to sentence generation.
summary: Formal/symbolic semantics can provide canonical, rigid controllability and interpretability to sentence representations due to their \textit{localisation} or \textit{composition} property. How can we deliver such property to the current distributional sentence representations to control and interpret the generation of language models (LMs)? In this work, we theoretically frame the sentence semantics as the composition of \textit{semantic role - word content} features and propose the formal semantic geometry. To inject such geometry into Transformer-based LMs (i.e. GPT2), we deploy Transformer-based Variational AutoEncoder with a supervision approach, where the sentence generation can be manipulated and explained over low-dimensional latent Gaussian space. In addition, we propose a new probing algorithm to guide the movement of sentence vectors over such geometry. Experimental results reveal that the formal semantic geometry can potentially deliver better control and interpretation to sentence generation.
abstract_zh: 由于其 \textit{localization} 或 \textit{composition} 属性，形式/符号语义可以为句子表示提供规范的、严格的可控性和可解释性。我们如何将这样的属性传递给当前的分布式句子表示来控制和解释语言模型（LM）的生成？在这项工作中，我们从理论上将句子语义框架为 \textit{语义角色 - 单词内容}特征的组合，并提出了形式语义几何。为了将这种几何形状注入基于 Transformer 的 LM（即 GPT2），我们部署了具有监督方法的基于 Transformer 的变分自动编码器，其中可以在低维潜在高斯空间上操纵和解释句子生成。此外，我们提出了一种新的探测算法来指导句子向量在这种几何形状上的移动。实验结果表明，形式语义几何可以为句子生成提供更好的控制和解释。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于变分自编码器（VAE）的准符号语义几何框架，旨在增强Transformer语言模型（如GPT2）的可控性和可解释性。
AI.motivation: 当前分布式的句子表示缺乏形式化语义的局部性或组合性特性，导致语言模型生成过程难以控制和解释。
AI.method: 将句子语义建模为语义角色与词内容特征的组合，构建形式化语义几何结构，并通过监督式Transformer-VAE将该结构注入语言模型，同时设计探针算法引导句子向量在低维潜在空间中移动。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法能有效提升语言生成的可控性和可解释性，验证了形式化语义几何的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入准符号语义几何，可在保持Transformer模型性能的同时，增强其生成过程的控制与解释能力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于变分自编码器（VAE）的准符号语义几何框架，旨在增强Transformer语言模型（如GPT2）的可控性和可解释性。
ai_content.motivation: 当前分布式的句子表示缺乏形式化语义的局部性或组合性特性，导致语言模型生成过程难以控制和解释。
ai_content.method: 将句子语义建模为语义角色与词内容特征的组合，构建形式化语义几何结构，并通过监督式Transformer-VAE将该结构注入语言模型，同时设计探针算法引导句子向量在低维潜在空间中移动。
ai_content.result: 实验表明，该方法能有效提升语言生成的可控性和可解释性，验证了形式化语义几何的有效性。
ai_content.conclusion: 通过引入准符号语义几何，可在保持Transformer模型性能的同时，增强其生成过程的控制与解释能力。

search_text: Quasi-symbolic Semantic Geometry over Transformer-based Variational AutoEncoder 基于 Transformer 的变分自动编码器的准符号语义几何 Formal/symbolic semantics can provide canonical, rigid controllability and interpretability to sentence representations due to their \textit{localisation} or \textit{composition} property. How can we deliver such property to the current distributional sentence representations to control and interpret the generation of language models (LMs)? In this work, we theoretically frame the sentence semantics as the composition of \textit{semantic role - word content} features and propose the formal semantic geometry. To inject such geometry into Transformer-based LMs (i.e. GPT2), we deploy Transformer-based Variational AutoEncoder with a supervision approach, where the sentence generation can be manipulated and explained over low-dimensional latent Gaussian space. In addition, we propose a new probing algorithm to guide the movement of sentence vectors over such geometry. Experimental results reveal that the formal semantic geometry can potentially deliver better control and interpretation to sentence generation. 由于其 \textit{localization} 或 \textit{composition} 属性，形式/符号语义可以为句子表示提供规范的、严格的可控性和可解释性。我们如何将这样的属性传递给当前的分布式句子表示来控制和解释语言模型（LM）的生成？在这项工作中，我们从理论上将句子语义框架为 \textit{语义角色 - 单词内容}特征的组合，并提出了形式语义几何。为了将这种几何形状注入基于 Transformer 的 LM（即 GPT2），我们部署了具有监督方法的基于 Transformer 的变分自动编码器，其中可以在低维潜在高斯空间上操纵和解释句子生成。此外，我们提出了一种新的探测算法来指导句子向量在这种几何形状上的移动。实验结果表明，形式语义几何可以为句子生成提供更好的控制和解释。 本文提出一种基于变分自编码器（VAE）的准符号语义几何框架，旨在增强Transformer语言模型（如GPT2）的可控性和可解释性。 Yingji Zhang,Danilo S. Carvalho,André Freitas cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Leanne Nortje,Herman Kamper
title: Towards visually prompted keyword localisation for zero-resource spoken languages
title_zh: 零资源口语的视觉提示关键字本地化
abstract: Imagine being able to show a system a visual depiction of a keyword and finding spoken utterances that contain this keyword from a zero-resource speech corpus. We formalise this task and call it visually prompted keyword localisation (VPKL): given an image of a keyword, detect and predict where in an utterance the keyword occurs. To do VPKL, we propose a speech-vision model with a novel localising attention mechanism which we train with a new keyword sampling scheme. We show that these innovations give improvements in VPKL over an existing speech-vision model. We also compare to a visual bag-of-words (BoW) model where images are automatically tagged with visual labels and paired with unlabelled speech. Although this visual BoW can be queried directly with a written keyword (while our's takes image queries), our new model still outperforms the visual BoW in both detection and localisation, giving a 16% relative improvement in localisation F1.
summary: Imagine being able to show a system a visual depiction of a keyword and finding spoken utterances that contain this keyword from a zero-resource speech corpus. We formalise this task and call it visually prompted keyword localisation (VPKL): given an image of a keyword, detect and predict where in an utterance the keyword occurs. To do VPKL, we propose a speech-vision model with a novel localising attention mechanism which we train with a new keyword sampling scheme. We show that these innovations give improvements in VPKL over an existing speech-vision model. We also compare to a visual bag-of-words (BoW) model where images are automatically tagged with visual labels and paired with unlabelled speech. Although this visual BoW can be queried directly with a written keyword (while our's takes image queries), our new model still outperforms the visual BoW in both detection and localisation, giving a 16% relative improvement in localisation F1.
abstract_zh: 想象一下，能够向系统显示关键字的视觉描述，并从零资源语音语料库中查找包含该关键字的口头话语。我们将这项任务形式化，并将其称为视觉提示关键词定位（VPKL）：给定关键词图像，检测并预测关键词在话语中出现的位置。为了进行 VPKL，我们提出了一种具有新颖的本地化注意力机制的语音视觉模型，并使用新的关键字采样方案进行训练。我们表明，这些创新使 VPKL 相对于现有的语音视觉模型有所改进。我们还与视觉词袋（BoW）模型进行比较，其中图像自动标记视觉标签并与未标记的语音配对。虽然这个视觉 BoW 可以直接使用书面关键字进行查询（而我们的模型则采用图像查询），但我们的新模型在检测和定位方面仍然优于视觉 BoW，在定位 F1 方面相对提高了 16%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过视觉提示在零资源语音语料库中定位关键词的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在零资源语音处理中存在局限，无法有效利用视觉信息进行关键词定位。
AI.method: 提出语音-视觉模型，结合定位注意力机制与新的关键词采样策略，实现视觉提示下的关键词检测与定位。
AI.result: 相比现有模型和视觉BoW模型，在定位F1指标上提升16%。
AI.conclusion: 新模型验证了视觉提示在零资源语音关键词定位中的有效性，为相关研究提供新方向。

authors_text: Edric Matwiejew,Jason Pye,Jingbo B. Wang
title: Quantum Optimisation for Continuous Multivariable Functions by a Structured Search
title_zh: 通过结构化搜索进行连续多变量函数的量子优化
abstract: Solving optimisation problems is a promising near-term application of quantum computers. Quantum variational algorithms leverage quantum superposition and entanglement to optimise over exponentially large solution spaces using an alternating sequence of classically tunable unitaries. However, prior work has primarily addressed discrete optimisation problems. In addition, these algorithms have been designed generally under the assumption of an unstructured solution space, which constrains their speedup to the theoretical limits for the unstructured Grover's quantum search algorithm. In this paper, we show that quantum variational algorithms can efficiently optimise continuous multivariable functions by exploiting general structural properties of a discretised continuous solution space with a convergence that exceeds the limits of an unstructured quantum search. We introduce the Quantum Multivariable Optimisation Algorithm (QMOA) and demonstrate its advantage over pre-existing methods, particularly when optimising high-dimensional and oscillatory functions.
summary: Solving optimisation problems is a promising near-term application of quantum computers. Quantum variational algorithms leverage quantum superposition and entanglement to optimise over exponentially large solution spaces using an alternating sequence of classically tunable unitaries. However, prior work has primarily addressed discrete optimisation problems. In addition, these algorithms have been designed generally under the assumption of an unstructured solution space, which constrains their speedup to the theoretical limits for the unstructured Grover's quantum search algorithm. In this paper, we show that quantum variational algorithms can efficiently optimise continuous multivariable functions by exploiting general structural properties of a discretised continuous solution space with a convergence that exceeds the limits of an unstructured quantum search. We introduce the Quantum Multivariable Optimisation Algorithm (QMOA) and demonstrate its advantage over pre-existing methods, particularly when optimising high-dimensional and oscillatory functions.
abstract_zh: 解决优化问题是量子计算机近期有前景的应用。量子变分算法利用量子叠加和纠缠，使用经典可调谐幺正的交替序列来优化指数级大的解空间。然而，先前的工作主要解决离散优化问题。此外，这些算法通常是在非结构化解空间的假设下设计的，这将它们的加速限制在非结构化 Grover 量子搜索算法的理论极限。在本文中，我们证明量子变分算法可以通过利用离散连续解空间的一般结构特性来有效地优化连续多变量函数，其收敛性超出了非结构化量子搜索的极限。我们介绍了量子多变量优化算法（QMOA），并展示了其相对于现有方法的优势，特别是在优化高维和振荡函数时。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于结构化搜索的量子变分算法QMOA，用于高效优化连续多变量函数。
AI.motivation: 现有量子优化算法主要针对离散问题且假设解空间无结构，难以有效处理高维连续函数优化问题。
AI.method: 通过离散化连续解空间并利用其结构特性设计QMOA算法，突破无结构量子搜索的理论限制。
AI.result: 实验表明QMOA在优化高维和振荡函数时相比传统方法具有显著优势。
AI.conclusion: 结构化量子优化算法为连续多变量函数优化提供了新范式，拓展了量子计算的应用边界。

authors_text: Pooja Prajod,Elisabeth André
title: On the Generalizability of ECG-based Stress Detection Models
title_zh: 基于心电图的压力检测模型的通用性
comment: Published in Proceedings of 2022 21st IEEE International Conference on Machine Learning and Applications (ICMLA)
comments: Published in Proceedings of 2022 21st IEEE International Conference on Machine Learning and Applications (ICMLA)
abstract: Stress is prevalent in many aspects of everyday life including work, healthcare, and social interactions. Many works have studied handcrafted features from various bio-signals that are indicators of stress. Recently, deep learning models have also been proposed to detect stress. Typically, stress models are trained and validated on the same dataset, often involving one stressful scenario. However, it is not practical to collect stress data for every scenario. So, it is crucial to study the generalizability of these models and determine to what extent they can be used in other scenarios. In this paper, we explore the generalization capabilities of Electrocardiogram (ECG)-based deep learning models and models based on handcrafted ECG features, i.e., Heart Rate Variability (HRV) features. To this end, we train three HRV models and two deep learning models that use ECG signals as input. We use ECG signals from two popular stress datasets - WESAD and SWELL-KW - differing in terms of stressors and recording devices. First, we evaluate the models using leave-one-subject-out (LOSO) cross-validation using training and validation samples from the same dataset. Next, we perform a cross-dataset validation of the models, that is, LOSO models trained on the WESAD dataset are validated using SWELL-KW samples and vice versa. While deep learning models achieve the best results on the same dataset, models based on HRV features considerably outperform them on data from a different dataset. This trend is observed for all the models on both datasets. Therefore, HRV models are a better choice for stress recognition in applications that are different from the dataset scenario. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to compare the cross-dataset generalizability between ECG-based deep learning models and HRV models.
summary: Stress is prevalent in many aspects of everyday life including work, healthcare, and social interactions. Many works have studied handcrafted features from various bio-signals that are indicators of stress. Recently, deep learning models have also been proposed to detect stress. Typically, stress models are trained and validated on the same dataset, often involving one stressful scenario. However, it is not practical to collect stress data for every scenario. So, it is crucial to study the generalizability of these models and determine to what extent they can be used in other scenarios. In this paper, we explore the generalization capabilities of Electrocardiogram (ECG)-based deep learning models and models based on handcrafted ECG features, i.e., Heart Rate Variability (HRV) features. To this end, we train three HRV models and two deep learning models that use ECG signals as input. We use ECG signals from two popular stress datasets - WESAD and SWELL-KW - differing in terms of stressors and recording devices. First, we evaluate the models using leave-one-subject-out (LOSO) cross-validation using training and validation samples from the same dataset. Next, we perform a cross-dataset validation of the models, that is, LOSO models trained on the WESAD dataset are validated using SWELL-KW samples and vice versa. While deep learning models achieve the best results on the same dataset, models based on HRV features considerably outperform them on data from a different dataset. This trend is observed for all the models on both datasets. Therefore, HRV models are a better choice for stress recognition in applications that are different from the dataset scenario. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to compare the cross-dataset generalizability between ECG-based deep learning models and HRV models.
abstract_zh: 压力普遍存在于日常生活的许多方面，包括工作、医疗保健和社交互动。许多作品研究了来自各种生物信号的手工特征，这些生物信号是压力的指标。最近，深度学习模型也被提出来检测压力。通常，压力模型是在同一数据集上进行训练和验证的，通常涉及一种压力场景。然而，收集每种情况的压力数据是不切实际的。因此，研究这些模型的通用性并确定它们在多大程度上可以用于其他场景至关重要。在本文中，我们探讨了基于心电图（ECG）的深度学习模型和基于手工制作的心电图特征（即心率变异性（HRV）特征）的模型的泛化能力。为此，我们训练了三个 HRV 模型和两个使用 ECG 信号作为输入的深度学习模型。我们使用来自两个流行压力数据集（WESAD 和 SWELL-KW）的心电图信号，这两个数据集在压力源和记录设备方面有所不同。首先，我们使用来自同一数据集的训练和验证样本，使用留一主题排除（LOSO）交叉验证来评估模型。接下来，我们对模型进行跨数据集验证，即使用 SWELL-KW 样本验证在 WESAD 数据集上训练的 LOSO 模型，反之亦然。虽然深度学习模型在同一数据集上取得了最佳结果，但基于 HRV 特征的模型在来自不同数据集的数据上的表现明显优于它们。两个数据集上的所有模型都观察到了这一趋势。因此，在不同于数据集场景的应用中，HRV 模型是压力识别的更好选择。据我们所知，这是第一个比较基于心电图的深度学习模型和 HRV 模型之间的跨数据集泛化性的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文研究基于心电图（ECG）的压力检测模型在不同数据集上的泛化能力，比较深度学习模型与基于HRV特征模型的跨场景适用性。
AI.motivation: 现有压力检测模型多在单一数据集上训练，难以适应实际中多样的应用场景，需评估模型在不同数据集和场景下的泛化性能。
AI.method: 训练三种HRV模型和两种深度学习模型，使用WESAD和SWELL-KW两个数据集进行同一数据集内（LOSO交叉验证）和跨数据集验证。
AI.result: 深度学习模型在相同数据集表现最佳，但HRV模型在跨数据集验证中显著优于深度学习模型，且该趋势在两个数据集均成立。
AI.conclusion: HRV模型更适用于与训练数据集不同的实际场景，首次系统比较了ECG深度学习模型与HRV模型的跨数据集泛化能力。

search_text: On the Generalizability of ECG-based Stress Detection Models 基于心电图的压力检测模型的通用性 Stress is prevalent in many aspects of everyday life including work, healthcare, and social interactions. Many works have studied handcrafted features from various bio-signals that are indicators of stress. Recently, deep learning models have also been proposed to detect stress. Typically, stress models are trained and validated on the same dataset, often involving one stressful scenario. However, it is not practical to collect stress data for every scenario. So, it is crucial to study the generalizability of these models and determine to what extent they can be used in other scenarios. In this paper, we explore the generalization capabilities of Electrocardiogram (ECG)-based deep learning models and models based on handcrafted ECG features, i.e., Heart Rate Variability (HRV) features. To this end, we train three HRV models and two deep learning models that use ECG signals as input. We use ECG signals from two popular stress datasets - WESAD and SWELL-KW - differing in terms of stressors and recording devices. First, we evaluate the models using leave-one-subject-out (LOSO) cross-validation using training and validation samples from the same dataset. Next, we perform a cross-dataset validation of the models, that is, LOSO models trained on the WESAD dataset are validated using SWELL-KW samples and vice versa. While deep learning models achieve the best results on the same dataset, models based on HRV features considerably outperform them on data from a different dataset. This trend is observed for all the models on both datasets. Therefore, HRV models are a better choice for stress recognition in applications that are different from the dataset scenario. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to compare the cross-dataset generalizability between ECG-based deep learning models and HRV models. 压力普遍存在于日常生活的许多方面，包括工作、医疗保健和社交互动。许多作品研究了来自各种生物信号的手工特征，这些生物信号是压力的指标。最近，深度学习模型也被提出来检测压力。通常，压力模型是在同一数据集上进行训练和验证的，通常涉及一种压力场景。然而，收集每种情况的压力数据是不切实际的。因此，研究这些模型的通用性并确定它们在多大程度上可以用于其他场景至关重要。在本文中，我们探讨了基于心电图（ECG）的深度学习模型和基于手工制作的心电图特征（即心率变异性（HRV）特征）的模型的泛化能力。为此，我们训练了三个 HRV 模型和两个使用 ECG 信号作为输入的深度学习模型。我们使用来自两个流行压力数据集（WESAD 和 SWELL-KW）的心电图信号，这两个数据集在压力源和记录设备方面有所不同。首先，我们使用来自同一数据集的训练和验证样本，使用留一主题排除（LOSO）交叉验证来评估模型。接下来，我们对模型进行跨数据集验证，即使用 SWELL-KW 样本验证在 WESAD 数据集上训练的 LOSO 模型，反之亦然。虽然深度学习模型在同一数据集上取得了最佳结果，但基于 HRV 特征的模型在来自不同数据集的数据上的表现明显优于它们。两个数据集上的所有模型都观察到了这一趋势。因此，在不同于数据集场景的应用中，HRV 模型是压力识别的更好选择。据我们所知，这是第一个比较基于心电图的深度学习模型和 HRV 模型之间的跨数据集泛化性的工作。 本文研究基于心电图（ECG）的压力检测模型在不同数据集上的泛化能力，比较深度学习模型与基于HRV特征模型的跨场景适用性。 Pooja Prajod,Elisabeth André cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Yizeng Han,Zhihang Yuan,Yifan Pu,Chenhao Xue,Shiji Song,Guangyu Sun,Gao Huang
title: Latency-aware Spatial-wise Dynamic Networks
title_zh: 延迟感知的空间动态网络
abstract: Spatial-wise dynamic convolution has become a promising approach to improving the inference efficiency of deep networks. By allocating more computation to the most informative pixels, such an adaptive inference paradigm reduces the spatial redundancy in image features and saves a considerable amount of unnecessary computation. However, the theoretical efficiency achieved by previous methods can hardly translate into a realistic speedup, especially on the multi-core processors (e.g. GPUs). The key challenge is that the existing literature has only focused on designing algorithms with minimal computation, ignoring the fact that the practical latency can also be influenced by scheduling strategies and hardware properties. To bridge the gap between theoretical computation and practical efficiency, we propose a latency-aware spatial-wise dynamic network (LASNet), which performs coarse-grained spatially adaptive inference under the guidance of a novel latency prediction model. The latency prediction model can efficiently estimate the inference latency of dynamic networks by simultaneously considering algorithms, scheduling strategies, and hardware properties. We use the latency predictor to guide both the algorithm design and the scheduling optimization on various hardware platforms. Experiments on image classification, object detection and instance segmentation demonstrate that the proposed framework significantly improves the practical inference efficiency of deep networks. For example, the average latency of a ResNet-101 on the ImageNet validation set could be reduced by 36% and 46% on a server GPU (Nvidia Tesla-V100) and an edge device (Nvidia Jetson TX2 GPU) respectively without sacrificing the accuracy. Code is available at https://github.com/LeapLabTHU/LASNet.
summary: Spatial-wise dynamic convolution has become a promising approach to improving the inference efficiency of deep networks. By allocating more computation to the most informative pixels, such an adaptive inference paradigm reduces the spatial redundancy in image features and saves a considerable amount of unnecessary computation. However, the theoretical efficiency achieved by previous methods can hardly translate into a realistic speedup, especially on the multi-core processors (e.g. GPUs). The key challenge is that the existing literature has only focused on designing algorithms with minimal computation, ignoring the fact that the practical latency can also be influenced by scheduling strategies and hardware properties. To bridge the gap between theoretical computation and practical efficiency, we propose a latency-aware spatial-wise dynamic network (LASNet), which performs coarse-grained spatially adaptive inference under the guidance of a novel latency prediction model. The latency prediction model can efficiently estimate the inference latency of dynamic networks by simultaneously considering algorithms, scheduling strategies, and hardware properties. We use the latency predictor to guide both the algorithm design and the scheduling optimization on various hardware platforms. Experiments on image classification, object detection and instance segmentation demonstrate that the proposed framework significantly improves the practical inference efficiency of deep networks. For example, the average latency of a ResNet-101 on the ImageNet validation set could be reduced by 36% and 46% on a server GPU (Nvidia Tesla-V100) and an edge device (Nvidia Jetson TX2 GPU) respectively without sacrificing the accuracy. Code is available at https://github.com/LeapLabTHU/LASNet.
abstract_zh: 空间动态卷积已成为提高深度网络推理效率的一种有前途的方法。通过将更多的计算分配给信息最丰富的像素，这种自适应推理范式减少了图像特征中的空间冗余，并节省了大量不必要的计算。然而，以前的方法所实现的理论效率很难转化为实际的加速，特别是在多核处理器（例如 GPU）上。关键的挑战是现有文献只关注设计具有最少计算量的算法，忽略了实际延迟也可能受到调度策略和硬件属性影响的事实。为了弥合理论计算和实际效率之间的差距，我们提出了一种延迟感知空间动态网络（LASNet），它在新颖的延迟预测模型的指导下执行粗粒度的空间自适应推理。延迟预测模型可以通过同时考虑算法、调度策略和硬件属性来有效地估计动态网络的推理延迟。我们使用延迟预测器来指导各种硬件平台上的算法设计和调度优化。图像分类、目标检测和实例分割的实验表明，所提出的框架显着提高了深度网络的实际推理效率。例如，ImageNet 验证集上的 ResNet-101 在服务器 GPU (Nvidia Tesla-V100) 和边缘设备 (Nvidia Jetson TX2 GPU) 上的平均延迟可分别减少 36% 和 46%，而不会牺牲准确性。代码可在 https://github.com/LeapLabTHU/LASNet 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为LASNet的延迟感知空间动态网络，旨在通过结合算法设计、调度策略和硬件特性，提升深度网络的推理效率。
AI.motivation: 现有空间动态卷积方法虽能减少计算冗余，但因忽略调度策略和硬件特性，导致理论计算效率难以转化为实际加速，尤其是在多核处理器上表现不佳。
AI.method: 提出延迟预测模型，综合考虑算法、调度策略和硬件属性，指导动态网络的粗粒度空间自适应推理，并在不同硬件平台优化算法设计与调度。
AI.result: 在ImageNet数据集上，ResNet-101模型在服务器GPU和边缘设备上的平均延迟分别降低36%和46%，且精度无损失。
AI.conclusion: LASNet通过引入延迟感知机制，有效弥合了理论计算效率与实际硬件性能之间的差距，显著提升了深度网络的实用推理效率。

authors_text: Edoardo Arnaudo,Antonio Tavera,Fabrizio Dominici,Carlo Masone,Barbara Caputo
title: Hierarchical Instance Mixing across Domains in Aerial Segmentation
title_zh: 空中分割中跨域的分层实例混合
abstract: We investigate the task of unsupervised domain adaptation in aerial semantic segmentation and discover that the current state-of-the-art algorithms designed for autonomous driving based on domain mixing do not translate well to the aerial setting. This is due to two factors: (i) a large disparity in the extension of the semantic categories, which causes a domain imbalance in the mixed image, and (ii) a weaker structural consistency in aerial scenes than in driving scenes since the same scene might be viewed from different perspectives and there is no well-defined and repeatable structure of the semantic elements in the images. Our solution to these problems is composed of: (i) a new mixing strategy for aerial segmentation across domains called Hierarchical Instance Mixing (HIMix), which extracts a set of connected components from each semantic mask and mixes them according to a semantic hierarchy and, (ii) a twin-head architecture in which two separate segmentation heads are fed with variations of the same images in a contrastive fashion to produce finer segmentation maps. We conduct extensive experiments on the LoveDA benchmark, where our solution outperforms the current state-of-the-art.
summary: We investigate the task of unsupervised domain adaptation in aerial semantic segmentation and discover that the current state-of-the-art algorithms designed for autonomous driving based on domain mixing do not translate well to the aerial setting. This is due to two factors: (i) a large disparity in the extension of the semantic categories, which causes a domain imbalance in the mixed image, and (ii) a weaker structural consistency in aerial scenes than in driving scenes since the same scene might be viewed from different perspectives and there is no well-defined and repeatable structure of the semantic elements in the images. Our solution to these problems is composed of: (i) a new mixing strategy for aerial segmentation across domains called Hierarchical Instance Mixing (HIMix), which extracts a set of connected components from each semantic mask and mixes them according to a semantic hierarchy and, (ii) a twin-head architecture in which two separate segmentation heads are fed with variations of the same images in a contrastive fashion to produce finer segmentation maps. We conduct extensive experiments on the LoveDA benchmark, where our solution outperforms the current state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了空中语义分割中的无监督域适应任务，发现当前基于域混合为自动驾驶设计的最先进算法不能很好地应用于空中环境。这是由于两个因素造成的：（i）语义类别的扩展差异很大，导致混合图像中的域不平衡；（ii）航拍场景的结构一致性比驾驶场景弱，因为同一场景可能从不同的角度观看，并且图像中的语义元素没有明确定义和可重复的结构。我们对这些问题的解决方案包括：（i）一种新的跨域航空分割混合策略，称为层次实例混合（HIMix），它从每个语义掩码中提取一组连接的组件，并根据语义层次结构将它们混合；（ii）双头架构，其中两个单独的分割头以对比方式输入相同图像的变体，以生成更精细的分割图。我们对 LoveDA 基准进行了广泛的实验，我们的解决方案优于当前最先进的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文研究航拍图像语义分割中的无监督领域自适应问题，提出针对领域差异和结构不一致的解决方案。
AI.motivation: 现有基于自动驾驶的领域混合算法在航拍场景中效果不佳，因语义类别扩展差异大且航拍场景结构一致性弱。
AI.method: 提出层次实例混合策略HIMix（按语义层次混合连通组件）和双头对比分割架构。
AI.result: 在LoveDA基准测试中优于当前最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: HIMix和双头架构有效解决了航拍领域自适应中的语义不平衡和结构不一致问题。

search_text: Hierarchical Instance Mixing across Domains in Aerial Segmentation 空中分割中跨域的分层实例混合 We investigate the task of unsupervised domain adaptation in aerial semantic segmentation and discover that the current state-of-the-art algorithms designed for autonomous driving based on domain mixing do not translate well to the aerial setting. This is due to two factors: (i) a large disparity in the extension of the semantic categories, which causes a domain imbalance in the mixed image, and (ii) a weaker structural consistency in aerial scenes than in driving scenes since the same scene might be viewed from different perspectives and there is no well-defined and repeatable structure of the semantic elements in the images. Our solution to these problems is composed of: (i) a new mixing strategy for aerial segmentation across domains called Hierarchical Instance Mixing (HIMix), which extracts a set of connected components from each semantic mask and mixes them according to a semantic hierarchy and, (ii) a twin-head architecture in which two separate segmentation heads are fed with variations of the same images in a contrastive fashion to produce finer segmentation maps. We conduct extensive experiments on the LoveDA benchmark, where our solution outperforms the current state-of-the-art. 我们研究了空中语义分割中的无监督域适应任务，发现当前基于域混合为自动驾驶设计的最先进算法不能很好地应用于空中环境。这是由于两个因素造成的：（i）语义类别的扩展差异很大，导致混合图像中的域不平衡；（ii）航拍场景的结构一致性比驾驶场景弱，因为同一场景可能从不同的角度观看，并且图像中的语义元素没有明确定义和可重复的结构。我们对这些问题的解决方案包括：（i）一种新的跨域航空分割混合策略，称为层次实例混合（HIMix），它从每个语义掩码中提取一组连接的组件，并根据语义层次结构将它们混合；（ii）双头架构，其中两个单独的分割头以对比方式输入相同图像的变体，以生成更精细的分割图。我们对 LoveDA 基准进行了广泛的实验，我们的解决方案优于当前最先进的解决方案。 本文研究航拍图像语义分割中的无监督领域自适应问题，提出针对领域差异和结构不一致的解决方案。 Edoardo Arnaudo,Antonio Tavera,Fabrizio Dominici,Carlo Masone,Barbara Caputo cs.CV

authors_text: Pedro Sanchez,Xiao Liu,Alison Q O'Neil,Sotirios A. Tsaftaris
title: Diffusion Models for Causal Discovery via Topological Ordering
title_zh: 通过拓扑排序进行因果发现的扩散模型
comment: Implementation is available at https://github.com/vios-s/DiffAN Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2023 https://openreview.net/forum?id=Idusfje4-Wq
comments: Implementation is available at https://github.com/vios-s/DiffAN Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2023 https://openreview.net/forum?id=Idusfje4-Wq
abstract: Discovering causal relations from observational data becomes possible with additional assumptions such as considering the functional relations to be constrained as nonlinear with additive noise (ANM). Even with strong assumptions, causal discovery involves an expensive search problem over the space of directed acyclic graphs (DAGs). \emph{Topological ordering} approaches reduce the optimisation space of causal discovery by searching over a permutation rather than graph space. For ANMs, the \emph{Hessian} of the data log-likelihood can be used for finding leaf nodes in a causal graph, allowing its topological ordering. However, existing computational methods for obtaining the Hessian still do not scale as the number of variables and the number of samples increase. Therefore, inspired by recent innovations in diffusion probabilistic models (DPMs), we propose \emph{DiffAN}\footnote{Implementation is available at \url{https://github.com/vios-s/DiffAN} .}, a topological ordering algorithm that leverages DPMs for learning a Hessian function. We introduce theory for updating the learned Hessian without re-training the neural network, and we show that computing with a subset of samples gives an accurate approximation of the ordering, which allows scaling to datasets with more samples and variables. We show empirically that our method scales exceptionally well to datasets with up to $500$ nodes and up to $10^5$ samples while still performing on par over small datasets with state-of-the-art causal discovery methods. Implementation is available at https://github.com/vios-s/DiffAN .
summary: Discovering causal relations from observational data becomes possible with additional assumptions such as considering the functional relations to be constrained as nonlinear with additive noise (ANM). Even with strong assumptions, causal discovery involves an expensive search problem over the space of directed acyclic graphs (DAGs). \emph{Topological ordering} approaches reduce the optimisation space of causal discovery by searching over a permutation rather than graph space. For ANMs, the \emph{Hessian} of the data log-likelihood can be used for finding leaf nodes in a causal graph, allowing its topological ordering. However, existing computational methods for obtaining the Hessian still do not scale as the number of variables and the number of samples increase. Therefore, inspired by recent innovations in diffusion probabilistic models (DPMs), we propose \emph{DiffAN}\footnote{Implementation is available at \url{https://github.com/vios-s/DiffAN} .}, a topological ordering algorithm that leverages DPMs for learning a Hessian function. We introduce theory for updating the learned Hessian without re-training the neural network, and we show that computing with a subset of samples gives an accurate approximation of the ordering, which allows scaling to datasets with more samples and variables. We show empirically that our method scales exceptionally well to datasets with up to $500$ nodes and up to $10^5$ samples while still performing on par over small datasets with state-of-the-art causal discovery methods. Implementation is available at https://github.com/vios-s/DiffAN .
abstract_zh: 通过附加假设，例如考虑将函数关系约束为带有加性噪声 (ANM) 的非线性，从观测数据中发现因果关系成为可能。即使有强有力的假设，因果发现也涉及有向无环图 (DAG) 空间上昂贵的搜索问题。 \emph{拓扑排序}方法通过搜索排列而不是图空间来减少因果发现的优化空间。对于 ANM，数据对数似然的 \emph{Hessian} 可用于查找因果图中的叶节点，从而实现其拓扑排序。然而，现有的用于获得 Hessian 矩阵的计算方法仍然不能随着变量数量和样本数量的增加而扩展。因此，受扩散概率模型 (DPM) 最近创新的启发，我们提出了 \emph{DiffAN}\footnote{实现可在 \url{https://github.com/vios-s/DiffAN} .} 获得，这是一种利用 DPM 学习 Hessian 函数的拓扑排序算法。我们引入了在不重新训练神经网络的情况下更新学习的 Hessian 矩阵的理论，并且我们表明使用样本子集进行计算可以给出排序的准确近似值，这允许扩展到具有更多样本和变量的数据集。我们的经验表明，我们的方法可以很好地扩展到具有高达 500 美元节点和高达 10^5 美元样本的数据集，同时仍然可以通过最先进的因果发现方法在小型数据集上表现出色。可以在 https://github.com/vios-s/DiffAN 上进行实施。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于扩散概率模型（DPM）的因果发现方法DiffAN，通过拓扑排序实现大规模数据集的因果关系学习。
AI.motivation: 现有拓扑排序方法在变量和样本数量增加时面临计算效率瓶颈，需开发可扩展且保持精度的因果发现算法。
AI.method: 利用扩散模型学习数据对数似然的Hessian函数，通过子集采样近似计算并动态更新Hessian，避免神经网络重训练。
AI.result: 实验表明DiffAN可处理500节点和10^5样本的数据集，在小规模数据上与最先进方法性能相当。
AI.conclusion: DiffAN通过扩散模型与Hessian近似技术，实现了因果发现任务在大规模数据下的高效准确求解。

Even with strong assumptions, causal discovery involves an expensive search problem over the space of directed acyclic graphs (DAGs). \emph{Topological ordering} approaches reduce the optimisation space of causal discovery by searching over a permutation rather than graph space. For ANMs, the \emph{Hessian} of the data log-likelihood can be used for finding leaf nodes in a causal graph, allowing its topological ordering. However, existing computational methods for obtaining the Hessian still do not scale as the number of variables and the number of samples increase. Therefore, inspired by recent innovations in diffusion probabilistic models (DPMs), we propose \emph{DiffAN}\footnote{Implementation is available at \url{https://github.com/vios-s/DiffAN} .}, a topological ordering algorithm that leverages DPMs for learning a Hessian function. We introduce theory for updating the learned Hessian without re-training the neural network, and we show that computing with a subset of samples gives an accurate approximation of the ordering, which allows scaling to datasets with more samples and variables. We show empirically that our method scales exceptionally well to datasets with up to $500$ nodes and up to $10^5$ samples while still performing on par over small datasets with state-of-the-art causal discovery methods. Implementation is available at https://github.com/vios-s/DiffAN . 通过附加假设，例如考虑将函数关系约束为带有加性噪声 (ANM) 的非线性，从观测数据中发现因果关系成为可能。即使有强有力的假设，因果发现也涉及有向无环图 (DAG) 空间上昂贵的搜索问题。 \emph{拓扑排序}方法通过搜索排列而不是图空间来减少因果发现的优化空间。对于 ANM，数据对数似然的 \emph{Hessian} 可用于查找因果图中的叶节点，从而实现其拓扑排序。然而，现有的用于获得 Hessian 矩阵的计算方法仍然不能随着变量数量和样本数量的增加而扩展。因此，受扩散概率模型 (DPM) 最近创新的启发，我们提出了 \emph{DiffAN}\footnote{实现可在 \url{https://github.com/vios-s/DiffAN} .} 获得，这是一种利用 DPM 学习 Hessian 函数的拓扑排序算法。我们引入了在不重新训练神经网络的情况下更新学习的 Hessian 矩阵的理论，并且我们表明使用样本子集进行计算可以给出排序的准确近似值，这允许扩展到具有更多样本和变量的数据集。我们的经验表明，我们的方法可以很好地扩展到具有高达 500 美元节点和高达 10^5 美元样本的数据集，同时仍然可以通过最先进的因果发现方法在小型数据集上表现出色。可以在 https://github.com/vios-s/DiffAN 上进行实施。 本文提出了一种基于扩散概率模型（DPM）的因果发现方法DiffAN，通过拓扑排序实现大规模数据集的因果关系学习。 Pedro Sanchez,Xiao Liu,Alison Q O'Neil,Sotirios A. authors_text: Han Chen,Yifan Jiang,Hanseok Ko
title: Pose-Guided Graph Convolutional Networks for Skeleton-Based Action Recognition
title_zh: 用于基于骨架的动作识别的姿势引导图卷积网络
abstract: Graph convolutional networks (GCNs), which can model the human body skeletons as spatial and temporal graphs, have shown remarkable potential in skeleton-based action recognition. However, in the existing GCN-based methods, graph-structured representation of the human skeleton makes it difficult to be fused with other modalities, especially in the early stages. This may limit their scalability and performance in action recognition tasks. In addition, the pose information, which naturally contains informative and discriminative clues for action recognition, is rarely explored together with skeleton data in existing methods. In this work, we propose pose-guided GCN (PG-GCN), a multi-modal framework for high-performance human action recognition. In particular, a multi-stream network is constructed to simultaneously explore the robust features from both the pose and skeleton data, while a dynamic attention module is designed for early-stage feature fusion. The core idea of this module is to utilize a trainable graph to aggregate features from the skeleton stream with that of the pose stream, which leads to a network with more robust feature representation ability. Extensive experiments show that the proposed PG-GCN can achieve state-of-the-art performance on the NTU RGB+D 60 and NTU RGB+D 120 datasets.
summary: Graph convolutional networks (GCNs), which can model the human body skeletons as spatial and temporal graphs, have shown remarkable potential in skeleton-based action recognition. However, in the existing GCN-based methods, graph-structured representation of the human skeleton makes it difficult to be fused with other modalities, especially in the early stages. This may limit their scalability and performance in action recognition tasks. In addition, the pose information, which naturally contains informative and discriminative clues for action recognition, is rarely explored together with skeleton data in existing methods. In this work, we propose pose-guided GCN (PG-GCN), a multi-modal framework for high-performance human action recognition. In particular, a multi-stream network is constructed to simultaneously explore the robust features from both the pose and skeleton data, while a dynamic attention module is designed for early-stage feature fusion. The core idea of this module is to utilize a trainable graph to aggregate features from the skeleton stream with that of the pose stream, which leads to a network with more robust feature representation ability. Extensive experiments show that the proposed PG-GCN can achieve state-of-the-art performance on the NTU RGB+D 60 and NTU RGB+D 120 datasets.
abstract_zh: 图卷积网络（GCN）可以将人体骨骼建模为空间和时间图，在基于骨骼的动作识别中显示出巨大的潜力。然而，在现有的基于 GCN 的方法中，人体骨骼的图结构表示使得很难与其他模态融合，特别是在早期阶段。这可能会限制它们在动作识别任务中的可扩展性和性能。此外，姿势信息自然包含用于动作识别的信息性和判别性线索，在现有方法中很少与骨架数据一起探索。在这项工作中，我们提出了姿势引导 GCN（PG-GCN），这是一种用于高性能人类动作识别的多模态框架。特别是，构建了多流网络以同时探索姿势和骨架数据的鲁棒特征，同时设计了动态注意模块用于早期特征融合。该模块的核心思想是利用可训练图将骨架流中的特征与姿势流中的特征聚合，从而使网络具有更强大的特征表示能力。大量实验表明，所提出的 PG-GCN 可以在 NTU RGB+D 60 和 NTU RGB+D 120 数据集上实现最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于姿态引导的图卷积网络（PG-GCN），用于提高骨骼数据驱动的动作识别性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于图卷积网络（GCN）的方法在融合骨骼数据与其他模态信息时存在困难，且很少同时利用姿态信息与骨骼数据进行动作识别。
AI.method: 本文设计了一个多模态框架PG-GCN，包含多流网络和动态注意力模块，用于在早期阶段融合骨骼数据与姿态信息的特征。
AI.result: 实验表明，PG-GCN在NTU RGB+D 60和NTU RGB+D 120数据集上达到了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: PG-GCN通过结合姿态信息与骨骼数据，提升了动作识别的性能，为多模态融合提供了有效的方法。

search_text: Pose-Guided Graph Convolutional Networks for Skeleton-Based Action Recognition 用于基于骨架的动作识别的姿势引导图卷积网络 Graph convolutional networks (GCNs), which can model the human body skeletons as spatial and temporal graphs, have shown remarkable potential in skeleton-based action recognition. However, in the existing GCN-based methods, graph-structured representation of the human skeleton makes it difficult to be fused with other modalities, especially in the early stages. This may limit their scalability and performance in action recognition tasks. In addition, the pose information, which naturally contains informative and discriminative clues for action recognition, is rarely explored together with skeleton data in existing methods. In this work, we propose pose-guided GCN (PG-GCN), a multi-modal framework for high-performance human action recognition. In particular, a multi-stream network is constructed to simultaneously explore the robust features from both the pose and skeleton data, while a dynamic attention module is designed for early-stage feature fusion. The core idea of this module is to utilize a trainable graph to aggregate features from the skeleton stream with that of the pose stream, which leads to a network with more robust feature representation ability. Extensive experiments show that the proposed PG-GCN can achieve state-of-the-art performance on the NTU RGB+D 60 and NTU RGB+D 120 datasets. 图卷积网络（GCN）可以将人体骨骼建模为空间和时间图，在基于骨骼的动作识别中显示出巨大的潜力。然而，在现有的基于 GCN 的方法中，人体骨骼的图结构表示使得很难与其他模态融合，特别是在早期阶段。这可能会限制它们在动作识别任务中的可扩展性和性能。此外，姿势信息自然包含用于动作识别的信息性和判别性线索，在现有方法中很少与骨架数据一起探索。在这项工作中，我们提出了姿势引导 GCN（PG-GCN），这是一种用于高性能人类动作识别的多模态框架。特别是，构建了多流网络以同时探索姿势和骨架数据的鲁棒特征，同时设计了动态注意模块用于早期特征融合。该模块的核心思想是利用可训练图将骨架流中的特征与姿势流中的特征聚合，从而使网络具有更强大的特征表示能力。大量实验表明，所提出的 PG-GCN 可以在 NTU RGB+D 60 和 NTU RGB+D 120 数据集上实现最先进的性能。 本文提出了一种基于姿态引导的图卷积网络（PG-GCN），用于提高骨骼数据驱动的动作识别性能。 Han Chen,Yifan Jiang,Hanseok Ko cs.CV,eess.IV,eess.SP

authors_text: Michael Bonfert,Anke V. Reinschluessel,Susanne Putze,Yenchin Lai,Dmitry Alexandrovsky,Rainer Malaka,Tanja Döring
title: "Seeing the Faces Is So Important" -- Experiences From Online Team Meetings on Commercial Virtual Reality Platforms
title_zh: “看脸很重要”——商用虚拟现实平台在线团队会议的经验
comment: This article has been published at Frontiers in Virtual Reality, Research Topic "Everyday Virtual and Augmented Reality: Methods and Applications, Volume II": https://doi.org/10.3389/frvir.2022.945791
comments: This article has been published at Frontiers in Virtual Reality, Research Topic "Everyday Virtual and Augmented Reality: Methods and Applications, Volume II": https://doi.org/10.3389/frvir.2022.945791
abstract: During the Covid-19 pandemic, online meetings became common for daily teamwork in the home office. To understand the opportunities and challenges of meeting in virtual reality (VR) compared to video conferences, we conducted the weekly team meetings of our human-computer interaction research lab on five off-the-shelf online meeting platforms over four months. After each of the 12 meetings, we asked the participants (N = 32) to share their experiences, resulting in 200 completed online questionnaires. We evaluated the ratings of the overall meeting experience and conducted an exploratory factor analysis of the quantitative data to compare VR meetings and video calls in terms of meeting involvement and co-presence. In addition, a thematic analysis of the qualitative data revealed genuine insights covering five themes: spatial aspects, meeting atmosphere, expression of emotions, meeting productivity, and user needs. We reflect on our findings gained under authentic working conditions, derive lessons learned for running successful team meetings in VR supporting different kinds of meeting formats, and discuss the team's long-term platform choice.
summary: During the Covid-19 pandemic, online meetings became common for daily teamwork in the home office. To understand the opportunities and challenges of meeting in virtual reality (VR) compared to video conferences, we conducted the weekly team meetings of our human-computer interaction research lab on five off-the-shelf online meeting platforms over four months. After each of the 12 meetings, we asked the participants (N = 32) to share their experiences, resulting in 200 completed online questionnaires. We evaluated the ratings of the overall meeting experience and conducted an exploratory factor analysis of the quantitative data to compare VR meetings and video calls in terms of meeting involvement and co-presence. In addition, a thematic analysis of the qualitative data revealed genuine insights covering five themes: spatial aspects, meeting atmosphere, expression of emotions, meeting productivity, and user needs. We reflect on our findings gained under authentic working conditions, derive lessons learned for running successful team meetings in VR supporting different kinds of meeting formats, and discuss the team's long-term platform choice.
abstract_zh: 在 Covid-19 大流行期间，在线会议在家庭办公室的日常团队合作中变得很常见。为了了解虚拟现实 (VR) 会议与视频会议相比的机遇和挑战，我们在四个月的时间里在五个现成的在线会议平台上每周召开人机交互研究实验室的团队会议。在 12 次会议之后，我们要求参与者 (N = 32) 分享他们的经验，最终完成了 200 份在线调查问卷。我们评估了整体会议体验的评分，并对定量数据进行了探索性因素分析，以比较 VR 会议和视频通话的会议参与度和共存度。此外，对定性数据的主题分析揭示了涵盖五个主题的真实见解：空间方面、会议氛围、情感表达、会议生产力和用户需求。我们反思在真实工作条件下获得的发现，总结在支持不同类型会议形式的 VR 中成功举办团队会议的经验教训，并讨论团队的长期平台选择。

AI.tldr: 本文通过对比虚拟现实（VR）会议与视频会议的体验，探讨了疫情期间在线团队会议的机遇与挑战。
AI.motivation: 新冠疫情促使远程办公常态化，需了解VR会议相较于传统视频会议的优势与不足，以优化团队协作方式。
AI.method: 在四个月内使用五种商业VR平台进行12次团队会议，收集32名参与者的200份问卷，结合定量因子分析与定性主题分析。
AI.result: VR会议在空间感知、情绪表达和临场感方面表现更优，但存在技术门槛和效率差异；用户需求呈现多样化特征。
AI.conclusion: VR会议需平衡技术适配性与团队需求，长期平台选择应结合具体会议形式及用户偏好。

authors_text: Marc Dietrichstein,David Major,Martin Trapp,Maria Wimmer,Dimitrios Lenis,Philip Winter,Astrid Berg,Theresa Neubauer,Katja Bühler
title: Anomaly Detection using Generative Models and Sum-Product Networks in Mammography Scans
title_zh: 在乳腺 X 线摄影扫描中使用生成模型和和积网络进行异常检测
comment: Submitted to DGM4MICCAI 2022 Workshop. This preprint has not undergone peer review (when applicable) or any post-submission improvements or corrections. The Version of Record of this contribution is published in LNCS 13609, and is available online at https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-031-18576-2_8
comments: Submitted to DGM4MICCAI 2022 Workshop. This preprint has not undergone peer review (when applicable) or any post-submission improvements or corrections. The Version of Record of this contribution is published in LNCS 13609, and is available online at https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-031-18576-2_8
abstract: Unsupervised anomaly detection models which are trained solely by healthy data, have gained importance in the recent years, as the annotation of medical data is a tedious task. Autoencoders and generative adversarial networks are the standard anomaly detection methods that are utilized to learn the data distribution. However, they fall short when it comes to inference and evaluation of the likelihood of test samples. We propose a novel combination of generative models and a probabilistic graphical model. After encoding image samples by autoencoders, the distribution of data is modeled by Random and Tensorized Sum-Product Networks ensuring exact and efficient inference at test time. We evaluate different autoencoder architectures in combination with Random and Tensorized Sum-Product Networks on mammography images using patch-wise processing and observe superior performance over utilizing the models standalone and state-of-the-art in anomaly detection for medical data.
summary: Unsupervised anomaly detection models which are trained solely by healthy data, have gained importance in the recent years, as the annotation of medical data is a tedious task. Autoencoders and generative adversarial networks are the standard anomaly detection methods that are utilized to learn the data distribution. However, they fall short when it comes to inference and evaluation of the likelihood of test samples. We propose a novel combination of generative models and a probabilistic graphical model. After encoding image samples by autoencoders, the distribution of data is modeled by Random and Tensorized Sum-Product Networks ensuring exact and efficient inference at test time. We evaluate different autoencoder architectures in combination with Random and Tensorized Sum-Product Networks on mammography images using patch-wise processing and observe superior performance over utilizing the models standalone and state-of-the-art in anomaly detection for medical data.
abstract_zh: 近年来，仅由健康数据训练的无监督异常检测模型变得越来越重要，因为医疗数据的注释是一项繁琐的任务。自动编码器和生成对抗网络是用于学习数据分布的标准异常检测方法。然而，在推断和评估测试样本的可能性时，它们存在不足。我们提出了生成模型和概率图模型的新颖组合。通过自动编码器对图像样本进行编码后，通过随机和张量化和积网络对数据分布进行建模，确保测试时准确有效的推理。我们使用分片处理结合随机和张量化和积网络对乳房 X 线摄影图像评估不同的自动编码器架构，并观察到在医学数据异常检测中使用独立模型和最先进的模型的优越性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合生成模型与求和-乘积网络（SPN）的新方法，用于乳腺X光扫描中的异常检测。
AI.motivation: 医疗数据标注成本高，传统无监督异常检测模型（如自编码器、生成对抗网络）在测试样本似然评估上存在不足。
AI.method: 通过自编码器编码图像后，利用随机和张量化求和-乘积网络建模数据分布，结合块处理策略实现高效精确的异常检测。
AI.result: 在乳腺X光图像实验中，该方法在异常检测性能上优于独立使用生成模型及现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 融合生成模型与概率图模型的方法能有效提升医疗图像异常检测的准确性与效率。

authors_text: Govind Mittal,Chinmay Hegde,Nasir Memon
title: GOTCHA: Real-Time Video Deepfake Detection via Challenge-Response
title_zh: GOTCHA：通过挑战-响应进行实时视频 Deepfake 检测
abstract: With the rise of AI-enabled Real-Time Deepfakes (RTDFs), the integrity of online video interactions has become a growing concern. RTDFs have now made it feasible to replace an imposter's face with their victim in live video interactions. Such advancement in deepfakes also coaxes detection to rise to the same standard. However, existing deepfake detection techniques are asynchronous and hence ill-suited for RTDFs. To bridge this gap, we propose a challenge-response approach that establishes authenticity in live settings. We focus on talking-head style video interaction and present a taxonomy of challenges that specifically target inherent limitations of RTDF generation pipelines. We evaluate representative examples from the taxonomy by collecting a unique dataset comprising eight challenges, which consistently and visibly degrades the quality of state-of-the-art deepfake generators. These results are corroborated both by humans and a new automated scoring function, leading to 88.6% and 80.1% AUC, respectively. The findings underscore the promising potential of challenge-response systems for explainable and scalable real-time deepfake detection in practical scenarios. We provide access to data and code at \url{https://github.com/mittalgovind/GOTCHA-Deepfakes}.
summary: With the rise of AI-enabled Real-Time Deepfakes (RTDFs), the integrity of online video interactions has become a growing concern. RTDFs have now made it feasible to replace an imposter's face with their victim in live video interactions. Such advancement in deepfakes also coaxes detection to rise to the same standard. However, existing deepfake detection techniques are asynchronous and hence ill-suited for RTDFs. To bridge this gap, we propose a challenge-response approach that establishes authenticity in live settings. We focus on talking-head style video interaction and present a taxonomy of challenges that specifically target inherent limitations of RTDF generation pipelines. We evaluate representative examples from the taxonomy by collecting a unique dataset comprising eight challenges, which consistently and visibly degrades the quality of state-of-the-art deepfake generators. These results are corroborated both by humans and a new automated scoring function, leading to 88.6% and 80.1% AUC, respectively. The findings underscore the promising potential of challenge-response systems for explainable and scalable real-time deepfake detection in practical scenarios. We provide access to data and code at \url{https://github.com/mittalgovind/GOTCHA-Deepfakes}.
abstract_zh: 随着人工智能实时 Deepfakes (RTDF) 的兴起，在线视频交互的完整性已成为人们日益关注的问题。 RTDF 现在已经可以在实时视频交互中用受害者的脸替换冒名顶替者的脸。 Deepfakes 的这种进步也促使检测达到相同的标准。然而，现有的 Deepfake 检测技术是异步的，因此不适合 RTDF。为了弥补这一差距，我们提出了一种挑战-响应方法，可以在现场环境中建立真实性。我们专注于谈话式视频交互，并提出了专门针对 RTDF 生成管道的固有局限性的挑战分类。我们通过收集包含八个挑战的独特数据集来评估分类法中的代表性示例，这些挑战持续且明显地降低了最先进的深度伪造生成器的质量。这些结果得到了人类和新的自动评分功能的证实，AUC 分别为 88.6% 和 80.1%。这些发现强调了挑战响应系统在实际场景中可解释和可扩展的实时深度伪造检测的巨大潜力。我们在 \url{https://github.com/mittalgovind/GOTCHA-Deepfakes} 提供对数据和代码的访问。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于挑战-响应机制的实时视频深度伪造检测方法GOTCHA，通过设计特定挑战来暴露实时深度伪造生成器的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度伪造检测技术无法应对实时深度伪造（RTDF）的同步检测需求，而RTDF技术已能实现直播场景中人脸替换，威胁在线视频交互的真实性。
AI.method: 构建挑战-响应检测框架，针对RTDF生成管道的固有缺陷设计八类挑战任务，并建立包含这些挑战的评估数据集，结合人类评估和自动化评分函数验证效果。
AI.result: 人类评估和自动化评分分别达到88.6%和80.1%的AUC值，表明所提方法能显著降低先进深度伪造生成器的输出质量。
AI.conclusion: 挑战-响应系统为可解释且可扩展的实时深度伪造检测提供了新思路，具有实际应用潜力。

However, existing deepfake detection techniques are asynchronous and hence ill-suited for RTDFs. To bridge this gap, we propose a challenge-response approach that establishes authenticity in live settings. We focus on talking-head style video interaction and present a taxonomy of challenges that specifically target inherent limitations of RTDF generation pipelines. We evaluate representative examples from the taxonomy by collecting a unique dataset comprising eight challenges, which consistently and visibly degrades the quality of state-of-the-art deepfake generators. These results are corroborated both by humans and a new automated scoring function, leading to 88.6% and 80.1% AUC, respectively. The findings underscore the promising potential of challenge-response systems for explainable and scalable real-time deepfake detection in practical scenarios. authors_text: Kazuki Irie,Jürgen Schmidhuber
title: Images as Weight Matrices: Sequential Image Generation Through Synaptic Learning Rules
title_zh: 图像作为权重矩阵：通过突触学习规则生成顺序图像
abstract: Work on fast weight programmers has demonstrated the effectiveness of key/value outer product-based learning rules for sequentially generating a weight matrix (WM) of a neural net (NN) by another NN or itself. However, the weight generation steps are typically not visually interpretable by humans, because the contents stored in the WM of an NN are not. Here we apply the same principle to generate natural images. The resulting fast weight painters (FPAs) learn to execute sequences of delta learning rules to sequentially generate images as sums of outer products of self-invented keys and values, one rank at a time, as if each image was a WM of an NN. We train our FPAs in the generative adversarial networks framework, and evaluate on various image datasets. We show how these generic learning rules can generate images with respectable visual quality without any explicit inductive bias for images. While the performance largely lags behind the one of specialised state-of-the-art image generators, our approach allows for visualising how synaptic learning rules iteratively produce complex connection patterns, yielding human-interpretable meaningful images. Finally, we also show that an additional convolutional U-Net (now popular in diffusion models) at the output of an FPA can learn one-step "denoising" of FPA-generated images to enhance their quality. Our code is public.
summary: Work on fast weight programmers has demonstrated the effectiveness of key/value outer product-based learning rules for sequentially generating a weight matrix (WM) of a neural net (NN) by another NN or itself. However, the weight generation steps are typically not visually interpretable by humans, because the contents stored in the WM of an NN are not. Here we apply the same principle to generate natural images. The resulting fast weight painters (FPAs) learn to execute sequences of delta learning rules to sequentially generate images as sums of outer products of self-invented keys and values, one rank at a time, as if each image was a WM of an NN. We train our FPAs in the generative adversarial networks framework, and evaluate on various image datasets. We show how these generic learning rules can generate images with respectable visual quality without any explicit inductive bias for images. While the performance largely lags behind the one of specialised state-of-the-art image generators, our approach allows for visualising how synaptic learning rules iteratively produce complex connection patterns, yielding human-interpretable meaningful images. Finally, we also show that an additional convolutional U-Net (now popular in diffusion models) at the output of an FPA can learn one-step "denoising" of FPA-generated images to enhance their quality. Our code is public.
abstract_zh: 快速权重程序员的工作已经证明了基于键/值外积的学习规则对于由另一个神经网络或其本身顺序生成神经网络（NN）的权重矩阵（WM）的有效性。然而，权重生成步骤通常无法被人类直观地解释，因为存储在神经网络的 WM 中的内容不能被人类直观地解释。在这里，我们应用相同的原理来生成自然图像。由此产生的快速权重画家 (FPA) 学习执行增量学习规则序列，以按顺序生成图像作为自行发明的键和值的外积之和，一次一个等级，就好像每个图像是神经网络的 WM 一样。我们在生成对抗网络框架中训练 FPA，并在各种图像数据集上进行评估。我们展示了这些通用学习规则如何生成具有良好视觉质量的图像，而无需对图像产生任何明确的归纳偏差。虽然性能在很大程度上落后于最先进的专业图像生成器之一，但我们的方法允许可视化突触学习规则如何迭代地产生复杂的连接模式，从而产生人类可解释的有意义的图像。最后，我们还表明，FPA 输出处的附加卷积 U-Net（现在在扩散模型中很流行）可以学习 FPA 生成的图像的一步“去噪”，以提高其质量。我们的代码是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过突触学习规则顺序生成图像的方法，将图像视为神经网络的权重矩阵，并利用对抗网络和卷积U-Net提升生成质量。
AI.motivation: 传统权重生成过程不可视，难以解释；旨在通过突触学习规则生成可解释的自然图像，揭示神经网络连接模式的形成过程。
AI.method: 设计快速权重画家（FPAs），通过执行键值外积的delta学习规则逐步生成图像，结合对抗训练框架，并在输出端添加卷积U-Net进行单步去噪优化。
AI.result: 生成图像质量虽逊于专用模型，但可视化过程清晰；附加U-Net后图像质量显著提升，验证了方法的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法首次将突触学习规则应用于图像生成，实现了人类可解释的复杂连接模式生成，为理解神经网络学习机制提供了新视角。

authors_text: Alireza Tavakoli,Zahra Honjani,Hedieh Sajedi
title: Convolutional Neural Network-Based Image Watermarking using Discrete Wavelet Transform
title_zh: 使用离散小波变换的基于卷积神经网络的图像水印
abstract: With the growing popularity of the Internet, digital images are used and transferred more frequently. Although this phenomenon facilitates easy access to information, it also creates security concerns and violates intellectual property rights by allowing illegal use, copying, and digital content theft. Using watermarks in digital images is one of the most common ways to maintain security. Watermarking is proving and declaring ownership of an image by adding a digital watermark to the original image. Watermarks can be either text or an image placed overtly or covertly in an image and are expected to be challenging to remove. This paper proposes a combination of convolutional neural networks (CNNs) and wavelet transforms to obtain a watermarking network for embedding and extracting watermarks. The network is independent of the host image resolution, can accept all kinds of watermarks, and has only 11 layers while keeping performance. Performance is measured by two terms; the similarity between the extracted watermark and the original one and the similarity between the host image and the watermarked one.
summary: With the growing popularity of the Internet, digital images are used and transferred more frequently. Although this phenomenon facilitates easy access to information, it also creates security concerns and violates intellectual property rights by allowing illegal use, copying, and digital content theft. Using watermarks in digital images is one of the most common ways to maintain security. Watermarking is proving and declaring ownership of an image by adding a digital watermark to the original image. Watermarks can be either text or an image placed overtly or covertly in an image and are expected to be challenging to remove. This paper proposes a combination of convolutional neural networks (CNNs) and wavelet transforms to obtain a watermarking network for embedding and extracting watermarks. The network is independent of the host image resolution, can accept all kinds of watermarks, and has only 11 layers while keeping performance. Performance is measured by two terms; the similarity between the extracted watermark and the original one and the similarity between the host image and the watermarked one.
abstract_zh: 随着互联网的日益普及，数字图像的使用和传输更加频繁。尽管这种现象方便了信息的获取，但它也造成了安全问题，并允许非法使用、复制和盗窃数字内容，从而侵犯了知识产权。在数字图像中使用水印是维护安全性的最常见方法之一。水印是通过在原始图像上添加数字水印来证明和声明图像的所有权。水印可以是文本，也可以是公开或隐蔽地放置在图像中的图像，并且预计很难删除。本文提出了卷积神经网络（CNN）和小波变换的结合，以获得用于嵌入和提取水印的水印网络。该网络与主机图像分辨率无关，可以接受各种水印，并且在保持性能的情况下只有11层。绩效通过两个术语来衡量；提取的水印与原始水印之间的相似度以及宿主图像与加水印的水印之间的相似度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合卷积神经网络（CNN）和离散小波变换（DWT）的图像水印方法，实现水印的嵌入与提取。
AI.motivation: 随着互联网普及，数字图像易被非法复制和盗用，传统水印技术存在鲁棒性和兼容性不足的问题，需探索更高效的安全方案。
AI.method: 融合CNN特征提取能力与DWT多尺度分析优势，构建11层轻量级网络，实现与宿主图像分辨率无关的水印嵌入与提取，支持多种水印类型。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在水印提取准确性（与原始水印相似度）和图像保真度（与原始图像相似度）两项指标上均表现良好。
AI.conclusion: 提出的CNN-DWT水印框架在保持性能的同时降低计算复杂度，为数字图像版权保护提供了有效且通用的解决方案。
