search_text: Self-Validated Physics-Embedding Network: A General Framework for Inverse Modelling 自验证物理嵌入网络：逆向建模的通用框架 Physics-based inverse modeling techniques are typically restricted to particular research fields, whereas popular machine-learning-based ones are too data-dependent to guarantee the physical compatibility of the solution. In this paper, Self-Validated Physics-Embedding Network (SVPEN), a general neural network framework for inverse modeling is proposed. As its name suggests, the embedded physical forward model ensures that any solution that successfully passes its validation is physically reasonable. SVPEN operates in two modes: (a) the inverse function mode offers rapid state estimation as conventional supervised learning, and (b) the optimization mode offers a way to iteratively correct estimations that fail the validation process. Furthermore, the optimization mode provides SVPEN with reconfigurability i.e., replacing components like neural networks, physical models, and error calculations at will to solve a series of distinct inverse problems without pretraining. More than ten case studies in two highly nonlinear and entirely distinct applications: molecular absorption spectroscopy and Turbofan cycle analysis, demonstrate the generality, physical reliability, and reconfigurability of SVPEN. More importantly, SVPEN offers a solid foundation to use existing physical models within the context of AI, so as to striking a balance between data-driven and physics-driven models. 基于物理的逆向建模技术通常仅限于特定的研究领域，而流行的基于机器学习的技术则过于依赖数据，无法保证解决方案的物理兼容性。本文提出了自验证物理嵌入网络（SVPEN），这是一种用于逆向建模的通用神经网络框架。顾名思义，嵌入式物理正向模型可确保任何成功通过验证的解决方案在物理上都是合理的。 SVPEN 以两种模式运行：(a) 反函数模式提供与传统监督学习一样的快速状态估计，(b) 优化模式提供了一种迭代纠正验证过程失败的估计的方法。此外，优化模式为SVPEN提供了可重构性，即随意更换神经网络、物理模型、误差计算等组件，无需预训练即可解决一系列不同的逆问题。两个高度非线性且完全不同的应用（分子吸收光谱和涡轮风扇循环分析）的十多个案例研究证明了 SVPEN 的通用性、物理可靠性和可重构性。更重要的是，SVPEN 为在人工智能背景下使用现有物理模型提供了坚实的基础，从而在数据驱动和物理驱动模型之间取得平衡。 本文提出了一种结合物理模型与机器学习的通用逆向建模框架SVPEN，解决传统方法在物理兼容性与数据依赖性之间的矛盾。 Ruiyuan Kang,Dimitrios C. Kyritsis,Panos Liatsis cs.NE,eess.SY

authors_text: Lifeng Han,Gleb Erofeev,Irina Sorokina,Serge Gladkoff,Goran Nenadic
title: Investigating Massive Multilingual Pre-Trained Machine Translation Models for Clinical Domain via Transfer Learning
title_zh: 通过迁移学习研究临床领域的大规模多语言预训练机器翻译模型
abstract: Massively multilingual pre-trained language models (MMPLMs) are developed in recent years demonstrating superpowers and the pre-knowledge they acquire for downstream tasks. This work investigates whether MMPLMs can be applied to clinical domain machine translation (MT) towards entirely unseen languages via transfer learning. We carry out an experimental investigation using Meta-AI's MMPLMs ``wmt21-dense-24-wide-en-X and X-en (WMT21fb)'' which were pre-trained on 7 language pairs and 14 translation directions including English to Czech, German, Hausa, Icelandic, Japanese, Russian, and Chinese, and the opposite direction. We fine-tune these MMPLMs towards English-\textit{Spanish} language pair which \textit{did not exist at all} in their original pre-trained corpora both implicitly and explicitly. We prepare carefully aligned \textit{clinical} domain data for this fine-tuning, which is different from their original mixed domain knowledge. Our experimental result shows that the fine-tuning is very successful using just 250k well-aligned in-domain EN-ES segments for three sub-task translation testings: clinical cases, clinical terms, and ontology concepts. It achieves very close evaluation scores to another MMPLM NLLB from Meta-AI, which included Spanish as a high-resource setting in the pre-training. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work on using MMPLMs towards \textit{clinical domain transfer-learning NMT} successfully for totally unseen languages during pre-training.
summary: Massively multilingual pre-trained language models (MMPLMs) are developed in recent years demonstrating superpowers and the pre-knowledge they acquire for downstream tasks. This work investigates whether MMPLMs can be applied to clinical domain machine translation (MT) towards entirely unseen languages via transfer learning. We carry out an experimental investigation using Meta-AI's MMPLMs ``wmt21-dense-24-wide-en-X and X-en (WMT21fb)'' which were pre-trained on 7 language pairs and 14 translation directions including English to Czech, German, Hausa, Icelandic, Japanese, Russian, and Chinese, and the opposite direction. We fine-tune these MMPLMs towards English-\textit{Spanish} language pair which \textit{did not exist at all} in their original pre-trained corpora both implicitly and explicitly. We prepare carefully aligned \textit{clinical} domain data for this fine-tuning, which is different from their original mixed domain knowledge. Our experimental result shows that the fine-tuning is very successful using just 250k well-aligned in-domain EN-ES segments for three sub-task translation testings: clinical cases, clinical terms, and ontology concepts. It achieves very close evaluation scores to another MMPLM NLLB from Meta-AI, which included Spanish as a high-resource setting in the pre-training. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work on using MMPLMs towards \textit{clinical domain transfer-learning NMT} successfully for totally unseen languages during pre-training.
abstract_zh: 近年来开发的大规模多语言预训练语言模型（MMPLM）展示了超能力以及它们为下游任务获得的预知识。这项工作研究了 MMPLM 是否可以通过迁移学习应用于临床领域机器翻译 (MT)，以实现完全未见过的语言。我们使用 Meta-AI 的 MMPLM“wmt21-dense-24-wide-en-X 和 X-en (WMT21fb)”进行了一项实验研究，该 MMPLM 在 7 个语言对和 14 个翻译方向上进行了预训练，包括英语到捷克语、德语、豪萨语、冰岛语、日语、俄语和中文以及相反方向。我们将这些 MMPLM 微调为英语-\textit{西班牙语}语言对，而 \textit{根本不存在}在其原始预训练语料库中隐式和显式地存在。我们为这种微调准备了仔细对齐的 \textit{clinical} 领域数据，这与他们最初的混合领域知识不同。我们的实验结果表明，仅使用 25 万个对齐良好的域内 EN-ES 片段进行三个子任务翻译测试：临床病例、临床术语和本体概念，微调就非常成功。它的评估分数与 Meta-AI 的另一个 MMPLM NLLB 非常接近，后者在预训练中将西班牙语作为高资源设置。据我们所知，这是第一个使用 MMPLM 成功地在预训练过程中针对完全未见过的语言进行 \textit{临床领域迁移学习 NMT} 的工作。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究通过迁移学习将大规模多语言预训练模型应用于临床领域机器翻译，针对预训练阶段完全未接触的语言进行微调。
AI.motivation: 尽管大规模多语言预训练模型（MMPLMs）在多种任务中表现优异，但其在临床领域针对预训练阶段未包含语言的迁移学习效果尚不明确，需验证其适应能力。
AI.method: 使用Meta-AI的WMT21fb模型，在未包含西班牙语的预训练基础上，通过精心对齐的临床领域数据微调模型，针对临床案例、术语和本体概念三个子任务进行测试。
AI.result: 仅用25万条临床领域对齐数据微调后，模型在三个子任务上的评估分数接近包含西班牙语的高资源预训练模型NLLB，验证了迁移学习的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 这是首次成功将MMPLMs应用于临床领域迁移学习的完全未见语言场景，表明预训练模型可通过领域微调适应新语言和专业领域。

search_text: Investigating Massive Multilingual Pre-Trained Machine Translation Models for Clinical Domain via Transfer Learning 通过迁移学习研究临床领域的大规模多语言预训练机器翻译模型 Massively multilingual pre-trained language models (MMPLMs) are developed in recent years demonstrating superpowers and the pre-knowledge they acquire for downstream tasks. This work investigates whether MMPLMs can be applied to clinical domain machine translation (MT) towards entirely unseen languages via transfer learning. We carry out an experimental investigation using Meta-AI's MMPLMs ``wmt21-dense-24-wide-en-X and X-en (WMT21fb)'' which were pre-trained on 7 language pairs and 14 translation directions including English to Czech, German, Hausa, Icelandic, Japanese, Russian, and Chinese, and the opposite direction. We fine-tune these MMPLMs towards English-\textit{Spanish} language pair which \textit{did not exist at all} in their original pre-trained corpora both implicitly and explicitly. We prepare carefully aligned \textit{clinical} domain data for this fine-tuning, which is different from their original mixed domain knowledge. Our experimental result shows that the fine-tuning is very successful using just 250k well-aligned in-domain EN-ES segments for three sub-task translation testings: clinical cases, clinical terms, and ontology concepts. It achieves very close evaluation scores to another MMPLM NLLB from Meta-AI, which included Spanish as a high-resource setting in the pre-training. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work on using MMPLMs towards \textit{clinical domain transfer-learning NMT} successfully for totally unseen languages during pre-training. 近年来开发的大规模多语言预训练语言模型（MMPLM）展示了超能力以及它们为下游任务获得的预知识。这项工作研究了 MMPLM 是否可以通过迁移学习应用于临床领域机器翻译 (MT)，以实现完全未见过的语言。我们使用 Meta-AI 的 MMPLM“wmt21-dense-24-wide-en-X 和 X-en (WMT21fb)”进行了一项实验研究，该 MMPLM 在 7 个语言对和 14 个翻译方向上进行了预训练，包括英语到捷克语、德语、豪萨语、冰岛语、日语、俄语和中文以及相反方向。我们将这些 MMPLM 微调为英语-\textit{西班牙语}语言对，而 \textit{根本不存在}在其原始预训练语料库中隐式和显式地存在。我们为这种微调准备了仔细对齐的 \textit{clinical} 领域数据，这与他们最初的混合领域知识不同。我们的实验结果表明，仅使用 25 万个对齐良好的域内 EN-ES 片段进行三个子任务翻译测试：临床病例、临床术语和本体概念，微调就非常成功。它的评估分数与 Meta-AI 的另一个 MMPLM NLLB 非常接近，后者在预训练中将西班牙语作为高资源设置。据我们所知，这是第一个使用 MMPLM 成功地在预训练过程中针对完全未见过的语言进行 \textit{临床领域迁移学习 NMT} 的工作。 本论文研究通过迁移学习将大规模多语言预训练模型应用于临床领域机器翻译，针对预训练阶段完全未接触的语言进行微调。 Lifeng Han,Gleb Erofeev,Irina Sorokina,Serge Gladkoff,Goran Nenadic cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Duksang Lee,Nam Ho-Nguyen,Dabeen Lee
title: Non-Smooth, Hölder-Smooth, and Robust Submodular Maximization
title_zh: 非光滑、霍尔德光滑和鲁棒子模最大化
abstract: We study the problem of maximizing a continuous DR-submodular function that is not necessarily smooth. We prove that the continuous greedy algorithm achieves an $[(1-1/e)\OPT-ε]$ guarantee when the function is monotone and Hölder-smooth, meaning that it admits a Hölder-continuous gradient. For functions that are non-differentiable or non-smooth, we propose a variant of the mirror-prox algorithm that attains an $[(1/2)\OPT-ε]$ guarantee. We apply our algorithmic frameworks to robust submodular maximization and distributionally robust submodular maximization under Wasserstein ambiguity. In particular, the mirror-prox method applies to robust submodular maximization to obtain a single feasible solution whose value is at least $(1/2)\OPT-ε$. For distributionally robust maximization under Wasserstein ambiguity, we deduce and work over a submodular-convex maximin reformulation whose objective function is Hölder-smooth, for which we may apply both the continuous greedy and the mirror-prox algorithms.
summary: We study the problem of maximizing a continuous DR-submodular function that is not necessarily smooth. We prove that the continuous greedy algorithm achieves an $[(1-1/e)\OPT-ε]$ guarantee when the function is monotone and Hölder-smooth, meaning that it admits a Hölder-continuous gradient. For functions that are non-differentiable or non-smooth, we propose a variant of the mirror-prox algorithm that attains an $[(1/2)\OPT-ε]$ guarantee. We apply our algorithmic frameworks to robust submodular maximization and distributionally robust submodular maximization under Wasserstein ambiguity. In particular, the mirror-prox method applies to robust submodular maximization to obtain a single feasible solution whose value is at least $(1/2)\OPT-ε$. For distributionally robust maximization under Wasserstein ambiguity, we deduce and work over a submodular-convex maximin reformulation whose objective function is Hölder-smooth, for which we may apply both the continuous greedy and the mirror-prox algorithms.
abstract_zh: 我们研究最大化不一定平滑的连续 DR 子模函数的问题。我们证明，当函数是单调且 Hölder 平滑时，连续贪婪算法实现了 $[(1-1/e)\OPT-ε]$ 保证，这意味着它承认 Hölder 连续梯度。对于不可微分或非平滑的函数，我们提出了mirror-prox算法的变体，该算法获得$[(1/2)\OPT-ε]$保证。我们将我们的算法框架应用于 Wasserstein 歧义下的鲁棒子模最大化和分布鲁棒子模最大化。特别地，mirror-prox方法应用于鲁棒子模最大化以获得值至少为$(1/2)\OPT-ε$的单个可行解。对于 Wasserstein 模糊下的分布鲁棒最大化，我们推导并研究了目标函数为 Hölder 平滑的子模凸极大值重构，对此我们可以应用连续贪婪算法和镜像近似算法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究非光滑、Hölder光滑及鲁棒子模函数最大化问题，提出适用于不同函数性质的算法框架。
AI.motivation: 传统子模最大化算法多假设函数光滑，但实际问题中函数可能存在非光滑性或需满足鲁棒性要求，需扩展算法适用范围。
AI.method: 针对单调Hölder光滑函数采用连续贪心算法，对非光滑函数设计镜像近端算法变体，并应用于鲁棒及分布鲁棒子模最大化问题。
AI.result: 连续贪心算法在Hölder光滑情况下达到(1-1/e)OPT-ε保证，镜像近端算法在非光滑情况下达到(1/2)OPT-ε保证，并成功解决鲁棒优化问题。
AI.conclusion: 提出的新算法扩展了子模最大化理论边界，为处理非光滑及鲁棒性需求场景提供了有效解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究非光滑、Hölder光滑及鲁棒子模函数最大化问题，提出适用于不同函数性质的算法框架。
ai_content.motivation: 传统子模最大化算法多假设函数光滑，但实际问题中函数可能存在非光滑性或需满足鲁棒性要求，需扩展算法适用范围。
ai_content.method: 针对单调Hölder光滑函数采用连续贪心算法，对非光滑函数设计镜像近端算法变体，并应用于鲁棒及分布鲁棒子模最大化问题。
ai_content.result: 连续贪心算法在Hölder光滑情况下达到(1-1/e)OPT-ε保证，镜像近端算法在非光滑情况下达到(1/2)OPT-ε保证，并成功解决鲁棒优化问题。
ai_content.conclusion: 提出的新算法扩展了子模最大化理论边界，为处理非光滑及鲁棒性需求场景提供了有效解决方案。

search_text: Non-Smooth, Hölder-Smooth, and Robust Submodular Maximization 非光滑、霍尔德光滑和鲁棒子模最大化 We study the problem of maximizing a continuous DR-submodular function that is not necessarily smooth. We prove that the continuous greedy algorithm achieves an $[(1-1/e)\OPT-ε]$ guarantee when the function is monotone and Hölder-smooth, meaning that it admits a Hölder-continuous gradient. For functions that are non-differentiable or non-smooth, we propose a variant of the mirror-prox algorithm that attains an $[(1/2)\OPT-ε]$ guarantee. We apply our algorithmic frameworks to robust submodular maximization and distributionally robust submodular maximization under Wasserstein ambiguity. In particular, the mirror-prox method applies to robust submodular maximization to obtain a single feasible solution whose value is at least $(1/2)\OPT-ε$. For distributionally robust maximization under Wasserstein ambiguity, we deduce and work over a submodular-convex maximin reformulation whose objective function is Hölder-smooth, for which we may apply both the continuous greedy and the mirror-prox algorithms. 我们研究最大化不一定平滑的连续 DR 子模函数的问题。我们证明，当函数是单调且 Hölder 平滑时，连续贪婪算法实现了 $[(1-1/e)\OPT-ε]$ 保证，这意味着它承认 Hölder 连续梯度。对于不可微分或非平滑的函数，我们提出了mirror-prox算法的变体，该算法获得$[(1/2)\OPT-ε]$保证。我们将我们的算法框架应用于 Wasserstein 歧义下的鲁棒子模最大化和分布鲁棒子模最大化。特别地，mirror-prox方法应用于鲁棒子模最大化以获得值至少为$(1/2)\OPT-ε$的单个可行解。对于 Wasserstein 模糊下的分布鲁棒最大化，我们推导并研究了目标函数为 Hölder 平滑的子模凸极大值重构，对此我们可以应用连续贪婪算法和镜像近似算法。 本文研究非光滑、Hölder光滑及鲁棒子模函数最大化问题，提出适用于不同函数性质的算法框架。 Duksang Lee,Nam Ho-Nguyen,Dabeen Lee math.OC,cs.DS

authors_text: Jerzy Szynka
title: System theoretic approach of information processing in nested cellular automata
title_zh: 嵌套元胞自动机信息处理的系统理论方法
abstract: The subject of this paper is the evolution of the concept of information processing in regular structures based on multi-level processing in nested cellular automata. The essence of the proposed model is a discrete space-time containing nested orthogonal space-times at its points. The factorization of the function describing the global behavior of a system is the key element of the mathematical description. Factorization describes the relations of physical connections, signal propagation times and signal processing to global behavior. In the model appear expressions similar to expressions used in the Special Relativity Theory.
summary: The subject of this paper is the evolution of the concept of information processing in regular structures based on multi-level processing in nested cellular automata. The essence of the proposed model is a discrete space-time containing nested orthogonal space-times at its points. The factorization of the function describing the global behavior of a system is the key element of the mathematical description. Factorization describes the relations of physical connections, signal propagation times and signal processing to global behavior. In the model appear expressions similar to expressions used in the Special Relativity Theory.
abstract_zh: 本文的主题是基于嵌套元胞自动机中的多级处理的规则结构中的信息处理概念的演变。所提出模型的本质是在其点处包含嵌套正交时空的离散时空。描述系统全局行为的函数的因式分解是数学描述的关键要素。因式分解描述了物理连接、信号传播时间和信号处理与全局行为的关系。模型中出现与狭义相对论中使用的表达式类似的表达式。

AI.tldr: 提出基于嵌套细胞自动机的系统理论方法，研究多层级信息处理的演变及全局行为的数学描述。
AI.motivation: 传统细胞自动机难以刻画复杂系统的层级化信息处理，需结合系统理论与时空结构建模以揭示物理连接与信号传播的全局关联。
AI.method: 构建包含嵌套正交时空的离散时空模型，通过函数分解量化物理连接、信号传播时延与处理逻辑对全局行为的影响。
AI.result: 推导出类似狭义相对论的数学表达式，证明该模型可统一描述多层级信息处理中的时空关系与系统行为。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为复杂系统的层级化信息处理提供了理论框架，揭示了系统行为与物理约束的深层联系，具有跨学科应用潜力。

authors_text: Alexander Dittrich,Jan Schneider,Simon Guist,Nico Gürtler,Heiko Ott,Thomas Steinbrenner,Bernhard Schölkopf,Dieter Büchler
title: AIMY: An Open-source Table Tennis Ball Launcher for Versatile and High-fidelity Trajectory Generation
title_zh: AIMY：用于生成多功能和高保真轨迹的开源乒乓球发射器
abstract: To approach the level of advanced human players in table tennis with robots, generating varied ball trajectories in a reproducible and controlled manner is essential. Current ball launchers used in robot table tennis either do not provide an interface for automatic control or are limited in their capabilities to adapt speed, direction, and spin of the ball. For these reasons, we present AIMY, a three-wheeled open-hardware and open-source table tennis ball launcher, which can generate ball speeds and spins of up to 15.4 ms-1 and 192 s-1, respectively, which are comparable to advanced human players. The wheel speeds, launch orientation and time can be fully controlled via an open Ethernet or Wi-Fi interface. We provide a detailed overview of the core design features, as well as open source the software to encourage distribution and duplication within and beyond the robot table tennis research community. We also extensively evaluate the ball launcher's accuracy for different system settings and learn to launch a ball to desired locations. With this ball launcher, we enable long-duration training of robot table tennis approaches where the complexity of the ball trajectory can be automatically adjusted, enabling large-scale real-world online reinforcement learning for table tennis robots.
summary: To approach the level of advanced human players in table tennis with robots, generating varied ball trajectories in a reproducible and controlled manner is essential. Current ball launchers used in robot table tennis either do not provide an interface for automatic control or are limited in their capabilities to adapt speed, direction, and spin of the ball. For these reasons, we present AIMY, a three-wheeled open-hardware and open-source table tennis ball launcher, which can generate ball speeds and spins of up to 15.4 ms-1 and 192 s-1, respectively, which are comparable to advanced human players. The wheel speeds, launch orientation and time can be fully controlled via an open Ethernet or Wi-Fi interface. We provide a detailed overview of the core design features, as well as open source the software to encourage distribution and duplication within and beyond the robot table tennis research community. We also extensively evaluate the ball launcher's accuracy for different system settings and learn to launch a ball to desired locations. With this ball launcher, we enable long-duration training of robot table tennis approaches where the complexity of the ball trajectory can be automatically adjusted, enabling large-scale real-world online reinforcement learning for table tennis robots.
abstract_zh: 为了用机器人达到先进人类乒乓球运动员的水平，以可重复和受控的方式生成不同的球轨迹至关重要。目前机器人乒乓球中使用的球发射器要么不提供自动控制接口，要么在适应球的速度、方向和旋转方面的能力有限。出于这些原因，我们推出了 AIMY，一款三轮开放硬件和开源乒乓球发射器，它可以产生高达 15.4 ms-1 和 192 s-1 的球速和旋转，与先进的人类运动员相当。轮速、发射方向和时间可以通过开放的以太网或 Wi-Fi 接口完全控制。我们提供了核心设计功能的详细概述，以及开源软件，以鼓励机器人乒乓球研究社区内外的分发和复制。我们还广泛评估了球发射器在不同系统设置下的准确性，并学习将球发射到所需位置。通过这个球发射器，我们可以对机器人乒乓球方法进行长时间训练，其中球轨迹的复杂性可以自动调整，从而实现乒乓球机器人的大规模真实世界在线强化学习。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AIMY，一种开源的乒乓球发球机，用于生成可重复且可控的多样化乒乓球轨迹，以提升机器人乒乓球训练的复杂度和真实性。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人乒乓球发球机缺乏自动控制接口或在速度、方向和旋转适应性上存在局限，难以满足高级训练需求。
AI.method: 设计三轮开放式硬件发球机，通过以太网/Wi-Fi接口控制轮速、发射方向和时间，开源软件并验证不同设置下的发射精度。
AI.result: 实现15.4 m/s球速和192 s⁻¹旋转速度，支持精准定位发射，适用于长期训练及大规模在线强化学习。
AI.conclusion: AIMY为机器人乒乓球研究提供灵活工具，其开源特性促进技术共享，推动真实场景下的训练方法革新。

authors_text: Fuying Wang,Yuyin Zhou,Shujun Wang,Varut Vardhanabhuti,Lequan Yu
title: Multi-Granularity Cross-modal Alignment for Generalized Medical Visual Representation Learning
title_zh: 广义医学视觉表示学习的多粒度跨模态对齐
abstract: Learning medical visual representations directly from paired radiology reports has become an emerging topic in representation learning. However, existing medical image-text joint learning methods are limited by instance or local supervision analysis, ignoring disease-level semantic correspondences. In this paper, we present a novel Multi-Granularity Cross-modal Alignment (MGCA) framework for generalized medical visual representation learning by harnessing the naturally exhibited semantic correspondences between medical image and radiology reports at three different levels, i.e., pathological region-level, instance-level, and disease-level. Specifically, we first incorporate the instance-wise alignment module by maximizing the agreement between image-report pairs. Further, for token-wise alignment, we introduce a bidirectional cross-attention strategy to explicitly learn the matching between fine-grained visual tokens and text tokens, followed by contrastive learning to align them. More important, to leverage the high-level inter-subject relationship semantic (e.g., disease) correspondences, we design a novel cross-modal disease-level alignment paradigm to enforce the cross-modal cluster assignment consistency. Extensive experimental results on seven downstream medical image datasets covering image classification, object detection, and semantic segmentation tasks demonstrate the stable and superior performance of our framework.
summary: Learning medical visual representations directly from paired radiology reports has become an emerging topic in representation learning. However, existing medical image-text joint learning methods are limited by instance or local supervision analysis, ignoring disease-level semantic correspondences. In this paper, we present a novel Multi-Granularity Cross-modal Alignment (MGCA) framework for generalized medical visual representation learning by harnessing the naturally exhibited semantic correspondences between medical image and radiology reports at three different levels, i.e., pathological region-level, instance-level, and disease-level. Specifically, we first incorporate the instance-wise alignment module by maximizing the agreement between image-report pairs. Further, for token-wise alignment, we introduce a bidirectional cross-attention strategy to explicitly learn the matching between fine-grained visual tokens and text tokens, followed by contrastive learning to align them. More important, to leverage the high-level inter-subject relationship semantic (e.g., disease) correspondences, we design a novel cross-modal disease-level alignment paradigm to enforce the cross-modal cluster assignment consistency. Extensive experimental results on seven downstream medical image datasets covering image classification, object detection, and semantic segmentation tasks demonstrate the stable and superior performance of our framework.
abstract_zh: 直接从配对放射学报告中学习医学视觉表征已成为表征学习中的一个新兴主题。然而，现有的医学图文联合学习方法受到实例或局部监督分析的限制，忽略了疾病级别的语义对应关系。在本文中，我们通过利用医学图像和放射学报告在三个不同级别（即病理区域级别、实例级别和疾病级别）之间自然表现的语义对应关系，提出了一种用于广义医学视觉表示学习的新颖的多粒度跨模态对齐（MGCA）框架。具体来说，我们首先通过最大化图像报告对之间的一致性来合并实例对齐模块。此外，对于 token-wise 对齐，我们引入了双向交叉注意策略来显式学习细粒度视觉 token 和文本 token 之间的匹配，然后通过对比学习来对齐它们。更重要的是，为了利用高级主体间关系语义（例如疾病）对应关系，我们设计了一种新颖的跨模态疾病级别对齐范例来强制跨模态聚类分配的一致性。在七个下游医学图像数据集（涵盖图像分类、对象检测和语义分割任务）上的广泛实验结果证明了我们的框架的稳定和优越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多粒度跨模态对齐框架（MGCA），通过医学图像与报告在病灶区域级、实例级和疾病级三个层次的语义对齐，实现通用医学视觉表示学习。
AI.motivation: 现有医学图像-文本联合学习方法受限于实例或局部监督分析，未能有效捕捉疾病级别的高层语义关联，导致表示学习效果受限。
AI.method: 框架包含三个层次对齐：1）实例级对齐通过最大化图像-报告对的一致性；2）细粒度token级对齐采用双向交叉注意力与对比学习；3）疾病级对齐设计跨模态聚类一致性约束。
AI.result: 在七个医学下游数据集（涵盖分类、检测、分割任务）的实验表明，MGCA框架在稳定性与性能上均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 多粒度跨模态对齐有效捕捉医学图像与报告的多层次语义关联，显著提升通用医学视觉表示学习效果。

authors_text: Md. Rezaul Karim,Hussain Ali,Prinon Das,Mohamed Abdelwaheb,Stefan Decker
title: Question Answering Over Biological Knowledge Graph via Amazon Alexa
title_zh: 通过 Amazon Alexa 对生物知识图进行问答
comment: This paper is based on the Knowledge Graph Lab course (https://dbis.rwth-aachen.de/dbis/index.php/) offered at Computer Science 5 - Information Systems and Databases, RWTH Aachen University, Germany, and a joint collaboration with Osthus GmbH (https://www.osthus.com/), Aachen, Germany
comments: This paper is based on the Knowledge Graph Lab course (https://dbis.rwth-aachen.de/dbis/index.php/) offered at Computer Science 5 - Information Systems and Databases, RWTH Aachen University, Germany, and a joint collaboration with Osthus GmbH (https://www.osthus.com/), Aachen, Germany
abstract: Structured and unstructured data and facts about drugs, genes, protein, viruses, and their mechanism are spread across a huge number of scientific articles. These articles are a large-scale knowledge source and can have a huge impact on disseminating knowledge about the mechanisms of certain biological processes. A knowledge graph (KG) can be constructed by integrating such facts and data and be used for data integration, exploration, and federated queries. However, exploration and querying large-scale KGs is tedious for certain groups of users due to a lack of knowledge about underlying data assets or semantic technologies. A question-answering (QA) system allows the answer of natural language questions over KGs automatically using triples contained in a KG. Recently, the use and adaption of digital assistants are getting wider owing to their capability at enabling users to voice commands to control smart systems or devices. This paper is about using Amazon Alexa's voice-enabled interface for QA over KGs. As a proof-of-concept, we use the well-known DisgeNET KG, which contains knowledge covering 1.13 million gene-disease associations between 21,671 genes and 30,170 diseases, disorders, and clinical or abnormal human phenotypes. Our study shows how Alex could be of help to find facts about certain biological entities from large-scale knowledge bases.
summary: Structured and unstructured data and facts about drugs, genes, protein, viruses, and their mechanism are spread across a huge number of scientific articles. These articles are a large-scale knowledge source and can have a huge impact on disseminating knowledge about the mechanisms of certain biological processes. A knowledge graph (KG) can be constructed by integrating such facts and data and be used for data integration, exploration, and federated queries. However, exploration and querying large-scale KGs is tedious for certain groups of users due to a lack of knowledge about underlying data assets or semantic technologies. A question-answering (QA) system allows the answer of natural language questions over KGs automatically using triples contained in a KG. Recently, the use and adaption of digital assistants are getting wider owing to their capability at enabling users to voice commands to control smart systems or devices. This paper is about using Amazon Alexa's voice-enabled interface for QA over KGs. As a proof-of-concept, we use the well-known DisgeNET KG, which contains knowledge covering 1.13 million gene-disease associations between 21,671 genes and 30,170 diseases, disorders, and clinical or abnormal human phenotypes. Our study shows how Alex could be of help to find facts about certain biological entities from large-scale knowledge bases.
abstract_zh: 有关药物、基因、蛋白质、病毒及其机制的结构化和非结构化数据和事实分布在大量科学文章中。这些文章是一个大规模的知识来源，可以对传播有关某些生物过程机制的知识产生巨大影响。通过整合这些事实和数据可以构建知识图谱（KG），并用于数据集成、探索和联合查询。然而，由于缺乏对底层数据资产或语义技术的了解，探索和查询大规模知识图谱对于某些用户群体来说是乏味的。问答（QA）系统允许使用知识图谱中包含的三元组自动回答知识图谱上的自然语言问题。最近，数字助理的使用和适应变得越来越广泛，因为它们能够让用户通过语音命令来控制智能系统或设备。本文介绍如何使用 Amazon Alexa 的语音接口通过 KG 进行 QA。作为概念验证，我们使用著名的 DisgeNET KG，其中包含涵盖 21,671 个基因与 30,170 种疾病、病症以及临床或异常人类表型之间的 113 万个基因-疾病关联的知识。我们的研究表明亚历克斯如何帮助从大规模知识库中找到有关某些生物实体的事实。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过亚马逊Alexa语音助手实现对生物知识图谱的问答系统，以简化大规模生物数据的查询过程。
AI.motivation: 生物领域的科学文献和知识图谱数据量庞大，传统查询方式对非专业用户不够友好，而语音助手的普及为自然语言交互提供了新途径。
AI.method: 基于DisgeNET知识图谱（包含113万基因-疾病关联数据），构建与Alexa语音接口集成的问答系统，通过自然语言处理技术解析用户问题并匹配知识图谱中的三元组信息。
AI.result: 验证了Alexa语音助手能够有效辅助用户从大规模生物知识库中检索基因、疾病等实体的关联事实，证明了语音交互在生物信息学领域的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过语音助手降低了知识图谱的使用门槛，为科研人员和普通用户提供了更直观的生物信息查询方式，推动了智能语音技术与生物医学数据的融合应用。

authors_text: Max Spahn,Chadi Salmi,Javier Alonso-Mora
title: Local Planner Bench: Benchmarking for Local Motion Planning
title_zh: 局部规划器基准：局部运动规划的基准测试
comment: Workshop @IROS2022: Evaluating Motion Planning Performance, 4 pages
comments: Workshop @IROS2022: Evaluating Motion Planning Performance, 4 pages
abstract: Local motion planning is a heavily researched topic in the field of robotics with many promising algorithms being published every year. However, it is difficult and time-consuming to compare different methods in the field. In this paper, we present localPlannerBench, a new benchmarking suite that allows quick and seamless comparison between local motion planning algorithms. The key focus of the project lies in the extensibility of the environment and the simulation cases. Out-of-the-box, localPlannerBench already supports many simulation cases ranging from a simple 2D point mass to full-fledged 3D 7DoF manipulators, and it is straightforward to add your own custom robot using a URDF file. A post-processor is built-in that can be extended with custom metrics and plots. To integrate your own motion planner, simply create a wrapper that derives from the provided base class. Ultimately we aim to improve the reproducibility of local motion planning algorithms and encourage standardized open-source comparison.
summary: Local motion planning is a heavily researched topic in the field of robotics with many promising algorithms being published every year. However, it is difficult and time-consuming to compare different methods in the field. In this paper, we present localPlannerBench, a new benchmarking suite that allows quick and seamless comparison between local motion planning algorithms. The key focus of the project lies in the extensibility of the environment and the simulation cases. Out-of-the-box, localPlannerBench already supports many simulation cases ranging from a simple 2D point mass to full-fledged 3D 7DoF manipulators, and it is straightforward to add your own custom robot using a URDF file. A post-processor is built-in that can be extended with custom metrics and plots. To integrate your own motion planner, simply create a wrapper that derives from the provided base class. Ultimately we aim to improve the reproducibility of local motion planning algorithms and encourage standardized open-source comparison.
abstract_zh: 局部运动规划是机器人领域的一个深入研究的课题，每年都会发布许多有前景的算法。然而，在现场比较不同的方法是困难且耗时的。在本文中，我们提出了 localPlannerBench，这是一个新的基准测试套件，可以在本地运动规划算法之间进行快速、无缝的比较。该项目的重点在于环境的可扩展性和模拟案例。开箱即用的 localPlannerBench 已经支持许多模拟案例，从简单的 2D 点质量到成熟的 3D 7DoF 操纵器，并且可以直接使用 URDF 文件添加您自己的自定义机器人。内置后处理器，可以使用自定义指标和绘图进行扩展。要集成您自己的运动规划器，只需创建一个从提供的基类派生的包装器即可。最终我们的目标是提高本地运动规划算法的可重复性并鼓励标准化的开源比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为localPlannerBench的基准测试套件，用于快速比较局部运动规划算法。
AI.motivation: 局部运动规划算法众多，但缺乏统一的基准测试工具，导致比较困难且可重复性差。
AI.method: 构建支持多种模拟场景的可扩展环境，提供URDF自定义机器人接口，内置可扩展后处理器及基类包装器集成算法。
AI.result: 实现了覆盖2D到3D复杂机械臂的多样化测试案例，支持自定义指标与算法扩展，提升实验可复现性。
AI.conclusion: 该基准测试套件为局部规划算法研究提供了标准化开源平台，有助于推动领域内更客观的性能对比与优化。

authors_text: Yogesh Verma,Samuel Kaski,Markus Heinonen,Vikas Garg
title: Modular Flows: Differential Molecular Generation
title_zh: 模块化流：微分分子生成
comment: Accepted to NeurIPS 2022. More info at: https://yogeshverma1998.github.io/ModFlow/
comments: Accepted to NeurIPS 2022. More info at: https://yogeshverma1998.github.io/ModFlow/
abstract: Generating new molecules is fundamental to advancing critical applications such as drug discovery and material synthesis. Flows can generate molecules effectively by inverting the encoding process, however, existing flow models either require artifactual dequantization or specific node/edge orderings, lack desiderata such as permutation invariance, or induce discrepancy between the encoding and the decoding steps that necessitates post hoc validity correction. We circumvent these issues with novel continuous normalizing E(3)-equivariant flows, based on a system of node ODEs coupled as a graph PDE, that repeatedly reconcile locally toward globally aligned densities. Our models can be cast as message-passing temporal networks, and result in superlative performance on the tasks of density estimation and molecular generation. In particular, our generated samples achieve state-of-the-art on both the standard QM9 and ZINC250K benchmarks.
summary: Generating new molecules is fundamental to advancing critical applications such as drug discovery and material synthesis. Flows can generate molecules effectively by inverting the encoding process, however, existing flow models either require artifactual dequantization or specific node/edge orderings, lack desiderata such as permutation invariance, or induce discrepancy between the encoding and the decoding steps that necessitates post hoc validity correction. We circumvent these issues with novel continuous normalizing E(3)-equivariant flows, based on a system of node ODEs coupled as a graph PDE, that repeatedly reconcile locally toward globally aligned densities. Our models can be cast as message-passing temporal networks, and result in superlative performance on the tasks of density estimation and molecular generation. In particular, our generated samples achieve state-of-the-art on both the standard QM9 and ZINC250K benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 生成新分子是推进药物发现和材料合成等关键应用的基础。流可以通过反转编码过程有效地生成分子，然而，现有的流模型要么需要人为的反量化或特定的节点/边排序，缺乏排列不变性等需求，要么导致编码和解码步骤之间的差异，从而需要事后有效性校正。我们通过新颖的连续归一化 E(3) 等变流来规避这些问题，该流基于作为图 PDE 耦合的节点 ODE 系统，反复进行局部协调以实现全局对齐的密度。我们的模型可以被视为消息传递时间网络，并在密度估计和分子生成任务上产生最佳性能。特别是，我们生成的样本在标准 QM9 和 ZINC250K 基准测试中均达到了最先进的水平。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型连续归一化E(3)-等变流模型，用于解决分子生成中的密度估计与结构生成问题。
AI.motivation: 现有分子生成流模型存在去量化操作依赖、缺乏置换不变性及编码解码步骤不一致等问题，限制了生成效果与效率。
AI.method: 基于节点ODE与图PDE耦合系统构建E(3)-等变流模型，通过局部协调机制实现全局密度对齐，并采用消息传递时序网络架构。
AI.result: 在QM9和ZINC250K基准测试中生成样本达到SOTA水平，密度估计与分子生成任务表现显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了分子生成中的关键问题，为药物发现与材料设计提供了更高效可靠的生成模型框架。

authors_text: Yuchong Sun,Hongwei Xue,Ruihua Song,Bei Liu,Huan Yang,Jianlong Fu
title: Long-Form Video-Language Pre-Training with Multimodal Temporal Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 具有多模态时态对比学习的长格式视频语言预训练
abstract: Large-scale video-language pre-training has shown significant improvement in video-language understanding tasks. Previous studies of video-language pretraining mainly focus on short-form videos (i.e., within 30 seconds) and sentences, leaving long-form video-language pre-training rarely explored. Directly learning representation from long-form videos and language may benefit many long-form video-language understanding tasks. However, it is challenging due to the difficulty of modeling long-range relationships and the heavy computational burden caused by more frames. In this paper, we introduce a Long-Form VIdeo-LAnguage pre-training model (LF-VILA) and train it on a large-scale long-form video and paragraph dataset constructed from an existing public dataset. To effectively capture the rich temporal dynamics and to better align video and language in an efficient end-to-end manner, we introduce two novel designs in our LF-VILA model. We first propose a Multimodal Temporal Contrastive (MTC) loss to learn the temporal relation across different modalities by encouraging fine-grained alignment between long-form videos and paragraphs. Second, we propose a Hierarchical Temporal Window Attention (HTWA) mechanism to effectively capture long-range dependency while reducing computational cost in Transformer. We fine-tune the pre-trained LF-VILA model on seven downstream long-form video-language understanding tasks of paragraph-to-video retrieval and long-form video question-answering, and achieve new state-of-the-art performances. Specifically, our model achieves 16.1% relative improvement on ActivityNet paragraph-to-video retrieval task and 2.4% on How2QA task, respectively. We release our code, dataset, and pre-trained models at https://github.com/microsoft/XPretrain.
summary: Large-scale video-language pre-training has shown significant improvement in video-language understanding tasks. Previous studies of video-language pretraining mainly focus on short-form videos (i.e., within 30 seconds) and sentences, leaving long-form video-language pre-training rarely explored. Directly learning representation from long-form videos and language may benefit many long-form video-language understanding tasks. However, it is challenging due to the difficulty of modeling long-range relationships and the heavy computational burden caused by more frames. In this paper, we introduce a Long-Form VIdeo-LAnguage pre-training model (LF-VILA) and train it on a large-scale long-form video and paragraph dataset constructed from an existing public dataset. To effectively capture the rich temporal dynamics and to better align video and language in an efficient end-to-end manner, we introduce two novel designs in our LF-VILA model. We first propose a Multimodal Temporal Contrastive (MTC) loss to learn the temporal relation across different modalities by encouraging fine-grained alignment between long-form videos and paragraphs. Second, we propose a Hierarchical Temporal Window Attention (HTWA) mechanism to effectively capture long-range dependency while reducing computational cost in Transformer. We fine-tune the pre-trained LF-VILA model on seven downstream long-form video-language understanding tasks of paragraph-to-video retrieval and long-form video question-answering, and achieve new state-of-the-art performances. Specifically, our model achieves 16.1% relative improvement on ActivityNet paragraph-to-video retrieval task and 2.4% on How2QA task, respectively. We release our code, dataset, and pre-trained models at https://github.com/microsoft/XPretrain.
abstract_zh: 大规模视频语言预训练在视频语言理解任务上显示出显着的改善。以往对视频语言预训练的研究主要集中在短视频（即30秒以内）和句子上，而对长视频语言预训练的研究很少。直接从长视频和语言中学习表示可能有利于许多长视频语言理解任务。然而，由于对远程关系建模的困难以及更多帧造成的繁重计算负担，它具有挑战性。在本文中，我们介绍了一种长格式 VIdeo-LANguage 预训练模型（LF-VILA），并在从现有公共数据集构建的大规模长格式视频和段落数据集上对其进行训练。为了有效捕获丰富的时间动态并以高效的端到端方式更好地对齐视频和语言，我们在 LF-VILA 模型中引入了两种新颖的设计。我们首先提出多模态时间对比（MTC）损失，通过鼓励长视频和段落之间的细粒度对齐来学习不同模态之间的时间关系。其次，我们提出了一种分层时间窗口注意（HTWA）机制，以有效捕获长程依赖性，同时降低 Transformer 中的计算成本。我们在段落到视频检索和长视频问答的七个下游长视频语言理解任务上对预训练的 LF-VILA 模型进行了微调，并实现了新的最先进性能。具体来说，我们的模型在 ActivityNet 段落到视频检索任务上分别实现了 16.1% 的相对改进，在 How2QA 任务上分别实现了 2.4% 的相对改进。我们在 https://github.com/microsoft/XPretrain 发布了我们的代码、数据集和预训练模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对长视频和段落的预训练模型LF-VILA，通过多模态时间对比损失和分层时间窗口注意力机制解决长视频语言理解任务中的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有视频语言预训练研究主要集中在短视频（30秒内），而长视频语言对齐因时序关系复杂和计算成本高未被充分探索，需设计新方法提升长视频理解效果。
AI.method: 引入多模态时间对比损失（MTC）促进长视频与段落的细粒度对齐，并设计分层时间窗口注意力机制（HTWA）在降低计算成本的同时捕捉长距离依赖关系。
AI.result: 在段落到视频检索和长视频问答七项下游任务中取得新SOTA，其中ActivityNet任务相对提升16.1%，How2QA任务提升2.4%。
AI.conclusion: LF-VILA通过创新性设计有效解决了长视频语言预训练的挑战，实验验证了方法的有效性，并开源了代码和预训练模型推动后续研究。

search_text: Long-Form Video-Language Pre-Training with Multimodal Temporal Contrastive Learning 具有多模态时态对比学习的长格式视频语言预训练 Large-scale video-language pre-training has shown significant improvement in video-language understanding tasks. Previous studies of video-language pretraining mainly focus on short-form videos (i.e., within 30 seconds) and sentences, leaving long-form video-language pre-training rarely explored. Directly learning representation from long-form videos and language may benefit many long-form video-language understanding tasks. However, it is challenging due to the difficulty of modeling long-range relationships and the heavy computational burden caused by more frames. In this paper, we introduce a Long-Form VIdeo-LAnguage pre-training model (LF-VILA) and train it on a large-scale long-form video and paragraph dataset constructed from an existing public dataset. To effectively capture the rich temporal dynamics and to better align video and language in an efficient end-to-end manner, we introduce two novel designs in our LF-VILA model. We first propose a Multimodal Temporal Contrastive (MTC) loss to learn the temporal relation across different modalities by encouraging fine-grained alignment between long-form videos and paragraphs. Second, we propose a Hierarchical Temporal Window Attention (HTWA) mechanism to effectively capture long-range dependency while reducing computational cost in Transformer. We fine-tune the pre-trained LF-VILA model on seven downstream long-form video-language understanding tasks of paragraph-to-video retrieval and long-form video question-answering, and achieve new state-of-the-art performances. Specifically, our model achieves 16.1% relative improvement on ActivityNet paragraph-to-video retrieval task and 2.4% on How2QA task, respectively. We release our code, dataset, and pre-trained models at https://github.com/microsoft/XPretrain. 大规模视频语言预训练在视频语言理解任务上显示出显着的改善。以往对视频语言预训练的研究主要集中在短视频（即30秒以内）和句子上，而对长视频语言预训练的研究很少。直接从长视频和语言中学习表示可能有利于许多长视频语言理解任务。然而，由于对远程关系建模的困难以及更多帧造成的繁重计算负担，它具有挑战性。在本文中，我们介绍了一种长格式 VIdeo-LANguage 预训练模型（LF-VILA），并在从现有公共数据集构建的大规模长格式视频和段落数据集上对其进行训练。为了有效捕获丰富的时间动态并以高效的端到端方式更好地对齐视频和语言，我们在 LF-VILA 模型中引入了两种新颖的设计。我们首先提出多模态时间对比（MTC）损失，通过鼓励长视频和段落之间的细粒度对齐来学习不同模态之间的时间关系。其次，我们提出了一种分层时间窗口注意（HTWA）机制，以有效捕获长程依赖性，同时降低 Transformer 中的计算成本。我们在段落到视频检索和长视频问答的七个下游长视频语言理解任务上对预训练的 LF-VILA 模型进行了微调，并实现了新的最先进性能。具体来说，我们的模型在 ActivityNet 段落到视频检索任务上分别实现了 16.1% 的相对改进，在 How2QA 任务上分别实现了 2.4% 的相对改进。我们在 https://github.com/microsoft/XPretrain 发布了我们的代码、数据集和预训练模型。 本文提出一种针对长视频和段落的预训练模型LF-VILA，通过多模态时间对比损失和分层时间窗口注意力机制解决长视频语言理解任务中的挑战。 Yuchong Sun,Hongwei Xue,Ruihua Song,Bei Liu,Huan Yang,Jianlong Fu cs.CV

authors_text: Megh Shukla,Roshan Roy,Pankaj Singh,Shuaib Ahmed,Alexandre Alahi
title: VL4Pose: Active Learning Through Out-Of-Distribution Detection For Pose Estimation
title_zh: VL4Pose：通过分布外检测主动学习姿势估计
abstract: Advances in computing have enabled widespread access to pose estimation, creating new sources of data streams. Unlike mock set-ups for data collection, tapping into these data streams through on-device active learning allows us to directly sample from the real world to improve the spread of the training distribution. However, on-device computing power is limited, implying that any candidate active learning algorithm should have a low compute footprint while also being reliable. Although multiple algorithms cater to pose estimation, they either use extensive compute to power state-of-the-art results or are not competitive in low-resource settings. We address this limitation with VL4Pose (Visual Likelihood For Pose Estimation), a first principles approach for active learning through out-of-distribution detection. We begin with a simple premise: pose estimators often predict incoherent poses for out-of-distribution samples. Hence, can we identify a distribution of poses the model has been trained on, to identify incoherent poses the model is unsure of? Our solution involves modelling the pose through a simple parametric Bayesian network trained via maximum likelihood estimation. Therefore, poses incurring a low likelihood within our framework are out-of-distribution samples making them suitable candidates for annotation. We also observe two useful side-outcomes: VL4Pose in-principle yields better uncertainty estimates by unifying joint and pose level ambiguity, as well as the unintentional but welcome ability of VL4Pose to perform pose refinement in limited scenarios. We perform qualitative and quantitative experiments on three datasets: MPII, LSP and ICVL, spanning human and hand pose estimation. Finally, we note that VL4Pose is simple, computationally inexpensive and competitive, making it suitable for challenging tasks such as on-device active learning.

Unlike mock set-ups for data collection, tapping into these data streams through on-device active learning allows us to directly sample from the real world to improve the spread of the training distribution. We address this limitation with VL4Pose (Visual Likelihood For Pose Estimation), a first principles approach for active learning through out-of-distribution detection. We begin with a simple premise: pose estimators often predict incoherent poses for out-of-distribution samples. Hence, can we identify a distribution of poses the model has been trained on, to identify incoherent poses the model is unsure of? Our solution involves modelling the pose through a simple parametric Bayesian network trained via maximum likelihood estimation. Therefore, poses incurring a low likelihood within our framework are out-of-distribution samples making them suitable candidates for annotation. We also observe two useful side-outcomes: VL4Pose in-principle yields better uncertainty estimates by unifying joint and pose level ambiguity, as well as the unintentional but welcome ability of VL4Pose to perform pose refinement in limited scenarios. We perform qualitative and quantitative experiments on three datasets: MPII, LSP and ICVL, spanning human and hand pose estimation. Finally, we note that VL4Pose is simple, computationally inexpensive and competitive, making it suitable for challenging tasks such as on-device active learning.
abstract_zh: 计算的进步使得姿态估计得以广泛应用，创造了新的数据流来源。与数据收集的模拟设置不同，通过设备上的主动学习利用这些数据流使我们能够直接从现实世界中进行采样，以改善训练分布的传播。然而，设备上的计算能力是有限的，这意味着任何候选主动学习算法都应该具有较低的计算占用量，同时也应该可靠。尽管多种算法可以满足姿态估计的需求，但它们要么使用大量计算来提供最先进的结果，要么在资源匮乏的环境中不具有竞争力。我们通过 VL4Pose（姿势估计的视觉似然）解决了这一限制，这是通过分布外检测进行主动学习的第一原理方法。我们从一个简单的前提开始：姿势估计器通常会预测分布外样本的不连贯姿势。因此，我们能否识别模型所训练的姿势分布，以识别模型不确定的不连贯姿势？我们的解决方案涉及通过最大似然估计训练的简单参数贝叶斯网络对姿势进行建模。因此，在我们的框架内出现的可能性较低的姿势是分布外的样本，这使得它们成为注释的合适候选者。我们还观察到两个有用的副作用：VL4Pose 原则上通过统一关节和姿势级别模糊性产生更好的不确定性估计，以及 VL4Pose 在有限场景中执行姿势细化的无意但受欢迎的能力。我们对三个数据集进行定性和定量实验：MPII、LSP 和 ICVL，涵盖人体和手部姿势估计。最后，我们注意到 VL4Pose 简单、计算成本低且具有竞争力，使其适合具有挑战性的任务，例如设备上主动学习。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VL4Pose方法，通过分布外检测实现姿态估计的主动学习，以解决设备计算资源有限下的模型优化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有姿态估计主动学习算法或计算开销大，或在低资源环境下表现不佳，需开发轻量且可靠的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于贝叶斯网络和最大似然估计，通过建模姿态分布识别低似然（分布外）样本作为标注候选，同时实现不确定性估计与姿态优化。
AI.result: 在MPII、LSP和ICVL数据集上验证，VL4Pose在保持低计算成本的同时，优于现有方法且具备姿态精修能力。
AI.conclusion: VL4Pose方法简单高效，适用于资源受限场景下的姿态估计主动学习任务。

authors_text: Tim Schopf,Daniel Braun,Florian Matthes
title: Lbl2Vec: An Embedding-Based Approach for Unsupervised Document Retrieval on Predefined Topics
title_zh: Lbl2Vec：一种基于嵌入的预定义主题无监督文档检索方法
comment: ef:In Proceedings of the 17th International Conference on Web Information Systems and Technologies - WEBIST, ISBN 978-989-758-536-4; ISSN 2184-3252, pages 124-132 (2021)
comments: ef:In Proceedings of the 17th International Conference on Web Information Systems and Technologies - WEBIST, ISBN 978-989-758-536-4; ISSN 2184-3252, pages 124-132 (2021)
abstract: In this paper, we consider the task of retrieving documents with predefined topics from an unlabeled document dataset using an unsupervised approach. The proposed unsupervised approach requires only a small number of keywords describing the respective topics and no labeled document. Existing approaches either heavily relied on a large amount of additionally encoded world knowledge or on term-document frequencies. Contrariwise, we introduce a method that learns jointly embedded document and word vectors solely from the unlabeled document dataset in order to find documents that are semantically similar to the topics described by the keywords. The proposed method requires almost no text preprocessing but is simultaneously effective at retrieving relevant documents with high probability. When successively retrieving documents on different predefined topics from publicly available and commonly used datasets, we achieved an average area under the receiver operating characteristic curve value of 0.95 on one dataset and 0.92 on another. Further, our method can be used for multiclass document classification, without the need to assign labels to the dataset in advance. Compared with an unsupervised classification baseline, we increased F1 scores from 76.6 to 82.7 and from 61.0 to 75.1 on the respective datasets. For easy replication of our approach, we make the developed Lbl2Vec code publicly available as a ready-to-use tool under the 3-Clause BSD license.
summary: In this paper, we consider the task of retrieving documents with predefined topics from an unlabeled document dataset using an unsupervised approach. The proposed unsupervised approach requires only a small number of keywords describing the respective topics and no labeled document. Existing approaches either heavily relied on a large amount of additionally encoded world knowledge or on term-document frequencies. Contrariwise, we introduce a method that learns jointly embedded document and word vectors solely from the unlabeled document dataset in order to find documents that are semantically similar to the topics described by the keywords. The proposed method requires almost no text preprocessing but is simultaneously effective at retrieving relevant documents with high probability. When successively retrieving documents on different predefined topics from publicly available and commonly used datasets, we achieved an average area under the receiver operating characteristic curve value of 0.95 on one dataset and 0.92 on another. Further, our method can be used for multiclass document classification, without the need to assign labels to the dataset in advance. Compared with an unsupervised classification baseline, we increased F1 scores from 76.6 to 82.7 and from 61.0 to 75.1 on the respective datasets. For easy replication of our approach, we make the developed Lbl2Vec code publicly available as a ready-to-use tool under the 3-Clause BSD license.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们考虑使用无监督方法从未标记的文档数据集中检索具有预定义主题的文档的任务。所提出的无监督方法只需要描述各自主题的少量关键字，并且不需要标记文档。现有的方法要么严重依赖大量额外编码的世界知识，要么严重依赖术语文档频率。相反，我们引入了一种仅从未标记的文档数据集中学习联合嵌入的文档和单词向量的方法，以便找到在语义上与关键字描述的主题相似的文档。所提出的方法几乎不需要文本预处理，但同时能够有效地以高概率检索相关文档。当从公开可用和常用的数据集中连续检索不同预定义主题的文档时，我们在一个数据集上实现了接收者操作特征曲线下的平均面积值 0.95，在另一个数据集上实现了 0.92。此外，我们的方法可以用于多类文档分类，而不需要提前为数据集分配标签。与无监督分类基线相比，我们将各自数据集的 F1 分数从 76.6 提高到 82.7，从 61.0 提高到 75.1。为了轻松复制我们的方法，我们将开发的 Lbl2Vec 代码作为 3-Clause BSD 许可证下的即用工具公开提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Lbl2Vec方法，通过无监督学习从未标记文档集中检索预定义主题的文档，仅需少量关键词描述主题，无需标注数据。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖大量外部知识或词频统计，而本文旨在无需标注数据和额外知识的情况下，仅通过关键词和未标记文档集实现高效检索。
AI.method: 联合学习文档和词向量嵌入，利用关键词与文档的语义相似性进行检索，几乎无需文本预处理，并可扩展至多分类任务。
AI.result: 在两个公开数据集上分别达到0.95和0.92的AUC值，多分类任务F1分数从76.6提升至82.7、从61.0提升至75.1。
AI.conclusion: Lbl2Vec在无监督文档检索和分类中表现优异，代码已开源，为实际应用提供了高效工具。

search_text: Lbl2Vec: An Embedding-Based Approach for Unsupervised Document Retrieval on Predefined Topics Lbl2Vec：一种基于嵌入的预定义主题无监督文档检索方法 In this paper, we consider the task of retrieving documents with predefined topics from an unlabeled document dataset using an unsupervised approach. The proposed unsupervised approach requires only a small number of keywords describing the respective topics and no labeled document. Existing approaches either heavily relied on a large amount of additionally encoded world knowledge or on term-document frequencies. Contrariwise, we introduce a method that learns jointly embedded document and word vectors solely from the unlabeled document dataset in order to find documents that are semantically similar to the topics described by the keywords. The proposed method requires almost no text preprocessing but is simultaneously effective at retrieving relevant documents with high probability. When successively retrieving documents on different predefined topics from publicly available and commonly used datasets, we achieved an average area under the receiver operating characteristic curve value of 0.95 on one dataset and 0.92 on another. Further, our method can be used for multiclass document classification, without the need to assign labels to the dataset in advance. Compared with an unsupervised classification baseline, we increased F1 scores from 76.6 to 82.7 and from 61.0 to 75.1 on the respective datasets. For easy replication of our approach, we make the developed Lbl2Vec code publicly available as a ready-to-use tool under the 3-Clause BSD license. 在本文中，我们考虑使用无监督方法从未标记的文档数据集中检索具有预定义主题的文档的任务。所提出的无监督方法只需要描述各自主题的少量关键字，并且不需要标记文档。现有的方法要么严重依赖大量额外编码的世界知识，要么严重依赖术语文档频率。相反，我们引入了一种仅从未标记的文档数据集中学习联合嵌入的文档和单词向量的方法，以便找到在语义上与关键字描述的主题相似的文档。所提出的方法几乎不需要文本预处理，但同时能够有效地以高概率检索相关文档。当从公开可用和常用的数据集中连续检索不同预定义主题的文档时，我们在一个数据集上实现了接收者操作特征曲线下的平均面积值 0.95，在另一个数据集上实现了 0.92。此外，我们的方法可以用于多类文档分类，而不需要提前为数据集分配标签。与无监督分类基线相比，我们将各自数据集的 F1 分数从 76.6 提高到 82.7，从 61.0 提高到 75.1。为了轻松复制我们的方法，我们将开发的 Lbl2Vec 代码作为 3-Clause BSD 许可证下的即用工具公开提供。 本文提出Lbl2Vec方法，通过无监督学习从未标记文档集中检索预定义主题的文档，仅需少量关键词描述主题，无需标注数据。 Tim Schopf,Daniel Braun,Florian Matthes cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Leo Ardon,Jared Vann,Deepeka Garg,Tom Spooner,Sumitra Ganesh
title: Phantom -- A RL-driven multi-agent framework to model complex systems
title_zh: Phantom——强化学习驱动的多智能体框架，用于对复杂系统进行建模
comment: 2022 ACM International Conference on Artificial Intelligence in Finance - Benchmarks for AI in Finance Workshop 2023 Autonomous Agents and Multiagent Systems - Extended Abstract
comments: 2022 ACM International Conference on Artificial Intelligence in Finance - Benchmarks for AI in Finance Workshop 2023 Autonomous Agents and Multiagent Systems - Extended Abstract
abstract: Agent based modelling (ABM) is a computational approach to modelling complex systems by specifying the behaviour of autonomous decision-making components or agents in the system and allowing the system dynamics to emerge from their interactions. Recent advances in the field of Multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) have made it feasible to study the equilibrium of complex environments where multiple agents learn simultaneously. However, most ABM frameworks are not RL-native, in that they do not offer concepts and interfaces that are compatible with the use of MARL to learn agent behaviours. In this paper, we introduce a new open-source framework, Phantom, to bridge the gap between ABM and MARL. Phantom is an RL-driven framework for agent-based modelling of complex multi-agent systems including, but not limited to economic systems and markets. The framework aims to provide the tools to simplify the ABM specification in a MARL-compatible way - including features to encode dynamic partial observability, agent utility functions, heterogeneity in agent preferences or types, and constraints on the order in which agents can act (e.g. Stackelberg games, or more complex turn-taking environments). In this paper, we present these features, their design rationale and present two new environments leveraging the framework.
summary: Agent based modelling (ABM) is a computational approach to modelling complex systems by specifying the behaviour of autonomous decision-making components or agents in the system and allowing the system dynamics to emerge from their interactions. Recent advances in the field of Multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) have made it feasible to study the equilibrium of complex environments where multiple agents learn simultaneously. However, most ABM frameworks are not RL-native, in that they do not offer concepts and interfaces that are compatible with the use of MARL to learn agent behaviours. In this paper, we introduce a new open-source framework, Phantom, to bridge the gap between ABM and MARL. Phantom is an RL-driven framework for agent-based modelling of complex multi-agent systems including, but not limited to economic systems and markets. The framework aims to provide the tools to simplify the ABM specification in a MARL-compatible way - including features to encode dynamic partial observability, agent utility functions, heterogeneity in agent preferences or types, and constraints on the order in which agents can act (e.g. Stackelberg games, or more complex turn-taking environments). In this paper, we present these features, their design rationale and present two new environments leveraging the framework.
abstract_zh: 基于代理的建模 (ABM) 是一种对复杂系统进行建模的计算方法，它通过指定系统中自主决策组件或代理的行为并允许系统动态从它们的交互中显现出来。多智能体强化学习（MARL）领域的最新进展使得研究多个智能体同时学习的复杂环境的平衡成为可能。然而，大多数 ABM 框架都不是 RL 原生的，因为它们不提供与使用 MARL 学习代理行为兼容的概念和接口。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新的开源框架 Phantom，以弥合 ABM 和 MARL 之间的差距。 Phantom 是一个强化学习驱动的框架，用于对复杂的多智能体系统进行基于智能体的建模，包括但不限于经济系统和市场。该框架旨在提供以与 MARL 兼容的方式简化 ABM 规范的工具 - 包括编码动态部分可观测性的功能、代理效用函数、代理偏好或类型的异质性以及对代理行动顺序的约束（例如 Stackelberg 游戏或更复杂的轮流环境）。在本文中，我们介绍了这些功能、它们的设计原理，并介绍了利用该框架的两个新环境。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为Phantom的开源框架，旨在通过强化学习驱动多智能体建模，解决复杂系统建模中ABM与MARL兼容性不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有ABM框架缺乏对MARL的原生支持，难以处理动态可观测性、智能体异质性、行动顺序约束等复杂场景。
AI.method: 设计Phantom框架，提供动态部分可观测性编码、效用函数定义、智能体类型异质性支持及行动顺序约束接口，并实现两个新环境验证框架能力。
AI.result: 框架成功支持复杂多智能体系统的MARL建模，通过两个新环境展示了动态博弈和异质性偏好建模能力。
AI.conclusion: Phantom框架有效弥合了ABM与MARL的鸿沟，为经济系统等复杂场景提供了兼容强化学习的建模工具。

However, most ABM frameworks are not RL-native, in that they do not offer concepts and interfaces that are compatible with the use of MARL to learn agent behaviours. authors_text: Khurram Azeem Hashmi,Alain Pagani,Didier Stricker,Muhammamd Zeshan Afzal
title: BoxMask: Revisiting Bounding Box Supervision for Video Object Detection
title_zh: BoxMask：重新审视视频对象检测的边界框监督
abstract: We present a new, simple yet effective approach to uplift video object detection. We observe that prior works operate on instance-level feature aggregation that imminently neglects the refined pixel-level representation, resulting in confusion among objects sharing similar appearance or motion characteristics. To address this limitation, we propose BoxMask, which effectively learns discriminative representations by incorporating class-aware pixel-level information. We simply consider bounding box-level annotations as a coarse mask for each object to supervise our method. The proposed module can be effortlessly integrated into any region-based detector to boost detection. Extensive experiments on ImageNet VID and EPIC KITCHENS datasets demonstrate consistent and significant improvement when we plug our BoxMask module into numerous recent state-of-the-art methods.
summary: We present a new, simple yet effective approach to uplift video object detection. We observe that prior works operate on instance-level feature aggregation that imminently neglects the refined pixel-level representation, resulting in confusion among objects sharing similar appearance or motion characteristics. To address this limitation, we propose BoxMask, which effectively learns discriminative representations by incorporating class-aware pixel-level information. We simply consider bounding box-level annotations as a coarse mask for each object to supervise our method. The proposed module can be effortlessly integrated into any region-based detector to boost detection. Extensive experiments on ImageNet VID and EPIC KITCHENS datasets demonstrate consistent and significant improvement when we plug our BoxMask module into numerous recent state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新的、简单而有效的方法来提升视频对象检测。我们观察到，先前的工作是在实例级特征聚合上进行操作，它立即忽略了精细的像素级表示，导致共享相似外观或运动特征的对象之间出现混淆。为了解决这个限制，我们提出了 BoxMask，它通过合并类感知像素级信息来有效地学习判别表示。我们简单地将边界框级注释视为每个对象的粗略掩模以监督我们的方法。所提出的模块可以轻松集成到任何基于区域的检测器中以增强检测。在 ImageNet VID 和 EPIC KITCHENS 数据集上进行的大量实验表明，当我们将 BoxMask 模块插入到许多最新的最先进方法中时，可以得到一致且显着的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为BoxMask的新方法，通过重新利用边界框监督来提升视频目标检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在实例级特征聚合时忽略了精细的像素级表示，导致外观或运动特征相似的对象容易混淆。
AI.method: 设计BoxMask模块，利用类别感知的像素级信息，将边界框注释作为粗略掩码来学习判别性表示，并可无缝集成到基于区域的检测器中。
AI.result: 在ImageNet VID和EPIC KITCHENS数据集上，将BoxMask模块集成到多种最新方法中均取得显著性能提升。
AI.conclusion: BoxMask通过简单有效的像素级监督机制，能够显著提升视频目标检测效果且具有广泛适用性。

search_text: BoxMask: Revisiting Bounding Box Supervision for Video Object Detection BoxMask：重新审视视频对象检测的边界框监督 We present a new, simple yet effective approach to uplift video object detection. We observe that prior works operate on instance-level feature aggregation that imminently neglects the refined pixel-level representation, resulting in confusion among objects sharing similar appearance or motion characteristics. To address this limitation, we propose BoxMask, which effectively learns discriminative representations by incorporating class-aware pixel-level information. We simply consider bounding box-level annotations as a coarse mask for each object to supervise our method. The proposed module can be effortlessly integrated into any region-based detector to boost detection. Extensive experiments on ImageNet VID and EPIC KITCHENS datasets demonstrate consistent and significant improvement when we plug our BoxMask module into numerous recent state-of-the-art methods. 我们提出了一种新的、简单而有效的方法来提升视频对象检测。我们观察到，先前的工作是在实例级特征聚合上进行操作，它立即忽略了精细的像素级表示，导致共享相似外观或运动特征的对象之间出现混淆。为了解决这个限制，我们提出了 BoxMask，它通过合并类感知像素级信息来有效地学习判别表示。我们简单地将边界框级注释视为每个对象的粗略掩模以监督我们的方法。所提出的模块可以轻松集成到任何基于区域的检测器中以增强检测。在 ImageNet VID 和 EPIC KITCHENS 数据集上进行的大量实验表明，当我们将 BoxMask 模块插入到许多最新的最先进方法中时，可以得到一致且显着的改进。 本文提出一种名为BoxMask的新方法，通过重新利用边界框监督来提升视频目标检测性能。 Khurram Azeem Hashmi,Alain Pagani,Didier Stricker,Muhammamd Zeshan Afzal cs.CV

authors_text: Yueh-Kao Wu,Ching-Yu Chiu,Yi-Hsuan Yang
title: JukeDrummer: Conditional Beat-aware Audio-domain Drum Accompaniment Generation via Transformer VQ-VAE
title_zh: JukeDrummer：通过 Transformer VQ-VAE 生成条件节拍感知音频域鼓伴奏
abstract: This paper proposes a model that generates a drum track in the audio domain to play along to a user-provided drum-free recording. Specifically, using paired data of drumless tracks and the corresponding human-made drum tracks, we train a Transformer model to improvise the drum part of an unseen drumless recording. We combine two approaches to encode the input audio. First, we train a vector-quantized variational autoencoder (VQ-VAE) to represent the input audio with discrete codes, which can then be readily used in a Transformer. Second, using an audio-domain beat tracking model, we compute beat-related features of the input audio and use them as embeddings in the Transformer. Instead of generating the drum track directly as waveforms, we use a separate VQ-VAE to encode the mel-spectrogram of a drum track into another set of discrete codes, and train the Transformer to predict the sequence of drum-related discrete codes. The output codes are then converted to a mel-spectrogram with a decoder, and then to the waveform with a vocoder. We report both objective and subjective evaluations of variants of the proposed model, demonstrating that the model with beat information generates drum accompaniment that is rhythmically and stylistically consistent with the input audio.
summary: This paper proposes a model that generates a drum track in the audio domain to play along to a user-provided drum-free recording. Specifically, using paired data of drumless tracks and the corresponding human-made drum tracks, we train a Transformer model to improvise the drum part of an unseen drumless recording. We combine two approaches to encode the input audio. First, we train a vector-quantized variational autoencoder (VQ-VAE) to represent the input audio with discrete codes, which can then be readily used in a Transformer. Second, using an audio-domain beat tracking model, we compute beat-related features of the input audio and use them as embeddings in the Transformer. Instead of generating the drum track directly as waveforms, we use a separate VQ-VAE to encode the mel-spectrogram of a drum track into another set of discrete codes, and train the Transformer to predict the sequence of drum-related discrete codes. The output codes are then converted to a mel-spectrogram with a decoder, and then to the waveform with a vocoder. We report both objective and subjective evaluations of variants of the proposed model, demonstrating that the model with beat information generates drum accompaniment that is rhythmically and stylistically consistent with the input audio.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种模型，可在音频域中生成鼓音轨，以便与用户提供的无鼓录音一起播放。具体来说，使用无鼓轨道和相应的人造鼓轨道的配对数据，我们训练 Transformer 模型来即兴创作看不见的无鼓录音的鼓部分。我们结合两种方法对输入音频进行编码。首先，我们训练一个矢量量化变分自动编码器（VQ-VAE）来用离散代码表示输入音频，然后可以在 Transformer 中轻松使用。其次，使用音频域节拍跟踪模型，我们计算输入音频的节拍相关特征，并将它们用作 Transformer 中的嵌入。我们没有直接将鼓轨道生成为波形，而是使用单独的 VQ-VAE 将鼓轨道的梅尔频谱图编码为另一组离散代码，并训练 Transformer 来预测与鼓相关的离散代码的序列。然后使用解码器将输出代码转换为梅尔频谱图，然后使用声码器将其转换为波形。我们报告了对所提出模型的变体的客观和主观评估，证明具有节拍信息的模型生成的鼓伴奏在节奏和风格上与输入音频一致。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于Transformer和VQ-VAE的模型，用于生成与输入音频节奏和风格一致的鼓伴奏
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以生成与输入音频节奏和风格匹配的鼓伴奏，需更有效的方法
AI.method: 结合VQ-VAE编码音频和节拍特征，使用Transformer预测鼓相关离散代码，再通过解码器和声码器生成波形
AI.result: 模型在客观和主观评估中表现优异，生成的鼓伴奏在节奏和风格上与输入一致
AI.conclusion: 所提方法能有效生成节奏和风格与输入音频一致的鼓伴奏，验证了模型的有效性

authors_text: Ruihao Wang,Jian Qin,Kaiying Li,Yaochen Li,Dong Cao,Jintao Xu
title: BEV-LaneDet: a Simple and Effective 3D Lane Detection Baseline
title_zh: BEV-LaneDet：简单有效的 3D 车道检测基线
abstract: 3D lane detection which plays a crucial role in vehicle routing, has recently been a rapidly developing topic in autonomous driving. Previous works struggle with practicality due to their complicated spatial transformations and inflexible representations of 3D lanes. Faced with the issues, our work proposes an efficient and robust monocular 3D lane detection called BEV-LaneDet with three main contributions. First, we introduce the Virtual Camera that unifies the in/extrinsic parameters of cameras mounted on different vehicles to guarantee the consistency of the spatial relationship among cameras. It can effectively promote the learning procedure due to the unified visual space. We secondly propose a simple but efficient 3D lane representation called Key-Points Representation. This module is more suitable to represent the complicated and diverse 3D lane structures. At last, we present a light-weight and chip-friendly spatial transformation module named Spatial Transformation Pyramid to transform multiscale front-view features into BEV features. Experimental results demonstrate that our work outperforms the state-of-the-art approaches in terms of F-Score, being 10.6% higher on the OpenLane dataset and 5.9% higher on the Apollo 3D synthetic dataset, with a speed of 185 FPS. The source code will released at https://github.com/gigo-team/bev_lane_det.
summary: 3D lane detection which plays a crucial role in vehicle routing, has recently been a rapidly developing topic in autonomous driving. Previous works struggle with practicality due to their complicated spatial transformations and inflexible representations of 3D lanes. Faced with the issues, our work proposes an efficient and robust monocular 3D lane detection called BEV-LaneDet with three main contributions. First, we introduce the Virtual Camera that unifies the in/extrinsic parameters of cameras mounted on different vehicles to guarantee the consistency of the spatial relationship among cameras. It can effectively promote the learning procedure due to the unified visual space. We secondly propose a simple but efficient 3D lane representation called Key-Points Representation. This module is more suitable to represent the complicated and diverse 3D lane structures. At last, we present a light-weight and chip-friendly spatial transformation module named Spatial Transformation Pyramid to transform multiscale front-view features into BEV features. Experimental results demonstrate that our work outperforms the state-of-the-art approaches in terms of F-Score, being 10.6% higher on the OpenLane dataset and 5.9% higher on the Apollo 3D synthetic dataset, with a speed of 185 FPS. The source code will released at https://github.com/gigo-team/bev_lane_det.
abstract_zh: 3D车道检测在车辆路线规划中发挥着至关重要的作用，最近已成为自动驾驶领域快速发展的课题。之前的作品由于复杂的空间变换和不灵活的 3D 车道表示而在实用性上遇到困难。面对这些问题，我们的工作提出了一种高效且强大的单目 3D 车道检测，称为 BEV-LaneDet，具有三个主要贡献。首先，我们引入虚拟相机，它统一了安装在不同车辆上的相机的内外参数，以保证相机之间空间关系的一致性。由于统一的视觉空间，可以有效地促进学习过程。其次，我们提出了一种简单但高效的 3D 车道表示，称为关键点表示。该模块更适合表示复杂多样的3D车道结构。最后，我们提出了一种轻量级且芯片友好的空间转换模块，名为 Spatial Transformation Pyramid，用于将多尺度前视图特征转换为 BEV 特征。实验结果表明，我们的工作在 F-Score 方面优于最先进的方法，在 OpenLane 数据集上高出 10.6%，在 Apollo 3D 合成数据集上高出 5.9%，速度为 185 FPS。源代码将在 https://github.com/gigo-team/bev_lane_det 发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效且鲁棒的单目3D车道检测方法BEV-LaneDet，旨在解决现有方法在实际应用中的复杂性和灵活性不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有3D车道检测方法因复杂的空变换和不灵活的3D车道表示而缺乏实用性，亟需一种更简单有效的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出三种创新方法：1) 虚拟相机统一不同车辆摄像头内外参；2) 关键点表示法更适应复杂3D车道结构；3) 轻量级空间变换金字塔模块实现多尺度前视图到BEV特征的转换。
AI.result: 在OpenLane数据集上F-Score提升10.6%，在Apollo 3D合成数据集上提升5.9%，检测速度达185 FPS。
AI.conclusion: BEV-LaneDet通过简化表示和优化变换模块，在精度和效率上均优于现有方法，为自动驾驶提供了实用的3D车道检测基线。

At last, we present a light-weight and chip-friendly spatial transformation module named Spatial Transformation Pyramid to transform multiscale front-view features into BEV features. Experimental results demonstrate that our work outperforms the state-of-the-art approaches in terms of F-Score, being 10.6% higher on the OpenLane dataset and 5.9% higher on the Apollo 3D synthetic dataset, with a speed of 185 FPS. The source code will released at https://github.com/gigo-team/bev_lane_det. 3D车道检测在车辆路线规划中发挥着至关重要的作用，最近已成为自动驾驶领域快速发展的课题。之前的作品由于复杂的空间变换和不灵活的 3D 车道表示而在实用性上遇到困难。面对这些问题，我们的工作提出了一种高效且强大的单目 3D 车道检测，称为 BEV-LaneDet，具有三个主要贡献。首先，我们引入虚拟相机，它统一了安装在不同车辆上的相机的内外参数，以保证相机之间空间关系的一致性。由于统一的视觉空间，可以有效地促进学习过程。其次，我们提出了一种简单但高效的 3D 车道表示，称为关键点表示。该模块更适合表示复杂多样的3D车道结构。最后，我们提出了一种轻量级且芯片友好的空间转换模块，名为 Spatial Transformation Pyramid，用于将多尺度前视图特征转换为 BEV 特征。实验结果表明，我们的工作在 F-Score 方面优于最先进的方法，在 OpenLane 数据集上高出 10.6%，在 Apollo 3D 合成数据集上高出 5.9%，速度为 185 FPS。源代码将在 https://github.com/gigo-team/bev_lane_det 发布。 本文提出了一种高效且鲁棒的单目3D车道检测方法BEV-LaneDet，旨在解决现有方法在实际应用中的复杂性和灵活性不足的问题。 Ruihao Wang,Jian Qin,Kaiying Li,Yaochen Li,Dong Cao,Jintao Xu cs.CV

authors_text: Xiangjie Yan,Yongpeng Jiang,Chen Chen,Leiliang Gong,Ming Ge,Tao Zhang,Xiang Li
title: A Complementary Framework for Human-Robot Collaboration with a Mixed AR-Haptic Interface
title_zh: 具有混合 AR 触觉界面的人机协作补充框架
abstract: There is invariably a trade-off between safety and efficiency for collaborative robots (cobots) in human-robot collaborations. Robots that interact minimally with humans can work with high speed and accuracy but cannot adapt to new tasks or respond to unforeseen changes, whereas robots that work closely with humans can but only by becoming passive to humans, meaning that their main tasks suspended and efficiency compromised. Accordingly, this paper proposes a new complementary framework for human-robot collaboration that balances the safety of humans and the efficiency of robots. In this framework, the robot carries out given tasks using a vision-based adaptive controller, and the human expert collaborates with the robot in the null space. Such a decoupling drives the robot to deal with existing issues in task space (e.g., uncalibrated camera, limited field of view) and in null space (e.g., joint limits) by itself while allowing the expert to adjust the configuration of the robot body to respond to unforeseen changes (e.g., sudden invasion, change of environment) without affecting the robot's main task. Additionally, the robot can simultaneously learn the expert's demonstration in task space and null space beforehand with dynamic movement primitives (DMP). Therefore, an expert's knowledge and a robot's capability are both explored and complementary. Human demonstration and involvement are enabled via a mixed interaction interface, i.e., augmented reality (AR) and haptic devices. The stability of the closed-loop system is rigorously proved with Lyapunov methods. Experimental results in various scenarios are presented to illustrate the performance of the proposed method.
summary: There is invariably a trade-off between safety and efficiency for collaborative robots (cobots) in human-robot collaborations. Robots that interact minimally with humans can work with high speed and accuracy but cannot adapt to new tasks or respond to unforeseen changes, whereas robots that work closely with humans can but only by becoming passive to humans, meaning that their main tasks suspended and efficiency compromised. Accordingly, this paper proposes a new complementary framework for human-robot collaboration that balances the safety of humans and the efficiency of robots. In this framework, the robot carries out given tasks using a vision-based adaptive controller, and the human expert collaborates with the robot in the null space. Such a decoupling drives the robot to deal with existing issues in task space (e.g., uncalibrated camera, limited field of view) and in null space (e.g., joint limits) by itself while allowing the expert to adjust the configuration of the robot body to respond to unforeseen changes (e.g., sudden invasion, change of environment) without affecting the robot's main task. Additionally, the robot can simultaneously learn the expert's demonstration in task space and null space beforehand with dynamic movement primitives (DMP). Therefore, an expert's knowledge and a robot's capability are both explored and complementary. Human demonstration and involvement are enabled via a mixed interaction interface, i.e., augmented reality (AR) and haptic devices. The stability of the closed-loop system is rigorously proved with Lyapunov methods. Experimental results in various scenarios are presented to illustrate the performance of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 在人机协作中，协作机器人（cobots）总是需要在安全性和效率之间进行权衡。与人类互动最少的机器人可以高速、准确地工作，但无法适应新任务或对不可预见的变化做出反应，而与人类密切合作的机器人只能对人类变得被动，这意味着它们的主要任务被暂停，效率受到影响。因此，本文提出了一种新的人机协作互补框架，平衡人类的安全和机器人的效率。在此框架中，机器人使用基于视觉的自适应控制器执行给定的任务，人类专家在零空间中与机器人协作。这种解耦驱动机器人自行处理任务空间（例如，未校准的相机、有限的视野）和零空间（例如，关节限制）中的现有问题，同时允许专家调整机器人主体的配置以响应不可预见的变化（例如，突然入侵、环境变化），而不影响机器人的主要任务。此外，机器人可以通过动态运动原语（DMP）同时学习专家在任务空间和零空间中的演示。因此，专家的知识和机器人的能力都是探索性的、互补性的。人类演示和参与是通过混合交互界面实现的，即增强现实（AR）和触觉设备。采用Lyapunov方法严格证明了闭环系统的稳定性。给出了各种场景下的实验结果来说明所提出方法的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合增强现实（AR）和触觉交互的人机协作框架，旨在平衡协作机器人（cobot）的安全性与效率。
AI.motivation: 传统协作机器人存在安全与效率的矛盾：高度自动化时难以适应变化，而依赖人工干预则牺牲效率。现有方法无法兼顾两者。
AI.method: 通过任务空间与零空间解耦控制，机器人自主处理任务空间问题（如视觉校准），人类专家在零空间调整机器人配置；结合动态运动基元（DMP）学习专家示范，并采用AR与触觉设备实现混合交互。
AI.result: 理论证明闭环系统稳定性，实验验证了框架在多种场景下的有效性，展示了对突发环境变化的适应能力。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过人机能力互补，实现了安全性与效率的平衡，为复杂动态环境下的协作提供了新思路。

authors_text: Chenggong Zhang,Zhilei Liu
title: Face Super-Resolution with Progressive Embedding of Multi-scale Face Priors
title_zh: 具有多尺度人脸先验渐进嵌入的人脸超分辨率
abstract: The face super-resolution (FSR) task is to reconstruct high-resolution face images from low-resolution inputs. Recent works have achieved success on this task by utilizing facial priors such as facial landmarks. Most existing methods pay more attention to global shape and structure information, but less to local texture information, which makes them cannot recover local details well. In this paper, we propose a novel recurrent convolutional network based framework for face super-resolution, which progressively introduces both global shape and local texture information. We take full advantage of the intermediate outputs of the recurrent network, and landmarks information and facial action units (AUs) information are extracted in the output of the first and second steps respectively, rather than low-resolution input. Moreover, we introduced AU classification results as a novel quantitative metric for facial details restoration. Extensive experiments show that our proposed method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art FSR methods in terms of image quality and facial details restoration.
summary: The face super-resolution (FSR) task is to reconstruct high-resolution face images from low-resolution inputs. Recent works have achieved success on this task by utilizing facial priors such as facial landmarks. Most existing methods pay more attention to global shape and structure information, but less to local texture information, which makes them cannot recover local details well. In this paper, we propose a novel recurrent convolutional network based framework for face super-resolution, which progressively introduces both global shape and local texture information. We take full advantage of the intermediate outputs of the recurrent network, and landmarks information and facial action units (AUs) information are extracted in the output of the first and second steps respectively, rather than low-resolution input. Moreover, we introduced AU classification results as a novel quantitative metric for facial details restoration. Extensive experiments show that our proposed method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art FSR methods in terms of image quality and facial details restoration.
abstract_zh: 人脸超分辨率（FSR）任务是从低分辨率输入重建高分辨率人脸图像。最近的工作通过利用面部先验（例如面部标志）在这项任务上取得了成功。大多数现有方法更多地关注全局形状和结构信息，而较少关注局部纹理信息，这使得它们不能很好地恢复局部细节。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于循环卷积网络的面部超分辨率框架，该框架逐步引入全局形状和局部纹理信息。我们充分利用循环网络的中间输出，分别在第一步和第二步的输出中提取地标信息和面部动作单元（AU）信息，而不是低分辨率的输入。此外，我们引入了 AU 分类结果作为面部细节恢复的一种新颖的定量指标。大量实验表明，我们提出的方法在图像质量和面部细节恢复方面明显优于最先进的 FSR 方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于循环卷积网络的人脸超分辨率方法，通过渐进融合多尺度人脸先验信息来提升图像质量与局部细节恢复。
AI.motivation: 现有方法侧重于全局结构而忽视局部纹理细节，导致局部信息恢复不足，需更全面的信息融合。
AI.method: 采用循环卷积网络框架，逐步融合全局形状与局部纹理信息，利用中间输出提取面部标志点及动作单元信息，并引入AU分类作为定量评估指标。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在图像质量及面部细节恢复上显著优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的新框架有效结合多尺度人脸先验，为人脸超分辨率任务提供了更优的解决方案。

authors_text: Markus Knitt,Jakob Schyga,Asan Adamanov,Johannes Hinckeldeyn,Jochen Kreutzfeldt
title: Estimating the Pose of a Euro Pallet with an RGB Camera based on Synthetic Training Data
title_zh: 基于综合训练数据使用 RGB 相机估计欧洲托盘的姿态
abstract: Estimating the pose of a pallet and other logistics objects is crucial for various use cases, such as automatized material handling or tracking. Innovations in computer vision, computing power, and machine learning open up new opportunities for device-free localization based on cameras and neural networks. Large image datasets with annotated poses are required for training the network. Manual annotation, especially of 6D poses, is an extremely labor-intensive process. Hence, newer approaches often leverage synthetic training data to automatize the process of generating annotated image datasets. In this work, the generation of synthetic training data for 6D pose estimation of pallets is presented. The data is then used to train the Deep Object Pose Estimation (DOPE) algorithm. The experimental validation of the algorithm proves that the 6D pose estimation of a standardized Euro pallet with a Red-Green-Blue (RGB) camera is feasible. The comparison of the results from three varying datasets under different lighting conditions shows the relevance of an appropriate dataset design to achieve an accurate and robust localization. The quantitative evaluation shows an average position error of less than 20 cm for the preferred dataset. The validated training dataset and a photorealistic model of a Euro pallet are publicly provided.
summary: Estimating the pose of a pallet and other logistics objects is crucial for various use cases, such as automatized material handling or tracking. Innovations in computer vision, computing power, and machine learning open up new opportunities for device-free localization based on cameras and neural networks. Large image datasets with annotated poses are required for training the network. Manual annotation, especially of 6D poses, is an extremely labor-intensive process. Hence, newer approaches often leverage synthetic training data to automatize the process of generating annotated image datasets. In this work, the generation of synthetic training data for 6D pose estimation of pallets is presented. The data is then used to train the Deep Object Pose Estimation (DOPE) algorithm. The experimental validation of the algorithm proves that the 6D pose estimation of a standardized Euro pallet with a Red-Green-Blue (RGB) camera is feasible. The comparison of the results from three varying datasets under different lighting conditions shows the relevance of an appropriate dataset design to achieve an accurate and robust localization. The quantitative evaluation shows an average position error of less than 20 cm for the preferred dataset. The validated training dataset and a photorealistic model of a Euro pallet are publicly provided.
abstract_zh: 估计托盘和其他物流物体的姿态对于各种用例（例如自动化物料搬运或跟踪）至关重要。计算机视觉、计算能力和机器学习方面的创新为基于相机和神经网络的无设备定位带来了新的机遇。训练网络需要带有注释姿势的大型图像数据集。手动注释，尤其是 6D 姿势的注释，是一个极其耗费人力的过程。因此，较新的方法通常利用合成训练数据来自动化生成带注释的图像数据集的过程。在这项工作中，提出了用于托盘 6D 位姿估计的合成训练数据的生成。然后，该数据用于训练深度物体姿态估计 (DOPE) 算法。该算法的实验验证证明，使用红绿蓝（RGB）相机对标准化欧洲托盘进行6D位姿估计是可行的。不同光照条件下三个不同数据集的结果的比较显示了适当的数据集设计对于实现准确和稳健的定位的相关性。定量评估显示首选数据集的平均位置误差小于 20 厘米。公开提供经过验证的训练数据集和欧洲托盘的真实感模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于合成训练数据的方法，利用RGB相机实现对欧元托盘的6D姿态估计。
AI.motivation: 手动标注6D姿态耗时且困难，合成数据能高效生成标注数据集，提升自动化物流中的姿态估计效率。
AI.method: 通过生成合成训练数据，训练Deep Object Pose Estimation (DOPE)算法，并在不同光照条件下进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验表明，使用优选数据集的平均位置误差小于20厘米，验证了方法的可行性，并公开了数据集和托盘模型。
AI.conclusion: 适当的合成数据集设计对提高定位精度和鲁棒性至关重要，所提方法为物流自动化提供了可行的解决方案。
