authors_text: Tai-Yin Chiu,Danna Gurari
title: Line Search-Based Feature Transformation for Fast, Stable, and Tunable Content-Style Control in Photorealistic Style Transfer
title_zh: 基于线搜索的特征转换，可在真实感风格迁移中实现快速、稳定和可调的内容风格控制
abstract: Photorealistic style transfer is the task of synthesizing a realistic-looking image when adapting the content from one image to appear in the style of another image. Modern models commonly embed a transformation that fuses features describing the content image and style image and then decodes the resulting feature into a stylized image. We introduce a general-purpose transformation that enables controlling the balance between how much content is preserved and the strength of the infused style. We offer the first experiments that demonstrate the performance of existing transformations across different style transfer models and demonstrate how our transformation performs better in its ability to simultaneously run fast, produce consistently reasonable results, and control the balance between content and style in different models. To support reproducing our method and models, we share the code at https://github.com/chiutaiyin/LS-FT.
summary: Photorealistic style transfer is the task of synthesizing a realistic-looking image when adapting the content from one image to appear in the style of another image. Modern models commonly embed a transformation that fuses features describing the content image and style image and then decodes the resulting feature into a stylized image. We introduce a general-purpose transformation that enables controlling the balance between how much content is preserved and the strength of the infused style. We offer the first experiments that demonstrate the performance of existing transformations across different style transfer models and demonstrate how our transformation performs better in its ability to simultaneously run fast, produce consistently reasonable results, and control the balance between content and style in different models. To support reproducing our method and models, we share the code at https://github.com/chiutaiyin/LS-FT.
abstract_zh: 照片写实风格迁移是指在调整一幅图像的内容以呈现另一幅图像的风格时合成逼真图像的任务。现代模型通常嵌入一种转换，该转换融合描述内容图像和风格图像的特征，然后将所得特征解码为风格化图像。我们引入了一种通用转换，可以控制保留的内容量和注入风格的强度之间的平衡。我们提供了第一个实验，展示了现有转换在不同风格迁移模型中的性能，并展示了我们的转换如何在同时快速运行、产生一致合理的结果以及控制不同模型中内容和风格之间的平衡方面表现得更好。为了支持重现我们的方法和模型，我们在 https://github.com/chiutaiyin/LS-FT 共享代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于线搜索的特征变换方法，用于在写实风格迁移任务中实现内容与风格的平衡控制。
AI.motivation: 现有风格迁移模型在控制内容保留与风格强度平衡时存在不足，难以同时满足速度、稳定性与可调性需求。
AI.method: 设计通用特征变换模块，通过线搜索策略动态调整内容-风格权重，支持跨模型的快速稳定风格迁移。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多个模型中均优于现有技术，在速度、结果一致性及平衡控制方面表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 提出的线搜索特征变换为不同风格迁移框架提供了统一的高效可控解决方案，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Homayun Afrabandpey,Michael Spranger
title: Feasible and Desirable Counterfactual Generation by Preserving Human Defined Constraints
title_zh: 通过保留人类定义的约束来生成可行且理想的反事实
abstract: We present a human-in-the-loop approach to generate counterfactual (CF) explanations that preserve global and local feasibility constraints. Global feasibility constraints refer to the causal constraints that are necessary for generating actionable CF explanation. Assuming a domain expert with knowledge on unary and binary causal constraints, our approach efficiently employs this knowledge to generate CF explanation by rejecting gradient steps that violate these constraints. Local feasibility constraints encode end-user's constraints for generating desirable CF explanation. We extract these constraints from the end-user of the model and exploit them during CF generation via user-defined distance metric. Through user studies, we demonstrate that incorporating causal constraints during CF generation results in significantly better explanations in terms of feasibility and desirability for participants. Adopting local and global feasibility constraints simultaneously, although improves user satisfaction, does not significantly improve desirability of the participants compared to only incorporating global constraints.
summary: We present a human-in-the-loop approach to generate counterfactual (CF) explanations that preserve global and local feasibility constraints. Global feasibility constraints refer to the causal constraints that are necessary for generating actionable CF explanation. Assuming a domain expert with knowledge on unary and binary causal constraints, our approach efficiently employs this knowledge to generate CF explanation by rejecting gradient steps that violate these constraints. Local feasibility constraints encode end-user's constraints for generating desirable CF explanation. We extract these constraints from the end-user of the model and exploit them during CF generation via user-defined distance metric. Through user studies, we demonstrate that incorporating causal constraints during CF generation results in significantly better explanations in terms of feasibility and desirability for participants. Adopting local and global feasibility constraints simultaneously, although improves user satisfaction, does not significantly improve desirability of the participants compared to only incorporating global constraints.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种人机交互的方法来生成反事实（CF）解释，以保留全局和局部可行性约束。全局可行性约束是指生成可操作的 CF 解释所必需的因果约束。假设领域专家了解一元和二元因果约束的知识，我们的方法可以有效地利用这些知识，通过拒绝违反这些约束的梯度步骤来生成 CF 解释。局部可行性约束对最终用户的约束进行编码，以生成所需的 CF 解释。我们从模型的最终用户那里提取这些约束，并在 CF 生成过程中通过用户定义的距离度量来利用它们。通过用户研究，我们证明在 CF 生成过程中纳入因果约束可以为参与者的可行性和可取性提供更好的解释。同时采用局部和全局可行性约束虽然提高了用户满意度，但与仅结合全局约束相比并没有显着提高参与者的意愿。

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合人类定义的全局和局部约束生成可行且理想的反事实解释的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有反事实生成方法常忽略人类设定的因果与用户偏好约束，导致生成的解释缺乏可行性或实用性。
AI.method: 采用人机交互框架，整合领域专家的因果约束（拒绝违反约束的梯度更新）与用户定义的局部约束（通过自定义距离度量优化生成过程）。
AI.result: 用户实验表明，引入因果约束显著提升解释的可行性与理想性，但同时应用全局与局部约束未显著改善理想性评分。
AI.conclusion: 全局因果约束对反事实质量影响更关键，局部约束可作为补充但需平衡约束复杂度与效果收益。

search_text: Feasible and Desirable Counterfactual Generation by Preserving Human Defined Constraints 通过保留人类定义的约束来生成可行且理想的反事实 We present a human-in-the-loop approach to generate counterfactual (CF) explanations that preserve global and local feasibility constraints. Global feasibility constraints refer to the causal constraints that are necessary for generating actionable CF explanation. Assuming a domain expert with knowledge on unary and binary causal constraints, our approach efficiently employs this knowledge to generate CF explanation by rejecting gradient steps that violate these constraints. Local feasibility constraints encode end-user's constraints for generating desirable CF explanation. We extract these constraints from the end-user of the model and exploit them during CF generation via user-defined distance metric. Through user studies, we demonstrate that incorporating causal constraints during CF generation results in significantly better explanations in terms of feasibility and desirability for participants. Adopting local and global feasibility constraints simultaneously, although improves user satisfaction, does not significantly improve desirability of the participants compared to only incorporating global constraints. 我们提出了一种人机交互的方法来生成反事实（CF）解释，以保留全局和局部可行性约束。全局可行性约束是指生成可操作的 CF 解释所必需的因果约束。假设领域专家了解一元和二元因果约束的知识，我们的方法可以有效地利用这些知识，通过拒绝违反这些约束的梯度步骤来生成 CF 解释。局部可行性约束对最终用户的约束进行编码，以生成所需的 CF 解释。我们从模型的最终用户那里提取这些约束，并在 CF 生成过程中通过用户定义的距离度量来利用它们。通过用户研究，我们证明在 CF 生成过程中纳入因果约束可以为参与者的可行性和可取性提供更好的解释。同时采用局部和全局可行性约束虽然提高了用户满意度，但与仅结合全局约束相比并没有显着提高参与者的意愿。 提出一种结合人类定义的全局和局部约束生成可行且理想的反事实解释的方法。 Homayun Afrabandpey,Michael Spranger cs.LG,cs.HC

authors_text: Ran Tamir
title: Fast Convergence to Unanimity in Dense Erdős-Rényi Graphs
title_zh: 密集 Erdős-Rényi 图中快速收敛到一致
comment: The introduction has been edited. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2104.04996
comments: The introduction has been edited. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2104.04996
abstract: Majority dynamics on the binomial Erdős-Rényi graph $\mathsf{G}(n,p)$ with $p=λ/\sqrt{n}$ is studied. In this process, each vertex has a state in $\{0,1\}$ and at each round, every vertex adopts the state of the majority of its neighbors, retaining its state in the case of a tie. It was conjectured by Benjamini et al. and proved by Fountoulakis et al. that this process reaches unanimity with high probability in at most four rounds. By adding some extra randomness and allowing the underlying graph to be drawn anew in each communication round, we improve on their result and prove that this process reaches consensus in only three communication rounds with probability approaching $1$ as $n$ grows to infinity. We also provide a converse result, showing that three rounds are not only sufficient, but also necessary.
summary: Majority dynamics on the binomial Erdős-Rényi graph $\mathsf{G}(n,p)$ with $p=λ/\sqrt{n}$ is studied. In this process, each vertex has a state in $\{0,1\}$ and at each round, every vertex adopts the state of the majority of its neighbors, retaining its state in the case of a tie. It was conjectured by Benjamini et al. and proved by Fountoulakis et al. that this process reaches unanimity with high probability in at most four rounds. By adding some extra randomness and allowing the underlying graph to be drawn anew in each communication round, we improve on their result and prove that this process reaches consensus in only three communication rounds with probability approaching $1$ as $n$ grows to infinity. We also provide a converse result, showing that three rounds are not only sufficient, but also necessary.
abstract_zh: 研究了二项式 Erdős-Rényi 图 $\mathsf{G}(n,p)$ 上的多数动力学，其中 $p=λ/\sqrt{n}$。在此过程中，每个顶点都有一个 $\{0,1\}$ 状态，并且在每一轮中，每个顶点都会采用其大多数邻居的状态，并在平局的情况下保留其状态。这是本杰明尼等人推测的。并由 Fountoulakis 等人证明。这个过程最多四轮就很有可能达成一致。通过添加一些额外的随机性并允许在每一轮通信中重新绘制底层图，我们改进了结果并证明这个过程仅在三轮通信中就达成共识，随着 $n$ 增长到无穷大，概率接近 $1$。我们还提供了一个相反的结果，表明三轮不仅是足够的，而且是必要的。

AI.tldr: 研究密集型Erdős-Rényi图上的多数动态过程，证明在三轮通信内可达到共识。
AI.motivation: 改进已有结论，将达成共识所需轮数从四轮减少至三轮，并验证其必要性。
AI.method: 引入额外随机性，允许每轮通信时重新生成图结构，结合概率分析与图论方法。
AI.result: 证明三轮通信可使系统以高概率达成共识，且三轮为必要且充分条件。
AI.conclusion: 三轮是密集Erdős-Rényi图多数动态达成共识的最优轮数，提供理论下界与上界保证。

authors_text: Sayontan Ghosh,Tanvi Aggarwal,Minh Hoai,Niranjan Balasubramanian
title: Text-Derived Knowledge Helps Vision: A Simple Cross-modal Distillation for Video-based Action Anticipation
title_zh: 文本衍生知识有助于视觉：基于视频的动作预期的简单跨模式蒸馏
abstract: Anticipating future actions in a video is useful for many autonomous and assistive technologies. Most prior action anticipation work treat this as a vision modality problem, where the models learn the task information primarily from the video features in the action anticipation datasets. However, knowledge about action sequences can also be obtained from external textual data. In this work, we show how knowledge in pretrained language models can be adapted and distilled into vision-based action anticipation models. We show that a simple distillation technique can achieve effective knowledge transfer and provide consistent gains on a strong vision model (Anticipative Vision Transformer) for two action anticipation datasets (3.5% relative gain on EGTEA-GAZE+ and 7.2% relative gain on EPIC-KITCHEN 55), giving a new state-of-the-art result.
summary: Anticipating future actions in a video is useful for many autonomous and assistive technologies. Most prior action anticipation work treat this as a vision modality problem, where the models learn the task information primarily from the video features in the action anticipation datasets. However, knowledge about action sequences can also be obtained from external textual data. In this work, we show how knowledge in pretrained language models can be adapted and distilled into vision-based action anticipation models. We show that a simple distillation technique can achieve effective knowledge transfer and provide consistent gains on a strong vision model (Anticipative Vision Transformer) for two action anticipation datasets (3.5% relative gain on EGTEA-GAZE+ and 7.2% relative gain on EPIC-KITCHEN 55), giving a new state-of-the-art result.
abstract_zh: 预测视频中的未来动作对于许多自主和辅助技术非常有用。大多数先前的动作预期工作将其视为视觉模态问题，其中模型主要从动作预期数据集中的视频特征学习任务信息。然而，关于动作序列的知识也可以从外部文本数据获得。在这项工作中，我们展示了如何将预训练语言模型中的知识改编并提炼为基于视觉的动作预期模型。我们证明，简单的蒸馏技术可以实现有效的知识转移，并为两个动作预期数据集的强视觉模型（Anticipative Vision Transformer）提供一致的增益（EGTEA-GAZE+ 上的相对增益为 3.5%，EPIC-KITCHEN 55 上的相对增益为 7.2%），从而给出了新的最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种跨模态蒸馏方法，将预训练语言模型中的文本知识迁移到基于视频的动作预判视觉模型中，以提升动作预判性能。
AI.motivation: 传统动作预判方法仅依赖视频数据，忽视了文本数据中蕴含的动作序列知识。作者认为结合文本知识可提升模型表现。
AI.method: 通过简单蒸馏技术，将预训练语言模型的知识迁移到视觉模型（Anticipative Vision Transformer），实现跨模态知识转移。
AI.result: 在EGTEA-GAZE+和EPIC-KITCHEN 55数据集上分别取得3.5%和7.2%的相对性能提升，达到新的SOTA结果。
AI.conclusion: 文本衍生知识能有效增强视觉模型的动作预判能力，且该跨模态蒸馏方法简单有效，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Haotian Wu,Peipei Wang,Xin Wang,Ji Xiang,Rui Gong
title: GGViT:Multistream Vision Transformer Network in Face2Face Facial Reenactment Detection
title_zh: GGViT：Face2Face 面部重演检测中的多流视觉变换器网络
comment: 6 pages,4 figures,to be published in ICPR2022
comments: 6 pages,4 figures,to be published in ICPR2022
abstract: Detecting manipulated facial images and videos on social networks has been an urgent problem to be solved. The compression of videos on social media has destroyed some pixel details that could be used to detect forgeries. Hence, it is crucial to detect manipulated faces in videos of different quality. We propose a new multi-stream network architecture named GGViT, which utilizes global information to improve the generalization of the model. The embedding of the whole face extracted by ViT will guide each stream network. Through a large number of experiments, we have proved that our proposed model achieves state-of-the-art classification accuracy on FF++ dataset, and has been greatly improved on scenarios of different compression rates. The accuracy of Raw/C23, Raw/C40 and C23/C40 was increased by 24.34%, 15.08% and 10.14% respectively.
summary: Detecting manipulated facial images and videos on social networks has been an urgent problem to be solved. The compression of videos on social media has destroyed some pixel details that could be used to detect forgeries. Hence, it is crucial to detect manipulated faces in videos of different quality. We propose a new multi-stream network architecture named GGViT, which utilizes global information to improve the generalization of the model. The embedding of the whole face extracted by ViT will guide each stream network. Through a large number of experiments, we have proved that our proposed model achieves state-of-the-art classification accuracy on FF++ dataset, and has been greatly improved on scenarios of different compression rates. The accuracy of Raw/C23, Raw/C40 and C23/C40 was increased by 24.34%, 15.08% and 10.14% respectively.
abstract_zh: 检测社交网络上被操纵的面部图像和视频一直是一个亟待解决的问题。社交媒体上的视频压缩破坏了一些可用于检测伪造品的像素细节。因此，检测不同质量视频中被操纵的面孔至关重要。我们提出了一种名为 GGViT 的新多流网络架构，它利用全局信息来提高模型的泛化能力。 ViT提取的整个人脸的嵌入将指导每个流网络。通过大量的实验，我们证明我们提出的模型在FF++数据集上实现了state-of-the-art的分类精度，并且在不同压缩率的场景下得到了很大的提高。 Raw/C23、Raw/C40和C23/C40的准确率分别提高了24.34%、15.08%和10.14%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GGViT多流视觉Transformer网络，用于检测社交媒体中不同压缩质量下的Face2Face面部重演伪造视频。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体视频压缩破坏了可用于检测伪造的像素细节，现有方法难以应对不同压缩率场景下的面部伪造检测需求。
AI.method: 设计多流网络架构GGViT，通过ViT提取的全局面部特征引导各子网络，提升模型在不同压缩率下的泛化能力。
AI.result: 在FF++数据集上达到SOTA分类准确率，Raw/C23、Raw/C40和C23/C40场景准确率分别提升24.34%、15.08%和10.14%。
AI.conclusion: GGViT通过全局特征引导的多流结构有效解决了不同压缩率下的面部伪造检测问题，验证了其在实际场景中的优越性。

motivation: 社交媒体视频压缩破坏了可用于检测伪造的像素细节，现有方法难以应对不同压缩率场景下的面部伪造检测需求。
method: 设计多流网络架构GGViT，通过ViT提取的全局面部特征引导各子网络，提升模型在不同压缩率下的泛化能力。
result: 在FF++数据集上达到SOTA分类准确率，Raw/C23、Raw/C40和C23/C40场景准确率分别提升24.34%、15.08%和10.14%。
conclusion: GGViT通过全局特征引导的多流结构有效解决了不同压缩率下的面部伪造检测问题，验证了其在实际场景中的优越性。
search_text: GGViT:Multistream Vision Transformer Network in Face2Face Facial Reenactment Detection GGViT：Face2Face 面部重演检测中的多流视觉变换器网络 Detecting manipulated facial images and videos on social networks has been an urgent problem to be solved. The compression of videos on social media has destroyed some pixel details that could be used to detect forgeries. Hence, it is crucial to detect manipulated faces in videos of different quality. We propose a new multi-stream network architecture named GGViT, which utilizes global information to improve the generalization of the model. The embedding of the whole face extracted by ViT will guide each stream network. Through a large number of experiments, we have proved that our proposed model achieves state-of-the-art classification accuracy on FF++ dataset, and has been greatly improved on scenarios of different compression rates. The accuracy of Raw/C23, Raw/C40 and C23/C40 was increased by 24.34%, 15.08% and 10.14% respectively. 检测社交网络上被操纵的面部图像和视频一直是一个亟待解决的问题。社交媒体上的视频压缩破坏了一些可用于检测伪造品的像素细节。因此，检测不同质量视频中被操纵的面孔至关重要。我们提出了一种名为 GGViT 的新多流网络架构，它利用全局信息来提高模型的泛化能力。 ViT提取的整个人脸的嵌入将指导每个流网络。通过大量的实验，我们证明我们提出的模型在FF++数据集上实现了state-of-the-art的分类精度，并且在不同压缩率的场景下得到了很大的提高。 Raw/C23、Raw/C40和C23/C40的准确率分别提高了24.34%、15.08%和10.14%。 本文提出GGViT多流视觉Transformer网络，用于检测社交媒体中不同压缩质量下的Face2Face面部重演伪造视频。 Haotian Wu,Peipei Wang,Xin Wang,Ji Xiang,Rui Gong cs.CV

authors_text: Thom Badings,Licio Romao,Alessandro Abate,Nils Jansen
title: Probabilities Are Not Enough: Formal Controller Synthesis for Stochastic Dynamical Models with Epistemic Uncertainty
title_zh: 概率是不够的：具有认知不确定性的随机动力学模型的形式控制器综合
abstract: Capturing uncertainty in models of complex dynamical systems is crucial to designing safe controllers. Stochastic noise causes aleatoric uncertainty, whereas imprecise knowledge of model parameters leads to epistemic uncertainty. Several approaches use formal abstractions to synthesize policies that satisfy temporal specifications related to safety and reachability. However, the underlying models exclusively capture aleatoric but not epistemic uncertainty, and thus require that model parameters are known precisely. Our contribution to overcoming this restriction is a novel abstraction-based controller synthesis method for continuous-state models with stochastic noise and uncertain parameters. By sampling techniques and robust analysis, we capture both aleatoric and epistemic uncertainty, with a user-specified confidence level, in the transition probability intervals of a so-called interval Markov decision process (iMDP). We synthesize an optimal policy on this iMDP, which translates (with the specified confidence level) to a feedback controller for the continuous model with the same performance guarantees. Our experimental benchmarks confirm that accounting for epistemic uncertainty leads to controllers that are more robust against variations in parameter values.
summary: Capturing uncertainty in models of complex dynamical systems is crucial to designing safe controllers. Stochastic noise causes aleatoric uncertainty, whereas imprecise knowledge of model parameters leads to epistemic uncertainty. Several approaches use formal abstractions to synthesize policies that satisfy temporal specifications related to safety and reachability. However, the underlying models exclusively capture aleatoric but not epistemic uncertainty, and thus require that model parameters are known precisely. Our contribution to overcoming this restriction is a novel abstraction-based controller synthesis method for continuous-state models with stochastic noise and uncertain parameters. By sampling techniques and robust analysis, we capture both aleatoric and epistemic uncertainty, with a user-specified confidence level, in the transition probability intervals of a so-called interval Markov decision process (iMDP). We synthesize an optimal policy on this iMDP, which translates (with the specified confidence level) to a feedback controller for the continuous model with the same performance guarantees. Our experimental benchmarks confirm that accounting for epistemic uncertainty leads to controllers that are more robust against variations in parameter values.
abstract_zh: 捕获复杂动力系统模型中的不确定性对于设计安全控制器至关重要。随机噪声会导致任意不确定性，而模型参数的不精确知识会导致认知不确定性。多种方法使用形式抽象来综合满足与安全性和可达性相关的时间规范的策略。然而，底层模型只捕获任意的不确定性，而不捕获认知的不确定性，因此需要精确地知道模型参数。我们对克服这一限制的贡献是一种新颖的基于抽象的控制器综合方法，用于具有随机噪声和不确定参数的连续状态模型。通过采样技术和稳健分析，我们在所谓的区间马尔可夫决策过程 (iMDP) 的转移概率区间中捕获任意和认知不确定性，并具有用户指定的置信水平。我们在此 iMDP 上综合了一个最优策略，该策略（以指定的置信水平）转换为具有相同性能保证的连续模型的反馈控制器。我们的实验基准证实，考虑认知不确定性可以使控制器对参数值的变化更加鲁棒。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对具有认知不确定性的随机动态模型的控制器综合方法，通过区间马尔可夫决策过程（iMDP）同时处理随机噪声和参数不确定性。
AI.motivation: 现有控制器综合方法仅考虑随机噪声引起的偶然不确定性，无法处理模型参数不精确导致的认知不确定性，限制了实际应用中的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 结合采样技术和鲁棒分析，构建包含置信水平的区间转移概率的iMDP模型，并在此基础上综合最优策略以生成满足性能保证的反馈控制器。
AI.result: 实验表明，考虑认知不确定性的控制器在参数变化下表现出更高的鲁棒性，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合偶然与认知不确定性，本文提出的方法为复杂动态系统的安全控制器设计提供了更可靠的理论框架。

authors_text: Xuecheng Xu,Sha Lu,Jun Wu,Haojian Lu,Qiuguo Zhu,Yiyi Liao,Rong Xiong,Yue Wang
title: RING++: Roto-translation Invariant Gram for Global Localization on a Sparse Scan Map
title_zh: RING++：用于稀疏扫描地图上全局定位的旋转平移不变语法
abstract: Global localization plays a critical role in many robot applications. LiDAR-based global localization draws the community's focus with its robustness against illumination and seasonal changes. To further improve the localization under large viewpoint differences, we propose RING++ which has roto-translation invariant representation for place recognition, and global convergence for both rotation and translation estimation. With the theoretical guarantee, RING++ is able to address the large viewpoint difference using a lightweight map with sparse scans. In addition, we derive sufficient conditions of feature extractors for the representation preserving the roto-translation invariance, making RING++ a framework applicable to generic multi-channel features. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first learning-free framework to address all subtasks of global localization in the sparse scan map. Validations on real-world datasets show that our approach demonstrates better performance than state-of-the-art learning-free methods, and competitive performance with learning-based methods. Finally, we integrate RING++ into a multi-robot/session SLAM system, performing its effectiveness in collaborative applications.
summary: Global localization plays a critical role in many robot applications. LiDAR-based global localization draws the community's focus with its robustness against illumination and seasonal changes. To further improve the localization under large viewpoint differences, we propose RING++ which has roto-translation invariant representation for place recognition, and global convergence for both rotation and translation estimation. With the theoretical guarantee, RING++ is able to address the large viewpoint difference using a lightweight map with sparse scans. In addition, we derive sufficient conditions of feature extractors for the representation preserving the roto-translation invariance, making RING++ a framework applicable to generic multi-channel features. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first learning-free framework to address all subtasks of global localization in the sparse scan map. Validations on real-world datasets show that our approach demonstrates better performance than state-of-the-art learning-free methods, and competitive performance with learning-based methods. Finally, we integrate RING++ into a multi-robot/session SLAM system, performing its effectiveness in collaborative applications.
abstract_zh: 全球本地化在许多机器人应用中发挥着至关重要的作用。基于激光雷达的全球定位以其对光照和季节变化的鲁棒性吸引了社区的关注。为了进一步改善大视点差异下的定位，我们提出了 RING++，它具有用于位置识别的旋转平移不变表示，以及用于旋转和平移估计的全局收敛。有了理论保证，RING++ 能够使用稀疏扫描的轻量级地图来解决较大的视点差异。此外，我们推导了特征提取器的充分条件，以保持旋转平移不变性，使 RING++ 成为适用于通用多通道特征的框架。据我们所知，这是第一个无需学习的框架，可以解决稀疏扫描图中全局定位的所有子任务。对现实世界数据集的验证表明，我们的方法表现出比最先进的无学习方法更好的性能，以及基于学习的方法的竞争性能。最后，我们将 RING++ 集成到多机器人/会话 SLAM 系统中，在协作应用中发挥其有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RING++框架，解决稀疏扫描地图上的全局定位问题，通过旋转平移不变性表示提升大视角差异下的定位精度。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理大视角差异和稀疏地图时存在局限，需开发无需学习的鲁棒定位框架以应对光照/季节变化及多机器人协作需求。
AI.method: 构建旋转平移不变性Gram矩阵表示，结合稀疏扫描地图与理论证明的特征提取条件，形成适用于多通道特征的通用学习-free框架。
AI.result: 在真实数据集上优于现有学习-free方法，性能接近学习方法，并成功集成于多机器人SLAM系统验证有效性。
AI.conclusion: RING++是首个解决稀疏地图全局定位所有子任务的无学习框架，在大视角差异场景和协作应用中表现优异。

authors_text: Sander Borst,Daniel Dadush,Sophie Huiberts,Danish Kashaev
title: A nearly optimal randomized algorithm for explorable heap selection
title_zh: 用于可探索堆选择的近乎最优的随机算法
abstract: Explorable heap selection is the problem of selecting the $n$th smallest value in a binary heap. The key values can only be accessed by traversing through the underlying infinite binary tree, and the complexity of the algorithm is measured by the total distance traveled in the tree (each edge has unit cost). This problem was originally proposed as a model to study search strategies for the branch-and-bound algorithm with storage restrictions by Karp, Saks and Widgerson (FOCS '86), who gave deterministic and randomized $n\cdot \exp(O(\sqrt{\log{n}}))$ time algorithms using $O(\log(n)^{2.5})$ and $O(\sqrt{\log n})$ space respectively. We present a new randomized algorithm with running time $O(n\log(n)^3)$ using $O(\log n)$ space, substantially improving the previous best randomized running time at the expense of slightly increased space usage. We also show an $Ω(\log(n)n/\log(\log(n)))$ for any algorithm that solves the problem in the same amount of space, indicating that our algorithm is nearly optimal.
summary: Explorable heap selection is the problem of selecting the $n$th smallest value in a binary heap. The key values can only be accessed by traversing through the underlying infinite binary tree, and the complexity of the algorithm is measured by the total distance traveled in the tree (each edge has unit cost). This problem was originally proposed as a model to study search strategies for the branch-and-bound algorithm with storage restrictions by Karp, Saks and Widgerson (FOCS '86), who gave deterministic and randomized $n\cdot \exp(O(\sqrt{\log{n}}))$ time algorithms using $O(\log(n)^{2.5})$ and $O(\sqrt{\log n})$ space respectively. We present a new randomized algorithm with running time $O(n\log(n)^3)$ using $O(\log n)$ space, substantially improving the previous best randomized running time at the expense of slightly increased space usage. We also show an $Ω(\log(n)n/\log(\log(n)))$ for any algorithm that solves the problem in the same amount of space, indicating that our algorithm is nearly optimal.
abstract_zh: 可探索的堆选择是选择二叉堆中第 $n$ 个最小值的问题。键值只能通过遍历底层无限二叉树来访问，算法的复杂度通过树中行驶的总距离来衡量（每条边都有单位成本）。这个问题最初是由 Karp、Saks 和 Widgerson (FOCS '86) 提出的，作为研究具有存储限制的分支定界算法的搜索策略的模型，他们分别使用 $O(\log(n)^{2.5})$ 和 $O(\sqrt{\log n})$ 空间给出了确定性和随机的 $n\cdot \exp(O(\sqrt{\log{n}}))$ 时间算法。我们提出了一种新的随机算法，其运行时间为 $O(n\log(n)^3)$，使用 $O(\log n)$ 空间，显着提高了之前的最佳随机运行时间，但代价是稍微增加了空间使用量。我们还显示了在相同空间量中解决问题的任何算法的 $Ω(\log(n)n/\log(\log(n)))$，这表明我们的算法接近最优。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种近似最优的随机化算法，用于在可探索堆中选择第n小元素，通过减少遍历无限二叉树的总距离来优化时间复杂度。
AI.motivation: 传统堆选择算法在存储受限的分支定界搜索策略中存在时间与空间复杂度的局限性，需改进随机化算法以实现更优性能。
AI.method: 设计新的随机化算法，利用O(log n)空间将时间复杂度降至O(n log³n)，并证明了空间复杂度下界Ω(n log n / log log n)。
AI.result: 算法时间复杂度显著优于先前结果，且证明其接近理论下界，空间复杂度仅轻微增加。
AI.conclusion: 提出的算法在时间与空间复杂度间取得平衡，为可探索堆选择问题提供了近似最优解。

authors_text: Byoung Jin Choi,Myeonghun Jeong,Minchan Kim,Sung Hwan Mun,Nam Soo Kim
title: Adversarial Speaker-Consistency Learning Using Untranscribed Speech Data for Zero-Shot Multi-Speaker Text-to-Speech
title_zh: 使用未转录语音数据进行零样本多说话人文本转语音的对抗性说话人一致性学习
abstract: Several recently proposed text-to-speech (TTS) models achieved to generate the speech samples with the human-level quality in the single-speaker and multi-speaker TTS scenarios with a set of pre-defined speakers. However, synthesizing a new speaker's voice with a single reference audio, commonly known as zero-shot multi-speaker text-to-speech (ZSM-TTS), is still a very challenging task. The main challenge of ZSM-TTS is the speaker domain shift problem upon the speech generation of a new speaker. To mitigate this problem, we propose adversarial speaker-consistency learning (ASCL). The proposed method first generates an additional speech of a query speaker using the external untranscribed datasets at each training iteration. Then, the model learns to consistently generate the speech sample of the same speaker as the corresponding speaker embedding vector by employing an adversarial learning scheme. The experimental results show that the proposed method is effective compared to the baseline in terms of the quality and speaker similarity in ZSM-TTS.
summary: Several recently proposed text-to-speech (TTS) models achieved to generate the speech samples with the human-level quality in the single-speaker and multi-speaker TTS scenarios with a set of pre-defined speakers. However, synthesizing a new speaker's voice with a single reference audio, commonly known as zero-shot multi-speaker text-to-speech (ZSM-TTS), is still a very challenging task. The main challenge of ZSM-TTS is the speaker domain shift problem upon the speech generation of a new speaker. To mitigate this problem, we propose adversarial speaker-consistency learning (ASCL). The proposed method first generates an additional speech of a query speaker using the external untranscribed datasets at each training iteration. Then, the model learns to consistently generate the speech sample of the same speaker as the corresponding speaker embedding vector by employing an adversarial learning scheme. The experimental results show that the proposed method is effective compared to the baseline in terms of the quality and speaker similarity in ZSM-TTS.
abstract_zh: 最近提出的几种文本转语音 (TTS) 模型可以在具有一组预定义说话人的单说话人和多说话人 TTS 场景中生成具有人类水平质量的语音样本。然而，用单个参考音频合成新说话者的声音（通常称为零样本多说话者文本转语音 (ZSM-TTS)）仍然是一项非常具有挑战性的任务。 ZSM-TTS 的主要挑战是新说话人语音生成时的说话人域转移问题。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了对抗性说话人一致性学习（ASCL）。所提出的方法首先在每次训练迭代时使用外部未转录数据集生成查询说话者的附加语音。然后，该模型学习通过采用对抗性学习方案来一致地生成同一说话人的语音样本作为相应的说话人嵌入向量。实验结果表明，与基线相比，该方法在 ZSM-TTS 的质量和说话人相似度方面是有效的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于未转录语音数据的对抗性说话人一致性学习方法（ASCL），以解决零样本多说话人文本到语音合成（ZSM-TTS）中的说话人域偏移问题。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到语音模型在生成新说话人语音时面临域偏移挑战，尤其在仅提供单个参考音频的零样本场景下难以保持语音质量和说话人一致性。
AI.method: 通过外部未转录数据集生成查询说话人的额外语音，在训练过程中利用对抗学习框架，使模型学习根据对应的说话人嵌入向量生成一致的语音样本。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在语音质量和说话人相似性指标上优于基线模型，有效缓解了零样本多说话人语音合成中的域偏移问题。
AI.conclusion: 对抗性说话人一致性学习通过利用未转录数据和对抗训练机制，为零样本多说话人文本到语音合成提供了有效的解决方案。

authors_text: Antonio Candelieri,Andrea Ponti,Francesco Archetti
title: BORA: Bayesian Optimization for Resource Allocation
title_zh: BORA：资源分配的贝叶斯优化
abstract: Optimal resource allocation is gaining a renewed interest due its relevance as a core problem in managing, over time, cloud and high-performance computing facilities. Semi-Bandit Feedback (SBF) is the reference method for efficiently solving this problem. In this paper we propose (i) an extension of the optimal resource allocation to a more general class of problems, specifically with resources availability changing over time, and (ii) Bayesian Optimization as a more efficient alternative to SBF. Three algorithms for Bayesian Optimization for Resource Allocation, namely BORA, are presented, working on allocation decisions represented as numerical vectors or distributions. The second option required to consider the Wasserstein distance as a more suitable metric to use into one of the BORA algorithms. Results on (i) the original SBF case study proposed in the literature, and (ii) a real-life application (i.e., the optimization of multi-channel marketing) empirically prove that BORA is a more efficient and effective learning-and-optimization framework than SBF.
summary: Optimal resource allocation is gaining a renewed interest due its relevance as a core problem in managing, over time, cloud and high-performance computing facilities. Semi-Bandit Feedback (SBF) is the reference method for efficiently solving this problem. In this paper we propose (i) an extension of the optimal resource allocation to a more general class of problems, specifically with resources availability changing over time, and (ii) Bayesian Optimization as a more efficient alternative to SBF. Three algorithms for Bayesian Optimization for Resource Allocation, namely BORA, are presented, working on allocation decisions represented as numerical vectors or distributions. The second option required to consider the Wasserstein distance as a more suitable metric to use into one of the BORA algorithms. Results on (i) the original SBF case study proposed in the literature, and (ii) a real-life application (i.e., the optimization of multi-channel marketing) empirically prove that BORA is a more efficient and effective learning-and-optimization framework than SBF.
abstract_zh: 随着时间的推移，最优资源分配作为管理云和高性能计算设施的核心问题，正在重新引起人们的兴趣。半强盗反馈（SBF）是有效解决该问题的参考方法。在本文中，我们提出（i）将最优资源分配扩展到更一般的问题，特别是资源可用性随时间变化的问题，以及（ii）贝叶斯优化作为 SBF 的更有效替代方案。提出了三种资源分配贝叶斯优化算法，即 BORA，用于处理表示为数值向量或分布的分配决策。第二种选择需要将 Wasserstein 距离视为更适合用于 BORA 算法之一的度量。 (i) 文献中提出的原始 SBF 案例研究和 (ii) 实际应用（即多渠道营销的优化）的结果实证证明 BORA 是比 SBF 更高效、更有效的学习和优化框架。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BORA算法，通过贝叶斯优化解决动态资源分配问题，并与半带反馈（SBF）方法进行对比。
AI.motivation: 传统SBF方法在处理资源可用性随时间变化的问题时效率不足，需更高效的优化框架以适应云计算和高性能计算场景。
AI.method: 设计三种基于贝叶斯优化的资源分配算法（BORA），利用数值向量或分布表示分配决策，并引入Wasserstein距离作为度量指标。
AI.result: 在经典SBF案例和多渠道营销实际应用中，BORA在效率和效果上均优于SBF方法。
AI.conclusion: BORA为动态资源分配提供了更高效的学习与优化框架，适用于资源状态随时间变化的复杂场景。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出BORA算法，通过贝叶斯优化解决动态资源分配问题，并与半带反馈（SBF）方法进行对比。
ai_content.motivation: 传统SBF方法在处理资源可用性随时间变化的问题时效率不足，需更高效的优化框架以适应云计算和高性能计算场景。
ai_content.method: 设计三种基于贝叶斯优化的资源分配算法（BORA），利用数值向量或分布表示分配决策，并引入Wasserstein距离作为度量指标。
ai_content.result: 在经典SBF案例和多渠道营销实际应用中，BORA在效率和效果上均优于SBF方法。
ai_content.conclusion: BORA为动态资源分配提供了更高效的学习与优化框架，适用于资源状态随时间变化的复杂场景。

search_text: BORA: Bayesian Optimization for Resource Allocation BORA：资源分配的贝叶斯优化 Optimal resource allocation is gaining a renewed interest due its relevance as a core problem in managing, over time, cloud and high-performance computing facilities. Semi-Bandit Feedback (SBF) is the reference method for efficiently solving this problem. In this paper we propose (i) an extension of the optimal resource allocation to a more general class of problems, specifically with resources availability changing over time, and (ii) Bayesian Optimization as a more efficient alternative to SBF. Three algorithms for Bayesian Optimization for Resource Allocation, namely BORA, are presented, working on allocation decisions represented as numerical vectors or distributions. The second option required to consider the Wasserstein distance as a more suitable metric to use into one of the BORA algorithms. Results on (i) the original SBF case study proposed in the literature, and (ii) a real-life application (i.e., the optimization of multi-channel marketing) empirically prove that BORA is a more efficient and effective learning-and-optimization framework than SBF. 随着时间的推移，最优资源分配作为管理云和高性能计算设施的核心问题，正在重新引起人们的兴趣。半强盗反馈（SBF）是有效解决该问题的参考方法。在本文中，我们提出（i）将最优资源分配扩展到更一般的问题，特别是资源可用性随时间变化的问题，以及（ii）贝叶斯优化作为 SBF 的更有效替代方案。提出了三种资源分配贝叶斯优化算法，即 BORA，用于处理表示为数值向量或分布的分配决策。第二种选择需要将 Wasserstein 距离视为更适合用于 BORA 算法之一的度量。 (i) 文献中提出的原始 SBF 案例研究和 (ii) 实际应用（即多渠道营销的优化）的结果实证证明 BORA 是比 SBF 更高效、更有效的学习和优化框架。 本文提出BORA算法，通过贝叶斯优化解决动态资源分配问题，并与半带反馈（SBF）方法进行对比。 Antonio Candelieri,Andrea Ponti,Francesco Archetti cs.LG,cs.AI,math.OC

authors_text: Dong Wei,Huaijiang Sun,Bin Li,Jianfeng Lu,Weiqing Li,Xiaoning Sun,Shengxiang Hu
title: Human Joint Kinematics Diffusion-Refinement for Stochastic Motion Prediction
title_zh: 用于随机运动预测的人体关节运动学扩散细化
abstract: Stochastic human motion prediction aims to forecast multiple plausible future motions given a single pose sequence from the past. Most previous works focus on designing elaborate losses to improve the accuracy, while the diversity is typically characterized by randomly sampling a set of latent variables from the latent prior, which is then decoded into possible motions. This joint training of sampling and decoding, however, suffers from posterior collapse as the learned latent variables tend to be ignored by a strong decoder, leading to limited diversity. Alternatively, inspired by the diffusion process in nonequilibrium thermodynamics, we propose MotionDiff, a diffusion probabilistic model to treat the kinematics of human joints as heated particles, which will diffuse from original states to a noise distribution. This process offers a natural way to obtain the "whitened" latents without any trainable parameters, and human motion prediction can be regarded as the reverse diffusion process that converts the noise distribution into realistic future motions conditioned on the observed sequence. Specifically, MotionDiff consists of two parts: a spatial-temporal transformer-based diffusion network to generate diverse yet plausible motions, and a graph convolutional network to further refine the outputs. Experimental results on two datasets demonstrate that our model yields the competitive performance in terms of both accuracy and diversity.
summary: Stochastic human motion prediction aims to forecast multiple plausible future motions given a single pose sequence from the past. Most previous works focus on designing elaborate losses to improve the accuracy, while the diversity is typically characterized by randomly sampling a set of latent variables from the latent prior, which is then decoded into possible motions. This joint training of sampling and decoding, however, suffers from posterior collapse as the learned latent variables tend to be ignored by a strong decoder, leading to limited diversity. Alternatively, inspired by the diffusion process in nonequilibrium thermodynamics, we propose MotionDiff, a diffusion probabilistic model to treat the kinematics of human joints as heated particles, which will diffuse from original states to a noise distribution. This process offers a natural way to obtain the "whitened" latents without any trainable parameters, and human motion prediction can be regarded as the reverse diffusion process that converts the noise distribution into realistic future motions conditioned on the observed sequence. Specifically, MotionDiff consists of two parts: a spatial-temporal transformer-based diffusion network to generate diverse yet plausible motions, and a graph convolutional network to further refine the outputs. Experimental results on two datasets demonstrate that our model yields the competitive performance in terms of both accuracy and diversity.
abstract_zh: 随机人体运动预测旨在根据过去的单个姿势序列来预测多个可能的未来运动。以前的大多数工作都侧重于设计精心设计的损失以提高准确性，而多样性通常通过从潜在先验中随机采样一组潜在变量来表征，然后将其解码为可能的运动。然而，这种采样和解码的联合训练会遭受后验崩溃，因为学习到的潜在变量往往会被强大的解码器忽略，从而导致多样性有限。另外，受非平衡热力学中扩散过程的启发，我们提出了 MotionDiff，这是一种扩散概率模型，将人体关节的运动学视为加热粒子，该粒子将从原始状态扩散到噪声分布。这个过程提供了一种无需任何可训练参数即可获得“白化”潜伏的自然方法，并且人体运动预测可以被视为反向扩散过程，它将噪声分布转换为以观察到的序列为条件的现实的未来运动。具体来说，MotionDiff 由两部分组成：一个基于时空变换器的扩散网络，用于生成多样化但合理的运动；以及一个图卷积网络，用于进一步细化输出。两个数据集的实验结果表明，我们的模型在准确性和多样性方面都具有竞争性的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于扩散过程的随机人体运动预测方法MotionDiff，通过将关节运动学建模为热粒子扩散过程，实现多样且合理的未来运动预测。
AI.motivation: 传统方法通过随机采样潜在变量实现多样性，但存在后验坍塌问题，导致生成运动缺乏多样性；需探索更自然的潜在空间建模方式。
AI.method: 提出MotionDiff模型，包含时空Transformer扩散网络生成多样运动，及图卷积网络进行输出优化，利用扩散过程将噪声分布转化为条件化未来运动。
AI.result: 在两个数据集上实验表明，模型在准确性和多样性指标上均达到竞争性性能，有效缓解了后验坍塌问题。
AI.conclusion: 通过扩散概率模型和图卷积联合优化，实现了无需可训练参数的潜在空间白化，为人体运动预测提供了新的有效范式。

authors_text: Henry Ling-Hei Tsang,Thomas Dybdahl Ahle
title: Clustering the Sketch: A Novel Approach to Embedding Table Compression
title_zh: 对草图进行聚类：嵌入表压缩的新方法
abstract: Embedding tables are used by machine learning systems to work with categorical features. In modern Recommendation Systems, these tables can be very large, necessitating the development of new methods for fitting them in memory, even during training. We suggest Clustered Compositional Embeddings (CCE) which combines clustering-based compression like quantization to codebooks with dynamic methods like The Hashing Trick and Compositional Embeddings (Shi et al., 2020). Experimentally CCE achieves the best of both worlds: The high compression rate of codebook-based quantization, but *dynamically* like hashing-based methods, so it can be used during training. Theoretically, we prove that CCE is guaranteed to converge to the optimal codebook and give a tight bound for the number of iterations required.
summary: Embedding tables are used by machine learning systems to work with categorical features. In modern Recommendation Systems, these tables can be very large, necessitating the development of new methods for fitting them in memory, even during training. We suggest Clustered Compositional Embeddings (CCE) which combines clustering-based compression like quantization to codebooks with dynamic methods like The Hashing Trick and Compositional Embeddings (Shi et al., 2020). Experimentally CCE achieves the best of both worlds: The high compression rate of codebook-based quantization, but *dynamically* like hashing-based methods, so it can be used during training. Theoretically, we prove that CCE is guaranteed to converge to the optimal codebook and give a tight bound for the number of iterations required.
abstract_zh: 机器学习系统使用嵌入表来处理分类特征。在现代推荐系统中，这些表可能非常大，因此需要开发新方法将它们放入内存中，甚至在训练期间也是如此。我们建议使用集群组合嵌入（CCE），它将基于集群的压缩（例如量化到码本）与哈希技巧和组合嵌入等动态方法相结合（Shi et al., 2020）。实验上，CCE 实现了两全其美：基于码书的量化的高压缩率，但像基于散列的方法一样“动态”，因此可以在训练期间使用。理论上，我们证明 CCE 保证收敛到最优码本，并给出所需迭代次数的严格限制。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Clustered Compositional Embeddings (CCE)的新方法，用于高效压缩机器学习系统中的嵌入表，特别是在推荐系统中。
AI.motivation: 现代推荐系统中的嵌入表规模庞大，传统压缩方法在训练期间难以兼顾高压缩率和动态适应性，亟需一种能在训练过程中高效压缩嵌入表的方法。
AI.method: CCE结合了基于聚类的量化（如代码簿）与动态方法（如哈希技巧和组合嵌入），通过聚类生成静态代码簿并结合动态哈希实现压缩，同时保证训练期间的可扩展性。
AI.result: 实验表明，CCE在保持代码簿量化高压缩率的同时，具备哈希方法的动态性，适用于训练阶段；理论分析证明其收敛于最优代码簿并给出迭代次数的严格上界。
AI.conclusion: CCE通过融合静态聚类与动态哈希，有效解决了嵌入表压缩的内存瓶颈问题，为训练阶段的高效模型压缩提供了理论与实践支持。

search_text: Clustering the Sketch: A Novel Approach to Embedding Table Compression 对草图进行聚类：嵌入表压缩的新方法 Embedding tables are used by machine learning systems to work with categorical features. In modern Recommendation Systems, these tables can be very large, necessitating the development of new methods for fitting them in memory, even during training. We suggest Clustered Compositional Embeddings (CCE) which combines clustering-based compression like quantization to codebooks with dynamic methods like The Hashing Trick and Compositional Embeddings (Shi et al., 2020). Experimentally CCE achieves the best of both worlds: The high compression rate of codebook-based quantization, but *dynamically* like hashing-based methods, so it can be used during training. Theoretically, we prove that CCE is guaranteed to converge to the optimal codebook and give a tight bound for the number of iterations required. 机器学习系统使用嵌入表来处理分类特征。在现代推荐系统中，这些表可能非常大，因此需要开发新方法将它们放入内存中，甚至在训练期间也是如此。我们建议使用集群组合嵌入（CCE），它将基于集群的压缩（例如量化到码本）与哈希技巧和组合嵌入等动态方法相结合（Shi et al., 2020）。实验上，CCE 实现了两全其美：基于码书的量化的高压缩率，但像基于散列的方法一样“动态”，因此可以在训练期间使用。理论上，我们证明 CCE 保证收敛到最优码本，并给出所需迭代次数的严格限制。 本文提出了一种名为Clustered Compositional Embeddings (CCE)的新方法，用于高效压缩机器学习系统中的嵌入表，特别是在推荐系统中。 Henry Ling-Hei Tsang,Thomas Dybdahl Ahle cs.LG,cs.DS

authors_text: Zeyu Qin,Yanbo Fan,Yi Liu,Li Shen,Yong Zhang,Jue Wang,Baoyuan Wu
title: Boosting the Transferability of Adversarial Attacks with Reverse Adversarial Perturbation
title_zh: 通过反向对抗性扰动增强对抗性攻击的可转移性
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have been shown to be vulnerable to adversarial examples, which can produce erroneous predictions by injecting imperceptible perturbations. In this work, we study the transferability of adversarial examples, which is significant due to its threat to real-world applications where model architecture or parameters are usually unknown. Many existing works reveal that the adversarial examples are likely to overfit the surrogate model that they are generated from, limiting its transfer attack performance against different target models. To mitigate the overfitting of the surrogate model, we propose a novel attack method, dubbed reverse adversarial perturbation (RAP). Specifically, instead of minimizing the loss of a single adversarial point, we advocate seeking adversarial example located at a region with unified low loss value, by injecting the worst-case perturbation (the reverse adversarial perturbation) for each step of the optimization procedure. The adversarial attack with RAP is formulated as a min-max bi-level optimization problem. By integrating RAP into the iterative process for attacks, our method can find more stable adversarial examples which are less sensitive to the changes of decision boundary, mitigating the overfitting of the surrogate model. Comprehensive experimental comparisons demonstrate that RAP can significantly boost adversarial transferability. Furthermore, RAP can be naturally combined with many existing black-box attack techniques, to further boost the transferability. When attacking a real-world image recognition system, Google Cloud Vision API, we obtain 22% performance improvement of targeted attacks over the compared method. Our codes are available at https://github.com/SCLBD/Transfer_attack_RAP.
summary: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have been shown to be vulnerable to adversarial examples, which can produce erroneous predictions by injecting imperceptible perturbations. In this work, we study the transferability of adversarial examples, which is significant due to its threat to real-world applications where model architecture or parameters are usually unknown. Many existing works reveal that the adversarial examples are likely to overfit the surrogate model that they are generated from, limiting its transfer attack performance against different target models. To mitigate the overfitting of the surrogate model, we propose a novel attack method, dubbed reverse adversarial perturbation (RAP). Specifically, instead of minimizing the loss of a single adversarial point, we advocate seeking adversarial example located at a region with unified low loss value, by injecting the worst-case perturbation (the reverse adversarial perturbation) for each step of the optimization procedure. The adversarial attack with RAP is formulated as a min-max bi-level optimization problem. By integrating RAP into the iterative process for attacks, our method can find more stable adversarial examples which are less sensitive to the changes of decision boundary, mitigating the overfitting of the surrogate model. Comprehensive experimental comparisons demonstrate that RAP can significantly boost adversarial transferability. Furthermore, RAP can be naturally combined with many existing black-box attack techniques, to further boost the transferability. When attacking a real-world image recognition system, Google Cloud Vision API, we obtain 22% performance improvement of targeted attacks over the compared method. Our codes are available at https://github.com/SCLBD/Transfer_attack_RAP.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 已被证明容易受到对抗性示例的影响，这些示例可能会通过注入难以察觉的扰动而产生错误的预测。在这项工作中，我们研究了对抗性示例的可转移性，这很重要，因为它对模型架构或参数通常未知的现实世界应用程序构成威胁。许多现有的工作表明，对抗性示例可能会过度拟合生成它们的代理模型，从而限制其针对不同目标模型的转移攻击性能。为了减轻代理模型的过度拟合，我们提出了一种新颖的攻击方法，称为反向对抗扰动（RAP）。具体来说，我们不主张最小化单个对抗点的损失，而是主张通过为优化过程的每一步注入最坏情况的扰动（反向对抗性扰动）来寻找位于具有统一低损失值的区域的对抗性示例。 RAP 的对抗性攻击被表述为最小-最大双层优化问题。通过将 RAP 集成到攻击的迭代过程中，我们的方法可以找到更稳定的对抗性示例，这些示例对决策边界的变化不太敏感，从而减轻代理模型的过度拟合。全面的实验比较表明，RAP 可以显着提高对抗性可转移性。此外，RAP可以自然地与许多现有的黑盒攻击技术结合，进一步提高可转移性。当攻击现实世界的图像识别系统 Google Cloud Vision API 时，我们的目标攻击性能比对比方法提高了 22%。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/SCLBD/Transfer_attack_RAP 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为反向对抗扰动（RAP）的新方法，旨在提升对抗样本在不同目标模型间的迁移性。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗攻击方法容易过拟合代理模型，导致迁移攻击效果受限，需解决此问题以提升跨模型攻击能力。
AI.method: 通过在优化过程中注入最坏情况扰动（反向对抗扰动），将攻击问题建模为最小-最大双层优化问题，寻找低损失区域的稳定对抗样本。
AI.result: 实验表明RAP显著提升迁移性，在攻击Google Cloud Vision API时目标攻击性能提升22%，且可与多种现有黑盒攻击技术结合。
AI.conclusion: RAP有效缓解代理模型过拟合问题，显著增强对抗攻击的迁移能力，为实际应用提供可行方案。

authors_text: Loay Mualem,Moran Feldman
title: Resolving the Approximability of Offline and Online Non-monotone DR-Submodular Maximization over General Convex Sets
title_zh: 求解一般凸集上的离线和在线非单调 DR 子模最大化的逼近性
abstract: In recent years, maximization of DR-submodular continuous functions became an important research field, with many real-worlds applications in the domains of machine learning, communication systems, operation research and economics. Most of the works in this field study maximization subject to down-closed convex set constraints due to an inapproximability result by Vondrák (2013). However, Durr et al. (2021) showed that one can bypass this inapproximability by proving approximation ratios that are functions of $m$, the minimum $\ell_{\infty}$-norm of any feasible vector. Given this observation, it is possible to get results for maximizing a DR-submodular function subject to general convex set constraints, which has led to multiple works on this problem. The most recent of which is a polynomial time $\tfrac{1}{4}(1 - m)$-approximation offline algorithm due to Du (2022). However, only a sub-exponential time $\tfrac{1}{3\sqrt{3}}(1 - m)$-approximation algorithm is known for the corresponding online problem. In this work, we present a polynomial time online algorithm matching the $\tfrac{1}{4}(1 - m)$-approximation of the state-of-the-art offline algorithm. We also present an inapproximability result showing that our online algorithm and Du's (2022) offline algorithm are both optimal in a strong sense. Finally, we study the empirical performance of our algorithm and the algorithm of Du (which was only theoretically studied previously), and show that they consistently outperform previously suggested algorithms on revenue maximization, location summarization and quadratic programming applications.
summary: In recent years, maximization of DR-submodular continuous functions became an important research field, with many real-worlds applications in the domains of machine learning, communication systems, operation research and economics. Most of the works in this field study maximization subject to down-closed convex set constraints due to an inapproximability result by Vondrák (2013). However, Durr et al. (2021) showed that one can bypass this inapproximability by proving approximation ratios that are functions of $m$, the minimum $\ell_{\infty}$-norm of any feasible vector. Given this observation, it is possible to get results for maximizing a DR-submodular function subject to general convex set constraints, which has led to multiple works on this problem. The most recent of which is a polynomial time $\tfrac{1}{4}(1 - m)$-approximation offline algorithm due to Du (2022). However, only a sub-exponential time $\tfrac{1}{3\sqrt{3}}(1 - m)$-approximation algorithm is known for the corresponding online problem. In this work, we present a polynomial time online algorithm matching the $\tfrac{1}{4}(1 - m)$-approximation of the state-of-the-art offline algorithm. We also present an inapproximability result showing that our online algorithm and Du's (2022) offline algorithm are both optimal in a strong sense. Finally, we study the empirical performance of our algorithm and the algorithm of Du (which was only theoretically studied previously), and show that they consistently outperform previously suggested algorithms on revenue maximization, location summarization and quadratic programming applications.
abstract_zh: 近年来，DR子模连续函数的最大化成为一个重要的研究领域，在机器学习、通信系统、运筹学和经济学领域有许多实际应用。由于 Vondrák (2013) 的不可逼近性结果，该领域的大多数工作研究最大化都受到下闭凸集约束。然而，杜尔等人。 （2021）表明，可以通过证明近似比率来绕过这种不可近似性，该近似比率是 $m$ 的函数，$m$ 是任何可行向量的最小 $\ell_{\infty}$ 范数。鉴于这一观察，有可能获得在一般凸集约束下最大化 DR 子模函数的结果，这导致了针对该问题的多项工作。其中最新的是 Du (2022) 提出的多项式时间 $\tfrac{1}{4}(1 - m)$ 近似离线算法。然而，对于相应的在线问题，仅已知次指数时间 $\tfrac{1}{3\sqrt{3}}(1 - m)$ 近似算法。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种多项式时间在线算法，与最先进的离线算法的 $\tfrac{1}{4}(1 - m)$ 近似相匹配。我们还提出了一个不可近似性结果，表明我们的在线算法和 Du（2022）离线算法在强意义上都是最优的。最后，我们研究了我们的算法和 Du 算法（之前仅在理论上研究过）的实证性能，并表明它们在收入最大化、位置汇总和二次规划应用方面始终优于之前建议的算法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在一般凸集约束下非单调DR-子模函数的离线和在线最大化问题，提出了多项式时间在线算法并证明其最优性。
AI.motivation: 尽管离线算法已取得1/4(1−m)近似比，但在线问题仅存在次指数时间算法，且缺乏理论最优性证明，需填补这一研究空白。
AI.method: 设计多项式时间在线算法匹配离线近似比，并通过不可近似性证明算法最优性；同时在实际应用中验证算法效果。
AI.result: 提出多项式时间在线算法达到1/4(1−m)近似比，证明算法与离线算法均最优，并在实际案例中表现优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文算法在理论保证和实际性能上均优于现有方案，为DR-子模最大化问题提供了完整解决方案。

Finally, we study the empirical performance of our algorithm and the algorithm of Du (which was only theoretically studied previously), and show that they consistently outperform previously suggested algorithms on revenue maximization, location summarization and quadratic programming applications. 近年来，DR子模连续函数的最大化成为一个重要的研究领域，在机器学习、通信系统、运筹学和经济学领域有许多实际应用。由于 Vondrák (2013) 的不可逼近性结果，该领域的大多数工作研究最大化都受到下闭凸集约束。然而，杜尔等人。 （2021）表明，可以通过证明近似比率来绕过这种不可近似性，该近似比率是 $m$ 的函数，$m$ 是任何可行向量的最小 $\ell_{\infty}$ 范数。鉴于这一观察，有可能获得在一般凸集约束下最大化 DR 子模函数的结果，这导致了针对该问题的多项工作。其中最新的是 Du (2022) 提出的多项式时间 $\tfrac{1}{4}(1 - m)$ 近似离线算法。然而，对于相应的在线问题，仅已知次指数时间 $\tfrac{1}{3\sqrt{3}}(1 - m)$ 近似算法。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种多项式时间在线算法，与最先进的离线算法的 $\tfrac{1}{4}(1 - m)$ 近似相匹配。我们还提出了一个不可近似性结果，表明我们的在线算法和 Du（2022）离线算法在强意义上都是最优的。最后，我们研究了我们的算法和 Du 算法（之前仅在理论上研究过）的实证性能，并表明它们在收入最大化、位置汇总和二次规划应用方面始终优于之前建议的算法。 本文研究了在一般凸集约束下非单调DR-子模函数的离线和在线最大化问题，提出了多项式时间在线算法并证明其最优性。 Loay Mualem,Moran Feldman cs.DS,cs.LG

authors_text: Lin Zhou,Haoming Cai,Jinjin Gu,Zheyuan Li,Yingqi Liu,Xiangyu Chen,Yu Qiao,Chao Dong
title: Efficient Image Super-Resolution using Vast-Receptive-Field Attention
title_zh: 使用广阔感受野注意力的高效图像超分辨率
abstract: The attention mechanism plays a pivotal role in designing advanced super-resolution (SR) networks. In this work, we design an efficient SR network by improving the attention mechanism. We start from a simple pixel attention module and gradually modify it to achieve better super-resolution performance with reduced parameters. The specific approaches include: (1) increasing the receptive field of the attention branch, (2) replacing large dense convolution kernels with depth-wise separable convolutions, and (3) introducing pixel normalization. These approaches paint a clear evolutionary roadmap for the design of attention mechanisms. Based on these observations, we propose VapSR, the VAst-receptive-field Pixel attention network. Experiments demonstrate the superior performance of VapSR. VapSR outperforms the present lightweight networks with even fewer parameters. And the light version of VapSR can use only 21.68% and 28.18% parameters of IMDB and RFDN to achieve similar performances to those networks. The code and models are available at https://github.com/zhoumumu/VapSR.
summary: The attention mechanism plays a pivotal role in designing advanced super-resolution (SR) networks. In this work, we design an efficient SR network by improving the attention mechanism. We start from a simple pixel attention module and gradually modify it to achieve better super-resolution performance with reduced parameters. The specific approaches include: (1) increasing the receptive field of the attention branch, (2) replacing large dense convolution kernels with depth-wise separable convolutions, and (3) introducing pixel normalization. These approaches paint a clear evolutionary roadmap for the design of attention mechanisms. Based on these observations, we propose VapSR, the VAst-receptive-field Pixel attention network. Experiments demonstrate the superior performance of VapSR. VapSR outperforms the present lightweight networks with even fewer parameters. And the light version of VapSR can use only 21.68% and 28.18% parameters of IMDB and RFDN to achieve similar performances to those networks. The code and models are available at https://github.com/zhoumumu/VapSR.
abstract_zh: 注意力机制在设计高级超分辨率（SR）网络中起着关键作用。在这项工作中，我们通过改进注意力机制设计了一个高效的SR网络。我们从一个简单的像素注意力模块开始，逐步修改它，以减少参数来实现更好的超分辨率性能。具体方法包括：（1）增加注意力分支的感受野，（2）用深度可分离卷积替换大型密集卷积核，（3）引入像素归一化。这些方法为注意力机制的设计描绘了清晰的进化路线图。基于这些观察，我们提出了 VapSR，即 VAst 感受野像素注意力网络。实验证明了VapSR的优越性能。 VapSR 的性能优于目前的轻量级网络，参数甚至更少。而轻量级的 VapSR 只能使用 IMDB 和 RFDN 21.68% 和 28.18% 的参数来实现与这些网络相似的性能。代码和模型可在https://github.com/zhoumumu/VapSR获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效图像超分辨率网络VapSR，通过改进注意力机制实现参数减少且性能优越的超分辨率效果。
AI.motivation: 现有超分辨率网络中注意力机制存在参数冗余、效率不足的问题，需设计更高效的注意力模块以平衡性能与计算成本。
AI.method: 通过逐步改进像素注意力模块：1) 扩大注意力分支的感受野，2) 用深度可分离卷积替代密集卷积核，3) 引入像素归一化，最终构建VapSR网络。
AI.result: VapSR在参数量仅为IMDB(21.68%)和RFDN(28.18%)的情况下，达到相近的超分性能，代码和模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: VapSR通过系统性改进注意力机制设计，验证了大感受野像素注意力在高效超分辨率任务中的有效性，为轻量网络设计提供新思路。

authors_text: Jian Kang,Qinghai Zhou,Hanghang Tong
title: JuryGCN: Quantifying Jackknife Uncertainty on Graph Convolutional Networks
title_zh: JuryGCN：量化图卷积网络上的 Jackknife 不确定性
abstract: Graph Convolutional Network (GCN) has exhibited strong empirical performance in many real-world applications. The vast majority of existing works on GCN primarily focus on the accuracy while ignoring how confident or uncertain a GCN is with respect to its predictions. Despite being a cornerstone of trustworthy graph mining, uncertainty quantification on GCN has not been well studied and the scarce existing efforts either fail to provide deterministic quantification or have to change the training procedure of GCN by introducing additional parameters or architectures. In this paper, we propose the first frequentist-based approach named JuryGCN in quantifying the uncertainty of GCN, where the key idea is to quantify the uncertainty of a node as the width of confidence interval by a jackknife estimator. Moreover, we leverage the influence functions to estimate the change in GCN parameters without re-training to scale up the computation. The proposed JuryGCN is capable of quantifying uncertainty deterministically without modifying the GCN architecture or introducing additional parameters. We perform extensive experimental evaluation on real-world datasets in the tasks of both active learning and semi-supervised node classification, which demonstrate the efficacy of the proposed method.
summary: Graph Convolutional Network (GCN) has exhibited strong empirical performance in many real-world applications. The vast majority of existing works on GCN primarily focus on the accuracy while ignoring how confident or uncertain a GCN is with respect to its predictions. Despite being a cornerstone of trustworthy graph mining, uncertainty quantification on GCN has not been well studied and the scarce existing efforts either fail to provide deterministic quantification or have to change the training procedure of GCN by introducing additional parameters or architectures. In this paper, we propose the first frequentist-based approach named JuryGCN in quantifying the uncertainty of GCN, where the key idea is to quantify the uncertainty of a node as the width of confidence interval by a jackknife estimator. Moreover, we leverage the influence functions to estimate the change in GCN parameters without re-training to scale up the computation. The proposed JuryGCN is capable of quantifying uncertainty deterministically without modifying the GCN architecture or introducing additional parameters. We perform extensive experimental evaluation on real-world datasets in the tasks of both active learning and semi-supervised node classification, which demonstrate the efficacy of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 图卷积网络（GCN）在许多实际应用中表现出了强大的经验性能。 GCN 现有的绝大多数工作主要关注准确性，而忽略了 GCN 对其预测的信心或不确定性。尽管是值得信赖的图挖掘的基石，但 GCN 的不确定性量化尚未得到充分研究，现有的工作要么无法提供确定性量化，要么必须通过引入额外的参数或架构来改变 GCN 的训练过程。在本文中，我们提出了第一个基于频率论的方法 JuryGCN 来量化 GCN 的不确定性，其关键思想是通过折刀估计器将节点的不确定性量化为置信区间的宽度。此外，我们利用影响函数来估计 GCN 参数的变化，而无需重新训练来扩大计算规模。所提出的 JuryGCN 能够确定性地量化不确定性，而无需修改 GCN 架构或引入额外的参数。我们在主动学习和半监督节点分类任务中对现实世界数据集进行了广泛的实验评估，这证明了所提出方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出JuryGCN方法，用于在图卷积网络（GCN）中确定性地量化预测不确定性，无需修改网络结构或引入额外参数。
AI.motivation: 现有GCN研究过度关注预测准确性，而忽视了模型预测的置信度评估，且现有不确定性量化方法存在需修改训练流程或引入新参数的缺陷。
AI.method: 基于频率学派思想，通过Jackknife估计器计算节点预测的置信区间宽度量化不确定性，并利用影响函数估计参数变化以提升计算效率。
AI.result: 在多个真实世界数据集的主动学习和半监督节点分类任务中验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: JuryGCN为GCN提供了首个无需架构修改的确定性不确定性量化方案，具有实际应用价值。

The vast majority of existing works on GCN primarily focus on the accuracy while ignoring how confident or uncertain a GCN is with respect to its predictions. Despite being a cornerstone of trustworthy graph mining, uncertainty quantification on GCN has not been well studied and the scarce existing efforts either fail to provide deterministic quantification or have to change the training procedure of GCN by introducing additional parameters or architectures. In this paper, we propose the first frequentist-based approach named JuryGCN in quantifying the uncertainty of GCN, where the key idea is to quantify the uncertainty of a node as the width of confidence interval by a jackknife estimator. Moreover, we leverage the influence functions to estimate the change in GCN parameters without re-training to scale up the computation. The proposed JuryGCN is capable of quantifying uncertainty deterministically without modifying the GCN architecture or introducing additional parameters. authors_text: Zhiying Lu,Hongtao Xie,Chuanbin Liu,Yongdong Zhang
title: Bridging the Gap Between Vision Transformers and Convolutional Neural Networks on Small Datasets
title_zh: 在小数据集上缩小视觉变压器和卷积神经网络之间的差距
comment: Fix the bug when calculating FLOPs of the models
comments: Fix the bug when calculating FLOPs of the models
abstract: There still remains an extreme performance gap between Vision Transformers (ViTs) and Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) when training from scratch on small datasets, which is concluded to the lack of inductive bias. In this paper, we further consider this problem and point out two weaknesses of ViTs in inductive biases, that is, the spatial relevance and diverse channel representation. First, on spatial aspect, objects are locally compact and relevant, thus fine-grained feature needs to be extracted from a token and its neighbors. While the lack of data hinders ViTs to attend the spatial relevance. Second, on channel aspect, representation exhibits diversity on different channels. But the scarce data can not enable ViTs to learn strong enough representation for accurate recognition. To this end, we propose Dynamic Hybrid Vision Transformer (DHVT) as the solution to enhance the two inductive biases. On spatial aspect, we adopt a hybrid structure, in which convolution is integrated into patch embedding and multi-layer perceptron module, forcing the model to capture the token features as well as their neighboring features. On channel aspect, we introduce a dynamic feature aggregation module in MLP and a brand new "head token" design in multi-head self-attention module to help re-calibrate channel representation and make different channel group representation interacts with each other. The fusion of weak channel representation forms a strong enough representation for classification. With this design, we successfully eliminate the performance gap between CNNs and ViTs, and our DHVT achieves a series of state-of-the-art performance with a lightweight model, 85.68% on CIFAR-100 with 22.8M parameters, 82.3% on ImageNet-1K with 24.0M parameters. Code is available at https://github.com/ArieSeirack/DHVT.
summary: There still remains an extreme performance gap between Vision Transformers (ViTs) and Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) when training from scratch on small datasets, which is concluded to the lack of inductive bias. In this paper, we further consider this problem and point out two weaknesses of ViTs in inductive biases, that is, the spatial relevance and diverse channel representation. First, on spatial aspect, objects are locally compact and relevant, thus fine-grained feature needs to be extracted from a token and its neighbors. While the lack of data hinders ViTs to attend the spatial relevance. Second, on channel aspect, representation exhibits diversity on different channels. But the scarce data can not enable ViTs to learn strong enough representation for accurate recognition. To this end, we propose Dynamic Hybrid Vision Transformer (DHVT) as the solution to enhance the two inductive biases. On spatial aspect, we adopt a hybrid structure, in which convolution is integrated into patch embedding and multi-layer perceptron module, forcing the model to capture the token features as well as their neighboring features. On channel aspect, we introduce a dynamic feature aggregation module in MLP and a brand new "head token" design in multi-head self-attention module to help re-calibrate channel representation and make different channel group representation interacts with each other. The fusion of weak channel representation forms a strong enough representation for classification. With this design, we successfully eliminate the performance gap between CNNs and ViTs, and our DHVT achieves a series of state-of-the-art performance with a lightweight model, 85.68% on CIFAR-100 with 22.8M parameters, 82.3% on ImageNet-1K with 24.0M parameters. Code is available at https://github.com/ArieSeirack/DHVT.
abstract_zh: 在小数据集上从头开始训练时，视觉变换器（ViT）和卷积神经网络（CNN）之间仍然存在极大的性能差距，其结论是缺乏归纳偏差。在本文中，我们进一步考虑了这个问题，并指出了 ViT 在归纳偏差方面的两个弱点，即空间相关性和多样化的通道表示。首先，在空间方面，对象是局部紧凑且相关的，因此需要从标记及其邻居中提取细粒度特征。而数据的缺乏阻碍了 ViT 关注空间相关性。其次，在渠道方面，不同渠道的代表性表现出多样性。但稀缺的数据无法使 ViT 学习足够强的表示来进行准确识别。为此，我们提出动态混合视觉变压器（DHVT）作为增强两个感应偏置的解决方案。在空间方面，我们采用混合结构，其中卷积被集成到补丁嵌入和多层感知器模块中，迫使模型捕获令牌特征及其邻近特征。在通道方面，我们在MLP中引入了动态特征聚合模块，并在多头自注意力模块中引入了全新的“头令牌”设计，以帮助重新校准通道表示并使不同通道组表示相互交互。弱通道表示的融合形成了足够强的分类表示。通过这种设计，我们成功消除了 CNN 和 ViT 之间的性能差距，并且我们的 DHVT 通过轻量级模型实现了一系列最先进的性能，在具有 2280 万个参数的 CIFAR-100 上达到了 85.68%，在具有 2400 万个参数的 ImageNet-1K 上达到了 82.3%。代码可在 https://github.com/ArieSeirack/DHVT 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决视觉变换器（ViTs）与卷积神经网络（CNNs）在小数据集上的性能差距问题。
AI.motivation: ViTs在小数据集上表现不佳，因其缺乏空间相关性和通道表示的归纳偏置，导致特征提取能力不足。
AI.method: 提出动态混合视觉变换器（DHVT），通过混合结构整合卷积操作，并引入动态特征聚合模块和‘头标记’设计，增强空间局部性和通道多样性。
AI.result: DHVT在CIFAR-100上达到85.68%准确率（22.8M参数），在ImageNet-1K上达到82.3%（24.0M参数），消除CNN与ViT的性能差距。
AI.conclusion: DHVT通过增强归纳偏置，在小数据集上实现轻量级模型的最先进性能，有效弥合了ViTs与CNNs的差距。

search_text: Bridging the Gap Between Vision Transformers and Convolutional Neural Networks on Small Datasets 在小数据集上缩小视觉变压器和卷积神经网络之间的差距 There still remains an extreme performance gap between Vision Transformers (ViTs) and Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) when training from scratch on small datasets, which is concluded to the lack of inductive bias. In this paper, we further consider this problem and point out two weaknesses of ViTs in inductive biases, that is, the spatial relevance and diverse channel representation. First, on spatial aspect, objects are locally compact and relevant, thus fine-grained feature needs to be extracted from a token and its neighbors. While the lack of data hinders ViTs to attend the spatial relevance. Second, on channel aspect, representation exhibits diversity on different channels. But the scarce data can not enable ViTs to learn strong enough representation for accurate recognition. To this end, we propose Dynamic Hybrid Vision Transformer (DHVT) as the solution to enhance the two inductive biases. On spatial aspect, we adopt a hybrid structure, in which convolution is integrated into patch embedding and multi-layer perceptron module, forcing the model to capture the token features as well as their neighboring features. On channel aspect, we introduce a dynamic feature aggregation module in MLP and a brand new "head token" design in multi-head self-attention module to help re-calibrate channel representation and make different channel group representation interacts with each other. The fusion of weak channel representation forms a strong enough representation for classification. With this design, we successfully eliminate the performance gap between CNNs and ViTs, and our DHVT achieves a series of state-of-the-art performance with a lightweight model, 85.68% on CIFAR-100 with 22.8M parameters, 82.3% on ImageNet-1K with 24.0M parameters. Code is available at https://github.com/ArieSeirack/DHVT. 在小数据集上从头开始训练时，视觉变换器（ViT）和卷积神经网络（CNN）之间仍然存在极大的性能差距，其结论是缺乏归纳偏差。在本文中，我们进一步考虑了这个问题，并指出了 ViT 在归纳偏差方面的两个弱点，即空间相关性和多样化的通道表示。首先，在空间方面，对象是局部紧凑且相关的，因此需要从标记及其邻居中提取细粒度特征。而数据的缺乏阻碍了 ViT 关注空间相关性。其次，在渠道方面，不同渠道的代表性表现出多样性。但稀缺的数据无法使 ViT 学习足够强的表示来进行准确识别。为此，我们提出动态混合视觉变压器（DHVT）作为增强两个感应偏置的解决方案。在空间方面，我们采用混合结构，其中卷积被集成到补丁嵌入和多层感知器模块中，迫使模型捕获令牌特征及其邻近特征。在通道方面，我们在MLP中引入了动态特征聚合模块，并在多头自注意力模块中引入了全新的“头令牌”设计，以帮助重新校准通道表示并使不同通道组表示相互交互。弱通道表示的融合形成了足够强的分类表示。通过这种设计，我们成功消除了 CNN 和 ViT 之间的性能差距，并且我们的 DHVT 通过轻量级模型实现了一系列最先进的性能，在具有 2280 万个参数的 CIFAR-100 上达到了 85.68%，在具有 2400 万个参数的 ImageNet-1K 上达到了 82.3%。代码可在 https://github.com/ArieSeirack/DHVT 获取。 本文旨在解决视觉变换器（ViTs）与卷积神经网络（CNNs）在小数据集上的性能差距问题。 Zhiying Lu,Hongtao Xie,Chuanbin Liu,Yongdong Zhang cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Yibo Yang,Hong Wang,Haobo Yuan,Zhouchen Lin
title: Towards Theoretically Inspired Neural Initialization Optimization
title_zh: 走向理论启发的神经初始化优化
abstract: Automated machine learning has been widely explored to reduce human efforts in designing neural architectures and looking for proper hyperparameters. In the domain of neural initialization, however, similar automated techniques have rarely been studied. Most existing initialization methods are handcrafted and highly dependent on specific architectures. In this paper, we propose a differentiable quantity, named GradCosine, with theoretical insights to evaluate the initial state of a neural network. Specifically, GradCosine is the cosine similarity of sample-wise gradients with respect to the initialized parameters. By analyzing the sample-wise optimization landscape, we show that both the training and test performance of a network can be improved by maximizing GradCosine under gradient norm constraint. Based on this observation, we further propose the neural initialization optimization (NIO) algorithm. Generalized from the sample-wise analysis into the real batch setting, NIO is able to automatically look for a better initialization with negligible cost compared with the training time. With NIO, we improve the classification performance of a variety of neural architectures on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and ImageNet. Moreover, we find that our method can even help to train large vision Transformer architecture without warmup.
summary: Automated machine learning has been widely explored to reduce human efforts in designing neural architectures and looking for proper hyperparameters. In the domain of neural initialization, however, similar automated techniques have rarely been studied. Most existing initialization methods are handcrafted and highly dependent on specific architectures. In this paper, we propose a differentiable quantity, named GradCosine, with theoretical insights to evaluate the initial state of a neural network. Specifically, GradCosine is the cosine similarity of sample-wise gradients with respect to the initialized parameters. By analyzing the sample-wise optimization landscape, we show that both the training and test performance of a network can be improved by maximizing GradCosine under gradient norm constraint. Based on this observation, we further propose the neural initialization optimization (NIO) algorithm. Generalized from the sample-wise analysis into the real batch setting, NIO is able to automatically look for a better initialization with negligible cost compared with the training time. With NIO, we improve the classification performance of a variety of neural architectures on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and ImageNet. Moreover, we find that our method can even help to train large vision Transformer architecture without warmup.
abstract_zh: 自动化机器学习已被广​​泛探索，以减少人类设计神经架构和寻找合适的超参数的工作量。然而，在神经初始化领域，类似的自动化技术很少被研究。大多数现有的初始化方法都是手工设计的，并且高度依赖于特定的体系结构。在本文中，我们提出了一个名为 GradCosine 的可微量，它具有评估神经网络初始状态的理论见解。具体来说，GradCosine 是样本梯度相对于初始化参数的余弦相似度。通过分析样本优化情况，我们表明可以通过在梯度范数约束下最大化 GradCosine 来提高网络的训练和测试性能。基于这一观察，我们进一步提出了神经初始化优化（NIO）算法。从样本分析推广到真正的批量设置，NIO 能够自动寻找更好的初始化，与训练时间相比，成本可以忽略不计。借助 NIO，我们提高了 CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100 和 ImageNet 上各种神经架构的分类性能。此外，我们发现我们的方法甚至可以帮助训练大型视觉 Transformer 架构而无需预热。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于理论分析的神经网络初始化优化方法，通过改进初始化状态提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络初始化方法依赖人工设计且难以适应不同架构，缺乏自动化优化手段。
AI.method: 提出可微分指标GradCosine（样本梯度余弦相似度），在梯度范数约束下最大化该指标，设计神经初始化优化算法（NIO）自动寻找更优初始化。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10/100和ImageNet数据集上提升多种网络架构分类性能，并成功训练大型视觉Transformer而无需预热阶段。
AI.conclusion: 理论驱动的初始化优化方法能有效提升模型性能，为自动化机器学习提供新思路。

authors_text: Chak Fong Chong,Yapeng Wang,Benjamin Ng,Wuman Luo,Xu Yang
title: Image Projective Transformation Rectification with Synthetic Data for Smartphone-captured Chest X-ray Photos Classification
title_zh: 使用合成数据进行图像投影变换校正，用于智能手机捕获的胸部 X 射线照片分类
abstract: Classification on smartphone-captured chest X-ray (CXR) photos to detect pathologies is challenging due to the projective transformation caused by the non-ideal camera position. Recently, various rectification methods have been proposed for different photo rectification tasks such as document photos, license plate photos, etc. Unfortunately, we found that none of them is suitable for CXR photos, due to their specific transformation type, image appearance, annotation type, etc. In this paper, we propose an innovative deep learning-based Projective Transformation Rectification Network (PTRN) to automatically rectify CXR photos by predicting the projective transformation matrix. To the best of our knowledge, it is the first work to predict the projective transformation matrix as the learning goal for photo rectification. Additionally, to avoid the expensive collection of natural data, synthetic CXR photos are generated under the consideration of natural perturbations, extra screens, etc. We evaluate the proposed approach in the CheXphoto smartphone-captured CXR photos classification competition hosted by the Stanford University Machine Learning Group, our approach won first place with a huge performance improvement (ours 0.850, second-best 0.762, in AUC). A deeper study demonstrates that the use of PTRN successfully achieves the classification performance on the spatially transformed CXR photos to the same level as on the high-quality digital CXR images, indicating PTRN can eliminate all negative impacts of projective transformation on the CXR photos.
summary: Classification on smartphone-captured chest X-ray (CXR) photos to detect pathologies is challenging due to the projective transformation caused by the non-ideal camera position. Recently, various rectification methods have been proposed for different photo rectification tasks such as document photos, license plate photos, etc. Unfortunately, we found that none of them is suitable for CXR photos, due to their specific transformation type, image appearance, annotation type, etc. In this paper, we propose an innovative deep learning-based Projective Transformation Rectification Network (PTRN) to automatically rectify CXR photos by predicting the projective transformation matrix. To the best of our knowledge, it is the first work to predict the projective transformation matrix as the learning goal for photo rectification. Additionally, to avoid the expensive collection of natural data, synthetic CXR photos are generated under the consideration of natural perturbations, extra screens, etc. We evaluate the proposed approach in the CheXphoto smartphone-captured CXR photos classification competition hosted by the Stanford University Machine Learning Group, our approach won first place with a huge performance improvement (ours 0.850, second-best 0.762, in AUC). A deeper study demonstrates that the use of PTRN successfully achieves the classification performance on the spatially transformed CXR photos to the same level as on the high-quality digital CXR images, indicating PTRN can eliminate all negative impacts of projective transformation on the CXR photos.
abstract_zh: 由于不理想的相机位置引起的投影变换，对智能手机拍摄的胸部 X 射线 (CXR) 照片进行分类以检测病理状况具有挑战性。最近，针对文档照片、车牌照片等不同的照片校正任务提出了各种校正方法。不幸的是，由于其特定的变换类型、图像外观、注释类型等，我们发现它们都不适合 CXR 照片。在本文中，我们提出了一种创新的基于深度学习的投影变换校正网络（PTRN），通过预测投影变换矩阵来自动校正 CXR 照片。据我们所知，这是第一个以预测投影变换矩阵作为照片校正的学习目标的工作。此外，为了避免昂贵的自然数据收集，在考虑自然扰动、额外屏幕等的情况下生成合成的 CXR 照片。我们在斯坦福大学机器学习小组主办的 CheXphoto 智能手机捕获的 CXR 照片分类竞赛中评估了所提出的方法，我们的方法以巨大的性能改进赢得了第一名（我们的 0.850，第二好的 0.762，AUC）。更深入的研究表明，使用 PTRN 成功地将空间变换的 CXR 照片的分类性能达到与高质量数字 CXR 图像相同的水平，这表明 PTRN 可以消除投影变换对 CXR 照片的所有负面影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的投影变换校正网络（PTRN），用于矫正智能手机拍摄的胸部X光照片，以提高病理分类的准确性。
AI.motivation: 智能手机拍摄的胸部X光照片由于非理想拍摄位置导致投影变换，使得病理分类变得困难。现有的校正方法不适用于胸部X光照片，因此需要一种新的方法。
AI.method: 提出了一种深度学习的投影变换校正网络（PTRN），通过预测投影变换矩阵来自动校正胸部X光照片。同时生成合成的胸部X光照片以避免昂贵的自然数据收集。
AI.result: 在斯坦福大学举办的CheXphoto竞赛中，该方法取得了第一名，AUC值为0.850，显著优于第二名的0.762。研究表明，PTRN能够使校正后的胸部X光照片分类性能达到高质量数字胸部X光图像的水平。
AI.conclusion: PTRN成功消除了投影变换对胸部X光照片的负面影响，为智能手机拍摄的胸部X光照片分类提供了有效的解决方案。
